1621b263.title: Cloud Advisor
1621b263.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Advisor
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Advise stakeholders on best practices to shape cloud transformations. Deliver consulting services focused on agile, scalable cloud architectures and solutions.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Cloud Strategy and Assessment
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 We are seeking a strategic and delivery\-focused Cloud Advisory Consultant to lead enterprise\-scale cloud transformation engagements. You will be responsible for cloud strategy, architectural strategy, AI adoption frameworks, and ensuring seamless execution of cloud initiatives from vision to value realization.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Conduct comprehensive assessments of clients' existing IT infrastructure and cloud readiness.
   

  

 Lead enterprise cloud architecture strategy engagements, including landing zone design, architectural reviews, and design authority.
   

  

 Lead comprehensive cloud architecture assessments, including landing zone design, architecture analysis, and recommendations tailored to client needs.
   

  

 Develop, present, and defend strategic cloud adoption roadmaps, balancing business objectives with technical feasibility.
   

  

 Design cloud migration and transformation programs, ensuring scalability, security, and compliance.
   

  

 Advise C\-suite and senior leadership on AI\-driven transformation, including GenAI adoption strategies, AI ethics, and operationalization.
   

  

 Drive cloud cost optimization strategies including FinOps and sustainable cloud operations.
   

  

 Support business development by contributing to proposals, solution designs, and thought leadership content.
   

  

**Must Have Skills**
 Cloud Strategy, Cloud Architecture, AI Advisory, Cloud Readiness Assessment, Cloud TCO, Cloud Migration, Cloud Cost Optimization (FinOps), Cloud Operating Model, Sustainability, GenAI
   

  

 Industry Segment: Retail, BFSI, Life Sciences, Utilities, Manufacturing
   

  

 What are we looking for: (Good to have)
   

  

 Understanding of business drivers and the ability to articulate cloud technology issues in business terms and vice\-versa.
   

  

 Deep experience with enterprise cloud architecture across AWS, Azure, and GCP, including hybrid and multi\-cloud models.
   

  

 Proven track record delivering AI/GenAI strategy engagements.
   

  

 Has a consultative mindset with analytical abilities to deliver client cloud transformation engagements.
   

  

 Experience and/or knowledge of one or more of the following cloud\-related technologies/methodologies is preferred \- Containerization, Serverless computing, DevOps, Multi\-cloud strategies \& FinOps.
   

  

 Proven experience designing and implementing landing zones and multi\-account architectures across major cloud providers (AWS, Azure, GCP).
   

  

 Strong understanding of AI/ML platforms, AI model lifecycle, and governance frameworks.
   

  

 Exposure to end\-to\-end cloud migration and implementation project lifecycle is desirable.
   

  

 Familiarity with cloud security best practices, compliance requirements, and cost optimization strategies.
   

  

 Experience guiding teams through end\-to\-end migration and modernization projects.
   

  

**Additional Information**
* The candidate should have minimum 5 years of experience in Cloud Strategy and Assessment.
* This position is based at our Bengaluru/Pune/Delhi NCR office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

165232dd.title: Cloud Application Support Engineer (APAC) - Noida
165232dd.description:
**Our Context**
 NeoXam is a growing international financial software company headquartered in Paris, with a strong and expanding presence across India. Through our combined expertise and transparent approach, we help Buy\-Side and Sell\-Side organizations \- across banking, asset management, and insurance \- navigate the continuous changes shaping the financial industry. Our solutions span the complete financial value chain, from centralized data management to front\- and back\-office software.
   

  

 With 750\+ dedicated staff across 21 offices worldwide \- including Sydney, Melbourne, New York, Boston, Paris, Frankfurt, Luxembourg, Zurich, Geneva, Milan, London, Hong Kong, Shanghai, Singapore, Noida, Chennai, and more \- NeoXam combines global scale with an entrepreneurial, collaborative culture. More than 150 clients across the globe trust NeoXam to run their most critical workflows.
   

  

 As part of our expanding NeoXam as a Service (NXaaS) operating model, we are looking for a motivated and technically strong
 **Technical Support \& Cloud Consultant** 
 to join our Indian team. This is a hands\-on role that blends client\-facing support with cloud infrastructure ownership, making it ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of financial software and modern cloud operations. As we continue to grow our global SaaS footprint, this role will evolve alongside increasing monitoring, observability, and operational responsibilities. NXaaS operates a follow\-the\-sun support model across APAC, EMEA, and the Americas \- this role covers Indian business hours.
   

  

 You will support NeoXam's core product suite, including:
   

  

* NeoXam DataHub – a centralized data management platform purpose\-built for financial institutions, serving as a hub for all data consumed or produced across the enterprise.
* NeoXam IBOR – a uniquely independent and flexible Investment Book of Record, providing asset managers with a single, continuously updated source for positions, valuations, and forecasts across multiple views.
* NeoXam Aro – an intelligent, low\-code reconciliation and data lifecycle platform that transforms fragmented, manual processes into a unified, AI\-powered solution.
* NeoXam Impress – an end\-to\-end solution for client, digital, and regulatory reporting, covering data integration, performance calculations, production workflows, and data visualization.


**Your Missions**
 Serve as the first technical point of contact for NeoXam's global clients, covering Australian business hours within NeoXam's follow\-the\-sun support model and ensuring seamless handoff with APAC and EMEA counterparts.
   

  

* Triage, analyze, and own support tickets end\-to\-end \- from anomaly identification and root cause investigation through to resolution, including software\-level fixes in Java and escalation to R\&D when required.
* Review and respond to monitoring alerts and operational dashboards, identifying and acting on anomalies before they impact clients; monitor and manage cloud resources (primarily AWS) to ensure performance and availability against production SLAs.
* Troubleshoot and enhance cloud\-based deployments; implement patches and configuration fixes; support data migration and cloud onboarding initiatives in collaboration with clients and internal teams.
* Manage technical installations, upgrades, and environment refreshes for client\-facing deployments; maintain internal environment replicas for issue reproduction and testing.
* Collaborate with the Paris R\&D team and global support counterparts to resolve complex issues and contribute to the NXaaS knowledge base.
* Support pre\-sales and implementation teams on technical matters; participate in client calls, project updates, and cross\-team coordination.


**Your Profile**
 Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
   

  

* 5\-8 years of experience in technical support, implementation, or infrastructure roles within financial software or the banking/financial services industry.
* Solid working knowledge of AWS (EC2, RDS, ALB, S3, CloudWatch, VPC, IAM); AWS certification is a plus.
* Proficient in Java application troubleshooting \- log analysis, memory management, thread dumps, and configuration.
* Ability to diagnose and interpret common database performance issues \- including slow queries, missing indexes, lock contention, and execution plan analysis. Experience with Oracle and/or PostgreSQL query tuning is strongly preferred.
* Experience with relational databases \- Oracle, PostgreSQL, or SQL Server.
* Scripting ability (Shell, Python, or equivalent) for automation and diagnostics.
* Familiarity with web application servers (Tomcat, JBoss, or WebSphere) and messaging systems (IBM MQ, Kafka, or equivalent).
* Working knowledge of XML, REST/SOAP web services, and API integrations.
* EKS (Elastic Kubernetes Service): Strong understanding of Kubernetes fundamentals and practical experience with Amazon EKS for container orchestration from support perspective.
* Monitoring \& Observability Tools: Hands\-on experience with solutions such as Datadog, Grafana, CloudWatch or similar platforms for system monitoring, logging, and performance visualization.
* Familiarity with Git and standard version control workflows.
* Hands\-on experience with Linux/Unix environments and command\-line operations.
* Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodology and ITIL support practices.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills; ability to manage client relationships professionally and independently.
* Self\-motivated, proactive, and collaborative — comfortable working across time zones with global teams.


**Why NeoXam**
 At NeoXam, we love people who are curious, involved, and self\-driven. We encourage creativity and strive to promote an environment and culture based on personal growth and development. We want you to express your full potential and become a major contributor to our continued growth across India and beyond.

8ff1bb19.title: Technical Architect
8ff1bb19.description:
***hackajob** 
 is collaborating with
 **Presidio** 
 to connect them with exceptional professionals for this role.*
**Presidio, Where Teamwork and Innovation Shape the Future**
 At Presidio, we’re at the forefront of a global technology revolution, transforming industries through cutting\-edge digital solutions and next\-generation AI. We empower businesses—and their customers—to achieve more through innovation, automation, and intelligent insights.
   

  

**The Role**
 Presidio is looking for an
 **Architect** 
 to design and implement complex systems and software architectures across multiple platforms. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in systems architecture, software engineering, cloud technologies, and team leadership. You will be responsible for translating business requirements into scalable, maintainable technical solutions and guiding development teams through implementation.
   

  

**Responsibilities Include**
* Design, plan, and manage cloud architectures leveraging AWS, Azure, and GCP, ensuring alignment with business objectives and industry best practices.
* Evaluate and recommend appropriate cloud services and emerging technologies to enhance system performance, scalability, and security.
* Lead the development and integration of software solutions using a variety of programming languages (Java, .NET, Python, Golang, etc.).
* Develop and maintain automated solutions for cloud provisioning, governance, and lifecycle management, utilizing Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform and Ansible.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to gather requirements, translate business needs into technical specifications, and deliver robust cloud\-native solutions.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to gather requirements, translate business needs into technical specifications, and deliver robust cloud\-native solutions.
* Guide and mentor development teams, enforcing architectural standards, coding best practices, and technical excellence.
* Provide expert consultation to internal and external stakeholders, offering recommendations on cloud migration, modernization, and optimization strategies.
* Ensure compliance with security, regulatory, and cost management policies across cloud environments.
* Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices, proactively introducing innovations to the organization.


**Required Skills And Professional Experience**
* 10\+ years of experience in software architecture, including significant experience with cloud infrastructure and hyperscaler platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Deep expertise in at least one hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, or GCP), with working knowledge of the others.
* Strong programming skills in multiple languages (Java, C\#, Node, JavaScript, .NET, Python, Golang, etc.).
* Experience with services/micro\-services development and relational databases (Postgres, MySQL, Oracle, etc.)
* Expertise in open\-source technologies and NoSQL/RDBMS such as Couchbase, Elasticsearch, RabbitMQ, MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis, etc.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Knowledge in Project Management tools and Agile Methodologies.
* Certification in AWS or Azure is preferred.


**Your future at Presidio**
 Joining Presidio means stepping into a culture of trailblazers—thinkers, builders, and collaborators—who push the boundaries of what’s possible. With our expertise in AI\-driven analytics, cloud solutions, cybersecurity, and next\-gen infrastructure, we enable businesses to stay ahead in an ever\-evolving digital world.
   

  

 Here, your impact is real. Whether you're harnessing the power of Generative AI, architecting resilient digital ecosystems, or driving data\-driven transformation, you’ll be part of a team that is shaping the future.
   

  

**Ready to innovate? Let’s redefine what’s next—together.**
**About Presidio**
 At Presidio, speed and quality meet technology and innovation. Presidio is a trusted ally for organizations across industries with a decades\-long history of building traditional IT foundations and deep expertise in AI and automation, security, networking, digital transformation, and cloud computing. Presidio fills gaps, removes hurdles, optimizes costs, and reduces risk. Presidio’s expert technical team develops custom applications, provides managed services, enables actionable data insights and builds forward\-thinking solutions that drive strategic outcomes for clients globally.
 **For more information, visit www.presidio.com** 
**.**
 Presidio is committed to hiring the most qualified candidates to join our amazing culture. We aim to attract and hire top talent from all backgrounds, including underrepresented and marginalized communities. We encourage women, people of color, people with disabilities, and veterans to apply for open roles at Presidio. Diversity of skills and thought is a key component to our business success.
   

  

***Recruitment Agencies, Please Note:***
 Presidio does not accept unsolicited agency resumes/CVs. Do not forward resumes/CVs to our careers email address, Presidio employees or any other means. Presidio is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes/CVs.

bc1f747d.title: Infrastructure Architect
bc1f747d.description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* Infosys is a global leader in technology services and consulting
* We enable enterprises to deliver resilient compliant and contractually governed managed services across complex multi tower and multi vendor environments
* We are looking for experienced CFS Contract Managers with strong expertise in contract governance commercial management SLA KPI obligations compliance tracking risk management change control financial alignment and stakeholder coordination to support large infrastructure managed services engagements

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* A day in the life of an Infoscion
* As part of the Infosys consulting team your primary role would be to lead the engagement effort of providing high quality and value adding consulting solutions to customers at different stages from problem definition to diagnosis to solution design development and deployment
* You will review the proposals prepared by consultants provide guidance and analyze the solutions defined for the client business problems to identify any potential risks and issues
* You will identify change Management requirements and propose a structured approach to client for managing the change using multiple communication mechanisms
* You will also coach and create a vision for the team provide subject matter training for your focus areas motivate and inspire team members through effective and timely feedback and recognition for high performance
* You would be a key contributor in unit level and organizational initiatives with an objective of providing high quality value adding consulting solutions to customers adhering to the guidelines and processes of the organization
* If you think you fit right in to help our clients navigate their next in their digital transformation journey this is the place for you

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* In this role you will manage contract governance and commercial controls for Cross Functional Services across infrastructure managed services engagements
* Ensure alignment of delivery obligations with contractual commitments service levels KPIs penalties deliverables governance forums reporting obligations and client expectations
* Act as the central point of coordination for contractual interpretation obligation tracking commercial risk assessment contract change control and compliance reporting
* Work closely with service delivery managers finance PMO legal procurement transition tower leads client governance teams and partner vendor teams to ensure commercial and contractual discipline
* Drive proactive identification of contractual risks open obligations SLA KPI exposure change impacts commercial deviations and governance actions across the service lifecycle

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Experience in contract governance for infrastructure managed services Cross Functional Services SIAM service management or multi vendor operating models
* Ability to interpret contract schedules statements of work service descriptions RACIs governance frameworks performance obligations commercial clauses and change control procedures
* Hands on experience in tracking contractual deliverables obligations service levels KPIs penalties credits assumptions dependencies exclusions risks and open actions
* Strong knowledge of contract change management including change request assessment impact analysis pricing coordination approval tracking documentation and implementation governance
* Experience in commercial management including billing validation invoice support effort cost tracking forecast alignment consumption reporting chargeability tracking and financial governance
* Ability to coordinate with legal finance procurement delivery PMO transition service management tower teams and client stakeholders for contract related decisions and escalations
* Experience in preparing compliance dashboards contract obligation trackers governance reports commercial risk logs SLA KPI exposure reports and leadership updates
* Strong understanding of ITIL based delivery operations incident change problem service request processes service reporting operational governance and continuous service improvement
* Ability to manage contractual escalations dispute coordination audit support evidence management and closure of non compliance observations
* Excellent communication negotiation analytical documentation stakeholder management and executive reporting skills

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Database\-\>Database\- ALL,Technology\-\>Big Data\-\>CouchDB,Foundational\-\>Account Management\-\>Contractual Compliance process,Technology\-\>Infrastructure\-Storage\-Administration\-\>Overview on Storage products,Technology\-\>Open System\-\>Linux,Technology\-\>Virtualization\-\>Database Virtualization,Technology\-\>Infrastructure\-Server Administration\-\>Unix Server administration (HP\-UX,IBM\-AIX, Sun Solaris, Redhat Linux),Technology\-\>Database\-\>Teradata,Technology\-\>Middleware Administration\-\>Middleware Administration\-Others,Technology\-\>Networking\-\>Routing \& Switching,Technology\-\>Server\-Virtualization\-\>RedHat Enterprise Virtualization\-\>virtualization

cbbb5084.title: Cyber Resilience Architect, APJ
cbbb5084.description:
Rubrik is seeking a Cyber Resilience Architect (Field CTO) to drive technical strategy and business leadership across the APJ region.
   

  

 In this role you will act as a transformation architect operating at the intersection of business strategy and technical execution. You will help large enterprises modernize their approach to Data Protection, Cyber Recovery, Identity Resilience, and AI\-driven security and governance.
   

  

 You are accountable for influencing regional revenue outcomes by leading high\-impact discovery, shaping differentiated architectures, and guiding strategic account execution. You will evangelize and architect Rubrik’s portfolio across on\-prem, cloud, SaaS, identity, cyber resilience, and AI solutions.
   

  

**Core Responsibilities**
* Executive Advisory: Serve as a trusted advisor to CIOs, CISOs, and Board. Partner with CIOs on modern data protection, operational efficiency, and cloud strategy. Partner with CISOs on cyber resilience, identity protection, and breach recovery readiness. At the executive level, position data resilience as a board\-level priority — aligning Rubrik’s platform to measurable outcomes such as operational continuity, risk reduction, regulatory compliance, and AI readiness.
* Revenue Acceleration: Partner with regional leadership to hit revenue goals by leading high\-impact technical discoveries and architecting innovative solutions for Tier\-1 accounts.
* Deal Orchestration: Master the MEDDIC framework to qualify opportunities, identifying technical "champions" and neutralizing competitive threats through superior architecture.
* Product Liaison: Distill complex field requirements into actionable insights for the Product Management team, ensuring the APJ voice influences our global roadmap.
* Technical Leadership: Design integrated solutions across On\-Prem, SaaS, Identity, and Multi\-Cloud environments, with a specific focus on Cyber Security including designing isolated recovery environments (IRE) and clean room recovery.
* Market Evangelism: Represent Rubrik at select industry events and executive forums. Contribute to thought leadership initiatives and support key marketing engagements as needed. This is an important but limited portion of the role, with primary focus remaining on strategic account execution and revenue impact.


**About You**
* 18\+ years in Sales Engineering or Technical Consulting, with consistent success in winning 7\-figure enterprise deals across APJ
* Strong executive presence with experience engaging CIO, CISO, and Board\-level stakeholders
* You have deep roots in data protection, disaster recovery, and cybersecurity (zero\-trust, isolated recovery environments, cyber recovery).
* Commercially astute — able to connect technical strategy to financial and operational impact
* Entrepreneurial \- willing to go the extra mile, strong work ethic, resourceful, “get it done” attitude
* Strives in moving in a fast\-paced environment; including handling multiple calls/demos per day with immediate follow up.
* Strong understanding of APJ market dynamics, regulatory landscapes, and cultural nuances
* Bachelor’s degree required or equivalent experience


 Join Us in Securing and Accelerating the World's AI Transformation
   

  

 Rubrik (RBRK), the Security and AI Operations Company, leads at the intersection of data protection, cyber resilience, and enterprise AI acceleration. Rubrik Security Cloud delivers complete cyber resilience by securing, monitoring, and recovering data, identities, and workloads across clouds. Rubrik Agent Cloud accelerates trusted AI agent deployments at scale by monitoring and auditing agentic actions, enforcing real\-time guardrails, fine\-tuning for accuracy and undoing agentic mistakes.
   

  

 Linkedin \| X (formerly Twitter) \| Instagram \| Rubrik.com
   

  

 Inclusion @ Rubrik
   

  

 At Rubrik, we are dedicated to fostering a culture where people from all backgrounds are valued, feel they belong, and believe they can succeed. Our commitment to inclusion is at the heart of our mission to secure the world’s data.
   

  

 Our goal is to hire and promote the best talent, regardless of background. We continually review our hiring practices to ensure fairness and strive to create an environment where every employee has equal access to opportunities for growth and excellence. We believe in empowering everyone to bring their authentic selves to work and achieve their fullest potential.
   

  

 Our inclusion strategy focuses on three core areas of our business and culture:
   

  

* Our Company: We are committed to building a merit\-based organization that offers equal access to growth and success for all employees globally. Your potential is limitless here.
* Our Culture: We strive to create an inclusive atmosphere where individuals from all backgrounds feel a strong sense of belonging, can thrive, and do their best work. Your contributions help us innovate and break boundaries.
* Our Communities: We are dedicated to expanding our engagement with the communities we operate in, creating opportunities for underrepresented talent and driving greater innovation for our clients. Your impact extends beyond Rubrik, contributing to safer and stronger communities.


 Equal Opportunity Employer/Veterans/Disabled
   

  

 Rubrik is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.
   

  

 Rubrik provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, Rubrik complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.
   

  

 Federal law requires employers to provide reasonable accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities. Please contact us at hr@rubrik.com if you require a reasonable accommodation to apply for a job or to perform your job. Examples of reasonable accommodation include making a change to the application process or work procedures, providing documents in an alternate format, using a sign language interpreter, or using specialized equipment.
   

  

 EEO IS THE LAW
   

  

 NOTIFICATION OF EMPLOYEE RIGHTS UNDER FEDERAL LABOR LAWS

bfe2e444.title: Customer Program Manager- Husky (India)Chennai
bfe2e444.description:
At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.



Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.



Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!

  

  



**Job Description**



As a member of the Customer Success Management (CSM) SAARC team, you will be responsible for managing Advantage \+ Elite Contracts from order intake to delivery as well as to achieve the key performance indicators of the product. In this role, you will be a key contact for customers to ensure customer satisfaction and contract renewal.


**Responsibilities:**


* Implements and leads the Contract planning process, its implementation and sustainment, responsible to achieve the stated KPI (availability, cycle time, energy consumption, quality, resin usage)


* Work with key cross\-functional teams throughout the Organization with the goal of maintaining the Contract commitments on a continuous basis


* Project Manages all activities and services provided within the Contract, ensuring they are done on time, based on a predefined timetable, in an efficient way


* Ensures all services included in the Contract are well defined, properly documented (in the proper Husky systems), and properly scheduled


* Manages customer expectations to ensure complete alignment with the Contract objectives and goals


* Plan and schedule Contract timelines and milestones using the appropriate tools. Responsible for the milestones and deliverables.


* Develop and deliver progress reports, presentations, and other Contract documentation, internally and to the customer.


* Coordinate all activities related to the Contract implementation and ongoing activities.


* Focus should be in the involvement and awareness of the daily activities and issues related to the Contract. Key contact, both internally and customer.


* Ensure customer is satisfied with contract


* Manage and lead weekly call with customer


* Escalate issues when required


* Builds relationship with customers


* Schedule upcoming work with Field Service teams


**Qualifications:**


* Familiar with preform or plastics manufacturing environment. Understands plants KPI.


* Project Management experience


* Mechanical or electrical engineering or equivalent experience
* A minimum of 5 years’ work experience gained in a similar work environment
* Knowledge of injection molding machinery and related mechanical, hydraulic, and electronic technologies considered an asset
* Customer\-focused attitude


* Fluent in English and Hindi language will be an advantage


* Excellent communication and coordination skills
* Strong organizational and project management skills
* Strong negotiation, facilitation, conflict management skills and the ability to professionally interact with team members
* Experience or knowledge of CRM, ERP, CPQ systems
* Sales attitude and capacity to judge business requirements
* Good knowledge of all MS Office applications

  


* Logical thinking capabilities and continuous improvement attitude

  

  



Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

1dbb926b.title: Delivery Lead
1dbb926b.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Delivery Lead
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Lead end\-to\-end delivery, or a defined component of a contract to meet operational, contractual, and financial commitments. Ensure service quality and efficiency. Manage delivery outcomes and identify opportunities for follow\-on work through up\-selling or cross\-selling.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Program Project Management
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 Microsoft Azure IaaS, Microsoft Azure Infra Transformation, Generative AI
   

  

**Minimum 12 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

**Summary**
 As a Delivery Lead, a typical day involves overseeing the complete delivery process or a specific segment of a contract to ensure all operational, contractual, and financial goals are achieved. This role requires maintaining high standards of service quality and operational efficiency while managing the outcomes of delivery activities. The position also involves identifying potential opportunities for additional business growth through up\-selling or cross\-selling, ensuring that client expectations are met and exceeded. Collaboration with various stakeholders to align delivery objectives and continuous monitoring of project progress are key aspects of the daily routine.
   

  

**Roles \& Responsibilities**
* Expected to be an SME, collaborate and manage the team to perform.
* Responsible for team decisions.
* Engage with multiple teams and contribute on key decisions.
* Expected to provide solutions to problems that apply across multiple teams.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance delivery processes and client satisfaction.
* Facilitate effective communication and coordination among cross\-functional teams to ensure seamless project execution.
* Mentor and support junior team members to foster professional growth and skill development.


**Professional \& Technical Skills**
* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Program Project Management.
* Good To Have Skills: Microsoft Azure IaaS, Microsoft Azure Infra Transformation, Generative AI.
* Strong capability in planning, organizing, and managing complex projects to meet deadlines and budget constraints.
* Experience in risk management and mitigation strategies to ensure project stability and success.
* Ability to analyze project metrics and performance indicators to drive informed decision\-making.
* Excellent stakeholder management skills to maintain productive relationships and align project goals.


**Additional Information**
* The candidate should have minimum 12 years of experience in Program Project Management.
* This position is based at our Gurugram office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

17220150.title: Service Delivery Manager
17220150.description:

**Experience \& Qualifications**
* Professional Background: 3 to 5 years of experience in technical leadership, specifically managing large\-scale application support or infrastructure programs.
* Educational Foundation: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.
* Shift Model: Proven ability to work effectively in a 24/7 rotational model.


**Technical \& Process Expertise**
* ITSM Mastery: Intermediate knowledge of ITIL frameworks (Incident, Problem,

da62230e.title: Delivery Lead Associate Director
da62230e.description:
**Skill required:** 
 Com.Bkg\- Commercial Real Estate \- General Ledger Reconciliations
   

  

**Designation:** 
 Delivery Lead Associate Director
   

  

**Qualifications:** 
 BCom
   

  

**Years of Experience:** 
 18 to 28 years
   

  

**About Accenture**
 Accenture is a global professional services company with leading capabilities in digital, cloud and security.Combining unmatched experience and specialized skills across more than 40 industries, we offer Strategy and Consulting, Technology and Operations services, and Accenture Song— all powered by the world’s largest network of Advanced Technology and Intelligent Operations centers. Our 784,000 people deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity every day, serving clients in more than 120 countries. We embrace the power of change to create value and shared success for our clients, people, shareholders, partners and communities.Visit us at www.accenture.com
   

  

**What would you do?** 
 We help clients address quality and productivity issues, keep pace with customer expectations, navigate regulatory and operational pressures and ensure business sustainability by transforming their banking operations into an agile, resilient operating model. Com.Bkg\- Commercial Real Estate refers to the sector of real estate that deals with properties used for business purposes. This includes office buildings, retail spaces, warehouses, and industrial properties. The focus is on buying, selling, leasing, and managing these properties to generate income. It involves various stakeholders such as investors, developers, and property managers. The goal is to maximize the value and return on investment of commercial properties. Loans are granted based on the income generated from the property and the crediworthiness is evaluated by analyzing the property by its location, amenities, ageing and the revenue generated and the occupancy. Computes and presents the results of financial events by administering,managing and processing general ledger accounts. Accounts for current assets, fixed assets, liabilities, revenue and expense items, and gains and losses, and may handle related tax issues, invoice management and budgeting.
   

  

**What are we looking for?**
* Account Management
* Balance Sheet Account Reconciliations
* Accounts Payable Processing
* Accounts Receivable (AR)
* Asset Management
* Ability to perform under pressure
* Ability to manage multiple stakeholders
* Ability to establish strong client relationship
* Ability to handle disputes
* Adaptable and flexible Roles and Responsibilities:
* This role requires proactive identification, definition and solving of complex problems that have impact on the direction of the business or work effort, where analysis of situations requires an in\-depth knowledge of Accenture
* It requires development and execution of strategy to achieve key business objectives in area of responsibility
* Interaction is with senior management levels at a client and/or within Accenture, involving negotiation or influencing on critical matters
* Individual should have wide latitude in decision making and determination of objectives and approaches to critical assignments
* Decisions have a major and lasting impact on areas outside of own responsibility
* Individual manages large complex teams and/or work efforts (if in an individual contributor role) at a client or within Accenture
* Please note that this role may require you to work in rotational shifts, BCom

1159c855.title: Technical Program Manager
1159c855.description:
**Location:** Remote

**Experience:** 5\+ years of relevant program, project and account management experience in a fast progressing tech\-oriented company


**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

**About Us**


At PromptCloud, we're dedicated to helping businesses harness the power of data. As a leader in the Data as a Service industry, our technology powers some of the most innovative big data projects globally. We cultivate a culture of continuous learning and professional growth, providing clear paths for advancement and fostering a work\-life blend that is particularly important in our remote setup.


We trust our team members to create a meaningful impact in their roles and allow them the flexibility to work from anywhere. Our mission is to put data at the heart of every business to fuel success.

**Product description**


PromptCloud is a leading Data as a Service (DaaS) company specializing in web data extraction. We help businesses gather high\-quality, structured data from publicly available sources at scale. Our expertise lies in setting up custom crawlers tailored to client needs, providing structured data with flexible delivery formats and frequencies.

**Our Product Ecosystem**


JobsPikr – An automated job data scraping platform that delivers fresh and structured job listings from multiple sources worldwide. Companies leverage JobsPikr for job market insights, talent intelligence, and competitive analysis.


42Signals – A competitive intelligence and price monitoring platform that helps e\-commerce businesses, brands, and retailers track pricing, product trends, and consumer insights across online marketplaces.


With our suite of data\-driven solutions, PromptCloud is helping businesses across industries — e\-commerce, job market analytics, market research, AI/ML, and finance — unlock the power of web data.

**About the Role**


We are looking for a self\-driven, detail\-oriented Associate Technical Program Manager (ATPM) with focus on AI enablement to join us, and be a part of our growth story.


You will be responsible for driving cross\-functional initiatives, managing multiple program execution, and ensuring seamless coordination between clients, sales, product, engineering, QA, and external vendors on a need basis.


The ideal candidate will have strong technical acumen, exceptional account and project management skills, and experience handling large\-scale, complex projects. You should be comfortable operating in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment with minimal direction while ensuring high\-quality results.

**Key Responsibilities**

* End\-to\-End Client Accounts and Project Ownership: Lead cross\-functional projects, including program definition, roadmap planning, resource allocation, and execution.
* AI \& Technology Enablement: Work on projects leveraging AI/ML technologies and integrating them into yours and the organisation's regular work stream.
* Delivery Management: Understand, clarify and articulate the requirements to the leads and developers, assist in scoping, schedule preparation, ensuring quality, and deployment excellence across the service and product offerings..
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with the clients, sales, tech leaders, developers, QA engineers, product managers, business teams, and external vendors to align priorities and drive execution.
* Process Optimization \& Automation: Identify bottlenecks, streamline workflows, and enhance testing and release processes to improve delivery speed and efficiency.
* Strategic Planning \& Execution: Define and implement quality, release metrics, and process improvements to reduce time\-to\-market while ensuring operational excellence.
* Problem\-Solving \& Decision\-Making: Act as a technical problem solver, resolving project deadlocks and constraints through consensus and sound judgment.
* Release Management: Drive planning of major/minor and maintenance release windows, ensuring alignment across multiple teams.
* Data\-Driven Execution: Collect and analyze data to track project performance and make informed business decisions.
* Communication \& Documentation: Maintain structured documentation and provide regular program updates to leadership teams.

**Key Requirements**

* Technical Background: Bachelor's/Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* Project \& Program Management: 5\+ years of experience managing technical projects, driving cross\-functional collaboration, and implementing release strategies.
* Account Management: Build good rapport with the existing clients and the prospects leading to new opportunities discovery, conversion, upselling, and cross\-selling. Review the delivery progress, successful onboarding, periodic invoicing and collections check.
* AI/ML Exposure: Experience or familiarity with AI\-driven solutions and automation tools.
* Deep Hands\-on Technical Expertise: Ability to understand and work with SMEs on frontend, backend, cloud, and infrastructure technologies.
* Agile \& Release Management: Experience managing Agile methodologies, participate and/or conduct the daily standups, promptly update the incident management tools, prepare work breakdown structure for complex and timebound tasks/projects, perform root cause analyses, initiate preventive and corrective actions.
* Strong Communication \& Collaboration: Ability to convey the technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders. Good verbal and written communication with attention to detail.
* Problem\-Solving \& Attention to Detail: Ability to identify gaps, propose solutions, and optimize workflows.
* Self\-Driven \& Proactive Mindset: Ability to handle multiple competing priorities, operate independently, and swiftly. Timely remediation of the incidents, ensuring on time delivery including the client and the internal assigned tasks.
* Documentation: Ensure all the accounts and project related details are up\-to\-date and documented. Drafting the contracts and SoWs, RCAs, reports and metrics update.

**Nice\-to\-Have Qualifications**

* Technical Program Management Experience: 2\+ years in an ATPM / TPM role handling large\-scale programs.
* Automation \& Scripting: Experience with Python, Selenium, or user\-level automation.
* Cloud \& AI Enablement: Familiarity with AWS, GCP, or Azure and AI/ML model deployment.

**Why Join Us?**

* Be part of a collaborative and fast\-paced environment.
* Opportunity to drive impact and shape key initiatives.


We are a 100% remote company and we strive to build a unique and thriving workplace where work is designed around people (and not the other way round).


**Our EVP is 3 fold:**


Great Culture


Great Colleagues


Learning and Growth

**Perks:**


An environment where each employee is celebrated.


A one\-time home office setup allowance, monthly allowances for internet bills, child care allowance for new mothers/single parents.


Half\-yearly performance appraisals


Flexible working hours


Competitive salary


If you're a self\-driven ATPM / TPM passionate about program management, and process excellence, a key learner who likes to remain up\-to\-date with AI and other emerging tech trends, we'd love to hear from you!


Also, if you know someone who fits this role, please refer.

26843f4f.title: Program Manager – Automotive Parts & Accessories
26843f4f.description:
Overview:

The Accessory Program Manager will serve as the primary liaison between the Accessories team and Vehicle Teams, ensuring all accessory parts and programs are delivered on time, within budget, and in alignment with OEM standards. This role demands a strong blend of program governance, technical coordination, and stakeholder communication across the full product development lifecycle through Start of Production (SOP).


Responsibilities:
**Key Responsibilities**

**Program \& Timeline Management**

* Own end\-to\-end program tracking for accessory parts and systems, maintaining accurate and up\-to\-date timelines.
* Compile, manage, and report program schedules, identifying milestone risks proactively.
* Escalate late parts and programs to the appropriate stakeholders; support (but not necessarily lead) recovery plan execution.

**Liaison \& Communication**

* Act as the primary interface between Accessories and Vehicle Teams, ensuring alignment on program requirements and deliverables.
* Author, track, and coordinate responses to technical Bulletins issued to or from Vehicle Teams.
* Write, manage, and follow up on Engineering Requisitions (ERs) throughout the program lifecycle.

**Budget \& Economic Management**

* Compile and track budgets at vehicle, part, and system levels.
* Manage economic follow\-up covering engineering costs, tooling and means, and part pricing.
* Perform global synthesis of costs and risks; report critical financial risks to OEM management with a defined action plan.

**Technical Coordination**

* Coordinate all technical activities from program kick\-off through SOP, including technical specification, validation plan definition and follow\-up.
* Manage supplier engagement: selection, follow\-up, TKO (Tool Kick\-Off), and part approval processes.
* Oversee fitting instruction documentation and distribution to relevant teams.

**Risk, Governance \& Reporting**

* Drive project progress across accessory and service parts projects; proactively identify risks and issues.
* Define and implement mitigation strategies to protect program delivery commitments.
* Manage stakeholder expectations and ensure project dependencies are delivered on time and in scope.
* Provide structured status reporting to internal leadership and client program teams.


Qualifications:
* Bachelor's degree in Mechanical, Automotive, or related Engineering discipline (mandatory).
* 12\+ years of experience in automotive program management, preferably in accessories, service parts, or OEM delivery.
* PMP (Project Management Professional) certification is a strong added advantage.
* Prior exposure to OEM programs


Essential skills:
**Required Skills \& Competencies**

* + Strong program and project management skills, including timeline management, budget control, and risk mitigation.
	+ Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills – ability to work across OEM, supplier, and internal teams.
	+ Solid automotive engineering background with understanding of accessory and service parts development processes.
	+ Familiarity with Engineering Requisition (ER) processes, technical bulletins, and supplier management in an OEM environment.
	+ Experience managing cross\-functional technical teams and vendor/supplier coordination.
	+ Strong analytical skills for budget tracking, risk synthesis, and reporting.
	+ Proficiency in MS Office tools (Excel, PowerPoint, Project); PLM/PDM tools knowledge is an advantage.

  


Experience:
**Total Experience**  

12 TO 15 Years in Program Management

c9d90734.title: Program Manager
c9d90734.description:
**IT Program Manager**


Department: IT Infrastructure


Location: Hyderabad, India


Employment Type: Full\-time


**About NationsBenefits:**


NationsBenefits is the leading provider of supplemental benefits, flex cards, and member engagement solutions that partners with managed care organizations to provide innovative healthcare solutions designed to drive growth, improve outcomes, reduce costs, and delight members. Our comprehensive suite of innovative supplemental benefits, payments platform, and member engagement solutions help health plans deliver high\-quality benefits to their members, addressing social determinants of health and improving member health outcomes and satisfaction. With a compliance\-focused infrastructure, proprietary technology systems, and premier service delivery model, we enable our health plan partners to deliver high quality, value\-based care to millions of members.


We are a fulfilling work environment that attracts top talent and encourages all associates to do their part in delivering premier service to internal and external customers alike. It's how we're transforming the healthcare industry for the better. We provide career advancement opportunities within the organization with multiple locations in Florida, California, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and India.


You might also like to know that NationsBenefits is also recognized as one of the fastest growing companies in America. We're proud of how far we've come, and a career with us also gives you growth opportunities.


We are looking for an Infrastructure Program Manager responsible for planning, governing, and delivering complex infrastructure programs consisting of multiple interdependent projects and workstreams. This role ensures alignment across stakeholders, manages risks and dependencies, and drives timely delivery of scalable, secure, and operationally efficient infrastructure solutions that support business operations and strategic initiatives.

  

**Key Responsibilities**


*Program Leadership \& Execution*


* Manage comprehensive infrastructure and IT\-related programs, ensuring effective planning, governance, coordination, and delivery across complex, interdependent initiatives.


* Define and maintain program roadmaps, strategic priorities, timelines, budgets, and resource allocations across multiple workstreams.


* Coordinate across site leads, engineering teams, security, and global delivery teams for successful execution.


* Ensure program\-level alignment on timelines, budgets, dependencies, and scope across all projects.


* Drive executive\-level visibility and stakeholder satisfaction throughout the program lifecycle.


* Leverage AI\-driven insights to forecast program\-level risks, dependencies, delivery trends, and financial impact.


* Manage cross\-project dependencies, ensuring alignment across infrastructure, security, and business initiatives.


*AI\-Enabled Program Management*


* Utilize AI\-powered program management tools to improve planning accuracy, timeline forecasting, and workload optimization.


* Apply predictive analytics to identify schedule slippage, resource constraints, and delivery risks early.


* Use AI to generate status reports, executive summaries, and dashboards with data backed insights.


* Leverage AI for scenario modeling (what\-if analysis) to support decision\-making on scope, timelines, and resources.


* Promote responsible and compliant use of AI in program workflows, ensuring transparency and data security.


* Partner with engineering, security, and PMO teams to continuously enhance AI adoption in program delivery processes.

  

*Technical Oversight*


* Provide program\-level oversight for infrastructure initiatives involving Zero Trust technologies, firewalls, Microsoft Azure, endpoint security, and telecom infrastructure.


* Lead enterprise initiatives such as cloud migrations, Zero Trust rollouts, device posture enforcement, secure access transformation, and telecom transformations.


* Oversee cloud and hybrid infrastructure initiatives with a security\-first mindset.


* Conduct risk assessments and ensure compliance with IT security and privacy policies.


* Ensure AI\-assisted tools and automation comply with enterprise governance standards.


*Stakeholder Management*


* Serve as the primary point of contact for internal stakeholders, vendors, and cross\-functional teams.


* Negotiate goals, priorities, and expectations across departments.


* Lead regular program updates using AI\-enhanced reporting to clearly communicate progress, risks, and deliverables. Program Governance, Process Optimization \& Automation


* Establish and manage program governance frameworks including RAID (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies), change control, and financial tracking.


* Define and track program\-level KPIs, milestones, risks, dependencies, and success metrics to measure delivery health and business impact.


* Drive automation and documentation improvements using tools like JIRA and AIenabled workflows.


* Implement AI\-supported task tracking, backlog prioritization, and dependency management.


* Lead onboarding and transitions for new sites or systems with minimal disruption.


* Create and maintain SOPs, playbooks, and checklists for consistent execution.


* Continuously improve delivery efficiency through AI\-based insights and process optimization.

  

*Compliance \& Governance*


* Embed privacy, security, and compliance objectives into all program phases.


* Maintain accurate documentation for audits, disaster recovery, and business continuity.


* Ensure ethical and compliant use of AI technologies in project execution.


*Collaboration \& Communication*


* Lead cross\-functional collaboration across IT, Security, Compliance, Operations, and Business teams.


* Translate strategic objectives into actionable execution plans and deliverables across multiple projects.


* Communicate effectively with leadership, providing concise, outcome\-driven updates and decision support.


* Act as a change leader driving adoption of program governance and AI\-enabled delivery practices.


* Support global teams across regions, including the US and India, ensuring seamless coordination.


*Required Skills \& Experience*


* Bachelor's or master's degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.


* 8\+ years of experience in IT infrastructure project management, including 3\+ years in program management.


* Strong expertise in risk management, dependency tracking, and resource allocation.


* Solid understanding of AI\-assisted project management concepts (predictive planning, automation, analytics).


* Strong knowledge of ITIL 4 and PMP standards.


* Excellent communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.


* Proven experience leading cross\-functional teams in matrixed organizations.


* Hands\-on experience with cloud migrations and hybrid infrastructure environments.

  

*Preferred Skills*


* Experience with tools such as JIRA, Service Management platforms, JAMF, Zero Trust solutions, FortiGate, and Microsoft 365\.


* Exposure to AI\-enabled PM tools (e.g., Jira AI, Copilot, Smartsheet AI, Monday AI, Power BI with predictive analytics).


* Knowledge of hybrid and remote infrastructure support models.


* Ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously in a fast\-paced environment.


* Certifications: ITIL 4, PMP, Scrum Master (AI or Agile certifications are a plus).

9008d569.title: Senior Program Manager, RBS : Cost to Serve
9008d569.description:
**Description**
 Amazon strives to be Earth's most customer\-centric company, where customers can find and discover anything they want to buy online. Retail Business Services (RBS) accelerates Amazon's growth by improving customer and Selling Partner (SP) experiences, while optimizing costs across Stores WW. RBS operates at the intersection of retail, operations, technology, and finance, ensuring Amazon's systems and processes scale reliably while maintaining a high\-quality customer and selling\-partner experience.
   

  

 Cost to Serve (CtS) is a specialized organization within RBS focused on improving Amazon's per\-unit economics across the global supply chain. CtS operates on two pillars: defect identification and defect elimination, and partners with WW Operations, Finance, Returns, Concessions, and abuse\-related programs to uncover true cost drivers and remove them systematically. The team builds mechanisms that improve cost predictability, strengthen upstream defect visibility, and enable consistent governance across high\-impact cost categories, contributing directly to improved Free Cash Flow and scalable business growth.
   

  

 Are you passionate about building AI\-powered automation at scale? Amazon's RBS CtS organization is looking for an experienced Senior Program Manager to lead our Defect Elimination Automation program — the engine responsible for delivering defect automation pipeline that powers our organization’s defect elimination work. This role serves as the primary business counterpart to our tech partners building our defect automation tools, and oversees the team of Business Analysts who co\-develop and validate the tool's output.
   

  

 This leader will define requirements, own the working backward plan for platform milestones, and oversee the daily mechanisms that connect business expertise to technical development. They will manage the continuous feedback loop between BA subject matter experts and the engineering team — holding a high quality bar, making trade\-off decisions at design and quality blockers, and escalating to senior leaders when appropriate. The ideal candidate is equally comfortable managing technical product delivery and presenting program health to VP\-level leadership, with the judgment to navigate ambiguity in a fast\-moving, high\-visibility space.
   

  

 Why You’ll Love This Role
   

  

* High Impact at Scale: You'll lead the automation program responsible for 80% of the organization's defect identification pipeline — work that directly shapes the 2027 elimination roadmap across all of RBS.
* Build with Tech: Serve as the key business voice shaping an AI\-powered platform from the ground up, defining what good looks like and ensuring the tool meets the bar for downstream adoption.
* Leadership Visibility: Own updates to senior leaders on key organizational priorities, with direct influence on how the organization invests in automation long\-term.


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Tech Partnership \& Requirements Definition: Serve as the primary business counterpart to the Mogwai engineering team. Define and prioritize business requirements, translate BA feedback into actionable product inputs, and ensure the platform roadmap reflects CtS priorities.
* Working Backward Planning: Own the milestone delivery plan for Mogwai, ensuring the team is on track to deliver against the $6B identification target. Identify risks early, adjust plans proactively, and maintain credible path\-to\-green narratives for leadership.
* BA Team Oversight: Manage the Business Analysts who audit Mogwai outputs and co\-develop the tool through iterative feedback. Ensure the feedback mechanism runs smoothly, quality standards are maintained, and BAs are effectively translating domain expertise into model improvements.
* Quality \& Trade\-off Decisions: Hold a high bar on output quality. When design or quality blockers arise, make trade\-off decisions that balance speed, accuracy, and adoption — escalating to senior leaders for significant calls.
* Senior Leadership Communication: Own goal\-level updates for the VP\-level defect identification target ($7\.5B). Provide regular updates to senior leaders on program health, risks, and milestones. Communicate complex technical progress in business terms.
* Mechanism Design: Build and maintain the operating mechanisms (stand\-ups, reviews, escalation paths) that keep the BA\-to\-tech feedback loop running efficiently across time zones and teams.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* 5\+ years of managing stakeholders in cross\-functional project experience
* Experience working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams
* Experience owning program strategy, end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership
* Bachelor's degree


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of leading large complex programs experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in supply chain, business, engineering, finance or related technical or quantitative field


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- BLR 14 SEZ
   

  

 Job ID: A10465577
