17f5fda6.title: Associate Technical Account Manager - Auth0
17f5fda6.description:
**Get to know Okta**
 Okta is The World’s Identity Company. We free everyone to safely use any technology, anywhere, on any device or app. Our flexible and neutral products, Okta Platform and Auth0 Platform, provide secure access, authentication, and automation, placing identity at the core of business security and growth.
   

  

 At Okta, we celebrate a variety of perspectives and experiences. We are not looking for someone who checks every single box \- we’re looking for lifelong learners and people who can make us better with their unique experiences.
   

  

 Join our team! We’re building a world where Identity belongs to you.
   

  

**Get to know Okta**
 Okta is The World’s Identity Company. We free everyone to safely use any technology—anywhere, on any device or app. Our Auth0 and Okta Platforms enable secure yet flexible access, authentication, and automation that transforms how people move through the digital world, putting Identity at the heart of business security and growthAt Okta, we celebrate a variety of perspectives and experiences. We are not looking for someone who checks every single box, we’re looking for lifelong learners and people who can make us better with their unique experiences. Join our team! We’re building a world where Identity belongs to you.
   

  

**The Okta Technical Account Management Team**
 The TAM team empowers Okta customers to deliver secure, scalable, and transformative identity solutions by acting as their trusted identity coach. We drive lasting success through elevated technical maturity, proactively guiding their identity decisions and long\-term identity vision. We guide a customer’s strategy for customer identity, workforce identity, and security posture while driving value in Okta’s suite of products and, ultimately, retention at contract renewal.
   

  

**The Auth0 Technical Account Manager Opportunity**
 This is an exciting opportunity for an experienced technical expert to join the TAM team. This role specialises in the Auth0 platform, which is an easy\-to\-implement, adaptable authentication and authorization platform for Consumer and SaaS applications. Basically, we make your login experience awesome. You will be working with a portfolio of well\-known brands on their Auth0 implementations as an identity coach. Building close relationships with technical stakeholders from early in the customer lifecycle, you will learn their business, goals, challenges and technical landscape, ensuring Okta delivers on a long\-term strategic plan to help solve these challenges and realize the value of their Auth0 platform investment, while continuing to evolve to solve new objectives and improve security posture.
   

  

 The ideal candidate for this role has experience in either customer business\-facing or technical delivery. They exhibit both interest and adaptability to both technical and business discussions, including agility in conversation and intelligent follow\-through for customers. They are able to showcase an understanding of the TAM role through concrete examples of problem solving strategies and tactics often faced in the role.
   

  

**What you’ll be doing:**
* Serve as a trusted Identity Coach, guiding customers to achieve their objectives through timely technical guidance, advice, enablement, and best practice sharing
* Learn our customers’ business, gaining insights into their strategies, goals, and challenges \- through the lens of identity
* Build and nurture long\-term relationships with stakeholder personas from developers, engineering leads, app builders, and product owners, through to C\-level exec, evolving customers into Auth0 champions
* Conduct quarterly customer meetings with executives to recap past value, show progress on current initiatives and future state or roadmap items
* Conduct ad hoc customer meetings with technical practitioners on identity solutions, technical guidance and best practices
* Monitor customer health, satisfaction, and engagement, proactively addressing risks and escalations
* Collaborate with stakeholders to develop strategies to increase customer adoption, and uncover growth opportunities that will solidify Auth0 for the entirety of customer identity
* Analyze trends, identify areas for improvement, and take action to optimize customer outcomes
* Act as a product evangelist, educating customers on new features and alignment of roadmaps to enhance their experience
* Represent the voice of the customer, ensuring their needs and feedback shape the company’s approach


**Requirements:**
* 3\+ years of total experience in information technology, with a Bachelor’s degree; or an advanced degree without experience; or equivalent experience.
* Familiarity in the following core CIAM areas or technical competencies:
+ Technologies and protocols to support authentication and authorization (OAuth, OpenID Connect, and SAML 2\.0\)
+ Consuming APIs and HTTP request methods
+ High\-level understanding of custom consumer and SaaS apps both web and native,
+ Passion for learning cybersecurity principles for IT and consumer applications
+ Experience with SaaS/PaaS/cloud\-based services, driving their adoption, integration, and ongoing use
+ Basic knowledge of software development lifecycle, interest in programming languages, and application builder practices

* A customer\-first mindset with the energy and problem\-solving skills to address technical challenges and achieve customers' business and technical objectives
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously, perform customer research, generate reports, and analyze data. Strong presentation and whiteboarding/diagram skills
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to set expectations, and communicate goals and objectives with customers at various levels, from a developer to C\-level exec
* Ability to influence customer behaviour \& health metrics across a portfolio of customers
* Ability to work US Time Zone (CST)


 P24641\_3352086
   

  

**What you can look forward to as a Full\-Time Okta employee!**
* Amazing Benefits
* Making Social Impact
* Developing Talent and Fostering Connection \+ Community at Okta


 Some roles may require travel to one of our office locations for in\-person onboarding.
   

  

 Okta is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, marital status, age, physical or mental disability, or status as a protected veteran. We also consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and convictions records, consistent with applicable laws.
   

  

 If reasonable accommodation is needed to complete any part of the job application, interview process, or onboarding please use this Form to request an accommodation.
   

  

**Notice for New York City Applicants \& Employees:** 
 Okta may use Automated Employment Decision Tools (AEDT), as defined by New York City Local Law 144, that use artificial intelligence, machine learning, or other automated processes to assist in our recruitment and hiring process. In accordance with NYC Local Law 144, if you are an applicant or employee residing in New York City, please
 **click here** 
 to view our full NYC AEDT Notice.
   

  

 Okta is committed to complying with applicable data privacy and security laws and regulations. For more information, please see our Personnel and Job Candidate Privacy Notice at https://www.okta.com/legal/personnel\-policy/.

0a4a8e34.title: Technical Program Manager - Engineering
0a4a8e34.description:
**Job Requirements**
**About Phenom**
 Phenom is an Applied AI company transforming how people find and choose work. Our platform uses artificial intelligence to power intelligent talent experiences for global enterprises, helping organizations hire faster, develop better talent, and deliver meaningful career journeys.
   

  

 Our mission is to help a billion people find the right work.
   

  

 We are building the next generation of AI\-driven products and platforms, and we are looking for high\-ownership Technical Program Managers to help drive Phenom's most critical engineering initiatives.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Technical Program Manager in Phenom's Engineering organization, you will work closely with the Head of Engineering and senior leadership to drive the company's most strategic initiatives ("Big Bets").
   

  

 This is a high\-impact role focused on solving complex, ambiguous problems and driving execution across multiple engineering teams. You will operate at the intersection of engineering, product, data, and business to ensure our most critical initiatives are successfully delivered.
   

  

 This role is ideal for individuals with a hands\-on engineering background, strong problem\-solving ability, leadership potential, and a passion for building AI\-driven products at scale.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Drive strategic engineering initiatives from concept to execution and measurable impact
* Partner with engineering leaders, product managers, and architects to define execution plans and technical roadmaps
* Translate ambiguous business or technical problems into structured plans and actionable milestones
* Coordinate across multiple engineering teams to drive alignment, remove blockers, and ensure timely delivery
* Track progress, risks, and dependencies, and communicate updates to senior leadership
* Establish effective execution mechanisms, operating cadence, and program visibility
* Work closely with leadership on initiatives involving AI, platform, infrastructure, and product innovation
* Help scale Phenom's engineering execution capability as the company grows


**What We Are Looking For**
* Hands\-on software development or engineering background, with the ability to engage credibly on architecture, system design, and technical trade\-offs
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical thinking ability
* Ability to work in fast\-moving, ambiguous environments
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
* High ownership and bias for action
* Ability to drive alignment across cross\-functional teams


**Required Qualifications**
* B.Tech / B.E. or equivalent engineering degree
* 2–6 years of experience with demonstrated hands\-on software development, engineering, or technical program management
* Working knowledge of software development lifecycle, system architecture, and technical execution
* Demonstrated ability to drive complex, cross\-team technical initiatives


**Preferred Background**
* Engineering degree from top institutions such as IIT, NIT, BITS, or IIIT
* MBA from top institutions such as ISB, IIMs, or other leading business schools, in addition to a hands\-on engineering background
* Experience in engineering, product, technical consulting, or program management roles
* Exposure to technology, AI, platforms, or digital products
* Demonstrated leadership potential and strong execution ability


**Nice to Have**
* Exposure to AI, machine learning, or data platforms
* Experience working in product companies, startups, or consulting
* Familiarity with Agile, engineering workflows, or technical delivery environments


**Why This Role is Unique**
* Work directly with senior engineering leadership on company\-level strategic initiatives
* Drive initiatives that shape the future of an Applied AI company
* Gain deep exposure to engineering, product, and AI innovation
* Fast career growth path into senior technical or engineering leadership roles
* Opportunity to solve high\-impact problems at scale

cffe8ba9.title: Solution Architect (FROM SAAS/ ECOMMERCE/ FINTECH)
cffe8ba9.description:
**About The Opportunity**
 A fast\-scaling tech consultancy operating at the intersection of SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce, we help global brands architect, deploy, and scale intelligent AI\-driven platforms that power personalization, automation, and real\-time decision\-making. Our clients span Fortune 500s to high\-growth startups—we translate complex business needs into scalable, secure, and intelligent AI architectures leveraging cloud\-native stacks, GenAI frameworks, and enterprise\-grade data ecosystems.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Design end\-to\-end AI solution blueprints for SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce clients—covering data pipelines, model orchestration, API gateways, and observability layers.
* Lead AI architecture reviews, aligning technical design with compliance (GDPR, PCI\-DSS), scalability targets, and cost\-optimization goals.
* Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral) and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate) into client platforms for RAG, agent\-based workflows, and real\-time recommendation engines.
* Partner with data science and engineering teams to productionize ML models using MLOps tooling (MLflow, SageMaker, DVC) and Kubernetes\-based inference services.
* Define cloud architecture on AWS/Azure/GCP—leveraging serverless, event\-driven, and containerized patterns to support low\-latency AI services.
* Advise on AI governance, model drift detection, bias mitigation, and ethical AI frameworks tailored to regulated verticals (Fintech, Healthcare, E\-commerce).


**Skills \& Qualifications**
**Must\-Have**
* AWS
* Azure
* GCP
* Python
* LangChain
* TensorFlow
* PyTorch
* MLflow
* Kubernetes
* Apache Airflow
* OpenAI API
* LangGraph
* FAISS
* Pinecone
* GenAI
* LLM
* RAG
* LLMOps
* MLOps
* PCI\-DSS
* GDPR


**Preferred**
* Experience with fintech compliance frameworks (e.g., PSD2, KYC/AML architecture)
* Published AI solutions or case studies in e\-commerce personalization or SaaS automation
* Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty, Azure AI Engineer Associate


**Benefits \& Culture Highlights**
* Work with global clients building next\-gen AI products—no internal legacy systems to refactor
* Hybrid flexibility \+ travel opportunities to client sites across APAC, MEA, and North America
* Access to cutting\-edge AI tools, training budgets, and speaking opportunities at major tech conferences


 Skills: e\-commerce,data,commerce,aws,azure,automation,architecture,api,fintech,saas

ab6a0731.title: Principal Architect
ab6a0731.description:
***hackajob** 
 is collaborating with
 **Presidio** 
 to connect them with exceptional professionals for this role.*
**Presidio, Where Teamwork and Innovation Shape the Future**
 At Presidio, we're at the forefront of a global technology revolution, transforming industries through cutting\-edge digital solutions and next\-generation AI. We empower businesses \- and their internal customers \- to achieve more through innovation, automation, and intelligent insights.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Principal Architect – Digital, you will operate at the intersection of technology, consulting, and business transformation, partnering with senior client stakeholders to shape, design, and deliver large\-scale digital solutions.
   

  

 This is a high\-impact, client\-facing leadership role where you will not only define architecture but also bring forward innovative ideas, create value\-led solutions, and actively contribute to growing and expanding client accounts. You will play a key role in positioning Presidio as a trusted digital transformation partner across global markets, particularly the US.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Design and lead end\-to\-end architecture for large\-scale digital transformation programs, combining deep technical expertise with a strong builder mindset. Actively shape, prototype, and deliver modern, cloud\-native, and AI\-driven solutions that create measurable business impact for clients. Operate at the intersection of consulting, engineering, and innovation within Presidio’s Digital Practice, translating complex business challenges into scalable, future\-ready platforms.
* Act as a trusted advisor to C\-level stakeholders, influencing technology strategy, shaping roadmaps, and driving adoption of AI, data, and emerging technologies. Lead the design of architectures across cloud, data, integration, and application layers, ensuring alignment with enterprise goals around scalability, resilience, security, and cost efficiency, while promoting a product and platform mindset.
* Stay hands\-on by building reference implementations, accelerators, and proof\-of\-concepts across GenAI, intelligent automation, and next\-generation digital platforms. Drive adoption of AI/ML and GenAI capabilities, including LLMs and RAG\-based architectures, to unlock new business value. Champion modern engineering practices such as DevSecOps, CI/CD, platform engineering, and SRE to enable high\-velocity delivery.
* Collaborate across multidisciplinary teams, including engineers, data scientists, designers, and product leaders, to deliver integrated digital solutions. Play a key role in pre\-sales and solutioning by crafting compelling, differentiated proposals. Contribute to thought leadership through reusable frameworks, industry insights, and client engagements, while mentoring teams and elevating the broader architecture and engineering community.


**Required Skills**
* Deep expertise in enterprise and solution architecture, with a strong foundation in distributed systems, microservices, APIs, and event\-driven architectures. Proven experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP), including cloud\-native design, containers, Kubernetes, and serverless paradigms.
* Strong hands\-on experience with AI/ML and GenAI solutions, including LLMs, prompt engineering, and retrieval\-augmented generation, along with solid knowledge of modern data platforms and data engineering practices. Demonstrated builder mindset with the ability to write high\-quality code (Python, Java, or similar), develop POCs, and solve complex technical challenges.
* Well\-developed consulting mindset, with exceptional problem\-solving ability, business acumen, and the capability to influence both technical and non\-technical stakeholders. Experience in modern engineering practices, including AI accelerated development, infrastructure as code, observability, reliability engineering, and secure\-by\-design principles.
* Strong architectural judgment, with the ability to evaluate trade\-offs across scalability, performance, cost, and time\-to\-market. Proven leadership in guiding cross\-functional teams, mentoring architects and engineers, and driving alignment in complex environments.
* Excellent communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear, compelling narratives. A passion for continuous learning, innovation, and leveraging AI and emerging technologies to redefine possibilities for clients and Presidio’s Digital Practice.


**Your future at Presidio**
 Joining Presidio means stepping into a culture of trailblazers \- thinkers, builders, and collaborators \- who push the boundaries of what's possible. With our expertise AI\-driven analytics, cloud solutions, cybersecurity, and next\-gen infrastructure, we enable businesses to stay ahead in an ever\-evolving digital world.
   

  

 Here, your impact is real. Whether you're harnessing the power of Generative AI, architecting resilient digital ecosystems, or driving data\-driven transformation, you'll be part of a team that is shaping the future.
   

  

**Ready to innovate? Let's redefine what's next\-together.**
**About Presidio**
 Presidio is committed to hiring the most qualified candidates to join our amazing culture. We aim to attract and hire top talent from all backgrounds, including underrepresented and marginalized communities. We encourage women, people of color, people with disabilities, and veterans to apply for open roles at Presidio. Diversity of skills and thought is a key component to our business success.
   

  

 At Presidio, speed and quality meet technology and innovation. Presidio is a trusted ally for organizations across industries with a decades\-long history of building traditional IT foundations and deep expertise in AI and automation, security, networking, digital transformation, and cloud computing. Presidio fills gaps, removes hurdles, optimizes costs, and reduces risk. Presidio's expert technical team develops custom applications, provides managed services, and enables actionable data insights and builds forward\-thinking solutions that drive strategic outcomes for clients globally. For more information visit
   

  

*Applications will be accepted on a rolling basis.*
*Presidio has a strong commitment to the community we serve and our employees. As an Equal Opportunity Employer, we strive to have a workforce that includes the community we serve.*
***Recruitment Agencies, Please Note:***
 Presidio does not accept unsolicited agency resumes/CVs. Do not forward resumes/CVs to our career's email address, Presidio employees or any other means. Presidio is not responsible for any feeds related to unsolicited resumes/CVs.

b4697f97.title: Delivery Leader - Zentis AI (incubated by Techvantage.ai)
b4697f97.description:
**Delivery Leader, Zentis AI (incubated by Techvantage.ai)** 




*Agentic AI for regulated BFSI. Four markets. Founder proximity.* 




 Most enterprise AI dies in a slide deck. A pilot that never reaches production is just an expensive demo, and we do not build those. Ours ship: on time, on spec, to customers who become references.
 



 We have built a product that works, with live deployments in a domain where most AI never clears compliance and ours is engineered to. Now we are scaling, and investors are at the table for that next chapter. This is not a seat where the pipeline is handed to you and all that remains is execution. You will help shape opportunities, get close to prospects, and win the room in presales. Then you will own delivery all the way to a customer who will vouch for us. If you want to hunt and build both, this is that role. If you only want to run a pre\-filled backlog, it is not.
 



 This is not a role for someone looking for a job. It is for someone looking to own something.
 



**What you will own** 



* The full arc of an engagement: from helping scout and shape opportunities, through presales and solutioning, to end to end delivery for some of the biggest names in BFSI. You carry the outcome, not just the plan.
* The bridge between sales, engineering, and the customer's IT, risk, and compliance teams. When it gets hard, you are the one holding it together.
* Pilots taken from kickoff to production rollout, including the messy parts most people quietly hand back.
* The delivery playbook that lets us scale beyond hand crafted engagements. You are building the machine, not just running the line.
* Delivery pods that you lead, grow, and motivate. People look to you when the road goes uphill, and you take them up it.



**What you bring** 



* Around 10 years delivering enterprise technology projects, with BFSI a strong plus.
* Real scars from regulated rollouts: UAT, security audits, change management, sign offs.
* Comfort in front of the customer before the contract is signed. Presales, scoping, and the credibility to shape a deal, not just deliver it.
* Sharp technical instincts. You do not need to write the code, but technology is not alien to you, and engineers respect your judgment.
* The spine to push back on scope creep without breaking the relationship.
* Process discipline, and genuinely excellent written, spoken, and stakeholder communication.
* A reference obsessed definition of done. Go live is not the finish line. A customer who will vouch for us is.
* Bachelor's in Engineering, CS, or related. PMP, PRINCE2, or Agile a plus.



**Why this seat is different** 




 Zentis AI is Agentic AI for the regulated enterprise, selling into institutions where most AI never survives compliance review. ESOPs from day one, real equity, and measurable ROI in production. Founder proximity, frontier problems, four markets, and a seat in the room when we decide what to build next. You will not be executing someone else's blueprint. You will help draw it, including who we go after and how we win them.
 



**How we work** 




 We measure what you ship, not the hours you log. That is real autonomy for people who move, and little patience for those who wait to be told. We hire slowly and choose carefully. We pay well and fairly for the right person, with meaningful equity, because we are not chasing numbers. We are building something that lasts.
 



 This is
 **demanding** 
 work, in a hard domain, for people who
 **take accountability** 
 and stay loyal to the goal even when it is difficult. It is not a pit stop. If you are optimising for the highest possible package rather than the work, this probably is not your seat, and that is okay. We would both rather find that out now.
 



 Hybrid: three days together in the office, two flexible.
 



**Apply** 




 Email your CV to
 **jobs@zentis.ai** 
 . Tell us, in a line or two, about a pilot or programme you personally dragged across the finish line when it would have been easier to let it slip.

11e749f9.title: Cloud Architect
11e749f9.description:
**Company Description** 
 Quantum\-AI Innovation Private Limited, through its Quantum AI School initiative, is a forward\-thinking institution focused on preparing learners for the future of technology. The organization makes advanced fields such as quantum computing, artificial intelligence, and next\-generation digital innovation accessible to individuals from diverse backgrounds. Its programs combine rigorous theory with hands\-on, project\-based learning, collaborative research, and exposure to cutting\-edge industry tools. With guidance from domain experts, researchers, and industry professionals, learners develop technical expertise, creative confidence, and ethical awareness. Quantum\-AI Innovation Private Limited fosters a community of thinkers and innovators committed to shaping the future of quantum computing and AI.
 



**Role Description** 
 The Cloud Architect will design, implement, and optimize scalable cloud architectures to support Quantum\-AI Innovation’s educational platforms, data pipelines, and AI/quantum computing workloads. Day\-to\-day responsibilities include assessing business and technical requirements, defining solution architectures, selecting appropriate cloud services, and ensuring secure, reliable infrastructure deployment. The role involves collaborating with software development teams to integrate applications with cloud environments, establishing best practices for performance, security, and cost management, and troubleshooting complex infrastructure and integration issues. The Cloud Architect will also document architectural decisions, mentor technical team members, and stay current with emerging cloud technologies relevant to AI and quantum computing. This is a full\-time, on\-site role based in Gurugram.
 



**Qualifications** 







* Strong Solution Architecture skills, including designing end\-to\-end cloud solutions aligned with business and technical needs.
* Deep understanding of Infrastructure concepts, such as networking, storage, compute, security, and cloud\-native services (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Experience in Software Development and Integration, including APIs, microservices, CI/CD pipelines, and application deployment on cloud platforms.
* Proficiency in Architecture principles, reference architectures, and best practices for scalable, secure, and highly available systems.
* Hands\-on experience with infrastructure\-as\-code tools (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation) and container/orchestration technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
* Knowledge of data and AI workloads in the cloud, including machine learning pipelines, data lakes/warehouses, and high\-performance computing environments.
* Strong problem\-solving, documentation, and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across multidisciplinary teams.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Relevant cloud certifications (e.g., AWS Solutions Architect, Azure Architect, GCP Professional Cloud Architect) are highly beneficial.

c8cf64ed.title: Solution Architect (Upto 25 LPA)
c8cf64ed.description:
**Solution Architect**
**Location:** 
 Hybrid (Surat, Gujarat)
   

  

**Salary Range:** 
 ₹20,00,000 \- ₹25,00,000 per annum
   

  

**Experience:** 
 6\+ Years
   

  

**Job Overview**
 We are seeking a skilled and experienced
 **Solution Architect** 
 to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will design end\-to\-end scalable technology solutions, align technical strategies with business objectives, and guide engineering teams in implementing robust system architectures. This position requires a strong combination of technical expertise, solution design capabilities, and stakeholder collaboration skills to drive successful project execution across enterprise and product\-based environments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Architecture Design: Define and design scalable, secure, and high\-performing system architectures that meet business requirements.
* Technical Strategy Alignment: Collaborate with stakeholders to align technical strategies with business objectives and ensure successful project execution.
* Team Guidance: Lead and guide engineering teams in the implementation of architectural standards and best practices.
* Technology Evaluation: Evaluate and recommend technology stacks that are future\-ready and aligned with industry trends.
* Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive architecture documentation and standards.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to ensure alignment and understanding of architectural decisions.


**Required Skills \& ExperienceCore Technical Skills**
* Experience: 8\+ years of software engineering experience with at least 2\+ years in an Architecture role.
* Architecture Expertise: Strong experience in Solution Architecture, System Design, and Enterprise Architecture.
* System Understanding: Strong understanding of system architecture, solution design, and enterprise application integration.
* Cloud Platforms: Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure cloud architecture.
* Caching Technologies: Experience with caching technologies such as Redis.
* Queue Systems: Experience with queue systems such as RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS, or Service Bus.
* Microservices Knowledge: Strong knowledge of microservices architecture, REST APIs, and distributed systems.
* Database Familiarity: Familiarity with SQL and NoSQL databases and modern backend/application frameworks.
* Optimization Principles: Understanding scalability, security, reliability, and performance optimization principles.


 Functional Strengths
   

  

* Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze business problems and design practical, scalable technical solutions.
* Problem\-Solving: Strong problem\-solving and decision\-making capabilities.
* Security Knowledge: Strong understanding of security architecture, authentication, authorization, and OWASP best practices.
* Agile Experience: Experience working in Agile and cross\-functional development environments.
* Project Management: Ability to manage multiple projects and architecture initiatives simultaneously.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Certifications such as TOGAF, AWS, Azure, or Solution Architecture.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


 What We Offer
   

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunity to work in a hybrid environment.
* A collaborative and innovative work culture.
* Opportunities for professional growth and development.


 If you are passionate about technology and have a proven track record in solution architecture, we encourage you to apply and join our team in shaping the future of technology solutions.
   

  

 Skills: aws,rest apis,rabbitmq,service bus,sqs,togaf,architecture,azure cloud architecture,solution architect

* Technical Strategy Alignment: Collaborate with stakeholders to align technical strategies with business objectives and ensure successful project execution.
* Team Guidance: Lead and guide engineering teams in the implementation of architectural standards and best practices.
* Technology Evaluation: Evaluate and recommend technology stacks that are future\-ready and aligned with industry trends.
* Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive architecture documentation and standards.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, and other stakeholders to ensure alignment and understanding of architectural decisions.


**Required Skills \& ExperienceCore Technical Skills**
* Experience: 8\+ years of software engineering experience with at least 2\+ years in an Architecture role.
* Architecture Expertise: Strong experience in Solution Architecture, System Design, and Enterprise Architecture.
* System Understanding: Strong understanding of system architecture, solution design, and enterprise application integration.
* Cloud Platforms: Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure cloud architecture.
* Caching Technologies: Experience with caching technologies such as Redis.
* Queue Systems: Experience with queue systems such as RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS, or Service Bus.
* Microservices Knowledge: Strong knowledge of microservices architecture, REST APIs, and distributed systems.
* Database Familiarity: Familiarity with SQL and NoSQL databases and modern backend/application frameworks.
* Optimization Principles: Understanding scalability, security, reliability, and performance optimization principles.


 Functional Strengths
   

  

* Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze business problems and design practical, scalable technical solutions.
* Problem\-Solving: Strong problem\-solving and decision\-making capabilities.
* Security Knowledge: Strong understanding of security architecture, authentication, authorization, and OWASP best practices.
* Agile Experience: Experience working in Agile and cross\-functional development environments.
* Project Management: Ability to manage multiple projects and architecture initiatives simultaneously.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Certifications such as TOGAF, AWS, Azure, or Solution Architecture.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


 What We Offer
   

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package.
* Opportunity to work in a hybrid environment.
* A collaborative and innovative work culture.
* Opportunities for professional growth and development.

bf472415.title: Virtualization Solution Architect
bf472415.description:
**This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Virtualization Solution Architect based in India.**
 This role is designed for a highly experienced infrastructure architect who specializes in designing and delivering enterprise\-grade virtualization solutions across complex IT environments.
   

  

 You will be responsible for translating business and technical requirements into scalable, secure, and high\-performance virtualization architectures.
   

  

 The position plays a key role in shaping end\-to\-end solutions across VMware and Microsoft virtualization stacks, ensuring alignment with managed services standards.
   

  

 You will lead virtualization migration strategies, from planning and design through execution and validation, minimizing risk and ensuring operational continuity.
   

  

 A strong focus will be placed on building supportable, repeatable architectures that enable efficient long\-term service delivery.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with infrastructure, security, networking, and managed services teams to ensure seamless integration and reliability.
   

  

 This is a senior, client\-facing role combining architectural leadership with hands\-on technical expertise in enterprise environments.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Design and architect enterprise virtualization solutions across VMware vSphere, Microsoft Hyper\-V, and SCVMM platforms.
* Develop scalable, highly available, and performance\-optimized virtualization architectures aligned with managed services standards.
* Lead virtualization migration planning and execution, including strategy definition, scheduling, and cutover planning.
* Validate post\-migration environments to ensure stability, performance, and operational readiness.
* Design solutions with a strong focus on long\-term supportability, monitoring, and operational efficiency.
* Collaborate with managed services teams to ensure smooth service onboarding and operational handover.
* Define reference architectures, reusable patterns, and best practices for virtualization deployments.
* Integrate virtualization solutions with storage, networking, backup, and security infrastructures.
* Ensure solutions comply with customer security, governance, and compliance requirements.
* Act as a technical authority during pre\-sales, workshops, and delivery engagements.
* Produce clear architectural documentation, diagrams, and technical design specifications.
* Provide mentorship and escalation support to engineering and delivery teams.


**Requirements**
* Strong hands\-on expertise in VMware vSphere, Microsoft Hyper\-V, and SCVMM.
* Proven experience designing and executing enterprise virtualization migration projects.
* Solid background in managed services or enterprise infrastructure environments.
* Experience delivering solutions for enterprise or mid\-market customers.
* Strong understanding of infrastructure domains including storage, networking, and backup integration.
* Excellent architectural documentation and technical communication skills.
* Experience with disaster recovery, business continuity, and infrastructure automation (preferred).
* VMware or Microsoft certifications are considered a strong advantage.
* Strong client\-facing and consultative skills, with ability to translate requirements into technical solutions.
* Ability to balance strategic architecture design with hands\-on technical involvement.
* Strong organizational mindset, attention to detail, and structured delivery approach.


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation aligned with senior infrastructure market standards
* Opportunity to work on enterprise\-scale virtualization and migration projects
* Exposure to global managed services environments and complex infrastructures
* Professional growth in architecture, cloud transformation, and infrastructure modernization
* Collaborative and technically strong engineering environment
* Continuous learning and certification support
* Engagement in high\-impact client\-facing projects
* Stable long\-term career opportunities in enterprise IT services.


**How Jobgether Works**
 We use an
 **AI\-powered matching process** 
 to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

**Data Privacy Notice:** 
 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

 We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Solutions Architect to work on a contract basis. You will collaborate with stakeholders to identify requirements and translate them into architectural designs. This position requires expertise in cloud infrastructure and application development.

 • Design and architect end\-to\-end solutions for high\-impact projects in a cloud\-native environment.
 



 • Evaluate and recommend technology stacks and frameworks to meet project requirements.

 • Develop and maintain documentation for architectural decisions and solution designs.
 



  





**Required Skills \& Qualifications:** 




 • Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP is required.
 



 • Proficiency in designing and implementing microservices and serverless architectures.
 



 • Strong knowledge of containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes.
 



 • Familiarity with infrastructure as code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or CloudFormation.
 



 • Ability to analyze technical requirements and propose viable architectural solutions.
 



  





**More About the Opportunity:** 




 This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of cutting\-edge digital solutions. The client operates in a fast\-evolving market, ensuring exposure to innovative technologies and industry best practices.
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 




 We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.
 



  





**Apply Now!**

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
The purpose of the role is to create exceptional integration architectural solution design and thought leadership and enable delivery teams to provide exceptional client engagement and satisfaction.
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
1\. Define integration architecture for the new deals/ major change requests in existing deals
  
a. Creates an enterprise\-wide integration architecture that ensures that systems are seamlessly integrated while being scalable, reliable, and manageable.
  
b. Provide solutioning for digital integration for RFPs received from clients and ensure overall design assurance
  
i. Analyse applications, exchange points, data formats, connectivity requirements, technology environment, enterprise specifics, client requirements to set an integration solution design framework/ architecture
  
ii. Provide technical leadership to the design, development and implementation of integration solutions through thoughtful use of modern technology
  
iii. Define and understand current state integration solutions and identify improvements, options \& tradeoffs to define target state solutions
  
iv. Clearly articulate, document and use integration patterns, best practices and processes.
  
v. Evaluate and recommend products and solutions to integrate with overall technology ecosystem
  
vi. Works closely with various IT groups to transition tasks, ensure performance and manage issues through to resolution
  
vii. Document integration architecture covering logical, deployment and data views mentioning all the artefacts in detail
  
viii. Validate the integration solution/ prototype from technology, cost structure and customer differentiation point of view
  
ix. Identify problem areas and perform root cause analysis of integration architectural design and solutions and provide relevant solutions to the problem
  
x. Collaborating with sales, program/project, consulting teams to reconcile solutions to architecture
  
xi. Tracks industry integration trends and relates these to planning current and future IT needs
  
c. Provides technical and strategic input during the project planning phase in the form of technical architectural designs and recommendations
  
d. Collaborates with all relevant parties in order to review the objectives and constraints of solutions and determine conformance with the Enterprise Architecture.
  
e. Identifies implementation risks and potential impacts.
  
  

͏
  
  

2\. Enable Delivery Teams by providing optimal delivery solutions/ frameworks
  
a. Build and maintain relationships with technical leaders, product owners, peer architects and other stakeholders to become a trusted advisor
  
b. Develops and establishes relevant integration metrics (KPI/SLA) to drive results
  
c. Identify risks related to integration and prepares a risk mitigation plan
  
d. Ensure quality assurance of the integration architecture or design decisions and provides technical mitigation support to the delivery teams
  
e. Leads the development and maintenance of integration framework and related artefacts
  
f. Develops trust and builds effective working relationships through respectful, collaborative engagement across individual product teams
  
g. Ensures integration architecture principles, patterns and standards are consistently applied to all the projects
  
h. Ensure optimal Client Engagement
  
i. Support pre\-sales team while presenting the entire solution design and its principles to the client
  
ii. Coordinate with the client teams to ensure all requirements are met and create an effective integration solution
  
iii. Demonstrate thought leadership with strong technical capability in front of the client to win the confidence and act as a trusted advisor
  
  

͏
  
  

3\. Competency Building and Branding
  
a. Ensure completion of necessary trainings and certifications on integration middleware
  
b. Develop Proof of Concepts (POCs),case studies, demos etc. for new growth areas and solve new customer problems based on market and customer research
  
c. Develop and present a point of view of Wipro on digital integration by writing white papers, blogs etc.
  
d. Help in attaining market recognition through analyst rankings, client testimonials and partner credits
  
e. Be the voice of WiproÃ¢ÂÂs Thought Leadership by speaking in forums (internal and external)
  
f. Mentor developers, designers and Junior architects in the project for their further career development and enhancement
  
g. Contribute to the integration practice by conducting selection interviews etc.
  
  

4\. Team Management
  
a. Resourcing
  
i. Anticipating new talent requirements as per the market/ industry trends or client requirements
  
ii. Support in hiring adequate and right resources for the team through conducting interviews
  
b. Talent Management
  
i. Ensure adequate onboarding and training for the team members to enhance capability \& effectiveness
  
c. Performance Management
  
i. Provide inputs to project manager in setting appraisal objectives for the team, conduct timely performance reviews and provide constructive feedback to own direct reports (if present)
  
  

͏
  
  

Deliver
  
  

No. Performance Parameter Measure
  
  

1\. Support sales team to create wins % of proposals with Quality Index \>7, timely support of the proposals, identifying opportunities/ leads to sell services within/ outside account (lead generation), no. of proposals led
  
2\. Delivery Responsibility in Projects/Programs and Accounts (a) Solution acceptance of Integration architecture (from client and/or internal Wipro architecture leadership), and
  
(b) effective implementation of integration\-approach/solution component by way of sufficient integration\-design, methods guidelines and tech\-know how of team
  
3\. Delivery support CSAT, delivery as per cost, quality and timelines, Identify and develop reusable components, Recommend tools for reuse, automation for improved productivity and reduced cycle times

**Key Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand business processes, challenges, and functional requirements.
* Design end\-to\-end Microsoft Dynamics 365 solutions aligned with business objectives and enterprise architecture standards.
* Provide solution architecture, technical leadership, and implementation guidance across Dynamics 365 projects.
* Define functional and technical solution designs, integration strategies, customization approaches, and extension patterns.
* Lead requirement gathering workshops, solution design sessions, and client walkthroughs.
* Guide development teams on Dynamics 365 best practices, coding standards, and architectural principles.
* Review existing Dynamics 365 implementations and recommend improvements for scalability, performance, maintainability, and security.
* Design and oversee integrations with external systems using Azure services and APIs.
* Develop and maintain Azure Functions to support integrations and business processes where required.
* Ensure solutions adhere to Microsoft's recommended architecture, security, and governance best practices.


**Required Functional Expertise**
* Strong experience with Dynamics 365 Order Management processes.
* Hands\-on experience implementing Dynamics 365 Customer Service (Customer Care) solutions.
* Experience with Product Management, Product Information Management (PIM), and Product Certification processes.
* Strong understanding of Dynamics 365 Sales, including Lead, Opportunity, Quote, Order, and Customer lifecycle management.
* Experience mapping complex business processes to standard Dynamics 365 capabilities while minimizing custom development.


**Required Technical Expertise**
* Deep expertise in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement (CE) architecture.
* Strong experience with Microsoft Dataverse and the Power Platform, including Power Apps and Power Automate.
* Hands\-on experience developing customizations using plugins, workflows, business rules, custom APIs, and extensions.
* Experience developing Azure Functions and implementing Azure\-based integrations.
* Strong understanding of REST APIs, integration patterns, middleware, and enterprise application architecture.
* Experience with data migration strategies, security models, role\-based access control, and solution deployment.
* Ability to review technical designs, mentor development teams, and ensure adherence to architectural standards.


**Experience \& Qualifications**
* 10\+ years of experience within the Microsoft Dynamics 365 ecosystem.
* Proven experience as a Dynamics 365 Solution Architect, Technical Architect, or similar leadership role delivering enterprise\-scale implementations.
* Strong consulting, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* Demonstrated ability to independently lead solution discussions with senior business and technical stakeholders.
* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills with the ability to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
* Experience working within Agile delivery methodologies is preferred.


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to work on cutting\-edge Microsoft technologies and enterprise\-scale digital transformation projects.
* Collaborative and growth\-oriented work environment with continuous learning opportunities.
* Competitive compensation package with excellent career growth and advancement opportunities.
* Exposure to innovative projects and global clients across diverse industries.


 Excited to architect enterprise\-scale Microsoft Dynamics 365 solutions and drive digital transformation initiatives?
   

  

 Click the Apply button below and become an Arcgatian!
   

  

 Apply

6984d965.title: Technical Architect
6984d965.description:
Job Description
 



**Skill\- Technical Architect** 




**Experience: 10\-12 Years** 




**Location: Bangalore (Basavanagudi)** 




**Mode\- Hybrid** 




**Job Description:** 




**About the Role:** 




 We’re looking for a Architect with a startup mindset, who thrives in a fast\-paced, high ownership environment. You should be a doer, thinker, and leader—someone who doesn't wait for direction but defines it. If you’ve worked in fast\-scaling product companies, led high performing teams, and solved complex technical problems while keeping the bigger picture in mind, we want to hear from you.
 



  





**Who You Are :** 



* 10\+ years of experience in software engineering, with at least 2–3 years in architectural roles.
* Must have extensive experience in Docker , Node JS, Python,
* AI is a plus
* Proven background in high\-growth startups or product\-led tech companies.
* Strong experience with system design, architecture patterns, scalability, and performance tuning.
* You bring a "can\-do" and "get\-things\-done" attitude with zero tolerance for procrastination.

**What You’ll Do :** 




 • Own end\-to\-end architecture for new and existing products.
 



 • Drive engineering excellence, performance, and scalability across systems.
 



 • Collaborate closely with founders, product, and engineering teams to convert vision into architecture.
 



 • Identify tech debt, eliminate blockers, and instill a culture of ownership and urgency.
 



 • Lead design and code reviews, and define architectural best practices.
 



 • Act as a technical mentor and culture carrier for the engineering team.
 



 • Bring structure, strategy, and speed to an environment that needs it.
 



  





**Education** 




**PG :** 
 Masters/Post\-Graduation

e632ed3d.title: Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2) - Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
e632ed3d.description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Tech Lead – Automation Solutions (Power Platform, K2\) \- Husky (Guindy, Chennai)
   

  

**Id:** 
 20857
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 Are you ready to shape the next generation of enterprise automation while keeping mission\-critical workflows running smoothly?
   

  

 As Tech Lead for the Automation Team, you will play a pivotal role in Husky’s transition from legacy workflow platforms to a modern, scalable automation landscape centered on the Microsoft Power Platform. You’ll lead by example—guiding your team in designing, governing, and delivering Power Apps and Power Automate solutions—while also ensuring the reliability, continuity, and evolution of existing automation solutions such as K2\.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of innovation and responsibility: driving modernization, setting technical standards, and mentoring engineers, while safeguarding the automation backbone that supports our global business operations.
   

  

 If you enjoy combining hands\-on technical leadership, platform thinking, and pragmatic enterprise automation, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
**Technical Leadership**
* Understand the E2E high level architecture (big picture)
* Translate the HLD (high level design) into the LLD (low level design) in collaboration with architects and own the LLD
* Technical direction for the product area
* Contribute to coordinating cross\-team dependencies and integration points


**Delivery \& Execution Excellence**
* Contribute to the feature definition and review
* Generate concepts and facilitate the concept selection
* Breaking down complex features into actionable tasks
* Helping with estimation and sprint planning
* Addressing technical impediments
* Own production readiness (incl. non\-functional requirements)


**Quality, Governance \& Security**
* Ensuring quality
* Conducting meaningful reviews and ensuring adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) / DoD (Definition of Done) criteria
* Ensure adherence to applicable standards, policies, and practices (e.g. DevSecOps)


**Incident Response**
* Leading incident response, root cause analysis (RCA), and post\-mortems


**Mentorship \& Team Growth**
* Mentoring team members
* Documenting key design decisions
* Participate in interviews and hiring decisions
* Promoting engineering best practices and driving continuous improvement


**Collaboration \& Communication**
* Act as the primary technical point of contact across Product, Architecture, and Platform teams
* Clearly communicate technical decisions and trade\-offs to non\-technical stakeholders


****Qualifications****
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 10\+ years professional experience in software development, 5\+ years’ experience with Power Platform
* Power Platform Expertise
* Deep, hands\-on experience with Microsoft Power Platform, including: Power Apps (Canvas \& Model Driven)
* Power Automate (cloud flows, approvals, error handling)
* Dataverse (data modeling, security, performance)
* Proven ability to design enterprise\-scale Power Platform solutions
* Strong understanding of solution layering, Application Lifecycle Management, and environment strategies
* Power Platform Governance
* Hands\-on experience implementing Power Platform governance, including DLP policies, environment strategies, Center of Excellence (CoE) Starter Kit
* Strong understanding of: Role\-based security in Dataverse
* Tenant\-level Power Platform administration
* Experience working in regulated or enterprise environments (e.g., GDPR, ISO, SOC)
* Azure \& Microsoft Ecosystem
* Solid experience in integrating Power Platform with Azure services (Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Service Bus, Entra AD) and Microsoft 365 (SharePoint, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive)
* Experience with authentication and authorization: Entra AD, OAuth, service principals, managed identities
* DevOps \& ALM
* Proven experience with Power Platform ALM, including: Managed vs unmanaged solutions
* Versioning and deployment strategies
* Experience with:
* Azure DevOps or GitHub
* CI/CD pipelines for Power Platform
* Automated testing strategies (where applicable)
* Familiarity with source control best practices for low\-code assets
* Development \& Customization Skills
* Strong proficiency in: Power Fx
* JavaScript (for model\-driven apps)
* Understanding data modeling best practices and normalization
* Experience working with web services / APIs (e.g., SOAP, REST)
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team
* Fluency in English (spoken and written)
* Strong problem\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities


**Assets**
* K2 Five / K2 BlackPearl – Workflows, Smart Objects, Forms and Views, Administration \& Troubleshooting, End\-to\-End testing
* Certifications: PL 600 \- Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
* Experience setting up or running a Power Platform Center of Excellence
* Prior experience in citizen development enablement
* Exposure to AI Builder, Copilot Studio, or Power Platform \+ AI scenarios
* Background in enterprise integration


**Why Husky?**
**Regulated Working Hours:** 
 Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\-being.
   

  

**Visible Impact:** 
 Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.
   

  

**Strategic Influence:** 
 Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.
   

  

**Empowered Involvement:** 
 Take an active role in decision\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.
   

  

**Valued Contributions:** 
 Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.
   

  

**Impactful Role:** 
 Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.
   

  

**Cutting\-Edge Projects:** 
 Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.
   

  

**Supportive Community:** 
 Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.
   

  

**Collaborative Environment:** 
 Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

9245d4d8.title: Cloud Devops Engineer
9245d4d8.description:
**Company Description** 




 ThreatXIntel is a growing Cybersecurity, IT Staffing, and Consulting company delivering end\-to\-end technology and security solutions. We are hiring for our corporate client. ThreatXIntel is the official hiring partner for this requirement.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking an experienced
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 with strong hands\-on expertise in
 **AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions, CI/CD automation, and application hosting across Windows and Linux environments** 
 .
 



 The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing and managing cloud infrastructure, automating deployment workflows, handling release management, and supporting both
 **web and mobile application deployment pipelines** 
 . This role requires strong technical troubleshooting skills, automation mindset, and the ability to work closely with development, QA, and product teams.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, implement, and manage scalable AWS cloud infrastructure across multiple environments.
* Build and maintain Terraform\-based Infrastructure as Code modules.
* Create, manage, and optimize CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
* Manage web application hosting on Windows servers using IIS.
* Manage Linux\-based hosting using Apache, Nginx, reverse proxies, SSL, and systemd services.
* Set up and maintain deployment pipelines for web applications and mobile applications.
* Support Android and iOS build and release processes.
* Automate operational tasks to improve deployment reliability and efficiency.
* Implement monitoring, logging, and alerting using AWS and other observability tools.
* Troubleshoot production infrastructure and deployment issues.
* Ensure security best practices across AWS, CI/CD pipelines, servers, and cloud resources.
* Collaborate with development, QA, and product teams to streamline release processes.
* Maintain proper technical documentation for infrastructure, deployments, and operational workflows.



**Required Skills** 



* 3–6 years of relevant DevOps experience.
* Strong hands\-on experience with AWS services such as:
* EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, RDS, ALB/ELB, CloudFront, Lambda, CloudWatch, Route53\.
* Strong experience with Terraform for Infrastructure as Code.
* Hands\-on experience building CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
* Experience hosting applications on Windows IIS.
* Experience hosting applications on Linux using Apache or Nginx.
* Good understanding of DNS, SSL/TLS, firewalls, security groups, and networking.
* Experience with Android and iOS deployment workflows.
* Knowledge of Gradle, Fastlane, TestFlight, Play Console, and code signing.
* Good Linux and Windows server administration skills.
* Familiarity with Docker and container deployment workflows.
* Scripting experience using Bash or PowerShell.



**Nice\-to\-Have Skills** 



* Kubernetes or AWS EKS experience.
* Experience with Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, or similar monitoring tools.
* Experience with Maven, Gradle, or Xcode build tools.
* Knowledge of identity services such as Azure AD or Okta.
* Experience managing secrets using AWS Secrets Manager or SSM Parameter Store.



**Soft Skills** 



* Strong communication and coordination skills.
* Excellent analytical and troubleshooting ability.
* Ownership mindset with focus on automation and quality.
* Good documentation and process\-oriented approach.
* Ability to work independently and collaborate with cross\-functional teams.

6d03d426.title: GM-Product Delivery Lead
6d03d426.description:
**Role** 




 GM \- Product Delivery Lead \- Web
 



**Function / Department** 




 Digital (COR) \-Corporate
 



**Job Purpose** 




 Lead end\-to\-end delivery, transformation, and governance of telecom digital web platforms to drive superior customer experience, business growth, and operational excellence. Own product roadmap execution, website delivery, stakeholder alignment, vendor management, and digital platform optimization while ensuring scalable, secure, and high\-performing customer digital journeys aligned with business objectives and organizational priorities.
 



**Key Result Areas/Accountabilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end website product delivery and digital transformation initiatives.
* Own roadmap execution for telecom website and digital customer journeys. Drive Agile delivery across multiple digital programs and releases.
* Manage website enhancements, feature launches, and production deployments.
* Collaborate with Product, Business, Technology, Marketing, Analytics, and Operations teams.
* Build and mentor high\-performing delivery teams.
* Ensure timely delivery within scope, budget, and quality parameters.
* Manage multiple vendors, system integration and technology partners to ensure seamless delivery execution and govern vendor delivery, SI partners, and SLA adherence
* Drive customer experience optimization across acquisition, recharge, payment, support, and self\-care journeys.
* Improve conversion, engagement, retention, and digital adoption metrics.
* Manage release planning, sprint governance, and backlog prioritization.
* Drive platform scalability, uptime, performance, and reliability and lead risk management, dependency tracking, and issue resolution.
* Drive executive governance and leadership reporting.
* Ensure compliance with security, privacy, accessibility, and enterprise standards.
* Partner with architecture teams on APIs, CMS, cloud, integrations, and modernization initiatives.
* Drive digital analytics and performance optimization initiatives.
* Lead defect reduction and continuous improvement programs. Ensure alignment of digital initiatives with business objectives and customer KPIs.



**Core Competencies, Knowledge, Experience** 



* Digital Product Delivery Leadership
* Digital Product Roadmap Planning \& Execution
* Telecom Digital Ecosystem understanding
* Website and Portal Delivery Management
* Agile / Scrum Delivery Model
* Design Thinking Methodology
* Executive Stakeholder Management
* Customer Experience (CX) Optimization
* Vendor and Partner Governance
* Risk and Dependency Management
* Data\-driven Decision Making
* Digital Analytics and Reporting
* Team Leadership and People Management
* Strategic Planning and Execution
* Enterprise Delivery Governance
* Budget and Resource Management



**Must have technical / professional qualifications** 



* B.Tech/BE/MCA/MBA/PGDM preferred
* 12\-15\+ years of experience in Digital Product Delivery
* SDLC, Release Management and Product Delivery Lifecycle expertise
* Experience to Web, Mobile App, CMS, API, and Digital Transformation programs
* Experience managing cross\-functional teams and multiple vendors/partners
* Agile/Scrum/PMP Certification Preferred
* Telecom/Banking domain knowledge preferred
* Strong communication, leadership, and governance capabilities

****Job Description****
