5aaa336d.title: Solutions Engineer, India
5aaa336d.description:
Rhombus Power, Inc. delivers AI\-powered predictive intelligence in real time for defense and national security organizations worldwide. Our mission\-built products— Ambient AI and Guardian— are transforming strategic, operational, and tactical decision\-making. By empowering the shift from reactive analysis to proactive, predictive intelligence and decision support, Rhombus Power is providing foresight and freedom of action when it matters most.
   

  

 Come join our cross\-disciplinary and world\-class team that is delivering game\-changing solutions to transform global security.
   

  

 Learn more about Rhombus Power, Inc. and watch a demonstration of Guardian, our AI Platform here:
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=3PxY6su1Q\-Q
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/@rhombuspower8558/videos
   

  

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v\=Iby5WVNfQiI
   

  

 See the following articles to learn more about what we do:
   

  

 https://www.rhombuspower.com/news\-and\-media
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Solutions Engineer at Rhombus Power, you are a hands\-on software generalist embedded directly with our national security partners. Much like the pioneering Forward Deployed roles in our industry, you will be the technical expert at the intersection of world\-changing problems and impactful AI technology. You will rapidly understand our customers' toughest operational challenges and architect, build, and deploy custom solutions that leverage the Rhombus Power platform. This role is a mix of development and customer support, requiring you to be comfortable writing code (DevOps, frontend, and backend) while acting as the primary technical consultant.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work side\-by\-side with intelligence partners to deeply understand their missions, data workflows, and requirements for predictive insights.
* Design, develop, and deploy tailored software solutions and applications utilizing the Rhombus Power AI platform.
* Be a true software generalist, writing, testing, and maintaining production\-grade code across the full stack—including cloud/DevOps configuration, backend data services, and interactive frontend user interfaces.
* Provide technical consultation to partners, guiding them on the best use of our products to achieve their strategic business and mission goals.
* Serve as the technical liaison, ensuring seamless communication between customer teams and Rhombus Power's core product engineering teams to influence product direction.
* Troubleshoot complex issues in live operational environments, providing expert technical support and guidance to maintain mission continuity.
* Travel to customer sites for deployment, integration, and operational support.


**Qualifications**
* Professional\-level proficiency in English (reading, writing, and verbal communication) required.
* 2–3 years of professional experience in a relevant technical role (e.g., Software Engineering, Technical Consulting, or Data Engineering).
* Demonstrated experience as a software generalist, capable of contributing across the technology stack (DevOps, frontend, and backend).
* Proven experience in a customer\-facing capacity, including requirement gathering, solution presentations, or technical support.
* Proficiency in at least one modern programming language (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Go).
* Experience with Linux/Unix systems and system administration a plus
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.

d3a6ca69.title: Stone Solutions Architect
d3a6ca69.description:
About Us

Jabal Exim is a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium granite, marble, quartzite, and engineered stone, serving customers across the USA, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. We are looking for an experienced architect with strong natural stone expertise to help us deliver world\-class stone solutions for residential, commercial, hospitality, and infrastructure projects.

Job Summary

We are seeking a highly motivated **Stone Solutions Architect** with experience in natural stone projects. The successful candidate will work closely with our international sales team, factory, architects, designers, developers, and contractors to develop practical, beautiful, and technically sound stone solutions.

Responsibilities

* Review architectural drawings and identify stone opportunities.
* Prepare shop drawings, stone layouts, elevations, and fabrication drawings.
* Create BOQs (Bill of Quantities) and quantity take\-offs.
* Recommend suitable stone materials, finishes, thicknesses, and fixing systems.
* Develop book\-matching and vein\-matching layouts for premium projects.
* Coordinate with production teams to ensure designs can be manufactured efficiently.
* Support the sales team during technical discussions with clients.
* Prepare presentations, design concepts, and 3D visualizations for international projects.
* Assist in product development and innovative stone applications.
* Visit project sites when required.

Required Qualifications

* Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Architecture.
* Minimum 5 years of experience in natural stone, marble, granite, or facade projects.
* Excellent knowledge of stone fabrication and installation techniques.
* Experience with luxury residential, hospitality, commercial, or mixed\-use developments.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Software Skills

* AutoCAD (Required)
* SketchUp
* Revit (Preferred)
* Lumion / Enscape / Twinmotion
* Adobe Photoshop
* Microsoft Office

Preferred Experience

* Granite
* Marble
* Quartzite
* Engineered Stone
* Sintered Stone
* Dry Cladding Systems
* Shop Drawings
* BOQs
* Quantity Estimation
* Stone Facades
* Interior Stone Applications

What We Offer

* Competitive salary (based on experience)
* Career growth in an international company
* Opportunity to work on prestigious global projects
* Collaborative and innovative work environment

Pay: ₹15,000\.00 \- ₹35,000\.00 per month

Application Question(s):

* How many years of experience do you have as an Architect?
* How many years have you worked specifically with natural stone (Granite, Marble, Quartzite, Limestone, etc.)?
* Have you worked for any of the following?

Natural Stone Manufacturer  
Stone Export Company  
Marble/Granite Company  
Facade Contractor  
Interior Design Firm  
Architectural Consultancy  
Other

* Are you currently located in Hyderabad or willing to relocate?
* Are you willing to travel within India and internationally for projects?
* Which natural stones have you worked with?

Granite  
Marble  
Quartzite  
Limestone  
Travertine  
Onyx  
Engineered Stone  
Sintered Stone

* Rate your proficiency in AutoCAD.
* Which software are you proficient in?

AutoCAD  
Revit  
SketchUp  
Lumion / Enscape / Twinmotion  
Other

* Describe one natural stone project you have worked on.

(Short answer)

* Current Employer

Current Designation  
Current CTC (Annual)  
Expected CTC (Annual)  
Notice Period  
Earliest Joining Date  
Total Experience

LinkedIn Profile

Work Location: In person

df203865.title: Healthcare Solutions Architect, India-PS
df203865.description:
**Description**
 Are you excited to work with the team that enables Indian industries to build innovative services with AWS, scaling to serve billion\+ Indians? The team in AWS India is looking for a Solutions Architect, who can work with our customers, who have built world class scaling infrastructure, exceptional solutions, exploding digital content and interactive experiences. Indian industries are profoundly changing everyday life of billion\+ Indians through their digital native solutions.
   

  

 Your broad responsibilities will include: owning the technical engagement and ensure success around specific implementation projects, developing a deep expertise in the AWS technologies as well as broad knowledge around how applications and services are constructed using the AWS platform for Healthcare organisations. An ideal candidate will be owning the architecture and design IT systems deploying at scale to evangelize adoption of new technologies, have experience with multiple technologies, patterns and frameworks; and is able to figure out trade\-offs between them, be hands\-on and can roll up their sleeves should need be to do Proof of concepts and demonstrate technologies. Candidate should be good at identifying repeatable pattern and best practices, picking up new technologies, Healthcare industry aspects \& constant learners.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will possess customer facing skills that will allow them to represent AWS India well within a customer’s or partner's environment and drive discussions with senior executives within the company, as well as a technical background that enables them to easily interact and give guidance to developer community and architects in India. S/he should also have demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, product, and technical challenges.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 The selected candidate will work with AWS customers to map business requirements to technology; define performance requirement based on user access patterns; compare between various design patterns; discern between variety of Generative AI, AI/ML, data, analytics, compute, containers, and serverless technologies; architect for high availability and scaling requirements, while minimizing the cost and meeting security standards; architect disaster recovery solutions for required RTO/RPO; advise on building DevOps pipelines and process; advise on monitoring and observability; conduct well architected reviews; partner with AWS Specialists to implement innovative solutions; collaborate with the Service teams to identify feature gaps suggest new features; present to customer C\-suite and technical communities on architecture patterns, best practices, case studies.
   

  

 Position can be based out of Gurgaon/ Noida
   

  

**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 10\+ years of IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries experience
* 4\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 2\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with AWS technologies from a dev/ops perspective
* Experience working within software development or Internet\-related industries
* Experience migrating or transforming legacy customer solutions to the cloud
* Experience using managed ML/AI solutions
* Experience of architecting/ building/implementing Healthcare domain solutions


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Haryana
   

  

 Job ID: A10427789

517002fc.title: Associate Director / Director, Solution Architecture
517002fc.description:
**About Us**
 Volante Technologies is the leading global provider of low\-code cloud Payments as a Service solution for financial businesses. We are disruptors and innovators and we are growing fast. For the last three years, we have been the \#1 seller of wholesale payment systems worldwide. At Volante, we are all about revolutionizing the world of Payments.
   

  

 Role Summary
   

  

 Seeking a Solution Lead to bridge Product Owners and Engineering by translating business requirements into scalable, resilient, enterprise\-aligned technical designs and guiding Java\-based delivery across payments systems (transaction processing, messaging, integrations).
   

  

* What You’ll Do (Key Responsibilities)


 Functional\-to\-Technical Translation
   

  

* Work closely with Product Owners to understand functional requirements
* Convert business requirements into detailed technical solution designs
* Identify design gaps, edge cases, and non\-functional requirements early
* Drive requirement clarification workshops where needed


 End\-to\-End Solution Ownership
   

  

* Own overall solution architecture for assigned initiatives
* Produce high\-level and low\-level design documents
* Define integration patterns (batch, file\-based, APIs, messaging, queues)
* Ensure design alignment with enterprise architecture principles


 Technical Leadership
   

  

* Guide and mentor development teams during implementation
* Review code and design artifacts for quality and scalability
* Identify performance, concurrency, and integration risks upfront
* Ensure solutions meet reliability, resiliency, and scalability expectations


 Payments \& Domain Alignment
   

  

* Design solutions for payment processing workflows
* Understand transaction lifecycles, exception handling, reconciliation flows
* Ensure compliance with regulatory and operational controls
* Anticipate domain\-specific edge cases (timeouts, retries, duplicates, reversals, etc.)


 Cross\-Functional Collaboration
   

  

* Collaborate with QA, middleware, infrastructure, and operations teams
* Support production issue analysis and root cause identification
* Continuously improve solution patterns and reusable components
* What You Bring (Skills \& Qualifications)


 Must\-Haves
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in engineering / computer science


 Core Technical Skills
   

  

* Strong hands\-on experience in Core Java
* Solid understanding of OOP, collections, multithreading, concurrency
* Working knowledge of Servlets and Spring (used selectively)
* Experience in JVM memory management and performance tuning
* Familiarity with Java design patterns


 Integration \& Processing
   

  

* Experience with batch and file\-based processing systems
* Strong understanding of messaging and queue\-based systems
+ IBM MQ or similar platforms
+ Asynchronous processing concepts
+ Retry mechanisms, DLQ handling, idempotency

* Experience designing API\-based integrations
* Familiarity with Linux/Unix environments


 Architecture \& NFR Awareness
   

  

* Understanding of scalability, resiliency, and high availability
* Awareness of security principles in transaction systems
* Exposure to distributed systems and enterprise integration patterns


 Leadership \& Communication Skills
   

  

* Strong ability to articulate technical solutions to non\-technical stakeholders
* Experience working directly with Product Owners and business teams
* Ability to challenge requirements constructively
* Strong analytical and structured problem\-solving mindset
* Experience leading design reviews and driving technical decisions


 Nice\-to\-Haves
   

  

* TOGAF certification (good to have)
* Java or middleware certifications (good to have)
* What We Offer


 Highlight what matters most to candidates today.
   

  

 ✔ Competitive compensation
   

  

 ✔ Health benefits
   

  

 ✔ Remote/flexible work options
   

  

 ✔ Professional development support
   

  

 📍 Location
   

  

 Pune / Chennai
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Statement
   

  

 At Volante Technologies, we believe diversity drives innovation and inclusion fuels success. We are committed to creating a performance driven workplace where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to bring their authentic self to work. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and ensure equitable opportunities for growth. All qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, color, religion, age, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, veteran status, or any other factor protected by law. Together as ONE TEAM, we celebrate differences and foster collaboration, creativity, and belonging.

4e0a8e01.title: Architect
4e0a8e01.description:
**Location:** 
 Hybrid
 



**Practice:** 
 Data, AI \& Digital Engineering – Retail \& CPG
 



**Reports To:** 
 Global Head of AI / Industry Solutions
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking an accomplished
 **AI Architect** 
 with strong
 **Retail \& CPG** 
 domain knowledge to define and deliver end\-to\-end AI solution architectures for global clients. This role combines hands\-on architecture depth with leadership in translating business needs into secure, scalable AI systems across merchandising, supply chain, marketing, sales, and store/field operations.
 



 The ideal candidate is
 **AI\-native** 
 and fluent in
 **agentic frameworks** 
 , modern LLM application patterns (RAG, tool use, orchestration), and enterprise integration. They will be able to
 **identify high\-value use cases** 
 , run structured discovery, build
 **quick POCs/pilots** 
 , and define the reference architectures, governance, and operating model required to move from experimentation to production at scale.
 



 This is a senior, visible role focused on
 **architecture ownership** 
 —driving technical direction, defining target\-state architectures, setting standards/guardrails, and guiding teams to deliver production\-grade AI solutions (reliability, performance, security, cost, and maintainability) in complex Retail/CPG environments.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Retail/CPG AI Solution Architecture \& Technical Governance** 



* Own the
 **target\-state AI architecture** 
 for Retail/CPG clients—defining platform, data, model/LLM, integration, and security patterns aligned to enterprise constraints.
* Lead
 **architecture governance** 
 with business and technology stakeholders—capturing requirements, defining NFRs (latency, availability, cost), and ensuring alignment across teams and vendors.
* Define
 **domain architecture patterns** 
 for common Retail/CPG AI scenarios (personalization, pricing/promo, planning, knowledge copilots, store execution), including data contracts and integration touchpoints.
* Shape end\-to\-end transformation roadmaps across:
* Merchandising, assortment \& space planning decision intelligence
* Pricing, promotions \& revenue management (including retail media impact)
* Demand forecasting, replenishment, inventory optimization \& S\&OP/IBP
* Omnichannel customer experience \& personalization (web/app, loyalty, CRM/CDP)
* Store operations, workforce productivity, and supplier/distributor collaboration



  





**2\. Use\-Case Discovery, Solution Design \& Rapid Prototyping** 



* Lead structured
 **use\-case discovery** 
 with business and technology stakeholders—problem framing, current\-state assessment, data readiness, and target outcomes for Retail/CPG processes.
* Translate use cases into
 **solution blueprints** 
 : functional/non\-functional requirements, architecture options, data/LLM dependencies, evaluation approach, and delivery plan (POC → pilot → scale).
* Build and evolve
 **technical accelerators** 
 for Retail/CPG AI (reference architectures, reusable components, and demos):
* Agentic merchandising assistant (assortment, price/promo, content)
* Retail media \& trade promotion analytics copilots
* Customer service \& store associate copilots (knowledge \+ task automation)
* Supply chain planning copilots (forecast, exceptions, root\-cause, actions)
* Responsible AI \& model risk governance starter kit for Retail/CPG
* Own
 **technical spikes and rapid prototypes** 
 to validate feasibility, performance, cost, and risk—then guide teams on hardening (security, evaluation, monitoring) for production deployment.



  





**3\. Agentic AI Architecture, Rapid POCs \& Production Scale** 



* Define the
 **reference architecture** 
 for GenAI/agentic solutions: patterns for RAG, tool/function calling, multi\-agent orchestration, memory, evaluation, and observability.
* Partner with delivery and engineering teams to build
 **quick POCs** 
 (days/weeks), convert to pilots, and establish reusable components (prompt patterns, agent tools, connectors, guardrails, test harnesses).
* Assortment recommendation \& category insights copilot
* Price \& promo scenario generation with constraints and ROI estimation
* Demand forecast exception explanation \& recommended actions agent
* Customer service automation for order status, returns, substitutions, and policy Q\&A
* Product content enrichment (attributes, claims, compliance) using GenAI \+ validation
* Supplier collaboration copilot (chargebacks, OTIF, claims, disputes) with workflow automation
* Store manager copilot for tasking, audits, shrink insights, and labor optimization
* Embed
 **responsible AI** 
 practices: data privacy, security, model risk, bias/safety controls, evaluation, and compliance (including brand/legal requirements in Retail/CPG).



  





**4\. Enterprise AI Platform, Data Foundations \& Integration** 




 Architect AI solutions that integrate with Retail/CPG enterprise platforms and data products (ERP, OMS, WMS/TMS, demand planning, PIM/MDM, CRM/CDP, ecommerce platforms, retail media platforms), leveraging modern cloud data stacks and MLOps/LLMOps.
 


* Lead architecture decisions across:
* Data architecture for AI: curated domains, feature stores, knowledge stores, and governance
* LLMOps/MLOps: model selection, evaluation, deployment, monitoring, and cost controls
* Integration patterns: APIs, event streams, workflow engines, and enterprise search
* Security \& compliance: access control, data protection, auditability, and vendor risk
* Observability: tracing, quality metrics, drift monitoring, and human\-in\-the\-loop controls
* Experience architecture for AI: copilot UX, conversation design, and change adoption
* Vendor/tooling choices: foundation models, vector databases, orchestration frameworks, and accelerators
* Balance time\-to\-value with enterprise standards—making pragmatic architecture tradeoffs and clearly communicating risks, costs, and scalability.



  





**5\. Lead \& Grow High\-Performance AI Teams** 



* Mentor and guide cross\-functional squads across:
* AI/ML Engineers \& Applied Scientists
* Data Engineers \& Analytics Engineers
* Solution/Platform Architects (Cloud, Data, Integration)
* Product Owners \& Domain SMEs (Merchandising, Supply Chain, Marketing)
* UX/Conversation Designers \& Change/Adoption Leads
* Establish engineering excellence: architecture standards, code quality, experimentation rigor, and repeatable delivery playbooks for GenAI/agentic systems.
* Build capability: internal enablement, architecture playbooks, reusable templates, and best practices to support consistent delivery and operational excellence.



  





**6\. Delivery Governance, Adoption \& Value Realization** 



* Oversee delivery of AI programs from discovery to scale—ensuring the right operating model, stakeholder alignment, and architectural integrity.
* Ensure measurable business impact focused on:
* Revenue growth \& conversion uplift (digital \+ store)
* Margin improvement via optimized pricing/promo and reduced markdowns
* Working capital impact through inventory \& service\-level optimization
* Customer experience \& loyalty outcomes (NPS, retention, personalization lift)
* Productivity \& service improvements (planner/merchant time saved, store execution)
* Govern quality, risk, and executive communication—ensuring clear KPIs, adoption plans, and runbooks for business ownership.



  





**Desired Experience \& Background** 




**Must\-Have:** 



* 8–12 years of experience in AI/ML, data engineering, and/or enterprise architecture with 3\+ years in
 **GenAI/LLM solutions** 
 and client\-facing delivery.
* Proven ability to lead
 **solution architecture** 
 and technical delivery across multiple workstreams; strong stakeholder management, design documentation, and technical decision\-making.
* Strong
 **Retail/CPG domain knowledge** 
 across merchandising, pricing \& promotions, supply chain planning, store operations, ecommerce/omnichannel, trade promotion, and retail media.
* Hands\-on knowledge of
 **agentic frameworks** 
 and LLM application patterns (RAG, tool use, orchestration, evals, guardrails), and ability to translate them into secure enterprise architectures.
* Demonstrated ability to run
 **use\-case discovery** 
 , build rapid
 **POCs/demos** 
 , and drive stakeholder alignment to transition validated prototypes into production roadmaps.



**Good\-to\-Have:** 



* Degree in Computer Science/Engineering; postgraduate qualification in business/analytics is a plus.
* Cloud/architecture certifications (AWS/Azure/GCP; TOGAF) and experience with modern data platforms.
* Experience with GenAI tooling (vector databases, orchestration, evaluation frameworks), and building production\-grade LLMOps pipelines.
* Experience working with/for leading retailers or CPG firms, and/or major platforms (SAP, Oracle, Blue Yonder, Manhattan, Salesforce, Adobe, Shopify, commercetools).



  





**Core Competencies** 



* AI Solution Architecture \& Technical Leadership (Retail/CPG)
* Agentic AI / LLM Architecture (RAG, orchestration, tool use, evals)
* Enterprise Data Architecture \& AI Platforms
* Use\-Case Discovery, Value Engineering \& Roadmapping
* Retail/CPG Domain Fluency (Merch, Supply Chain, Omni, Trade, Media)
* Technical Communication: architecture storytelling, tradeoff analysis, and documentation
* Cross\-Functional Leadership \& Team Mentoring
* Experimentation, Evaluation \& Model/Prompt Quality Management
* Responsible AI, Security, Privacy \& Compliance
* Delivery Governance, Adoption \& Value Realization



  





**Why This Role Matters** 




 Retail and CPG are at an inflection point—pressure on margins, volatile demand, supply chain disruption, and rising customer expectations are accelerating investment in
 **GenAI and agentic automation** 
 . Organizations need production\-grade AI architectures and delivery discipline that improve decision quality and speed across the value chain.
 



 This role will define and scale AI solutions that help clients win—through smarter merchandising, resilient planning, faster execution, and differentiated customer experiences—by delivering robust architectures, rapid prototypes, and production\-ready patterns that teams can reuse.
 



  





 Feel Free to apply on Shital.salunkhe@zensar.com this opening will be for Retail for CPG experience people

d37523cc.title: Solutions Architect - Enterprise
d37523cc.description:
**Enterprise Architect – AI \& Intelligent Platforms:**
**About The Role**
 We are seeking an Enterprise Architect – AI \& Intelligent Platforms to contribute to and help evolve enterprise architecture capabilities across enterprise AI platforms, machine learning solutions, and intelligent automation capabilities. This role supports architecture strategy, reference architecture development, and roadmap execution for AI\-enabled business capabilities across digital, corporate, supply chain, finance, and customer experience platforms. The role helps ensure AI solutions are built on scalable enterprise data, platform, and integration foundations. This role partners with business, engineering, data science, and senior architecture leadership to translate enterprise strategy into scalable AI platform and solution architecture approaches.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Contribute to enterprise architecture strategy and support roadmap execution across enterprise AI and intelligent automation platforms
* Support development and adoption of reference architectures and standards for AI platforms, ML lifecycle solutions, and AI\-enabled applications
* Lead architecture design and solution alignment for assigned AI, machine learning, or intelligent automation initiatives
* Partner with senior architects, engineering teams, and data science teams to ensure consistent AI platform and solution architecture design
* Support adoption of modern AI patterns including predictive analytics, real\-time decisioning, and AI\-enabled business workflows
* Participate in architecture reviews and provide architecture guidance to engineering, data engineering, and data science teams
* Contribute to AI platform evaluation, vendor selection, and AI solution modernization initiatives
* Demonstrate strong ownership of architecture deliverables and continuous improvement of architecture practices


**What You Bring**
* Strong experience working within enterprise data, analytics, or AI\-enabled platform architecture environments
* Solid understanding of enterprise data platforms, analytics solutions, and AI or ML solution integration patterns
* Experience supporting enterprise initiatives involving AI solutions, advanced analytics, or intelligent automation implementations
* Strong understanding of how AI solutions interact with enterprise applications, data platforms, and digital experiences
* Ability to operate across architecture strategy, solution design, and engineering collaboration layers
* Strong communication skills and ability to influence without formal authority
* Experience working in retail, consumer products, or customer\-facing digital business environments
* Experience collaborating with global teams, offshore delivery teams, or distributed product and engineering organizations


**Technical Expertise \& Platform Experience**
* Hands\-on experience with Enterprise Architecture repository or modeling tools (e.g., LeanIX, Ardoq, or similar platforms) and contributing to architecture documentation or portfolio data
* Experience working with AI, ML, or analytics platforms and supporting model deployment, model integration, or AI solution implementations
* Experience working with enterprise data platforms and data pipelines supporting AI or analytics workloads
* Working knowledge of AI solution integration patterns including API\-based model access, batch model processing, or real\-time inference integrations
* Experience working with enterprise security concepts such as secure model access, identity\-based access, and secure data or API interactions
* Experience participating in architecture reviews, architecture documentation, or supporting architecture governance and roadmap activities


**Qualifications**
* Progressive experience working across enterprise architecture, solution architecture, data platform architecture, or AI/analytics platform environments
* Demonstrated experience contributing to enterprise architecture, analytics platform, or AI solution modernization initiatives
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Science, or related field (Master’s preferred)


**Success in This Role:**
 Success in this role requires strong architecture fundamentals, ownership mindset, and the ability to grow into broader enterprise architecture responsibilities while supporting AI, data, and platform transformation initiatives at scale. This role requires strong collaboration and coordination with onsite architecture leaders, global architecture teams, and distributed delivery organizations to ensure consistent architecture execution across regions and programs.

16feb9fd.title: HCM Solution and Integration Architect
16feb9fd.description:
Welcome to Haleon. We’re a purpose\-driven, world\-class consumer company putting everyday health in the hands of millions. In just three years since our launch, we’ve grown, evolved and are now entering an exciting new chapter – one filled with bold ambitions and enormous opportunity.
   

  

 Our trusted portfolio of brands – including Sensodyne®, Panadol®, Advil®, Voltaren®, Theraflu®, Otrivin®, and Centrum® – lead in resilient and growing categories. What sets us apart is our unique blend of deep human understanding and trusted science.
   

  

 Now it’s time to fully realise the full potential of our business and our people. We do this through our Win as One strategy. It puts our purpose – to deliver better everyday health with humanity – at the heart of everything we do. It unites us, inspires us, and challenges us to be better every day, driven by our agile, performance\-focused culture.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Solution \& Integrations Architect will play a critical architecture leadership role within the HR Technology portfolio, with a core focus on simplifying the overall solution architecture and integration landscape. This role sits in the Corporate Functions D\&T organization and reports to the Director of HCM DevOps.
   

  

 This role is responsible for shaping, governing, and evolving HR technology solutions by applying enterprise architecture principles, capability led design, and platform first thinking. The architect will provide clear, evidence\-based guidance on what systems and products should be used for which HR business capabilities—and why, ensuring long\-term scalability, reduced complexity, and improved employee and manager experience.
   

  

 Deep, hands\-on experience with HCM suite of products is essential, as these platforms form the backbone of the HR systems landscape.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
* Own and define end\-to\-end solution architectures for HR capabilities across the employee lifecycle, ensuring alignment to enterprise and HR target architectures.
* Apply business capability\-based architecture to determine system fit, avoid duplication, and guide investment decisions.
* Lead the rationalisation of the HR integration landscape, reducing point\-to\-point complexity and improving reusability and resilience.
* Define and govern integration patterns, standards, and principles (e.g., event based, API\-led, canonical data models).
* Act as a trusted architecture authority on Workday and other HCM capabilities, constraints, and best fit use cases.
* Guide decisions on where to standardise vs. extend, and when not to customise.
* Serve as a key contributor to architecture governance forums, design reviews, and investment discussions.
* Provide clear, defensible recommendations to senior HR, Digital, and Architecture stakeholders—grounded in principles, not preferences.
* Ensure solutions comply with enterprise architecture guardrails, data principles (e.g., FAIR), and regulatory expectations (e.g., SOX where applicable).
* Maintain architectural artefacts in enterprise repositories (e.g., capability maps, solution views, spider diagrams, integration diagrams).
* Collaborate with HR Product Owners, Business Partners, Enterprise Architecture, Data, Security, and external vendors.
* Translate complex architectural topics into clear, business relevant narratives for senior stakeholders (e.g., CHRO\-level discussions).
* Influence delivery partners to build simpler, more sustainable solutions, not just technically correct ones.


***Why you?***
**Basic Qualifications:**
* 12\-14 years of experience in solution and/or integration architecture, with significant exposure to complex HR technology landscapes.
* Deep hands\-on experience with Workday and other HCM Tools (Core HR, Talent, Learning, Integrations).
* Strong grounding in enterprise architecture principles, including capability modelling, platform strategy, and technology lifecycle management.
* Proven experience simplifying large, fragmented integration landscapes in a global enterprise environment.
* Strong understanding of HR data domains, integration patterns, and downstream consumers (analytics, payroll, identity, learning, etc.).


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* Experience working within global, regulated enterprises with strong governance expectations.
* Familiarity with ServiceNow HRSD, IAM/PAM, data platforms, or integration middleware.
* Experience contributing to or operating within a formal architecture governance model.
* Ability to balance strategic architecture thinking with pragmatic delivery realities.
* Systems thinker with a strong bias for simplification and clarity
* Comfortable challenging “because we always did it this way”
* Trusted advisor who can influence without authority
* Able to operate at both deep technical and executive narrative levels
* Values long\-term architectural health over short\-term fixes


**Job Posting End Date**
 2026\-07\-10
   

  

**Equal Opportunities**
 Haleon are committed to mobilising our purpose in a way that represents the diverse consumers and communities who rely on our brands every day. It guides us in creating an inclusive culture, where different backgrounds and views are valued and respected – all in support of understanding and best serving the needs of our consumers and unleashing the full potential of our people. It’s important to us that Haleon is a place where all our employees feel they truly belong.
   

  

 During the application process, we may ask you to share some personal information, which is entirely voluntary. This information ensures we meet certain regulatory and reporting obligations and supports the development, refinement, and execution of our inclusion and belonging programmes that are open to all Haleon employees.
   

  

 The personal information you provide will be kept confidential, used only for legitimate business purposes, and will never be used in making any employment decisions, including hiring decisions.
   

  

**Adjustment or Accommodations Request**
 If you require a reasonable adjustment or accommodation or other assistance to apply for a job at Haleon at any stage of the application process, please let your recruiter know by providing them with a description of specific adjustments you are requesting. We’ll provide all reasonable adjustments to support you throughout the recruitment process and treat all information you provide us in confidence.
   

  

**Note to candidates**
 The Haleon recruitment team will contact you using a Haleon email account (@haleon.com). If you are not sure whether the email you received is from Haleon, please get in touch.

9838a693.title: Solution Architect
9838a693.description:
**Responsibilities**
* Data Manager who combines strong technical depth, solutioning mindset, stakeholder communication, and team leadership. This role is ideal for someone who can operate like a pre\-sales consultant with delivery ownership.


**Delivery Management**
* Own end\-to\-end execution of data programs from initiation to go\-live.
* Manage scope, timelines, risks, budgets, dependencies, and quality.
* Ensure best practices in Agile / Scrum / Waterfall delivery models.
* Drive governance with weekly status reports, steering meetings, and escalations.


**Team Leadership**
* Manage and mentor cross\-functional teams, including Data Engineers, BI Developers, Analysts, and Architects.
* Build a strong delivery culture focused on ownership, quality, and continuous learning.
* Conduct performance reviews, career growth planning, and hiring.
* Improve utilization and resource planning across projects.


**Technical Leadership**
* Guide teams on architecture, coding standards, reusability, DevOps, CI/CD, testing, and performance optimization.
* Review designs for Data Warehousing, Lakehouse, ETL/ELT pipelines, BI models, and reporting systems.
* Ensure scalable, secure, and cost\-optimized cloud solutions.


**Communication And Stakeholder Management**
* Interface with senior business stakeholders, delivery heads, and technical teams.
* Present status, risks, roadmap, and value realization clearly.
* Handle challenging conversations with confidence and professionalism.


**Requirements**
* Preferred Background Experience in IT Services / Consulting / GCC / Managed Services. Managed large enterprise customers.
* Experience in proposal creation and effort estimation. Exposure to multiple domains (Retail, BFSI, Healthcare, Manufacturing, CPG etc. ).
* Certifications in Cloud / Databricks / AI/ML.
* Education: Graduates only (please ignore pursuing/dropouts/12th or 10th pass).


 This job was posted by Akshay Patil from Netscribes.

31859e8a.title: Cloud Engineer
31859e8a.description:
**Company :** 
 Dayal InfoSystems (Dayal Group of Company)
   

  

**Job Title :** 
 Cloud Engineer
   

  

**Qualification :** 
 B.Tech or higher in CS / IT fields
   

  

**Experience :** 
 3 \- 6 Yrs.
   

  

**Location :** 
 Meerut, Partapur, Delhi Road ( Uttar Pradesh)
   

  

**Work Timing :** 
 10:00 AM \- 06:30 PM ( Two Saturday Off)
   

  

**Reporting To** 
 : Manager \- Platform Engineering
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 We are looking for a
 **Cloud Engineer / Linux Administrator** 
 to manage and support on\-premise cloud infrastructure built on
 **OpenStack** 
 , along with Linux servers and virtualization environments. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in Linux administration and OpenStack, with exposure to automation, containerization, and public cloud platforms being an added advantage.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Install, configure, and maintain Linux servers (Ubuntu, CentOS, RHEL).
* Deploy, administer, and troubleshoot OpenStack cloud infrastructure.
* Manage system performance, security, patching, and backups.
* Configure and troubleshoot Apache, NGINX, DNS, SSL, and networking issues.
* Monitor infrastructure using tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, or Zabbix.
* Automate routine tasks using Shell scripting or Ansible.
* Support CI/CD pipelines and application deployments.
* Maintain infrastructure documentation and operational procedures.
* Troubleshoot production issues and perform root cause analysis.


**Requirements**
* Hands\-on experience with OpenStack cloud platforms and infrastructure management.
* Strong expertise in Linux Administration and server management.
* Proficiency in Shell Scripting for automation and operational tasks.
* Solid understanding of networking concepts including DNS, TCP/IP, and Firewall configuration.
* Experience in managing and configuring Apache / NGINX web servers.
* Working knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes for containerization and orchestration.
* Familiarity with Git for version control and code management.
* Strong troubleshooting skills with experience in system monitoring and performance optimization.
* Experience in backup, recovery, and disaster management processes.


**Good to Have**
* Terraform
* Jenkins / GitLab CI/CD
* Ansible


**Proximity to Delhi NCR**
* Distance: \~70 km from Delhi, \~40 km from Ghaziabad, 55 km from Noida
* Connectivity: NH 58, Delhi Meerut Expressway ( 45\-50 Min), railways ( 50\-60 Min), and Metro/Rapid connectivity ( 30\-40 Min) from Delhi and Noida.
* Cost Advantage: Lower cost of living than Delhi /Noida, making it attractive for professionals

fc12f553.title: Oracle Cloud Infra Admin-Oracle and SQL Database Administrator-Senior
fc12f553.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**EY GDS – EBS DBA / OCI Senior Position**
 Over the last decade, enterprise application modernization and cloud adoption have become critical to ensuring scalability, availability, and cost optimization for global organizations. To support this fast paced and evolving digital landscape, EY leverages Oracle E Business Suite (EBS) expertise combined with Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) and automation driven database practices to deliver secure, high performance, and resilient solutions for mission critical business applications.
   

  

 As part of our global EY GDS team, you will work as a Senior EBS DBA / OCI professional, supporting large scale Oracle EBS environments across on premises and cloud deployments. You will be involved in solving complex technical challenges, including EBS migrations to OCI, database upgrades, high availability design, and performance optimization, while contributing to the development of next generation EBS and OCI platforms in a collaborative, international delivery environment.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 We are offering you a demanding role. You will use your advanced expertise in Oracle Database, SQL Database and Cloud Infrastructure OCI/Azure to deliver secure, scalable, and high availability solutions for mission critical enterprise applications. This position provides the opportunity to collaborate with global stakeholders and supporting large scale cloud migration, database modernization, and operational excellence initiatives.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Overseeing Oracle EBS database administration and OCI implementation, and identifying opportunities for performance, scalability, and availability improvements.
* Accountable for ensuring database standards, cloud architecture guidelines, and operational processes are followed across on premise and OCI environments.
* Act as the first level technical escalation point for EBS database and OCI related issues for mission critical systems.
* Perform and support end to end database and application migrations from on premises environments to OCI, guiding teams through design, execution, and stabilization.
* Responsible for technical decision making, solution design, environment optimization, and supporting implementation activities for EBS and Oracle database workloads.
* Accountable for collaborating with Cloud Infrastructure teams, supporting instance provisioning, virtual network design, routing rules, security configurations, and database deployments.


**Strong understanding of:**
* Oracle Database upgrades (9i/10g/11g to 12c/18c/19c)
* SQL Server DBA experience (SQL Server 2008–2019/2022\)
* OCI networking, security, and database services
* Production support and cross platform migrations on Cloud


**Execute end to end database migrations, including:**
* Virtual network design
* Routing rules
* Security configuration
* Compute instance creation
* Database deployment and configuration
* Responsible for ensuring database configurations, operational guidelines, and technical documentation are maintained and aligned with enterprise standards.
* Support database upgrades, patching, maintenance, and performance tuning for Oracle databases (12c, 18c, 19c) running on on prem and OCI platforms.
* Work with additional database technologies such as MS SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB
* Perform gap analysis against best practices and recommend improvements related to database performance, availability, security, and cloud architecture.
* Identify at risk environments or migration challenges and work with relevant teams to mitigate risks proactively.
* Perform technical reviews and identify corrective actions to improve database reliability and operational efficiency


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with business delivery teams.
* Analytical thinking.
* Strong team\-player and self\-started attitude.
* Ability to create documentation for Technical Proof of concept (POC).
* Well organized, attentive to details attitude.


**To qualify for the role, you must have**
* 2\-6 years of relevant experience in architecting, designing, implementing, and/or supporting highly distributed applications.
* Extensive experience working on at least one Public Cloud – Oracle/Azure/Google. Oracle Cloud is preferred .
* BTech / MTech / MCA / MBA
* Technical lead for engagements such as Proof of Concepts and Architectural Design Sessions to define and design a complete solution using best practices on Oracle Cloud
* System administration experience (Linux, Solaris)


**Additionally, Good To Have**
* Certificated in Public Cloud – Oracle/AWS/Azure/Google Cloud Certified Architect Professional
* Technical – Experience in Designing, Developing, Deploying and/or Migrating mission critical business applications to Cloud environments including re\-platform of such systems
* Expertise in architecting best technical solutions based on customer requirement
* Experience giving presentations to executive audiences and explaining the benefits of the platform and service solution over competitors


**Ideally, you’ll also have**
* Possesses good communication skills to coordinate, resolve queries of both external and internal customers
* Self\-motivator and result oriented to complete task as per timelines
* Must have good analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Good written/Verbal Communication, Presentation, Interactive skills with team across geography.
* Flexible to work either independently or work in tandem with Cloud Infrastructure team to identify and implement the most efficient cloud\-based solutions for the company.


**What We Look For**
* A Team of people with commercial acumen, technical experience and enthusiasm to learn new things in this fast\-moving environment
* An opportunity to be a part of market\-leading, multi\-disciplinary team of 1000\+ professionals, in the only integrated global transaction business worldwide.
* Opportunities to work with EY Oracle and Enterprise Applications practices globally with leading businesses across a range of industries


**What Working At EY Offers**
 At EY, we’re dedicated to helping our clients, from start–ups to Fortune 500 companies — and the work we do with them is as varied as they are.
   

  

 You get to work with inspiring and meaningful projects. Our focus is education and coaching alongside practical experience to ensure your personal development. We value our employees and you will be able to control your own development with an individual progression plan. You will quickly grow into a responsible role with challenging and stimulating assignments. Moreover, you will be part of an interdisciplinary environment that emphasizes high quality and knowledge exchange. Plus, we offer:
   

  

* Support, coaching and feedback from some of the most engaging colleagues around
* Opportunities to develop new skills and progress your career
* The freedom and flexibility to handle your role in a way that’s right for you


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

47aa21be.title: Guidewire Cloud Migration Consultant
47aa21be.description:
**Summary**
 As a Cloud Migration Consultant, you will be at the forefront of delivering cloud migrations to our global clients. This role is ideal for a technically sound professional who is eager to master the Guidewire Cloud Platform (GWCP) and execute complex technical upgrades in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Key Responsibilities:**
* ﻿﻿Cloud Migration Delivery: Build/upgrade scalable configuration \& integration Gosu code across PCF files, rules engine, and data models
* Resolve configuration and application\-level merge conflicts, Cloud Assurance findings, and deployment blockers
* Participate in end\-to\-end CI/CD processes, including GUnit test creation, build reviews, and code promotion
* Work with DevOps, QA, and Solution Architects to validate environment readiness and deployment outcomes
* At Guidewire, we foster a culture of curiosity, innovation, and responsible use of AI—empowering our teams to continuously leverage emerging technologies and data\-driven insights to enhance productivity and outcomes.


**Technical \& Functional Consultant Skills**
* Guidewire Ecosystem: Core competency in PolicyCenter/ClaimCenter; deep understanding of the Guidewire Cloud Standards and ski releases
* Language \& Scripting: Hands\-on Gosu and Java; proficient in XML, JSON, and GUnit testing.
* Insurance Domain: Strong functional grasp of the Policy Lifecycle, Underwriting workflows, and FNOL
* Cloud \& Integration: Hands\-on experience with Cloud API, REST/SOAP web services, Messaging plugins
* DevOps \& Tools: Proficient in CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Bitbucket, Git), Guidewire Hub, and code quality tools like SonarQube.


**Required Skills/Experience**
* 4 years of proven hands\-on experience with Guidewire Cloud implementation or migration (minimum one full\-cycle release)
* ﻿﻿Code Conflict Management: Proficient in analyzing 3\-way merge conflicts, inferring developer intent across multiple branches, and applying informed decisions to achieve correct, conflict\-free outcomes
* Hands on experience in CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions), GitHub/Bitbucket, Postman, Swagger/OpenAPI
* Demonstrated ability to embrace AI and apply it to your current role as well as data\-driven insights to drive innovation, productivity, and continuous improvement.
* Certifications
+ Guidewire Cloud Configuration Associate Certification (Preferred in any of XCenters)
+ Guidewire Cloud Integration Associate Certification (required)


**About Guidewire**
 Guidewire is the platform P\&C insurers trust to engage, innovate, and grow efficiently. We combine digital, core, analytics, and AI to deliver our platform as a cloud service. More than 540\+ insurers in 40 countries, from new ventures to the largest and most complex in the world, run on Guidewire.
   

  

 As a partner to our customers, we continually evolve to enable their success. We are proud of our unparalleled implementation track record with 1600\+ successful projects, supported by the largest R\&D team and partner ecosystem in the industry. Our Marketplace provides hundreds of applications that accelerate integration, localization, and innovation.
   

  

 For more information, please visit www.guidewire.com and follow us on Twitter: @Guidewire\_PandC.
   

  

 Guidewire Software, Inc. is proud to be an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer. We are committed to an inclusive workplace, and believe that a diversity of perspectives, abilities, and cultures is a key to our success. Qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, citizenship, marital status, age, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, veteran status, or disability. All offers are contingent upon passing a criminal history and other background checks where it's applicable to the position.

0a8b042f.title: Hybrid Cloud Architect
0a8b042f.description:
**About Us**
**PHINIA:** 
 Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow.
   

  

 PHINIA is an independent, market\-leading, premium solutions and components provider with over 100 years of manufacturing expertise and industry relationships, with a strong brand portfolio that includes DELPHI®, DELCO REMY® and HARTRIDGE™. With over 12,500 employees across 43 locations in 20 countries, PHINIA is headquartered in Auburn Hills, Michigan, USA.
   

  

 At PHINIA, we Provide fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket products and solutions of the highest quality — developed and manufactured responsibly — that are designed to enhance efficiency and reduce the environmental impact of vehicles, industrial machinery, and other applications. In doing so, we contribute to a cleaner tomorrow, treat our people and surrounding communities with respect, and hold ourselves accountable to robust ethical standards.
   

  

**Our Culture**
 PHINIA promotes and cultivates an inclusive culture and diverse perspectives, strives to maintain its reputation for excellence, thrives on the power of collaboration, and fosters the development of our talented employees. We believe in making a positive impact through our business and actions, and we take our collective responsibility seriously.
   

  

**Career Opportunities**
 We believe in building a brighter tomorrow for our employees as well as our customers and encourage you to learn about our long history, strong culture, new technologies, and future vision. We offer a strong local presence and interesting global opportunities. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow.
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 PHINIA is seeking a Hybrid Cloud Architect to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of PHINIA’s hybrid cloud ecosystem, spanning on‑premises infrastructure, private cloud, and public cloud platforms. This role ensures secure, scalable, cost‑efficient cloud architectures that align with PHINIA’s digital transformation strategy. The architect will guide cloud migration initiatives and governance standards while partnering closely with infrastructure, security, application, and business teams to deliver resilient hybrid cloud capabilities.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Architect hybrid cloud environments across on‑prem, private cloud, and public cloud platforms (Azure/AWS/GCP).
* Lead hybrid infrastructure modernization, including cloud migration strategies and data center integration.
* Establish and enforce hybrid cloud governance models, compliance controls, FinOps principles and security standards in collaboration with PHINIA Security and IT governance teams.
* Develop disaster recovery, business continuity approaches, and hybrid failover patterns.
* Create and maintain hybrid cloud architectural documentation, integration diagrams, interface specifications, and operational runbooks.
* Evaluate emerging cloud technologies, recommend enhancements, and lead proof‑of‑concept initiatives.
* Collaborate with DevOps, Infrastructure, and Application teams to drive automation, IaC adoption, and CI/CD integration.
* Modernize workloads (ERP, MES, PLM, custom apps) using containers, Kubernetes, and cloud\-native services.
* Design secure OT/IT integration, industrial edge compute, and data pipelines (OPC‑UA, IoT, analytics).


**What we’re looking for:**
* Bachelor’s or master's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent work experience.
* 7\+ years of IT infrastructure experience with 4\+ years in cloud or hybrid architecture.
* Strong expertise in Azure (preferred), plus working knowledge of AWS/GCP.
* Experience with Infrastructure\-as\-Code (Terraform, CloudFormation), automation, CI/CD tooling and containerization (Kubernetes, Docker).
* Experience with OT systems and industrial protocols.
* Foundation in cloud security, Zero Trust, networking, and governance.
* Background in manufacturing/automotive environments is a strong preference.
* Certifications such as Azure/AWS Architect, TOGAF, or FinOps are plus.


**What We Offer**
 We provide compensation and benefits programs intended to attract, motivate, reward, and retain an incredibly talented, globally diverse workforce at all levels within our organization. Our compensation programs are informed by market data and business needs, and we are committed to providing equitable and competitive compensation. We are committed to providing our team with quality and competitive benefit programs, including health and well\-being resources, family\-centric policies, and an agile workplace program, where not precluded by collective bargaining agreements or national statutory plans. Plans are benchmarked for competitiveness and value.
   

  

 We provide formal development opportunities at all levels and stages of employee careers. These opportunities are delivered in a variety of formats to make our portfolio of solutions agile, sustainable, and scalable to support our employees in developing the skills needed to succeed.
   

  

**What We Believe**
* Product Leadership \- Innovation that brings value to our customers
* Humility \- Seeking out diverse perspectives and working collaboratively
* Inclusivity \- Recognizing our differences makes us stronger; we are bold and intentional
* Net\-Zero \- Committed to energy efficiency, waste reduction and beneficial reuse
* Integrity \- Taking responsibility for our decisions and doing what is right
* Accountability \- Taking ownership of our actions and driving results


**SAFETY**
 You will consistently hear us say Safety First! We are committed to continually improving our strong safety performance supporting the health and wellness of our employees!
   

  

 We also believe employee health and safety is everyone’s responsibility. We encourage safety learning and collaboration to help employees understand and follow applicable safety policies, standards, and procedures and identify opportunities to minimize or eliminate risk. Work is expected to be conducted in a manner that stresses the importance of preventing incidents and illnesses, including attending all required safety meetings and trainings. It is expected that all incidents, near misses, and unsafe conditions are immediately reported to the direct manager, Human Resources, or Safety Representative.
   

  

**EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY**
 PHINIA is an equal employment opportunity employer such that all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.
   

  

**VISA SPONSORSHIP**
 PHINIA does provide sponsorship for employment visa status based on business need. However, for this role, applicants must be currently authorized to work on a full\-time basis, in the country where the position is currently based.
   

  

**NO UNAUTHORIZED REFERRALS FROM RECRUITERS \& VENDORS**
 Please note that PHINIA does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or offers from third party recruiters or staffing agencies associated with any published or unpublished employment opportunities. Any unsolicited information sent to PHINIA will be considered as unencumbered and free from any fee or charge whatsoever. Only members of our Human Resources Team have the authority to engage or authorize recruiting services, which must be agreed upon before the unsolicited resume or offer is received.
   

  

**GLOBAL TERMS OF USE AND PRIVACY STATEMENT**
 Carefully read the PHINIA Privacy Policy before using this website. Your ability to access and use this website and apply for a job at PHINIA are conditioned on your acceptance and compliance with these terms.
   

  

 Please access the linked document by clicking here, select the geographical area where you are applying for employment, and review.
   

  

 Before submitting your application you will be asked to confirm your agreement with the terms.
   

  

***Career Scam Disclaimer:***
*PHINIA makes no representations or guarantees regarding employment opportunities listed on any third\-party website. To protect against career scams, job applicants should take the necessary precautions when interviewing for and accepting employment positions allegedly offered by PHINIA. Applicants should never provide their national ID numbers, birth dates, credit card numbers, bank account information or other private information when communicating with prospective employers or responding to employment opportunities online. Job applicants are invited to contact PHINIA through PHINIA’s website to verify the authenticity of any employment opportunities.*
 Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow. Join us on this shared journey to a brighter tomorrow. For more information about PHINIA, please visit www.phinia.com.

b737b434.description:
12–18 years in QA/Testing, with 5–6\+ years in delivery leadership, managing multi\-account portfolios and testing engagements within BFS (Banking \& Financial Services) domain. AI experience is mandatory.
 



  





 12–18 years in QA/Testing, with 5–6\+ years in delivery leadership, managing multi\-account portfolios and testing engagements within BFS (Banking \& Financial Services) domain.
 



 Role \& Responsibilities
 


* Own end\-to\-end QE portfolio delivery for BFS accounts; act as the escalation point for quality and delivery issues.
* Drive account growth and expansion through proposals, RFPs, estimations, and AI for QE service adoption within BFS clients.
* Ensure high CSAT via strong stakeholder management and impactful demos.
* Establish delivery governance across accounts (KPIs, risks, compliance, regulatory considerations, reviews).
* Lead test improvement initiatives across coverage, efficiency, and quality metrics.
* Drive adoption of AI\-led QE, automation\-first, and CI/CD practices across Agile/DevOps/DevSecOps.
* Provide expertise across testing methodologies (integration, system, UAT, Regression, automation) with BFSI domain context.
* Mentor and guide QE associates, driving talent upskilling and capability building.
* Balance technical leadership and people management to deliver consistent, high\-quality outcomes.



  





 Shital.salunkhe@zensar.com feel free to connect for the opportunity with your updated resume.

ca6de3c9.title: Technical Customer Solutions Manager, India CSM Team
ca6de3c9.description:
**Description**
 Sales, Marketing and Global Services (SMGS)
   

  

 AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.
   

  

 As a Customer Solution Manager you will work with the largest and most complex enterprises in the world, to enable their multi\-year journey to the cloud. In this new, highly visible, role you will ensure that all AWS teams work together effectively and efficiently to deliver migration, modernization and GenAI outcomes for the customer in relation to Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cloud.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 You will be a trusted advisor to the customer. You will leverage your complex program management, technical, organizational, and transformation expertise to understand customer's business and strategic goals, translate them into an executable plan, and drive the implementation to success by working with the customer, AWS, and our partners. You will understand your customers' biggest IT challenges and provide prescriptive guidance, based on AWS best practices, to guide them through their migration and modernization journey to AWS at scale.
   

  

 You will take end\-to\-end ownership of multiple migration, modernization and GenAI projects within a single enterprise or across several enterprises, utilizing your communication skills to interface with and influence a broad range of multi\-disciplinary teams (Business development, solutions architecture, support, product, professional services, and partners). The Customer Solution Manager role is responsible for cloud migration and modernization programs (incl. technical, operational, organizational, and education) that span across traditional IT teams and business units.
   

  

 Engaging from the inception stage onwards, you will have a deep understanding of your customer's business vision, culture, and processes, you will be your customer's voice within AWS, ensuring that their needs are accurately communicated to AWS leadership, product, and engineering teams. Engaging during the latter stages of the business cycle you will be responsible for ensuring consistent best\-practices are applied, including: (1\) ensuring Migration Readiness Assessment (MRA) is conducted and bringing in SMEs to deliver the migration foundations (e.g. landing zone build, security controls, operating model, training etc.), (2\) Migration kick off workshops are conducted (including stakeholder alignment), and (3\) Executive Steering Committees and reporting are established, including customer, partner, and AWS Cloud exec sponsors and ensure mechanisms are in place to identify and mitigate any identified risks. You should be passionate about delivering a great customer experience by delivering successful IT transformation programs. You will ensure that the customer IT and business stakeholders are aligned, to ensure broad adoption of the migration and modernization across the customer organization. You will use AWS mechanisms to inform the customer migration journey. Where required, you will lead the interaction with specialist teams, ProServ and Partners for handoffs, especially with respect to migreation, modernization and GenAI implementation.
   

  

 In addition to your customer facing responsibilities, you will help shape the rapidly growing Customer Solution Management function, where your passion to define and implement standard processes, methodologies, and tools will be highly valued. Passionate about customer value creation, you will be adept at measuring and quantifying customer value realization and ensuring it stays on path. Successful candidates will have a technical program management background, technology foundation and consultative mindset, be detail driven, and have experience in managing teams to deliver complex programs. You will be a passionate and proven leader with the ability to gain stakeholder buy\-in, communicate confidently at both the executive and project team level, and collaborate with a wide range of technical and non\-technical teams, regardless of geographical or organizational boundaries to ensure compliance with AWS Standards, policies and best practices. You will be comfortable in working with diverse teams to ensure appropriate partners are on\-boarded and involved in the migration as required. Be an active participant of steering committees and governance structures regardless of who is leading the migration and modernization and act as the point of contact for escalations if the migration and modernization hits barriers. You will be proactive in assessing Migration and modernization progress and design and implement plans to mitigate any risks or delays. Along with project management cadence, you will support the people and process pillars of migration including CCOE design and be the overall owner of reporting and system updates related to the health of migration. You will be a natural problem solver with a cool head that can deal with ambiguity, work autonomously to drive the deliver results for your customer, build IP, and share best practice across geographies.
   

  

 \#aws\-ags\-india
   

  

**About The Team**
 About AWS
   

  

 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (gender diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of leading large\-scale, technical or engineering programs with a proven record of thought leadership, business case development, realizing customer benefits, and successful program completion experience
* Bachelor's degree in Science, Technology, Engineering, Math, or a related field
* Experience in customer\-facing roles
* Experience implementing cloud services including migrations and modernization projects or equivalent
* 4\+ years of customer\-facing work, engaging with customer executives, technologists or partners to solve business problems with advanced technologies experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* PMP certification, or SCRUM/Agile, SAFe certification, AWS Associate SA / Professional SA Certification. Experience implementing cloud services including migrations and modernization projects.


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
