fb84abe2.title: Technical Program Manager II
fb84abe2.description:
**Overview**  

Microsoft is a company where passionate innovators come to collaborate, envision what can be and take their careers further. This is a world of more possibilities, more innovation, more openness, and the sky is the limit thinking in a cloud\-enabled world.  

  

Microsoft’s Azure Data engineering team is leading the transformation of analytics in the world of data with products like databases, data integration, big data analytics, messaging \& real\-time analytics, and business intelligence. The products our portfolio include Microsoft Fabric, Azure SQL DB, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure PostgreSQL, Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, and Power BI. Our mission is to build the data platform for the age of AI, powering a new class of data\-first applications and driving a data culture.


Within Azure Data, the Microsoft Fabric platform team builds and maintains the operating system and provides customers a unified data stack to run an entire data estate. The platform provides a unified experience, unified governance, enables a unified business model and a unified architecture.


We're hiring a Technical Program Manager to strengthen how Fabric Quality measures, reports, and acts on service health — a top organizational focus and a critical effort for the business. This role builds trusted reporting, automates the manual workflows behind the quality rhythm, and standardizes service\-health telemetry and metrics, so "healthy" means the same thing across teams and raw signal becomes insight leaders and engineering teams act on. The team moves quickly, and the role calls for comfort working in an agile, fast\-paced environment.  

  

The work is hands\-on and cross\-team: identifying gaps across scenarios, defining the success criteria and metrics that matter, and ensuring the telemetry behind them is complete and trustworthy. It suits a TPM who executes reliably across multiple workstreams, cares about data correctness and consistency, and is proficient with telemetry, reporting, and automation — Power BI / DAX, Kusto, and scripting to remove manual toil. Working through ambiguity, developing hypotheses and solutions, and coordinating across engineering and data teams to land defined problems end\-to\-end — with a bias toward repeatable, AI\- and automation\-assisted workflows — rounds out the profile.


 We do not just value differences or different perspectives. We seek them out and invite them in so we can tap into the collective power of everyone in the company. As a result, our customers are better served.

 **Responsibilities**  

\- Drive end\-to\-end quality for Fabric scenarios, covering both performance (latency, regressions) and reliability (success rates, failures, and timeouts).  

* Partner with engineering and data teams to onboard scenarios with complete, accurate telemetry, clear ownership, and measurable targets — and to refine the data pipelines, reporting models, and sampling strategies that keep signals consistent and accurate across environments.
* Identify monitoring gaps across key customer journeys, improving signal quality and ensuring issues are detected early with minimal noise.
* Support LiveSite by helping define alerting thresholds and partner with teams during incidents to investigate performance regressions and reliability issues, identify root causes, and drive follow\-up actions.
* Maintain and evolve the dashboards and reporting used in regular reviews — connecting performance and reliability signals into actionable insight tied to team commitments and end\-to\-end customer impact.
* Drive cross\-team coordination to unblock dependencies and align priorities, and create simple, repeatable documentation and onboarding paths so teams can adopt monitoring and alerting with minimal friction.
Embody our culture and values

 **Qualifications** **Required Qualifications:**

* Bachelor's Degree AND 2\+ years experience in engineering, product/technical program management, data analysis, or product development OR equivalent experience.
* 1\+ year(s) of experience managing cross\-functional and/or cross\-team projects.

**Other \& Additional:**


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings: Microsoft Cloud Background Check:


This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.

**Preferred/Additional Qualifications:**

* Experience in performance monitoring, reliability, or observability systems
* Experience with data analysis tools such as Kusto, SQL, or Power BI
* Experience working with distributed systems or cloud platforms
* Effective communication skills, with the ability to work across disciplines including engineering, product, and data engineering teams

**Equal Opportunity Employer (EOP)**


Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations, and ordinances. If you need assistance and/or reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or the recruiting process, please send a request via the Accommodation request form (Accessibility \| Microsoft Careers).


Benefits/perks listed below may vary depending on the nature of your employment with Microsoft and the country where you work.


\#azdat


\#azuredata

  



  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

161b839f.title: Solutions Architect (CCaaS)
161b839f.description:
**Job Description**
**Job Description**
 As a Solutions Architect, your main responsibility will be to act as the key technical expert during the pre\-sales process. You will work closely with the Contact Center Platform Architecture team and potential customers to design and scope customized solutions that meet their unique business needs, ultimately securing new professional services engagements.
   

  

**Please note that to succeed in this role you must have previous experience working with CCaS architecture and AWS (Connect or Services) environments.**
**Responsibilities**
* Lead Pre\-Sales Technical Scoping. Provide expert technical support to the sales team by analyzing customer requirements and recommending the most effective use of Zendesk products and services.
* Create detailed professional services estimates and proposals for the development and implementation of new customer solutions.
* Articulate complex technical concepts clearly to diverse audiences, from technical teams to executive\-level decision\-makers, to build confidence in our proposed solution.
* Maintain deep technical expertise across Zendesk for Contact Center product suite, leading technical discussions and providing expert recommendations.
* Partner closely with the Professional Services team to ensure a seamless transition from the sales cycle to project delivery, setting the implementation team up for success.


**Qualifications**
* Strong experience and certification in AWS connect and/or AWS services working in a CCaS environment.
* Previous experience working as a solutions architect or similar role in a CCaS environment supporting AWS environments.
* Hands\-on experience building, migrating and deploying complex cloud\-based solutions.
* Strong technical background in cloud technologies, specifically Amazon Connect, SaaS applications, and enterprise\-level solution architecture.
* Experiencing implementing and supporting AWS environments.
* Proven ability to translate customer business objectives into a comprehensive technical solution and detailed project estimate.
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with a focus on articulating value and building trust with prospective customers.


 Please note that Zendesk can only hire candidates who are physically located and plan to work from Karnataka or Maharashtra. Please refer to the location posted on the requisition for where this role is based.
   

  

 Hybrid: In this role, our hybrid experience is designed at the team level to give you a rich onsite experience packed with connection, collaboration, learning, and celebration \- while also giving you flexibility to work remotely for part of the week. This role must attend our local office for part of the week. The specific in\-office schedule is to be determined by the hiring manager.
   

  

**The Intelligent Heart Of Customer Experience**
 Zendesk software was built to bring a sense of calm to the chaotic world of customer service. Today we power billions of conversations with brands you know and love.
   

  

 Zendesk believes in offering our people a fulfilling and inclusive experience. Our hybrid way of working, enables us to purposefully come together in person, at one of our many Zendesk offices around the world, to connect, collaborate and learn whilst also giving our people the flexibility to work remotely for part of the week.
   

  

 As part of our commitment to fairness and transparency, we inform all applicants that artificial intelligence (AI) or automated decision systems may be used to screen or evaluate applications for this position, in accordance with Company guidelines and applicable law.
   

  

 Zendesk is an equal opportunity employer, and we’re proud of our ongoing efforts to foster global diversity, equity, \& inclusion in the workplace. Individuals seeking employment and employees at Zendesk are considered without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, ancestry, disability, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We are an AA/EEO/Veterans/Disabled employer. If you are based in the United States and would like more information about your EEO rights under the law, please click here.
   

  

 Zendesk endeavors to make reasonable accommodations for applicants with disabilities and disabled veterans pursuant to applicable federal and state law. If you are an individual with a disability and require a reasonable accommodation to submit this application, complete any pre\-employment testing, or otherwise participate in the employee selection process, please send an e\-mail to peopleandplaces@zendesk.com with your specific accommodation request.

8323e85e.title: Sr Digital Solution Area Specialist - Security
8323e85e.description:
**Overview**
 At Small Medium Enterprises and Channel (SME\&C), we are leading a high\-growth, AI\-powered global sales team—one that is deeply connected to our partners and driven by customer success. By uniting our Small Medium Business, Corporate, Strategy, and Partner teams, we are unlocking the largest customer opportunity, backed by the industry’s most significant investments. Leveraging the power of AI and our extensive partner ecosystem, we are redefining how businesses of all sizes adopt technology to drive growth and innovation.
   

  

 SME\&C is more than a sales organization—it’s a culture of innovation, opportunity, and inclusivity. Here, you’ll be part of a diverse, high\-performing, and customer\-obsessed team where collaboration, connection, and continuous learning fuel everything we do.
   

  

 If you thrive in a fast\-paced, digital\-first environment and are eager to make a meaningful impact, explore how SME\&C can be the next step in your career. Together, we are shaping the future of business.
   

  

 As a Security Specialist you will build digital transformation security strategies with customers, collaborating across different groups inside the Customer environment to successfully enable them to be more secure. You will lead consultative customer conversations and collaborate on the planning, orchestration and execution of end\-to\-end Security opportunities with internal stakeholders and partners to cross\-sell and up\-sell. This opportunity will allow you to learn and accelerate your career growth, honing your solution sales and collaboration skills and deepening your end\-to\-end security expertise.
   

  

 In the Digital Security Specialists team, we are looking for passionate, experienced and credible specialist sellers with a drive for developing and winning strategic opportunities that deliver end\-to\-end security thought leadership driving significant customer value and enabling transformational customer outcomes.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* You will engage in conversations with customers aligned to their industry and collaborate with account and partner team to drive and qualify new opportunities and build pipeline.
* You will leverage digital selling including digital signals to drive customer interests and identify new stakeholders at the customer.
* You will identify customer business and technology readiness, proactively builds external stakeholders' mapping, implements strategies to accelerate the closing of deals, contributes input on strategies to drive and close prioritized opportunities, coaches junior team members in deal plan execution, and implements close plans.
* You will accelerate opportunities from the Lead stage to closing the opportunity successfully in a strong seller to seller alignment with our key security partners.
* You will apply role orchestration model and navigates the Microsoft organization to bring the best impact to the customer.
* You will identify new partners, develop joint proposals with partners and contribute to developing partner strategies.
* You will leverage and share competitor knowledge across solution areas as a subject matter expert to inform decisions on pursuit or withdrawal.
* You will lead conversations and set up events within Microsoft, mentors others and develop strategies for best practice sharing, initiate conversations with prospective customers/partners at events, act as a subject matter expert in one or more solution area(s).
* You will collaborate with the 'compete' SMEs internally to analyze competitor products, solutions, and/or services and implement strategies and drive the execution of projects, partners and collaborates with other teams on related deliverables, and leverages others in relevant work streams.


**Qualifications**
* 10\+ years technology\-related sales or account management experience
* OR Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or related field AND 7\+ years technology\-related sales or account management experience.
* Understanding of MITRE ATTACK Framework and well verse with XDR, SIEM and Data Security technology \& Platform.
* Industry certifications.


**Preferred Qualification**
* Cybersecurity industry experience. Microsoft security portfolio knowledge preferred.
* Demonstrated experience selling complex, cloud\-based solutions to Enterprise customers.
* Proven sales and negotiation experience.
* Proven self\-starter able to work towards delivery of goals as best practices are being developed.
* Able to drive technical security conversations and conduct product/solution demonstrations.
* Solid understanding of security market and complete solutions.


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. 9c37460b.title: Databricks Solution Architect
9c37460b.description:
**Databricks Solution Architect Job Description**
 The successful candidate will be responsible for leading the practice’s ambitious growth initiative with our most strategic cloud partners. This opportunity is scoped for high performing, high potential subject matter experts who are self\-directed, entrepreneurial, highly collaborative, organized, diligent, and thoughtful. This role requires a domain expertise combined with the ability to task\-organize, focus on the details, and sustain and drive progress over time.
   

  

 For the right candidate, this role offers an opportunity to contribute to rapid revenue growth in one of the most exciting and dynamic segments of the market. This is an ideal opportunity for technologists seeking cross vertical and/or cross industry expertise. Among other career\-enhancing considerations, this role provides opportunities to directly and indirectly manage teams.
   

  

 The entire AIA leadership team is personally committed to the success of the architects on\-boarded through this focused cloud hiring initiative.
   

  

****Principal Responsibilities****
* Lead joint solution architecture discussions with customer architects/stakeholders and support development
* Provide leadership for the transformation of customer requirements into visions, strategies, and roadmaps to implement data platforms, multi\-cloud , cloud data warehouse with primary focus on Databricks
* Independently lead client design workshops and provide tradeoffs and recommendations
* Contribute to the Cognizant Data community by developing assets, thought leadership, etc.
* Craft and manage solution/technical architecture for large scale data modernization and cloud data migration initiatives
* Drive turnkey proposals for data platforms, analytics, built cost summaries, value propositions as part of cloud modernization, data portfolio rationalization


**Technical Qualifications**
* Preferred cloud competencies:
* Deeper Solution Architect skills in Databricks with deeper exposure to one of the clouds – AWS, Azure, GCP
* Aware of PaaS services relating to Data, Analytics and end\-point API interfaces \- EMR/Dataproc/Snowflake etc.
* Able to compare and contrast between best of technologies by layer – e.g, stream processing, messaging, search, etc.
* High\-level awareness of other partner technologies, which are alternative to native services like Snowflake, Cloudera, Talend, Informatica, Confluent, etc.
* Exposure to native cloud data engineering technologies like AWS Glue, ADF, GCP datafusion, Bigquery etc


**Key competencies**
* Excellent consulting, communication, influencing and facilitation skills, in particular problem solving/troubleshooting activities.
* Lead key data architecture decisions, design of architectural roadmaps, database, data access and data technology architectures
* Provide expertise on the overall data eco\-system’s engineering best practices, standards, architectural approaches, and complex technical resolutions
* Holistic knowledge of solution architecture, including:


 × Data layers and purpose
   

  

 × Serverless compute
   

  

 × Processing run time – ETL vs Spark run time, etc.
   

  

 × Security controls around authentication, authorizations, encryption and certificates
   

  

 × Recommend the migration tools and design data migration strategy
   

  

 × Metadata and data catalogs
   

  

 Excellent communication skills, preparing presentations, executive readouts
   

  

****Key Experience****
 Successfully built and defended solution architecture with different levels of technical stakeholders – Business heads, enterprise architects, tech leads, etc.

**Work Profile**


* Perform power system network studies and simulations for Transmission \& Distribution (T\&D) networks.
* Develop, validate, and analyze power system models using PSSE, CYMEDIST, or similar simulation tools.
* Conduct load flow, short circuit, contingency, voltage stability, and other network studies.
* Support planning, design, and optimization of electrical transmission and distribution systems.
* Analyze simulation results and prepare technical reports with recommendations.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure compliance with applicable grid codes, standards, and project requirements.
* Assist in troubleshooting network\-related issues and recommend technical solutions.
* Maintain simulation models and ensure data accuracy for network studies.

  


**Required Skills**

* 3–5 years of relevant experience in power system engineering.
* Strong understanding of the power sector, particularly Transmission \& Distribution (T\&D) systems.
* Hands\-on experience with PSSE, CYMEDIST, or other power system simulation software.
* Experience in conducting power system studies, including load flow, fault analysis, and contingency analysis.
* Good knowledge of electrical network modeling and grid operations.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills.

  


**Education**


* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or a related discipline.

2d4b4a3f.title: Integrated Solution Strategist - Oil & Gas
2d4b4a3f.description:
Date: Jun 6, 2026
   

  

 Location:
   

  

 Vikhroli, West Mumbai, MH, IN
   

  

 Company: Black \& Veatch Family of Companies
   

  

 We believe real value is powered by the unique skills and experiences of our professionals. The interchange of ideas from a diverse group of people gives our teams an expanded perspective and the ability to find better solutions for our clients.
   

  

**Req Id :** 
 113846
   

  

**Job Title :** 
 Integrated Solution Strategist \- Oil \& Gas
   

  

**Business Unit sector :** 
 CPL\-STRGW\-INFRA ADV MARKET
   

  

**Department:** 
 BVCPL \- IA REGIONAL SALES
   

  

**Work Location :** 
 INMUMBAI2
   

  

**Opportunity Type** 
**:** 
 Staff
   

  

**Relocation eligible :** 
 No
   

  

**Full time/Part time :** 
 Full\-Time
   

  

**Recruiter :** 
 Sanatkumar Behera
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Together, we own our company, our future, and our shared success.
   

  

 As an employee\-owned company, our people are Black \& Veatch. We put them at the center of everything we do and empower them to grow, explore new possibilities and use their diverse talents and perspectives to solve humanity's biggest challenges in an ever\-evolving world. With over 100 years of innovation in sustainable infrastructure and our expertise in engineering, procurement, consulting and construction, together we are building a world of difference.
   

  

 Black \& Veatch allows you to lend your talent and perspective to humanity’s biggest challenges in a flexible environment where you are empowered to grow and explore new possibilities.
   

  

 Our hybrid environment allows you to balance your work and personal life. At Black \& Veatch, you own your career with purpose and meaning. You are empowered to grow and explore new possibilities at every step of your career journey. Bring your big ideas knowing you are safe to be who you are and speak up with concerns or questions and put your diverse talents and perspectives to use.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 In this critical leadership role in Black \& Veatch’s world class consulting organization, you will build and align integrated offerings to the unique needs of our clients. In this strategic role you will satisfy three primary responsibilities: (1\) leverage market expertise and work across Solution teams to gain an understanding of the evolving market/client demands, (2\) dynamically assemble integrated offerings from existing solutions to meet those needs with a clearly communicated value proposition from Black \& Veatch, and (3\) bring insights (outside\-in) back to the solutions to inform future solution development based on unmet client needs. As an Integrated Solutions Strategist, you will be responsible for strategy and solution development, providing thought leadership, direction, and guidance to enterprise sales and execution teams.
   

  

**The Team**
 Black \& Veatch’s Infrastructure Advisory business offers an integrated portfolio of strategic consulting and operation resiliency services that apply across the client. Black \& Veatch’s Infrastructure Advisory business offers an integrated portfolio of strategic consulting and operation resiliency services that apply across the client’s entire investment\-to\-operations lifecycle commitments. Included are Strategic Advisory, Industrial Cybersecurity, and Operating Assets.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Integrated Solutions Identification \& Strategy**
 Prioritize and inform go to market strategy of new integrated solution offerings aligned with your focus market area.
   

  

 Craft and clearly articulate the value proposition of new integrated solutions and determine go/no\-go decisions.
   

  

 Partner with Enterprise Innovation to ensure investment in innovative solutions are targeted at our clients’ needs and planned growth areas.
   

  

**Market Strategy**
 Collaborate with other Professionals (Client Account Managers (CAMs), Client Segment Leaders, and Enterprise Evolution Teams) on Strategic account management, driving clarity on our sales playbook and seamless client experience.
   

  

 Serve as the conduit for identifying new client needs and bringing forth new ideas to address, in collaboration with Client Account Managers (CAMs).
   

  

 Support strategic engagements as a senior advisor to assure the highest quality outcomes and enablement, including becoming the preferred provider for complex activities.
   

  

 Drive pursuits strategy, in partnership with the Client Account Managers (CAMs), Solutions and the Business Excellence Pursuits Team.
   

  

**Collaboration \& Leadership**
 Develop internal relationships and collaborate closely with Solution execution teams and Client Segments, particularly Client Account Managers (CAMs) to drive alignment, development, and integration of new offerings.
   

  

 Establish and cultivate external relationships with Clients and Ecosystem Alliance Partners.
   

  

 Operate as the trusted advisor and thought partner to Client Account Managers (CAMs) to help determine focus areas including client identification, capabilities assessments and applying market expertise and following through on strategic account plans.
   

  

 Inform and manage marketing, business development \& proposal budget for assigned market and integrated solutions focus areas.
   

  

 Build relationships with regional leaders and segment leaders to understand region\-specific strategy in response to changing market trends and client needs.
   

  

**Management Responsibilities**
**Preferred Qualifications**
 Typically 12\-15\+ years in a business/consulting environment in Oil \& Gas Industry.
   

  

 Comprehensive market awareness (current and future) for key markets (South East Asian countries including but not limited to Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia and Singapore), with understanding of specific client needs.
   

  

 8\+ years of direct industry and/or consulting experience in Oil \& Gas industry.
   

  

 In\-depth understanding of Black \& Veatch Solutions and sub\-offerings (Which include strategic advisory, planning and optimization, strategic asset management, monitoring and diagnostics, digital transformation, modification and upgrades, etc.)
   

  

 Experience articulating the business need for and direct involvement in creating innovative solutions for existing and prospective clients.
   

  

 Marketing and Business Development experience in successfully taking a new solution to market.
   

  

 Pursuit strategy development and management experience.
   

  

 Demonstrated ability to work with/adapt to varying disciplines and cross\-functional teams.
   

  

 Master’s degree preferred.
   

  

 Flex/Hybrid profile position with ability to travel up to 50%
   

  

**Minimum Qualifications**
 Bachelor's Degree or relevant work experience. Has managed significant engagements. 10\+ years in a business/consulting environment. All applicants must be able to complete pre\-employment onboarding requirements (if selected) which may include any/all of the following: criminal/civil background check, drug screen, and motor vehicle records search, in compliance with any applicable laws and regulations.
   

  

**Certifications**
 Certifications related to area of expertise, where applicable preferred.
   

  

**Work Environment/Physical Demands**
 BandV Office Environment or Client Site \- Travel up to 100%
   

  

**Competencies**
 Action oriented
   

  

 Customer focus
   

  

 Interpersonal savvy
   

  

**Salary Plan**
 CST: Consulting
   

  

**Job Grade**
 018
   

  

 BVH, Inc., its subsidiaries and its affiliated companies, complies with all Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) affirmative action laws and regulations. Black \& Veatch does not discriminate on the basis of age, race, religion, color, sex, national origin, marital status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender Identity and expression, disability, veteran status, pregnancy status or other status protected by law.
   

  

 Black \& Veatch is committed to being an employer of choice by creating a valuable work experience that keeps our people engaged, productive, safe and healthy. We offer professionals an array of health and welfare benefits that vary based on their geographic region and employment status. This may include health, life accident and disability insurances, paid time off, financial programs and more. Professionals may also be eligible for a performance\-based bonus program.
   

  

 By valuing diverse voices and perspectives, we cultivate an authentically inclusive environment for professionals and are able to provide innovative and effective solutions for clients.
   

  

**Job Segment:** 
 Engineer, Engineering

7a3285ab.description:
**About Us**
**ABOUT US**
 Bristlecone is the leading provider of AI\-powered application transformation services for the connected supply chain. We empower our customers with speed, visibility, automation, and resiliency – to thrive on change.
   

  

 Our transformative solutions in Digital Logistics, Cognitive Manufacturing, Autonomous Planning, Smart Procurement and Digitalization are positioned around key industry pillars and delivered through a comprehensive portfolio of services spanning digital strategy, design and build, and implementation across a range of technology platforms.
   

  

 Bristlecone is ranked among the top ten leaders in supply chain services by Gartner. We are headquartered in San Jose, California, with locations across North America, Europe and Asia, and over 2,500 consultants. Bristlecone is part of the $19\.4 billion Mahindra Group.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 Bristlecone is an equal opportunity employer. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability status .
   

  

**Information Security Responsibilities**
* Understand and adhere to Information Security policies, guidelines and procedure, practice them for protection of organizational data and Information System.

c453f41a.title: Senior Solutions Architect, Infiniband and Networking Ethernet - NVIS
c453f41a.description:
NVIDIA is looking for Senior Networking (ETH/IB) Solutions Architect to join its NVIDIA Infrastructure Specialist Team. Academic and commercial groups around the world are using NVIDIA products to revolutionize deep learning and data analytics, and to power data centers. Join the team building many of the largest and fastest AI/HPC systems in the world! We are looking for someone with the ability to work on a dynamic customer focused team that requires excellent interpersonal skills. This role will be interacting with customers, partners and internal teams, to analyze, define and implement large scale Networking projects. The scope of these efforts includes a combination of Networking, System Design and Automation and being the face to the customer!
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Primary responsibilities will include building AI/HPC infrastructure for new and existing customers.
* Support operational and reliability aspects of large\-scale AI clusters, focusing on performance at scale, real\-time monitoring, logging, and alerting.
* Engage in and improve the whole lifecycle of services—from inception and design through deployment, operation, and refinement.
* Maintain services once they are live by measuring and monitoring availability, latency, and overall system health.
* Provide feedback to internal teams such as opening bugs, documenting workarounds, and suggesting improvements.


**What We Need To See**
* BS/MS/PhD or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Electrical/Computer Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, or related fields.
* At least 5\+ years of professional experience in networking fundamentals, Ethernet or InfiniBand World.
* Hands\-on experience with network switch/router platforms like Cumulus Linux, SONiC, IOS, JunosOS, and EOS, etc.
* Possess solid working knowledge of Ethernet/InfiniBand/RDMA core principles.
* Be proficient in end\-to\-end IB/Eth cluster deployment, adapter configuration and firmware maintenance, and able to conduct professional performance benchmarking with mainstream RDMA testing tools.
* Capable of independently diagnosing and troubleshooting typical IB/Eth network anomalies, including link flapping, connection failure, as well as bandwidth and latency jitter issues.
* Master practical RDMA network optimization strategies such as QP tuning, MTU configuration and congestion control optimization.
* Hands\-on working experience in RDMA\-accelerated business scenarios, including distributed storage and high\-performance computing clusters.
* Extensive experience delivering automated network provisioning solutions using tools like Ansible, Salt, and Python.
* Ability to develop CI/CD pipelines for network operations.
* Strong written, verbal, and listening skills in English are essential.


**Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd**
* Familiarity with cloud networks (AWS, GCP, Azure) is a plus.
* Advanced Linux or Networking Certifications.
* Experience with High\-performance computing architectures. Understanding of how job schedulers(Slurm, PBS) work.
* luster management technologies knowledge (bonus credit for BCM (Base Command Manager).)
* Experience with GPU (Graphics Processing Unit) focused hardware/software.


 , , JR2019584

18542c17.title: Cloud  Architect
18542c17.description:
**Job Summary**
 Serve as a Cloud Architect with deep experience in AWS to design review and optimize scalable secure and resilient solutions using AWS Well Architected Framework and AWS Systems Manager. Collaborate with cross functional teams in a hybrid work model to modernize card and payment platforms reduce operational risk and deliver reliable digital services for global clients.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design cloud architectures that apply AWS Well Architected Framework principles to deliver secure resilient and cost efficient platforms that align with enterprise standards and hybrid work practices.
* Develop reference architectures and reusable patterns tailored for card and payment solutions that support high availability low latency and consistent customer experience across regions.
* Review solution designs from application and platform teams to identify risks in security reliability performance efficiency cost optimization and operational excellence and recommend actionable improvements.
* Configure and optimize AWS Systems Manager capabilities such as automation patch orchestration state management and inventory to reduce manual effort and improve operational consistency.
* Implement robust monitoring and observability strategies using AWS native tooling and complementary platforms to detect issues early and reduce mean time to recovery for critical payment and card services.
* Collaborate with product owners architects and engineering teams during early design phases to translate business and regulatory requirements into compliant and scalable AWS solutions.
* Create detailed design documents runbooks and architecture decision records that provide clear guidance for implementation maintenance and future enhancements in card and payment environments.
* Drive security by design practices on AWS by applying identity and access controls data protection mechanisms network segmentation and logging that support audit needs for financial services.
* Optimize cloud resource utilization and cost by analyzing usage trends right sizing compute and storage and advising teams on efficient use of managed services and automation.
* Coordinate and support application migration or modernization initiatives into AWS by defining transition architectures migration waves and validation steps that minimize service disruption.
* Engage with stakeholders in day shift hybrid model ceremonies to provide architectural guidance resolve technical blockers and ensure that delivered solutions meet agreed nonfunctional requirements.
* Evaluate new AWS services and features that can enhance resiliency and operational efficiency for payment processing workloads and prepare impact assessments and adoption paths.
* Guide teams on effective use of infrastructure as code and configuration management aligned with AWS Systems Manager capabilities to improve repeatability and compliance.


**Qualifications**
* Apply over ten years of progressive experience in designing and implementing complex infrastructure or cloud solutions with a strong focus on high availability and operational excellence.
* Demonstrate expert level knowledge of AWS core services including compute storage networking security controls and management services with hands on implementation exposure.
* Exhibit deep practical experience in applying AWS Well Architected Framework pillars during assessments and remediation efforts for production workloads.
* Show proven hands on experience configuring and operating AWS Systems Manager for automation patching configuration tracking and operational insights.
* Utilize strong background in cards and payments or broader financial services domains to design architectures that consider transaction integrity regulatory compliance and fraud prevention controls.
* Communicate complex cloud architecture concepts clearly to technical and non technical partners while documenting decisions and rationales in a structured and concise manner.
* Apply solid understanding of hybrid work practices agile delivery and peer collaboration to participate effectively in design reviews planning sessions and incident discussions.
* Maintain relevant cloud certifications and continuously learn new AWS capabilities and architectural patterns to keep solutions modern secure and efficient.

ad1649fe.title: Solution Architect  ( SaaS, Loyalty Platforms, E-commerce, FinTech)
ad1649fe.description:
**About The Opportunity**
 A fast\-scaling technology innovator in the SaaS, FinTech, and E\-commerce ecosystem, we build and deploy next\-gen loyalty platforms that power customer engagement, retention, and revenue growth for global brands. Our solutions fuse real\-time data, personalization engines, and payment orchestration to create seamless, scalable, and secure loyalty experiences across verticals — from retail and travel to banking and telco. We’re on a mission to redefine how enterprises turn customers into lifelong advocates — and we need visionary architects to design the backbone.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Architect scalable, secure, and modular SaaS platforms for loyalty, rewards, and customer engagement — from API design to microservices topology.
* Translate complex business requirements (e.g., point accrual, redemption logic, tiered campaigns) into technical blueprints compatible with cloud\-native environments.
* Design integration patterns with core systems — CRM, ERP, payment gateways, and identity providers — using event\-driven and REST/gRPC architectures.
* Lead technical decisions on cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure/GCP), data modeling, observability, and compliance (GDPR, PCI\-DSS).
* Collaborate with product, engineering, and security teams to ensure platform resilience, performance, and extensibility for enterprise clients.
* Document architecture decisions, conduct tech reviews, and mentor engineers on best practices for distributed systems and SaaS scalability.


**Skills \& Qualifications**
* Must\-Have
* AWS
* Azure
* Microservices
* REST APIs
* Event\-Driven Architecture
* Cloud\-Native Design
* PCI\-DSS
* OAuth2
* Preferred
* Serverless Architecture
* Kubernetes
* GraphQL


**Benefits \& Culture Highlights**
* Remote\-first culture with flexible hours and no commute — work from anywhere in India.
* Ownership\-driven environment: You own architecture decisions and see them ship to global clients.
* Competitive compensation \+ equity, learning stipends, and career growth paths tailored to architecture leadership.


 Skills: platforms,customer,design,commerce,aws,azure,cloud,architecture,saas,customer engagement

1f829567.title: Solution Architect
1f829567.description:
**CREATIVITY IS OUR SUPERPOWER.** 
 It’s our heritage and it’s also our future. Because we don’t just make toys. We create innovative products and experiences that inspire fans, entertain audiences and develop children through play. Mattel is at its best when every member of our team feels respected, included, and heard—when everyone can show up as themselves and do their best work every day. We value and share an infinite range of ideas and voices that evolve and broaden our perspectives with a reach that extends into all our brands, partners, and suppliers
   

  

**Job Title** 
 IT Manager, Supply Chain Planning –End to End Supply Chain Solution Architect \& KTLO Management
   

  

**Location** 
 Hyderabad, India
   

  

**Job Summary** 
 We are seeking an experienced and dynamic IT Manager, Supply Chain Planning who will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining the technology solution that supports global supply chain operations—from demand planning and procurement through manufacturing, logistics, and fulfillment with the focus on, but not limited to, supply chain special programs under the supervision of principle solution architect as well as overseeing the "Keep the Lights On" (KTLO) operations across all planning functions and applications, ensuring seamless supported day\-to\-day supply chain activities. This role bridges business strategy with technical execution, ensuring scalable, integrated, and future\-ready solutions across existing legacy systems, future ERP, MES, WMS, TMS, and planning systems. The candidate must be willing to work on site 4 days a week in Hyderabad, during US EST time zone.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**End to End Supply Chain Solution**
* Solution Architecture \& Design
* Lead architecture design for global supply chain solutions, including planning, sourcing, manufacturing, logistics, and order fulfillment under the supervision of the principle solution architect.
* Develop target\-state solutions aligned with enterprise standards and digital transformation goals across existing legacy systems, future ERP (SAP, Oracle, etc.), PLM, MES, WMS, TMS, and external partner systems.
* Ensure solutions alignment with business processes and KPIs for supply chain efficiency, visibility, and sustainability.
* Solution Delivery \& Governance
* Collaborate with delivery teams to ensure adherence to architectural principles and design standards.
* Provide technical leadership during project execution, including vendor selection and design reviews.
* Maintain documentation of architecture artifacts and ensure compliance with security, data, and integration standards.
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration
* Partner with business units (Planning, Procurement, Manufacturing, Logistics, Customer Service) to define functional requirements.
* Work closely with enterprise architects, data architects, and infrastructure teams to ensure holistic solutions.
* Liaise with external technology partners, system integrators, and SaaS providers.


**KTLO Operations Management**
* Oversee supported supply chain activities daily to ensure uninterrupted operations across all supported business units that includes but not limited to planning.
* Maintain and optimize (planning) systems and processes to support consistent product availability and service levels across all supported business units.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to address operational challenges and implement continuous improvement initiatives.
* Identify and address IT issues as primary point of contact and optimize infrastructure, hardware, software and processes, in close partnership with the GSC business team and driving GTO dependencies
* Engage in rigorous root cause analysis, problem solving and solution implementations
* Ensure system processes work in a manner that adheres to customer requirements
* Maintain and update systems and data – combination of legacy systems and Salesforce platforms
* Ability to identify systems problems, solution fixes, present to leadership, and implement changes


**Leadership and Management**
* Lead the planning and execution of special programs, including franchise expansions, portfolio adjustments, and new business trials.
* Lead and manage a team of technical resources located offshore, ensuring high performance, motivation, and professional development.
* Coordinate with stakeholders to align program objectives with overall business goals and supply chain capabilities.
* Foster a culture of collaboration, accountability, and continuous learning within the planning team


**Franchise \& Portfolio Planning**
* Analyze and manage the supply chain aspects of franchise operations, ensuring alignment with market demands and strategic objectives.
* Evaluate portfolio performance and implement planning adjustments to optimize product mix, inventory levels, and distribution strategies.
* Lead and support any Franchise and Portfolio initiatives and relevant system enhancements that includes but not limited to planning systems.


**New Business Integration**
* Collaborate with business development teams to assess supply chain implications of new business opportunities.
* Design and implement (planning) processes to support the successful launch and integration of new programs like AG International.
* Monitor and report on the performance of new initiatives, providing insights for continuous improvement.


**Project Deliverables** 
 Oversee the planning, execution, and delivery of technical projects, ensuring they are completed on time, within scope, and within budget.
   

  

**Collaboration** 
 Work closely with onshore teams, to align offshore activities with overall business objectives and project goals. Must be able and willing to jump in hands on any administrative, production support, Project management and/or business analyst tasks as needed.
   

  

**Resource Allocation** 
 Efficiently allocate and manage technical resources to meet project / operation demands and optimize productivity.
   

  

**Quality Assurance** 
 Implement and maintain quality assurance processes to ensure the highest standards of technical delivery.
   

  

**Communication** 
 Facilitate effective communication between offshore and onshore teams, ensuring transparency and alignment on project status, risks, and issues.
   

  

**Problem Solving** 
 Proactively identify and resolve technical and operational challenges to ensure smooth project execution.
   

  

**Stakeholder Management** 
 Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, providing regular updates and addressing any concerns or requirements.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Education Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or related field. Or 10\+ years in similar IT solution roles focusing on planning and supply chain operations in consumer product industries.
* Experience Minimum of 8 years of experience in IT solution architecture with at least 4 years focusing on supply chain planning systems and at least 3 years in a managerial role. Deep understanding of end\-to\-end supply chain process and applications is a MUST. Expert in application support including problem analysis and resolution. Strong analytical and critical thinking mindset. Expert relationship management/networking skills with excellent verbal and written communication skills. Comfortable presenting to business stakeholders on a regular basis and Should be able to work independently under minimal supervision and be a good team player.
* Technical Skills Strong understanding of software development, IT infrastructure, and project delivery methodologies and
+ Must have experience in Anaplan, Blue Yonder ESP/Fulfillment, ETL tools like Informatica, Ascend, , Cloudworks. Porficient in SQL, Excel, JIRA.
+ Nice to have \- Google cloud, Data Quality and Governance .

* Leadership Skills Proven ability to lead and inspire technical teams, with excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
* Problem\-Solving Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities, with a proactive approach to addressing challenges.
* Cultural Awareness Ability to work effectively in a multicultural and highly dynamic environment and manage teams across different time zones. Must be multi\-tasker and able to adapt, prioritize and deliver assignments with the highest quality under pressure with short deadlines.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Familiarity with advanced planning systems (e.g., SAP IBP, Oracle SCM Cloud, BY ESP), Anaplan, OMS and WMS a strong plus.
* Knowledge of project management methodologies and tools.


 Don’t meet every single requirement? At Mattel, we are dedicated to an inclusive workplace and a culture of belonging. If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we still encourage you to apply. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.
   

  

**How We Work**
 We are a purpose driven company aiming to empower generations to explore the wonder of childhood and reach their full potential. We live up to our purpose employing the following behaviors
   

  

* We collaborate Being a part of Mattel means being part of one team with shared values and common goals. Every person counts and working closely together always brings better results. Partnership is our process and our collective capabilities is our superpower.
* We innovate At Mattel we always aim to find new and better ways to create innovative products and experiences. No matter where you work in the organization, you can always make a difference and have real impact. We welcome new ideas and value new initiatives that challenge conventional thinking.
* We execute We are a performance\-driven company. We strive for excellence and are focused on pursuing best\-in\-class outcomes. We believe in accountability and ownership and know that our people are at their best when they are empowered to create and deliver results.


**Our Approach to Flexible Work:**
 We embrace a flexible work model designed to empower a culture of growth, optimism, and wellbeing, where every employee can reach their full potential. Combining purposeful in\-person collaboration with flexibility, our focus is to optimize performance and drive connection for moments that matter.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Mattel is a leading global toy and family entertainment company and owner of one of the most iconic brand portfolios in the world. We engage consumers and fans through our franchise brands, including Barbie, Hot Wheels, Fisher\-Price, American Girl, Thomas \& Friends, UNO, Masters of the Universe, Matchbox, Monster High, MEGA and Polly Pocket, as well as other popular properties that we own or license in partnership with global entertainment companies. Our offerings include toys, content, consumer products, digital and live experiences. Our products are sold in collaboration with the world’s leading retail and ecommerce companies. Since its founding in 1945, Mattel is proud to be a trusted partner in empowering generations to explore the wonder of childhood and reach their full potential.
   

  

 Mattel’s award\-winning workplace culture has been recognized by Forbes, Fast Company, Newsweek, Great Place to Work, TIME, and more.
   

  

 Visit us at https //jobs.mattel.com/ and www.instagram.com/MattelCareers .
   

  

 Mattel is an Equal Opportunity Employer where we want you to bring your authentic self to work every day. We welcome all job seekers, and all applicants will receive consideration for employment.
   

  

 Videos to watch
   

  

 The Culture at Mattel
   

  

 Corporate Philanthropy

23e5bf35.title: Solution Architect,D&T,SAP BW
23e5bf35.description:
**Description**
 At West, we’re a dedicated team that is connected by a purpose to improve patient lives that has been at the center of our Company for more than a century. Our story began when Herman O. West solved the problem of supplying penicillin in mass quantities to the US Government during World War 2\. Through our work to deliver thousands of life\-saving and life\-enhancing injectable medicines to millions of patients daily, West’s indelible mark on the healthcare industry has just begun. A name started our story. How will yours help write our future?
   

  

 There’s no better place to join an inclusive community of professionals with opportunities for lifelong learning, growth and development. Supported by benefit programs, we empower the physical, mental, emotional and financial health of our team members and their families.
   

  

 We believe in giving back to help those in need in the communities where we live and work. And are equally committed to creating a healthier environment and planet through our sustainability efforts.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The
 **Solution Architect, D\&T, SAP BW** 
 possesses in\-depth knowledge and experience to work autonomously. The position is responsible for the SAP BW \-Development, minor enhancements, with expertise in Production support. Have experience in Modeling, Extraction, reporting pertaining to SAP BW 7\.5 on HANA .
   

  

 This role requires hands\-on experience in SAP BW, HANA CDS Views, data warehouse design, Extraction \& Reporting.
   

  

**Essential Duties And Responsibilities**
* Work experience in Enhancements and supporting the enterprise BW , e xpertise in HANA\-BW data modelling using Eclipse Tool.
* Work with Users and Functional teams to gather \& document reporting requirements and to use the underlying data sources/data warehouses to meet business requirements.
* Act as an expert in Daily Production support activities pertaining to SAP BW , CDS Views
* Worked on Production support data load issues , bugs , tickets from Business and enhancements.
* Expertise in setup table fill concept, extraction from source systems like S4 Hana, ECC, APO
* Worked extensively on extraction from source system like S4 , APO, HR , Flat file etc . Expertise in LO Cockpit Extractions, Flat File Extractions and Generic Extractions. Having knowledge on using SAP delivered information structures, User defined information Structures for extracting data from different Logistic Information system (LIS).
* Liaise with the SAP Functional Teams to work on solutioning on all Gaps/Enhancements or bug fixes.
* Expertise in SAP BI/BW Data\-ware house \& Development of BW Objects, which includes Prototyping \& Technical Specifications.
* Other duties as assigned


**Additional Responsibilities**
****Education****
* Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, preferably in computer science


****Work Experience****
* Minimum 3 years of relevant experience


**Preferred Knowledge, Skills And Abilities**
* Knowledge in writing ABAP in transformation routines like Start or End or Expert routine.
* Knowledge in writing or debugging ABAP code for Object oriented classes and Function modules.
* Knowledge on SAP HANA Attribute views, Analytic views, and Calculation views etc.
* Knowledge/Understanding on Reporting tools BO/Power BI
* Worked/Knowledge on frontend tools like Analysis for Office, Power BI reporting tools.
* Previously worked on modeling of Custom Info objects, Info object maintenance, Data Sources (LO, FI etc), Info Sources, DTP’s, Info packages, PSA, Advanced DSO objects, DSO Objects, Info cubes, Data Marts, Info Providers, Multi Providers, Aggregates, APD's
* Knowledge in front\-end Business Warehouse Components like Queries, Calculated Key figures, Restricted Key figures, Structures \& Cells, Variables, Exceptions and Conditions, RRI, Web Items and Web Templates \& Reports, Input Ready Queries/Planning Templates.
* Comply with all relevant SOPs as per Company policy as they are related to the position covered by this Job Description.
* Comply with the company’s safety and quality policies.


****Physical and Travel Requirements****
* 15% travel, including global travel.
* Occasional on\-call work required.

**Additional Requirements**
 West is an equal opportunity employer and we value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. If you have a special need that requires accommodation in order to apply to West, please send an email to Apply.Accommodation@westpharma.com . Where permitted by law, an offer of employment with West Pharmaceutical Services, or any of its subsidiary or affiliate companies, is contingent upon the satisfactory completion of background screening and/or a pre\-employment drug screening.

7a71638a.title: Sr.Architect
7a71638a.description:
**Job Summary**
 As a Senior Architect you will play a pivotal role in designing and implementing cutting\-edge cloud solutions. With a focus on cloud security and infrastructure you will leverage your expertise in AI and ML to drive innovation. Your contributions will enhance our technological capabilities ensuring robust and scalable solutions that align with our strategic goals.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design and implement comprehensive cloud solutions that meet business requirements and align with industry standards.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to integrate AI and ML capabilities into existing cloud infrastructure.
* Ensure the security and compliance of cloud services by implementing best practices and security models.
* Lead the development of scalable and efficient cloud architectures that support deep learning and generative AI applications.
* Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior team members fostering a culture of continuous learning and innovation.
* Oversee the deployment and management of cloud resources across AWS GCP and Azure platforms.
* Develop and maintain documentation for cloud architectures ensuring clarity and accessibility for all stakeholders.
* Conduct regular assessments of cloud infrastructure to identify areas for improvement and optimization.
* Collaborate with project management teams to ensure timely delivery of cloud\-based solutions.
* Drive transformation initiatives by leveraging AI and ML concepts to enhance business processes.
* Evaluate and recommend new cloud technologies and services that align with organizational goals.
* Facilitate workshops and training sessions to promote understanding and adoption of cloud technologies.
* Monitor industry trends and advancements in cloud computing to ensure the organization remains at the forefront of innovation.


**Qualifications**
* Demonstrate expertise in cloud solution architecture with a strong understanding of cloud security models and services.
* Possess in\-depth knowledge of cloud infrastructure and concepts with experience across AWS GCP and Azure.
* Exhibit proficiency in AI and ML particularly in deep learning and generative AI applications.
* Showcase strong programming skills in Python with a focus on AI and ML development.
* Have experience in project and program management with a background in transformation initiatives.
* Display excellent communication and collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively in a hybrid work model.


**Certifications Required**
 AWS Certified Solutions Architect Google Professional Cloud Architect Azure Solutions Architect Expert
