**Job Description**

**About Persistent**

  

We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what?s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. Our disruptor?s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We reported $1,654\.4M FY26 revenue with 17\.4% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 27,500\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been recognized as the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally in the 2026 Brand Finance IT Services 25 Report. We named a Leader in the Everest Group Private Equity (PE) Services PEAK Matrix? Assessment 2026 and Software Product Engineering PEAK Matrix? Assessment 2026\.

 **About Position:**

  

We are looking for an experienced Salesforce QA Lead ? AccelQ, with 8 to 15 years of experience to lead Salesforce testing engagements and drive quality assurance excellence across enterprise Salesforce implementations. The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in Sales Cloud, AccelQ automation tool, and Validation Testing (Valgenesys), along with proven experience in leading QA teams. The candidate will be responsible for defining test strategies, managing testing activities, mentoring team members, and ensuring high\-quality deliverables across Salesforce programs.

* **Role: Salesforce QA Lead ? AccelQ ? Sales Cloud \& CPQ**
* **Location: All persistent Location**
* **Experience: 8 to 15 years**
* **Job Type: Full\-Time Employment**

 **What You'll Do:**

  

* Lead and mentor a team of QA engineers, providing guidance on testing best practices, automation strategies, and quality processes.
* Define test strategies, test plans, and quality assurance frameworks for Salesforce implementations.
* Develop and oversee automation test scripts using AccelQ for Salesforce Sales Cloud applications.
* Perform functional, integration, regression, system, and validation testing for Salesforce features and enhancements.
* Validate Sales Cloud components such as Leads, Opportunities, Accounts, Contacts, Forecasting, Reports, and Dashboards.
* Execute Validation Testing using Valgenesys to ensure data integrity, accuracy, and compliance.
* Validate CPQ processes, pricing configurations, quote generation, and contract workflows.
* Conduct API testing (REST/SOAP) and validate integrations with external applications and business systems.
* Collaborate with developers, architects, business analysts, and stakeholders to ensure comprehensive test coverage and quality delivery.
* Manage defect lifecycle, track quality metrics, and ensure timely defect resolution.
* Support release management activities and perform deployment validations across environments.
* Review test artifacts, automation reports, and execution summaries while ensuring adherence to quality standards.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives in test automation, QA processes, and team productivity.

 **Expertise You'll Bring:**

  

* Bachelor?s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* 8?15 years of overall QA experience, with a minimum of 5\+ years in Salesforce testing.
* Mandatory experience leading and managing QA teams in enterprise\-scale Salesforce projects.
* Strong understanding of Salesforce Sales Cloud functionalities and business processes.
* Hands\-on experience with AccelQ automation tool for Salesforce test automation.
* Experience in Validation Testing using Valgenesys.
* Experience testing Salesforce CPQ implementations, configurations, and integrations.
* Proficiency in functional, integration, regression, validation, and end\-to\-end testing methodologies.
* Strong experience in API testing using tools such as Postman, SoapUI, or similar.
* Knowledge of Salesforce Lightning Experience, custom components, and workflow validations.
* Experience working with Agile/Scrum methodologies and tools such as JIRA.
* Ability to define test strategies, estimate QA efforts, and manage testing deliverables across multiple projects.
* Strong stakeholder management, communication, leadership, and mentoring capabilities.
* Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices for Salesforce deployments.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.

 **Benefits:**

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups

 **Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:**

  

Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.

  

* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.

**About Persistent**

  

We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what?s next.  **About Position:**

  

We are seeking a SharePoint Architect to lead the design, implementation, and support of SharePoint Online as a centralized enterprise document management platform. The role focuses on information architecture, taxonomy, governance, and secure content management, ensuring scalable and compliant collaboration solutions. You will play a key role in modernizing legacy file share systems, driving migration initiatives, and improving document accessibility across the organization. This position requires close collaboration with architects, developers, and business stakeholders to deliver aligned outcomes within enterprise transformation programs

* **Role: SharePoint Architect**
* **Location: All Persistent Locations**
* **Experience : 10\-15 Years**
* **Job Type: Full Time Employment**

 **What You'll Do:**

  

* Responsible for designing, configuring, and supporting SharePoint Online as the enterprise document management platform
* Focus on taxonomy, governance, permissions, and migration from legacy file shares
* Ensures secure, scalable, and compliant document management architecture aligned with business needs
* Collaborates with architects, developers, and business stakeholders to deliver transformation outcomes

 **Expertise You'll Bring:**

  

Platform Design \& Administration

* Design and implement SharePoint Online architecture (Hub \& Spoke model)
* Configure and manage SharePoint Admin Center settings
* Define site collections, libraries, and information architecture
* Ensure optimal performance, scalability, and usability of SharePoint environment


Governance \& Compliance

* Establish and enforce SharePoint governance frameworks
* Implement data security policies, RBAC, and permission models
* Manage Microsoft Purview labels, retention, and compliance controls
* Ensure adherence to organizational and regulatory standards


Content Management \& Taxonomy

* Design and maintain metadata, taxonomy, and content types
* Build structured document classification models
* Standardize naming conventions and document lifecycle policies


Migration \& Transformation

* Plan and execute migration from legacy file shares to SharePoint Online
* Use tools like ShareGate / SPMT for migration activities
* Perform data mapping, validation, and post\-migration checks
* Ensure minimal business disruption and data integrity during migration


Automation \& Integration

* Develop workflows using Power Automate
* Integrate SharePoint with other systems using Microsoft Graph API (basic level)
* Enable automation for approvals, notifications, and document lifecycle processes


Operations \& Support

* Provide L2/L3 support for SharePoint\-related issues (permissions, access, performance)
* Monitor usage, storage, and health of SharePoint environment
* Troubleshoot and resolve site, access, and content\-related issues
* Support end users and stakeholders with best practices


Collaboration \& Delivery

* Participate in planning, design, testing, and rollout phases
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams (infra, security, business, dev)
* Drive knowledge transfer, documentation, and training sessions
* Align deliverables with overall transformation program goals

 **Benefits:**

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies

57ecdcae.title: AI (AMGBTTH10661) – Solution Architect (Exp: 15 Yrs+)
57ecdcae.description:
**Job Description: AI – Solution Architect (Exp: 15 Yrs\+)**  

We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced AI as a Solution Architect to join the team. Your key mission will be supporting the business on their AI roadmap and transform their requirements into end\-to\-end AI Solutions, coordinating with our AI Factory.  

* Experience should have 15\+ Years AI Solution Architect of which 5\+ years of hands\-on experience in AI Solution Architecture.
* A very broad experience in different types of AI solutions: different technology stacks, different tooling, in\-house and SaaS applications, Ability to evaluate what works and what doesn’t, what is mature and what isn’t.
* Proven experience deploying AI solutions in Microsoft Azure and SAP technologies
* Knowledge about SAP integration architectures
* Familiarity with LLMs and generative AI frameworks
* Knowledge of model monitoring, retraining, and explainability techniques.
* Excellent communication, collaboration, and stakeholder management skills.
* English: Advanced (written and spoken).
* Knowledge about Finance business processes
* Knowledge about Purchasing business processes is a plus

 **Roles \& Responsibility:** **Business \& Requirements Analysis*** Actively participate to business process optimization workshops
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to identify challenges and opportunities where AI can add value.
* Translate business goals into technical requirements for AI solutions.
Identify use cases where AI adds real value, prioritizing ROI and feasibility.  
* 

  

**Solution Design \& Architecture*** Design end\-to\-end AI solutions, covering:
* Data ingestion and processing
* Model training and evaluation
* Deployment, monitoring, and scaling
Ensure the architecture is scalable, maintainable, and secure.  
* 

  

**Model \& Technology Selection*** Evaluate and recommend GenAI models, frameworks, and AI services.
* Decide between custom development and external tools

 **Collaboration \& Cross\-Functional Leadership*** Work closely with:
* Data Scientists — to ensure models meet business objectives
* Software Engineers / Developers — for integration into applications
* AI Technical architects
Act as a bridge between business, internal and external consulting teams and our implementation partners  
* 

  

**Governance, Compliance \& Risk*** Ensure AI solutions follow ethical guidelines, avoid bias, and comply with regulations (GDPR, HIPAA, AI Act, etc.).
Ensure all AI solutions adhere to internal governance policies and procedures.  
* 

  

**Prototyping \& Proof\-of\-Concepts*** Build or oversee prototypes / PoCs to validate technical feasibility and business impact.
Assess performance, accuracy, and latency of AI models in the target environment.  
* 

  

**Documentation \& Communication*** Produce architecture diagrams, solution specifications, and technical documentation.

Present AI solution designs and clearly explain technical trade\-offs to stakeholders and leadership.

2b2bd14c.title: Solution Architect - Application
2b2bd14c.description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**Job Title: Solution Architect – Application**
 At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.
   

  

 We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.
   

  

 Join EY and help to build a better working world.
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 EY is a global leader in Advisory, Assurance, Tax, and Transaction Services. In our globalizing economy the availability of skills and expertise is becoming more and more distributed. Within the End User Technology Experience team, we enable EY professionals to meet the increasing pace of business by delivering productivity and collaboration solutions that empower them to work together where they want and how they want.
   

  

 The Solution Architect is a highly skilled senior role with industry leading architecture and design expertise to support one or more programs. He/she has a deep end to end understanding of architecture standards and platform solution
   

  

 development expertise.
   

  

 The End User Technology Experience requires a seasoned Solution Architect to provide technical guidance on Application development, Microsoft Platform solutions, and lead customer service applications. Candidate must be a self\-starter with Agile framework experience and provide RISK/Technical architecture leadership.
   

  

**Essential Functions Of The Job**
**The Solution Architect:**
* Architect and Design platform solutions needed for a complex enterprise
* Manages the technical dependencies across the different products and services
* Provides guidance on complex production designs, applications or system problems.
* Solution design will include the creation of reusable, repeatable IP and artifacts
* Identify opportunities to innovate, extend and enhance O365/Azure services
* Own Root Cause Analysis and Problem Management for first of a kind solution implementation
* Lead Agile sprints in product owner capacity and mentor technical staff on newer design sprints
* Enforce adherence to architectural standards/principles, global product\-specific guidelines, usability experience and design standards, etc.
* Identify, communicate and mitigate Risks, Assumptions, Issues and Decisions throughout the development lifecycle.
* Responsible for the solution planning, migration, architecture, development, and delivery; works with business stakeholders and technical teams to develop and implement solutions in agile environments, provides support for new SharePoint deployments and migrations from older platforms; builds Intranets, branding, enterprise applications and collaboration systems.
* Responsible to propose with a custom solutions \& collaboration with business application owners, project managers, designers, engineers, and infrastructure teams to build a quality experience for users.


**Knowledge and Skills Requirements:**
* History of working credibly with senior stakeholders
* Adapts personal communication style to the style of others, develops rapport and stays calm under pressure or escalating issues using advanced oral and written English communication skills.
* Strong verbal and written skills including strong cross\-cultural communication and the ability to draft effective communications
* Ability to work with people in a variety of cultures, countries and time zones
* Demonstrate excellent technical \& architecture skills in the context of cloud\-based platform/product design, service management and product lifecycle management
* Demonstrate ability to rapidly learn new and emerging technologies and developing a vision of their suitability
* Serves as the lead solution architect for customer service solutions
* Experience with Microsoft Teams and Dynamics 365
* Experience with ServiceNow, Azure IaaS and PaaS services
* Experience with Business Intelligence analytic tools
* Designed, validated, and implemented PowerApps and Power BI solutions
* Platform Expertise using Microsoft Graph, Power Apps, Flow and market place apps
* Knowledge of Artificial Intelligence, BOT Framework, RPA and virtual agents
* Knowledge of python, AI stacks, CNN’s, RNN’s, AI Fluency, NLP, Digital Twins, Metaverse, Data preprocessing.
* Knowledge of UI/UX, branding, and document management, Custom solutions development, search and metadata configuration, business analysis, business process automation, and workflows. Microsoft PowerApps and Microsoft Flow, SharePoint Technologies (Windows SharePoint Services, SharePoint Server, InfoPath Forms
* Services, Forms, PowerShell scripts, Migration tools (Sharegate, DocAve, Cloudiway), Excel Services, Search,
* Business Data Catalog and Web Services), PowerApps, Flow, Power BI, Security \& Compliance, Data Governance, Classic and Modern UI, PowerShell, PowerApps, Flow
* Knowledge of Intranets, public websites, applications, Proposal Management Systems, Project Management
* Information Systems, product or service sites, business development, process automation with forms and workflows.
* Knowledge of Classic and Modern UI, Power BI and SharePoint integration \& so as building knowledge of automated process and workflows (using various tools \& technologies).
* Knowledge of Agile Development, Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI), System Development Life Cycle
* Methodology (SDLCM), Microsoft Operations Framework (MOF), Microsoft Solutions Framework (MSF)
* Build technical artifacts for Engineering and product owners
* Brings proven industry leading technical expertise of the product(s)
* Good understanding of the financial aspects of the product management
* 5\-10 years’ experience in an Architecture role


**Other Requirements:**
* The role may require minimum travel, participate in workshops, coach/lead engineering teams and available in US/UK business hours


**Job Requirements:**
**Education:**
* Bachelor or Master degree in Information Technology or Business Management


**Experience:**
* Approximately 17 years of experience in a comparable executive leadership role.


**Certification Requirements:**
* TOGAF, O365, Azure Paas, IaaS or Analytics Certification


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.
   

  

 EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi\-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

68fddeb8.title: Healthcare Solutions Architect, India-PS
68fddeb8.description:
**Description**
 Are you excited to work with the team that enables Indian industries to build innovative services with AWS, scaling to serve billion\+ Indians? The team in AWS India is looking for a Solutions Architect, who can work with our customers, who have built world class scaling infrastructure, exceptional solutions, exploding digital content and interactive experiences. Indian industries are profoundly changing everyday life of billion\+ Indians through their digital native solutions.
   

  

 Your broad responsibilities will include: owning the technical engagement and ensure success around specific implementation projects, developing a deep expertise in the AWS technologies as well as broad knowledge around how applications and services are constructed using the AWS platform for Healthcare organisations. An ideal candidate will be owning the architecture and design IT systems deploying at scale to evangelize adoption of new technologies, have experience with multiple technologies, patterns and frameworks; and is able to figure out trade\-offs between them, be hands\-on and can roll up their sleeves should need be to do Proof of concepts and demonstrate technologies. Candidate should be good at identifying repeatable pattern and best practices, picking up new technologies, Healthcare industry aspects \& constant learners.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will possess customer facing skills that will allow them to represent AWS India well within a customer’s or partner's environment and drive discussions with senior executives within the company, as well as a technical background that enables them to easily interact and give guidance to developer community and architects in India. S/he should also have demonstrated ability to think strategically about business, product, and technical challenges.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 The selected candidate will work with AWS customers to map business requirements to technology; define performance requirement based on user access patterns; compare between various design patterns; discern between variety of Generative AI, AI/ML, data, analytics, compute, containers, and serverless technologies; architect for high availability and scaling requirements, while minimizing the cost and meeting security standards; architect disaster recovery solutions for required RTO/RPO; advise on building DevOps pipelines and process; advise on monitoring and observability; conduct well architected reviews; partner with AWS Specialists to implement innovative solutions; collaborate with the Service teams to identify feature gaps suggest new features; present to customer C\-suite and technical communities on architecture patterns, best practices, case studies.
   

  

 Position can be based out of Gurgaon/ Noida
   

  

**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee\-led and company\-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 10\+ years of IT development or implementation/consulting in the software or Internet industries experience
* 4\+ years of specific technology domain areas (e.g. software development, cloud computing, systems engineering, infrastructure, security, networking, data \& analytics) experience
* 2\+ years of design, implementation, or consulting in applications and infrastructures experience


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with AWS technologies from a dev/ops perspective
* Experience working within software development or Internet\-related industries
* Experience migrating or transforming legacy customer solutions to the cloud
* Experience using managed ML/AI solutions
* Experience of architecting/ building/implementing Healthcare domain solutions


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Haryana
   

  

 Job ID: A10427789

cb3b6029.title: Software Architect
cb3b6029.description:
**The Company**
 CTeBS, a subsidiary of Classic Fashion, is a leading software solution provider to the apparel manufacturing industry globally. Our suite of enterprise\-level products, including our flagship Trendz CMP, leverages cutting\-edge technology to enhance productivity, quality, and efficiency, ensuring our clients achieve unparalleled growth and success. Our journey with Classic Fashion has uniquely positioned us to design technology\-enabled products and solutions for the ever\-evolving needs of the apparel manufacturing sector, and we are poised for an exciting phase of growth.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are looking for a hands\-on
 **Software Architect** 
 who is passionate about building scalable, high\-performance software. In this role, you will serve as the bridge between high\-level architectural vision and low\-level code implementation.
   

  

 Unlike a pure manager, you will remain deeply involved in the code. You will own the technical design for major features, enforce coding standards, and solve the complex problems that stall development teams. You will work closely with the Associate Technical Manager (who handles delivery/metrics) while you ensure the
 **technical integrity** 
 of the solution.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Take full architectural responsibility for specific products or core modules (e.g., the Production Planning Engine or Payroll Calculation System).
* Translate business requirements into technical design documents (TDDs), defining data models, API contracts, and class structures before coding begins.
* Proactively identify "spaghetti code" or technical debt in our legacy Java/MSSQL systems and design safe refactoring plans to modernize them.
* You are the final approver for critical code merges. You do not just check for bugs; you check for maintainability, security, and scalability.
* Deep dive into database execution plans (Oracle/MSSQL) and application logic to optimize slow queries and reduce latency.
* Enforce consistent design patterns (Singleton, Factory, Observer, etc.) across the development team to ensure the codebase remains uniform.
* Act as the "Problem Solver in Chief" for the development team. When a developer is stuck on a complex logic issue, you provide the solution.
* Mentor Senior Developers on how to write clean, efficient, and testable code. Conduct technical workshops on new frameworks or best practices.


**Qualifications**
* 8 to 12 years of software development experience, with at least 2\+ years in a Software Architect Role.
* Expert in Java/J2EE (Spring, Hibernate, Multithreading).
* Strong proficiency in MSSQL or Oracle (Stored Procedures, Indexing, Partitioning).
* Solid understanding of Angular component architecture (even if you don't write CSS daily, you understand the data flow).
* Strong grasp of Object\-Oriented Design (OOD), Microservices patterns, and RESTful API design.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins/GitLab), Docker, and code quality tools (SonarQube).
* Proven ability to debug complex production issues (memory leaks, thread deadlocks) under pressure.

81602405.title: Application Architect
81602405.description:
. Application Architect
 



 Role Summary:
 



 Drive modern application architecture integrating AI and automation into SDLC tools and platforms.
 



 Key Responsibilities:
 



 • Architect scalable, modular applications aligned with microservices and API\-first principles
 



 • Embed AI capabilities into SDLC tools (e.g., code generation, testing, monitoring)
 



 • Enable integration across delivery pipelines, governance tools, and enterprise platforms
 



 • Define application\-level standards for performance, security, and scalability
 



 • Support transformation from legacy to modern, AI\-enabled application ecosystems
 



 • Collaborate with DevSecOps to ensure seamless CI/CD and automation integration
 



  





 Skills \& Experience:
 



 • 12\+years in application design and development (Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, etc.)
 



 • Strong experience in microservices, API\-first, and event\-driven architectures
 



 • Hands\-on knowledge of cloud\-native development and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
 



 • Experience integrating AI capabilities into applications (APIs, copilots, automation tools)
 



 • Understanding of SDLC tools and developer ecosystems
 



 • Strong focus on performance, scalability, and security best practices
 



 • Experience in legacy modernization and system re\-architecture
 



 • Ability to collaborate across Dev, QA, DevOps, and AI teams

5d0fe807.title: Solution Architect, M365 Copilot
5d0fe807.description:
**Job Description**
 We are looking for a Microsoft 365 Copilot Solution Architect, passionate about technology and AI, to play a key role in our Microsoft 365 Copilot and be part of a Copilot \& Copilot Studio Center of Excellence team. This is a strategic opportunity to shape how AI and Agentic AI solutions are designed, governed, and scaled across a Nokia organization transforming the way we work—leveraging Microsoft 365 Copilot, and Microsoft 365 Agents to drive automation, intelligence, and next\-generation digital experiences across our global teams.
   

  

 As we accelerate our AI journey, Microsoft 365 Copilot is becoming a core productivity service, transforming how employees collaborate, make decisions, and automate work. In this role, you will be at the center of that transformation—defining architectures, security guardrails, guiding business scenarios, and ensuring Copilot solutions are secure, compliant, scalable, and value driven according to our governance. You will work closely with a broad ecosystem of stakeholders, including: M365 Service Owners and Platform Architects, Business Product Owners and Power Users, Solution Designers and Developers, Security, Privacy, Legal, and Compliance teams, Communications, Change Management, and Adoption teams, Procurement and Vendor Management teams, Microsoft team, but not limited to. This role combines deep technical expertise, architectural leadership, and strong stakeholder engagement, with a clear mission: enable safe, impactful, and scalable AI experiences across the enterprise.
   

  

**How You Will Contribute And What You Will Learn**
* Define and own the reference architecture for Microsoft 365 Copilot within the enterprise
* Design secure, compliant, and scalable Copilot solutions aligned with business and regulatory requirements
* Lead the architectural design of Copilot use cases, plugins, connectors, MCP servers, agents (Microsoft 1st party, 3rd Party, Custom), and extensions across Microsoft 365 workloads
* Partner with Security, Legal, Privacy, and Compliance teams to ensure responsible AI adoption and data protection
* Establish and implement governance models, design guidelines, and best practices for Copilot and Agentic AI solutions, including billing models
* Support Service Owners and Business teams in identifying high\-value Copilot scenarios and translating them into technical designs defining success metrics (productivity, quality, cycle time), building business cases, and avoiding “AI for AI’s sake”.
* Guide the implementation of DLP, Purview controls, and access models related to Copilot usage
* Contribute to automation and operational excellence using PowerShell and scripting where applicable
* Act as a technical authority and advisor within the Copilot Center of Excellence
* Support adoption, change management, and communication initiatives by translating architecture into clear, actionable guidance
* Produce clear, reusable artifacts: reference architectures, decision records, security patterns, design blueprints, and operational runbooks that others can follow.
* Comfort with operationalization: monitoring, incident patterns, service health, telemetry, lifecycle management, and automation (PowerShell strongly preferred).
* Monitor Microsoft 365 Copilot roadmap, staying continuously aligned with Microsoft’s product direction, analyzing roadmap changes, and actively participating in private and public previews, internal programs initiatives to provide early architectural guidance, readiness assessments, and recommendations to stakeholders


**Key Skills And Experience**
**Must\-Have:**
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, information systems, or a related field with Over 12 years of enterprise in IT solution design and development experience, including 2\+ years with Microsoft 365 Copilot and 3\+ years in Power Platform and low\-code architecture roles.
* Understanding M365 identity, tenant design, service dependencies, and large\-scale rollout patterns across Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, Entra ID, and endpoint ecosystem.
* Ability to explain how Copilot works across apps (Teams, Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Loop, OneNote, and other M365 apps) and translate business scenarios into a safe, performant architecture.
* Experience designing agents: intents, actions, orchestration, fallback, human\-in\-the\-loop, conversation design, grounding strategies, and lifecycle/versioning.
* Understanding of Microsoft Purview concepts: sensitivity labels, information protection, retention, eDiscovery basics, auditing—plus practical implementation patterns for Copilot readiness.
* Strong understanding of identity and access controls, conditional access, least privilege, secure\-by\-default configurations, and how Copilot interacts with permissions and content exposure.
* Able to design and operationalize DLP policies that protect data without blocking productivity — balancing risk, usability, and business outcomes and Knows how to craft, evaluate, and standardize prompts; can coach business users; and can implement guardrails (do/don’t patterns, safe prompting playbooks, red\-teaming prompts).
* Understanding of Azure components commonly used in integrations (identity/app registrations, APIs, Key Vault, monitoring, networking concepts), plus how enterprise controls apply.
* Capable of connecting Copilot/agents to business data and workflows (connectors, APIs, Graph concepts, MCP servers), while handling authentication, authorization, and data boundaries correctly.


**Nice\-To\-Have:**
* Proven ability to lead across Security, Legal, Privacy, Procurement, Communications, business owners, and service teams—especially when trade\-offs are involved.
* Ability to partner with adoption/comms teams to build playbooks, learning paths, champion networks, and “scaled enablement” models—critical for 120k\+ users.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and communications skills: Written, Verbal and ability to present material management teams, create operational procedures guidance, and training.


**About Us**
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**
 Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.
   

  

 Learn more about life at Nokia .
   

  

**Our recruitment process**
 We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.
   

  

 If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.
   

  

 The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .
   

  

**About The Team**
 Some of our benefits:
   

  

* Flexible and hybrid working schemes
* A minimum of 90 days of Maternity and Paternity Leave, with the option to return to work within a year following the birth or adoption of a child (based on eligibility)
* Life insurance to all employees to provide peace of mind and financial security
* Well\-being programs to support your mental and physical health
* Opportunities to join and receive support from Nokia Employee Resource Groups (NERGs)
* Employee Growth Solutions to support your personalized career \& skills development
* Diverse pool of Coaches \& Mentors to whom you have easy access
* A learning environment which promotes personal growth and professional development \- for your role and beyond

ec55ab82.title: Lead Solution Architect
ec55ab82.description:
The Chevron Engineering and Innovation Excellence Center (ENGINE) in Bengaluru India brings together the resources and expertise of the Chevron global network with talent in India to enhance agility and technological innovation to optimize solutions for the world’s current and future energy challenges. As one of the leading energy providers worldwide, Chevron is involved in the production of crude oil and natural gas, manufacturing of transportation fuels, lubricants, petrochemicals, and additives, and the development of enabling technologies.
   

  

 Chevron's vision is to be the global energy company most admired for its people, partnerships, and performance. With a clear purpose to develop affordable, reliable, ever\-cleaner energy that enables human progress, we believe human ingenuity has the power to solve any challenge and overcome any obstacle. Meeting the world’s growing energy needs requires the pursuit of innovations and advancements that deliver a better future for all.
   

  

**About The Position**
 Provides execution oversight and leadership to the IT Operations teams located at ENGINE. Member of the global IT Operations Leadership Team, and partners to deliver prioritized business objectives. Ensures delivery execution is effective, efficient, and aligned with the overall direction of the global IT Operations.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Support the digital enablement of IT Operations workflows.
* Hire, attract, and retain talent for the IT Operations delivery organization within ENGINE. Communicate and reinforce the desired work culture, including a focus on personal and process safety. Recognize accomplishments and team member contributions.
* Build team alignment and consensus, ensuring team has a clear understanding of the platform’s global priorities. Enable others to work effectively and collaboratively in a multi\-discipline, multi\-function, multi\-cultural, and matrix environment.
* Support the Digital Platform Manager \& Digital Platform Technical Manager in managing the overall performance of the Platform, aligning Engine teams with the rest of the global platform, and escalating any team concerns.
* Collaborate with stakeholders and delivery partners, including peers at other locations, to execute the platform’s prioritized and strategic initiatives.
* Provide technical support and mentoring to junior staff
* Promote best practice and common standards and technology usage within the team
* Manage performance and development of the Subsurface Digital Platform ENGINE Tech Team Leads


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or comparable field
* Minimum 10\-15 years’ experience in managing development and operations\-based IT teams including business planning, vendor management, resource planning, talent management and support of software solutions
* Experience digitally enabling oil and gas business workflows
* Broad technical IT experience related to solution performance, reliability, cybersecurity, IT compliance, outsourcing, modernization, and agile delivery methodologies
* Experience hiring and managing team supervisors
* Strong communication skills. Ability to be well\-organized, clear and concise in conversations and written communications.
* Self\-driven, can work with minimal supervision
* Ability to prioritize tasks and quickly adjust in a rapidly changing environment
* Team player who exhibits effective interpersonal skills with a collaborative style
* English language (Advanced)


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* Experience digitally enabling oil and gas business workflows


**What We Can Offer You**
 Everything we do at Chevron is guided by our values and our commitment to The Chevron Way.
   

  

 Have the opportunity to take part in world\-leading energy projects, advance your professional development and expand your career within an inclusive and collaborative workplace.
   

  

* Join a workplace where innovation, collaboration and safety are at the core of how we work.
* Work in thoughtfully designed environments that support focus, well\-being, and innovation enhanced by digital tools that enable seamless collaboration.
* Grow through structured learning, mentorship, and opportunities to contribute to impactful projects that align with Chevron’s values and business priorities.
* Access comprehensive benefits that support your health, well\-being, and work\-life balance.
* Engage with emerging technologies and digital solutions that are shaping the future of energy and enterprise.


**How To Apply**
 To be a part of our success, click
 **APPLY** 
 to submit your application. Chevron regrets that it is unable to sponsor employment Visas or consider individuals on time\-limited Visa status for this position.
   

  

**Privacy and Terms and Conditions**
 We respect the privacy of candidates for employment. This Privacy Notice sets forth how we will use the information we obtain when you apply for a position through this career site. If you do not consent to the terms of this Privacy Notice, please do not submit information to us.
   

  

 Please access the Global Application Statements, select the country where you are applying for employment. By applying, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to the country specific statement.
   

  

 Terms of Use
   

  

 “ENGINE” refers to the Chevron Engineering and Innovation Excellence Center, which operates under Chevron Global Technology and Services Private Limited, an affiliate of Chevron Corporation. References to ENGINE in this document are for convenience only and do not denote a separate legal entity.
   

  

 This job advertisement is intended to provide a general overview of the role and workplace environment. Role details and outcomes may vary based on business needs and individual performance.
   

  

 Chevron ENGINE supports global operations, supporting business requirements across the world. Accordingly, the work hours for employees will be aligned to support business requirements. The standard work week will be Monday to Friday. Working hours are 8:00am to 5:00pm or 1\.30pm to 10\.30pm.
   

  

 Chevron participates in E\-Verify in certain locations as required by law.

51d3d286.title: Services Delivery Manager (Professional services Team)
51d3d286.description:
Why Join Us?
   

  

 Join Check Point Software Technologies as a Delivery Manager and be part of our global mission. As leaders in the Cyber Security industry, we tackle the most complex challenges head\-on. Our diverse team of passionate individuals is dedicated to innovation and excellence. We empower our clients with cutting\-edge solutions, serving a growing global customer base. By joining our team, you'll have the chance to make a meaningful impact in a remote\-friendly, fast\-paced, and fun environment.
   

  

 This role is responsible for leading operational delivery activities across the India Professional Services project delivery business, supporting consultants delivering enterprise security implementations, migrations, upgrades and customer escalations.
   

  

 The environment is highly dynamic and fast paced, requiring strong operational leadership, stakeholder management and delivery governance capabilities.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

**Major Responsibilities**
* Create and execute efficient personnel management plans
* Keep consultants utilization at a high level to meet annual objectives
* Improve the skills of our Professional Services consultants
* Maintain and increase the technical certification of consultants on the team
* Maintain strong relationships with customers, partners, sales and SE teams
* Strive to continuously improve current service offerings and delivery governance
* Help develop additional service offerings to enhance customer value
* Own and lead customer escalations end\-to\-end, working directly with customers, sales, SEs, TAC and consultants to drive resolution
* Lead operational cadence calls and ensure actions are tracked through to completion
* Always strive to improve the project delivery process and reporting structure
* Conduct regular 1:1 meetings with consultants
* Identify current and future challenges relating to skills, promotion, utilization and role development
* Demonstrate strong leadership presence by driving discussions, decisions and outcomes
* Be proactive, innovative and operationally focused
* Help with consultant recruitment and hiring
* Act as the primary delivery partner to sales leadership, ensuring regular communication, alignment and execution
* Support management of critical customer cutovers, weekend activities and enterprise delivery requirements
* Drive operational forecasting, resource planning and escalation management across the India project delivery business


**Qualifications**
* Experience managing a team of technical consultants or engineers
* Strong customer service, project management and quality control skills
* Proven experience managing escalations and enterprise customer situations
* Strong resource planning and operational management skills
* Excellent leadership and stakeholder management capabilities
* Strong teamwork skills and attention to detail
* Experience with Check Point technologies is preferred
* Experience managing firewall migrations, enterprise implementations or large\-scale delivery engagements is highly desirable
* Familiarity with technologies such as Maestro, VSX, VPN, CloudGuard and enterprise security environments is advantageous
* Ability to manage conflicts and make strong operational decisions under pressure
* Capacity to mentor and develop team members
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills

5c66df05.title: Program Manager, WW Knowledge Management Team
5c66df05.description:
**Description**
 Are you passionate about building learning experiences that change the way people work and grow? Do you get energy from helping small business owners and coaches unlock their full potential? Are you excited by the challenge of creating scalable programs that impact thousands of entrepreneurs worldwide? If yes, then you belong on Amazon’s DSP \& BC Learning team.
   

  

 Amazon’s Delivery Service Partner (DSP) program is one of the fastest growing parts of our logistics network, empowering entrepreneurs to build and lead their own last mile delivery businesses. Our Business Coaches (BCs) and DSPs are central to delivering millions of packages every day, and their success depends on world\-class training and education.
   

  

 We are looking for a Learning Manager to define, create, and deliver training experiences that help DSPs and BCs succeed from day one and continue to grow their businesses long\-term. In this role, you will be both a program owner and a content creator: you’ll partner with business and product teams, subject matter experts, and global stakeholders to translate complex requirements into simple, engaging, and scalable learning solutions. Your work will directly influence the quality, safety, and efficiency of Amazon’s last mile delivery network.
   

  

 This role is inherently cross\-functional; you’ll collaborate with program managers, product managers, operations leaders, and technology teams across geographies. If you’re passionate about learning, energized by building at scale, and inspired by seeing your work drive real\-world outcomes for entrepreneurs and their employees, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Drive a bold vision for learning that equips DSPs and BCs with the knowledge, skills, and tools to run successful last mile businesses.
* Design and deliver scalable learning content (e\-learning, facilitator\-led training, micro\-learning, job aids) grounded in instructional design best practices.
* Own end\-to\-end program management of learning initiatives: conduct needs analysis, develop content, implement programs, and measure results.
* Partner with stakeholders worldwide to align on business priorities and ensure training is relevant, timely, and impactful.
* Define and track metrics to measure learning effectiveness, using data and feedback to drive continuous improvement.

 This role is inherently cross\-functional; you’ll collaborate with program managers, product managers, operations leaders, and technology teams across geographies. If you’re passionate about learning, energized by building at scale, and inspired by seeing your work drive real\-world outcomes for entrepreneurs and their employees, this is your opportunity to make a lasting impact.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Drive a bold vision for learning that equips DSPs and BCs with the knowledge, skills, and tools to run successful last mile businesses.
* Design and deliver scalable learning content (e\-learning, facilitator\-led training, micro\-learning, job aids) grounded in instructional design best practices.
* Own end\-to\-end program management of learning initiatives: conduct needs analysis, develop content, implement programs, and measure results.
* Partner with stakeholders worldwide to align on business priorities and ensure training is relevant, timely, and impactful.
* Define and track metrics to measure learning effectiveness, using data and feedback to drive continuous improvement.
* Facilitate partner\-facing training and represent the DSP program in large and small group settings, answering complex questions with confidence.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of advanced Microsoft Word and Excel experience
* Bachelor's degree in relevant field, or 2\+ years of Amazon RME (BB/3P) full time experience
* Experience analyzing data and creating reports for leadership


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Knowledge of Lean principles and DMAIC methodology
* Experience in requirement gathering and ability to write clear and detailed requirement document
* Experience using Microsoft Projects software
* Knowledge of SQL


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. 25e588be.title: Associate Program Manager
25e588be.description:
**Role Summary**
**JOB DESCRIPTION**
 We are looking for a
 **senior professional** 
 with deep expertise in
 **cloud\-native architecture** 
 ,
 **microservices** 
 ,
 **DevOps** 
 ,
 **infrastructure monitoring** 
 ,
 **enterprise integration and team management** 
 . The role involves designing, governing, and guiding end\-to\-end Azure solutions while collaborating closely with business, development, security, and operations teams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Be accountable for a team of professionals involved in servicing cloud infrastructure and Devops support
* Knowledge and experience on end\-to\-end Azure cloud architectures (high availability, scalability, security, and cost optimization)
* Lead containerization and orchestration using Docker \& Kubernetes (AKS)
* Implement GitOps\-based deployments using ArgoCD
* Architect and govern CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps / GitHub Actions
* Experience in cloud networking design (VNETs, Subnets, NSGs, Load Balancers, Application Gateway, Firewall)
* Experienced in observability and monitoring using Datadog (logs, metrics, APM, alerts)
* Collaborate with DevOps teams to enforce IaC practices (Terraform / Bicep / ARM)
* Define non\-functional requirements: performance, resiliency, DR, security, compliance
* Review designs, conduct architecture reviews, and mentor senior engineers
* Act as a technical escalation point and ensure delivery quality


**Technical Skills**
**Cloud \& Azure**
* Azure core services: App Services, AKS, Azure Functions, Storage, Azure SQL, Cosmos DB
* Azure networking: VNET peering, Private Endpoints, ExpressRoute / VPN
* Identity \& Security: Azure AD, Managed Identity, RBAC, Key Vault


**DevOps \& Orchestration**
* Kubernetes (AKS) – cluster design, scaling, security, upgrades
* ArgoCD for GitOps\-based deployments
* Docker image strategy and registry management
* CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps / GitHub)


**Monitoring \& Observability**
* Datadog APM, infrastructure monitoring, logging, dashboards
* Alerting strategy and SLA/SLO definition


**Networking \& Security**
* Deep understanding of TCP/IP, DNS, Load Balancing, Firewalls
* Secure cloud design, Zero Trust concepts
* Experience with security scanning and compliance controls


**Architecture \& Design**
* Experience with enterprise architecture patterns
* System integration (REST, messaging, event streaming)
* High availability, disaster recovery, and multi\-region design
* Performance tuning and capacity planning


**Soft Skills**
* Excellent communication skills – able to explain complex concepts clearly
* Strong stakeholder management and cross\-team collaboration
* Eye for detail with a strong focus on quality and governance
* Ability to balance hands\-on work and strategic thinking
* Mentoring and leadership mindset


**Nice to Have**
* Azure certifications (Azure Solutions Architect Expert preferred)
* Experience with Kafka / Event Hub
* Knowledge of security tools, SAST/DAST
* Experience in regulated or large enterprise environments


**About The Team**
 eClerx is a global leader in productized services, bringing together people, technology and domain expertise to amplify business results. Our mission is to set the benchmark for client service and success in our industry. Our vision is to be the innovation partner of choice for technology, data analytics and process management services. Since our inception in 2000, we've partnered with top companies across various industries, including financial services, telecommunications, retail, and high\-tech. Our innovative solutions and domain expertise help businesses optimize operations, improve efficiency, and drive growth. With over 18,000 employees worldwide, eClerx is dedicated to delivering excellence through smart automation and data\-driven insights. At eClerx, we believe in nurturing talent and providing hands\-on experience.
   

  

 eClerx is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability or protected veteran status, or any other legally protected basis, per applicable law.

6c658a53.title: Program Manager II, BAR
6c658a53.description:
**Description**
 At Amazon, we are working to be the earth's most customer \- centric company. If you would like to help us build the place that help customers get their issues resolved in the fastest time possible, this is your chance to make history.
   

  

 We are looking for an exceptional Risk Manager to join our BAR team to lead automation solution from scratch (LLM,ML model based, Python) . Our team supports and optimizes process across operations sites that help minimize defects and improve SX. We build new models and optimization tools that help to scale quality audit mechanism.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Designing systems that increase critical\-to\-quality (CTQ) business needs by improving integration of people, materials, equipment, software, and finance.
   

  

 Leveraging and integrating advanced technology like LLM, Automations into process design to maximize return on investment and minimize costs.
   

  

 Innovating and designing new or improved processes to support the business needs.
   

  

 Conducting detailed process analysis including time and motion studies, and safety/ergonomic, process complexity, cost and environmental impact analysis.
   

  

 Recommending and implementing changes to procedures, work methods, and labor standards based on these analyses.
   

  

 Project and Change management from conception to completion.
   

  

 Build and publish critical data for understanding areas of financial opportunity and continuous improvement activity results, analyze root causes of difficult problems using statistical tools, and support the creation of reports and executive level documents.
   

  

 Experience working in or supporting a fast\-paced operations environment
   

  

**About The Team**
 Business Assessment and Reinforcement (BAR) owns risk mining and audit for high judgement complex decisions including one
   

  

 way door inventory disposal and funds withholding decisions that routinely end in litigation. We support SPIV \& FRM orgs to drive
   

  

 improvements in investigation judgement and accuracy in enforcement decisions along with driving innovation and business
   

  

 excellence based on inspection of operational processes and requirements from our partner teams. We implement ops efficiency
   

  

 solutions on behalf for ops and program teams by identifying and fixing gaps where confirmed bad actors have a good experience or good
   

  

 sellers have a bad experience.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 3\+ years of defining and implementing process improvement initiatives using data and metrics experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Knowledge of Excel (Pivot Tables, VLookUps) at an advanced level and SQL
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of driving end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* 3\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Experience in stakeholder management, dealing with multiple stakeholders at varied levels of the organization
* Experience building processes, project management, and schedules


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information.
