c8449d79.title: Account Solution Architect
c8449d79.description:
**About The Job**
 The Red Hat Sales team is looking for an experienced Account Solutions Architect to join us in Mumbai, India. In this role, you will provide the first major experience our customers have with Red Hat while creating possibilities, solving problems, and establishing working relationships. You'll discover and analyze the business and technical needs of our customers, while collaborating with the Sales and Technical Delivery teams to help them invest wisely in the best solutions that will give their systems maximum flexibility, allowing them to run faster and more efficiently. You'll need to have extensive technical expertise, passion for open source, a thorough understanding of business processes, and the ability to identify and solve issues at the enterprise level. As an Account Solutions Architect, you will also need to have great communication and people skills.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
* Develop strategic relationships with our customers to become a trusted adviser for Red Hat's offerings and solutions
* Demonstrate ownership of the technical relationships and technical sales cycle within a set of named accounts in your territory
* Ensure revenue and new business quotas/targets and service objectives are met while maintaining a high level of satisfaction among prospective and existing customer
* Provide presales technical support to our Enterprise Sales team
* Support evaluations of our offerings and technical proofs of concepts
* Respond to customer and partner inquiries, including requests for proposal (RFPs) and requests for information (RFIs)
* Provides pre\-sales technical support for the development and implementation of complex solutions.
* Use in\-depth domain \& product knowledge to provide technical expertise to customers or partners through sales presentations, product demonstrations, workshop, evaluations and Proof of Concept/Technology (POCs/POTs)
* Assess potential application of company products to meet customer needs and prepare detailed product specifications for the development and implementation of customer solutions.
* Create detailed design and implementation specifications for complex products/applications/solutions.
* Provide consultation to prospective users/customers/partners on product capability assessment and validation
* Design moderately complex customer solutions and lead workshops or pilots
* Develop technical success plans with sales (Account) or partner engagement plans (Ecosystem)
* Relay structured feedback to product teams on technical requirements
* Mentor junior associates in solution design and delivery practices
* Own technical account plan, track adoption metrics, and align with business goals


**What Will You Bring**
* 10\+ years of experience in the IT industry
* 5\+ years of experience working as a presales engineer, consultant, IT architect, or equivalent supporting partners and enterprises
* 5\+ years experience working in BFSI industry
* 5\+ years of experience with solutions design or implementation complex application systems, cloud, multi\-datacenter, and modernizing application environments, as well as multi\-product integration
* Experience in Application Modernization, Digital Transformation and understanding of modern methodologies like Kubernetes, Containers \& Microservices Architecture, agile development, and DevSecOps and associated capabilities like automation, orchestration, and configuration management
* Ability to explain technical concepts to non\-technical audiences
* Familiarity with enterprise solutions and architectures, including cloud, big data, virtualization, storage, middleware, clustering, and high availability
* Excellent presentation skills; ability to present to small and large groups of mixed business, technical, management, and leadership audiences
* Record of developing relationships at engineering, commercial, and executive levels throughout large enterprise IT organizations
* Understanding of complex enterprise solutions and architectures
* Ability to work well in a team environment and collaborate with others to provide the best solutions
* Knowledge of sophisticated sales motions
* Willingness to travel up to 50% of the time
* Record of working with partners, distributors, consultants, and service partners to create solutions propositions around Red Hat's solutions
* Expertise in one or more offerings from the Red Hat portfolio like OpenShift, Ansible, RHEL, JBOSS, Application Services/Middleware


**The Following Are Considered a Plus**
* Ability to handle multiple priorities and manage multiple large transactions between multiple organizations
* Experience working as an enterprise architect and strategizing with C\-level users regarding technologies and roadmaps
* Red Hat Certified Architect (RHCA), Red Hat Certified Engineer (RHCE), VMware Certified Professional (VCP), or Information Technology Infrastructure Library (ITIL) certifications


**Note:** 
 This role may come into contact with confidential or sensitive customer information requiring special treatment in accordance with Red Hat policies and applicable privacy laws
   

  

**About Red Hat**
 Red Hat is the world’s leading provider of enterprise open source software solutions, using a community\-powered approach to deliver high\-performing Linux, cloud, container, and Kubernetes technologies. Spread across 40\+ countries, our associates work flexibly across work environments, from in\-office, to office\-flex, to fully remote, depending on the requirements of their role. Red Hatters are encouraged to bring their best ideas, no matter their title or tenure. We're a leader in open source because of our open and inclusive environment. We hire creative, passionate people ready to contribute their ideas, help solve complex problems, and make an impact.
   

  

**Inclusion at Red Hat**
 Red Hat’s culture is built on the open source principles of transparency, collaboration, and inclusion, where the best ideas can come from anywhere and anyone. When this is realized, it empowers people from different backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences to come together to share ideas, challenge the status quo, and drive innovation. Our aspiration is that everyone experiences this culture with equal opportunity and access, and that all voices are not only heard but also celebrated. We hope you will join our celebration, and we welcome and encourage applicants from all the beautiful dimensions that compose our global village.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Policy (EEO)**
 Red Hat is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and an affirmative action employer. We review applications for employment without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, veteran status, genetic information, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, or any other basis prohibited by law.
   

  

 Red Hat does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or CVs from recruitment agencies. We are not responsible for, and will not pay, any fees, commissions, or any other payment related to unsolicited resumes or CVs except as required in a written contract between Red Hat and the recruitment agency or party requesting payment of a fee.
   

  

 Red Hat supports individuals with disabilities and provides reasonable accommodations to job applicants. If you need assistance completing our online job application, email application\-assistance@redhat.com. General inquiries, such as those regarding the status of a job application, will not receive a reply.

 Manufacturing Execution Systems, Pre Sales, Pre\-Sales, Direct Sales, SDLC, Discrete Event Simulation

 Good to Have:

 Relevant engineering degree or equivalent experience (degree details not specified).

* Strong leadership, presentation, and stakeholder management skills
* Proven experience managing large enterprise opportunities and RFPs
* Ability to engage with CXOs, IT leaders, facility heads, and security teams.

0c606362.title: Pre Sales - IT techno-commercial Pre-Sales professional
0c606362.description:
**Purpose of the Role** 




 The Pre\-Sales Consultant acts as a strategic bridge between sales, delivery, and solution teams, translating customer business needs into tailored solutions and driving technology evaluations and serve as the key technical advisor and advocate for Impiger’s services and solutions.
 



 As the technical face of the sales team, the Pre\-Sales Consultant should be articulate, quick\-thinking, and adept at engaging with C\-level executives and decision\-makers. They must possess a deep understanding of technology landscapes, competitive differentiators, and enterprise solutioning while effectively leading a pre\-sales team to ensure successful business outcomes.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Solutioning \& Customer Engagement** 




 • Lead and drive solution discovery, scoping, and proposal creation for large\-scale enterprise opportunities.
 



 • Understand customer business requirements, identify pain points, and propose tailored solutions that
 



 align with their strategic vision.
 



 • Provide technical leadership in the pre\-sales process, ensuring the best\-fit solution architecture is
 



 proposed.
 



 • Develop and present compelling solution demonstrations, Proof\-of\-Concepts (PoCs), and business cases
 



 that showcase Impiger’s competitive edge.
 



 • Act as a trusted advisor to customers, guiding them through the technical decision\-making process.
 



  





**Team Leadership \& Coaching** 




 • Manage, mentor, and coach a team of pre\-sales consultants, fostering professional development and
 



 technical expertise.
 



 • Define pre\-sales best practices, ensuring consistency in solution presentations and technical assessments.
 



 • Drive knowledge\-sharing sessions, including market trends, competitor analysis, and evolving
 



 technology stacks.
 



  





**Collaboration \& Cross\-Functional Engagement** 




 • Work closely with the sales team, delivery teams, and product management to design and refine solutions
 



 based on evolving customer needs.
 



 • Engage with partners, system integrators, and third\-party vendors to enhance Impiger’s solution
 



 offerings.
 



 • Own and Lead to strategic RFP and tender responses, ensuring winning proposals through clear value
 



 articulation.
 



  





**Market Intelligence \& Industry Trends** 




 • Stay ahead of emerging technologies, industry trends, and competitor movements to position Impiger’s
 



 offerings effectively.
 



 • Participate in industry conferences, trade shows, and customer forums to strengthen Impiger’s market
 



 presence.
 



  





**Operational Excellence \& Reporting** 




 • Ensure pre\-sales KPIs are met, including deal win rates, proposal quality, and response time.
 



 • Maintain detailed documentation on client interactions, solution architectures, and lessons learned.
 



 • Standardize pre\-sales processes to optimize efficiency and alignment with sales and delivery teams.
 



**Skills \& Requirements** 




 • 7 to 10 years of experience in pre\-sales, solution architecture, or technical consulting in the IT industry.
 



 • Proven experience leading and managing a pre\-sales team, including coaching and performance
 



 management.
 



 • Strong expertise in Web, Mobile, and Cloud solutions, with experience in large enterprise solutioning.
 



 • Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels.
 



 • Experience in handling large\-scale RFPs, tender processes, and high\-value sales cycles.
 



 • Deep understanding of B2B and enterprise sales methodologies, particularly in BFSI, Manufacturing, or
 



 Education sectors.
 



 • Self\-motivated leader with a strategic mindset and a passion for technology\-driven solutions.
 



 • Experience in the BFSI and Healthcare domains is good to have.
 



**Preferred (Not Essential)** 




 • Prior experience working in large enterprises or consulting organizations.
 



 • Familiarity with AI/ML, IoT, or emerging technologies in enterprise solutions.

cde3c4d0.title: AWS Solution Architect
cde3c4d0.description:
Title \- Principal AWS Solution Architect – Data \& Analytics
 



 Exp \- 12 to 18 years
 



 Location\- Pune, Chennai,Hyderabad,bangalore,kolkata,noida
 



 NP \- Immediate to 30 Days
 



 Role Overview
 



 Job Summary
 



 We are looking for a Principal AWS Solution Architect – Data \& Analytics to serve as the technical authority and strategic leader for enterprise data platforms on AWS. This role is responsible for defining the long\-term data \& analytics architecture vision, establishing organization\-wide standards, and guiding multiple teams and programs to deliver scalable, secure, and business\-critical analytics solutions.
 



 This is a hands\-on architecture leadership role, combining deep technical expertise with executive\-level influence.
 



**Job Description** 




  





**Must Have** 




 1\)12\+ years in data, analytics, or platform engineering; 8\+ years on AWS.
 



 2\)Proven experience leading enterprise\-scale data \& analytics architectures.
 



 3\)Deep hands\-on expertise with AWS data services: S3, Lake Formation, Glue, Athena, Redshift, EMR, Kinesis/MSK
 



 4\)Enterprise Architecture \& Strategy
 



 5\)Data lakes \& lakehouse platforms
 



 6\)Warehousing \& analytical querying
 



 7\)Streaming \& real\-time analytics
 



 8\)Metadata, governance, and data sharing
 



 9\)Evaluate and recommend build vs buy decisions and new AWS services or ecosystem tools.
 



 AWS Data Platform Architecture
 



 10\)Design and govern solutions using AWS services such as:
 



 Storage \& Lake: Amazon S3, AWS Lake Formation, Glue Data Catalog
 



 Processing: AWS Glue, EMR (Spark), Lambda, Step Functions
 



 Analytics: Amazon Athena, Amazon Redshift (incl. Spectrum)
 



 Streaming: Amazon Kinesis, MSK (Kafka)
 



 AI \- AWS sagemaker/bedrock
 



  





**Good to have** 




 1\)Security, Governance \& Compliance
 



 2\)Establish enterprise\-grade security architecture:
 



 IAM strategy, fine\-grained data access, encryption with KMS
 



 Network isolation, private connectivity, cross\-account patterns
 



 3\)Drive governance frameworks for:
 



 Data cataloging, lineage, classification, and access control
 



 Regulatory compliance (PII, financial, or industry\-specific constraints)
 



 Partner with Security and Risk teams to ensure alignment with enterprise policies.
 



 4\)Reliability, Performance \& Cost Excellence:
 



 Embed AWS Well\-Architected Framework principles into all data solutions.
 



 Lead performance optimization and cost management (FinOps) initiatives.
 



 Define observability standards for data pipelines and analytics workloads.
 



**Roles and responsibilities:** 




 At the Principal level, you will:
 



  





 1\)Own enterprise\-wide data \& analytics architecture strategy on AWS
 



 2\)Act as the final technical escalation point for complex data challenges
 



 3\)Influence technology roadmap, investment decisions, and platform modernization
 



 4\)Mentor Senior/Lead Architects and raise the overall architectural bar
 



 5\)Partner closely with CIO/CTO, Data Office, Security, and Product leadership

0e9fd353.title: Solution Technical Architect
0e9fd353.description:
**This role is for one of our clients**
**Seniority level:** 
 Mid\-Senior level
   

  

 Company Name: Nomiso
   

  

 Industry: Software Development
   

  

 Experience: 12\+ yrs
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Telangana, Karnataka, Chennai
   

  

 Job Type: full\-time
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced and highly skilled
 **Solution Technical Architect** 
 to lead the design, development, and implementation of enterprise\-scale technology solutions. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in
 **Java\-based application architecture** 
 , strong experience in creating
 **High\-Level Designs (HLD)** 
 and
 **Low\-Level Designs (LLD)** 
 , and the ability to translate complex business requirements into scalable, secure, and high\-performing technical solutions.
   

  

 As a Solution Technical Architect, you will collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, engineering leaders, and development teams to define architectural standards, drive technology decisions, and ensure successful delivery of mission\-critical applications. This role requires a strategic thinker with strong technical leadership capabilities and hands\-on experience in designing modern enterprise systems.
   

  

**Requirements**
 Key Responsibilities
   

  

  

* Define end\-to\-end solution architecture for enterprise applications and digital transformation initiatives
* Create and review High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD) documents, ensuring alignment with business objectives and technical standards
* Lead architecture discussions and provide technical direction across multiple development teams
* Design scalable, secure, and maintainable systems using Java and related enterprise technologies
* Evaluate business requirements and convert them into robust technical solutions and architecture blueprints
* Establish architecture governance, design principles, coding standards, and best practices
* Conduct architecture reviews, code reviews, and technical assessments to ensure solution quality
* Work closely with engineering, DevOps, QA, and product teams throughout the software development lifecycle
* Identify performance bottlenecks and recommend improvements for scalability, reliability, and maintainability
* Provide technical mentorship to developers, technical leads, and engineering teams
* Drive technology selection, framework adoption, and architectural innovation across projects
* Ensure compliance with security, performance, and enterprise architecture guidelines


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
 Must\-Have Skills
   

  

  

* Strong expertise in High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD) for complex enterprise applications
* Extensive experience in Java and enterprise application development
* Deep understanding of object\-oriented design principles, design patterns, and software architecture methodologies
* Experience designing distributed systems, microservices architectures, APIs, and integration solutions
* Strong knowledge of application scalability, performance optimization, security, and reliability principles
* Ability to create architecture diagrams, technical documentation, and solution blueprints
* Excellent problem\-solving, analytical, and decision\-making skills
* Strong stakeholder management and communication abilities


 Good\-to\-Have Skills
   

  

  

* Experience working as a Solution Architect or Technical Architect in large\-scale enterprise environments
* Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud
* Familiarity with containerization, Kubernetes, DevOps practices, and CI/CD pipelines
* Knowledge of event\-driven architecture, messaging systems, and modern integration patterns
* Experience in enterprise modernization and digital transformation initiatives


**Preferred Experience**
* 12\-20 years of overall experience in software engineering, architecture, and enterprise solution design
* Proven track record of leading architecture initiatives for large\-scale business\-critical applications
* Experience working with cross\-functional teams in Agile or hybrid development environments
* Strong understanding of enterprise architecture frameworks and best practices

142b441b.description:

**Notice Period : Immediate to 15 Days**
**Job Description**
**Position Overview :**
 AiFA Labs is seeking a highly experienced Principal AI Solution Architect to serve as the strategic design authority and technical owner for all AI solution architectures across our entire project portfolio. This role combines deep technical expertise with comprehensive solution ownership, responsible for designing, overseeing, and ensuring the successful delivery of all AI solution designs for both ongoing and new projects. As the Principal AI Solution Architect, you will be the single point of accountability for solution design excellence across AiFA Labs' diverse client engagements and product development initiatives.
   

  

**Required Qualifications \& Experience**
**Educational Background \& Experience**
* Master's degree in Computer Science, AI, Systems Architecture, or related field;


 PhD strongly preferred
   

  

* Minimum 12\-15 years of solution architecture experience with at least 8\+ years


 focused on AI/ML solutions
   

  

* Proven track record of owning and delivering complex solution designs for


 enterprise\-scale AI implementations
   

  

* Extensive experience managing multiple concurrent projects and solution design


 activities
   

  

**Technical Expertise**
* Expert\-level proficiency in AI/ML technologies including generative AI, large


 language models, computer vision, and natural language processing
   

  

* Deep understanding of enterprise integration patterns, API design, and


 microservices architectures
   

  

* Comprehensive knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and


 their AI/ML services
   

  

* Strong experience with data architecture, real\-time streaming, and big data


 technologies (Kafka, Spark, Hadoop)
   

  

**Solution Design Expertise**
* Mastery of solution architecture methodologies including TOGAF, enterprise


 architecture frameworks, and design patterns
   

  

* Extensive experience with solution design tools (enterprise architecture tools,


 diagramming software, modeling frameworks)
   

  

* Proven ability to design scalable, secure, and maintainable solutions that meet both functional and non\-functional requirements
* Deep knowledge of integration technologies, middleware platforms, and enterprise


 application connectivity

7d43a891.title: Solution Architect - Application Engineering
7d43a891.description:
As a
 **Solution Architect – Application Engineering** 
 at EPAM, you will play a dual role as a technology leader and client partner. You will lead solution strategy, oversee architecture governance, and manage large\-scale managed services engagements. You will directly interact with CXO\-level stakeholders to define transformation roadmaps while guiding and mentoring teams of architects and engineers to deliver excellence.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Define and own the solution strategy for large\-scale digital transformation and managed services programs
* Drive multi\-year technology roadmaps, modern platform architectures, and operating models
* Ensure solutions are scalable, resilient, cost\-efficient, and aligned with business objectives
* Architect and oversee large\-scale managed services engagements, including application management, cloud operations, and platform engineering
* Define SLAs, governance models, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement frameworks
* Ensure operational excellence through automation, AI/GenAI, and DevOps\-driven practices
* Stay hands\-on with architecture, proof\-of\-concepts, and technology exploration
* Lead technical due diligence, solution assessments, and modernization strategies
* Advocate for innovation, including cloud\-native, microservices, event\-driven architectures, and AI/GenAI\-enabled solutions
* Act as a trusted advisor to CIOs, CTOs, and other CXO\-level executives
* Bridge business strategy with technology execution, presenting clear roadmaps and business cases
* Lead pre\-sales, RFP/RFI responses, and executive\-level presentations to secure new business opportunities
* Lead a community of solution architects, principal engineers, and delivery leads across multiple geographies
* Foster a culture of technical excellence, knowledge sharing, and continuous learning
* Mentor senior architects on architecture best practices, client engagement, and managed services solutioning







**Requirements** 



* 22\-30 years of overall experience
* 15\+ years of experience in software engineering, enterprise architecture, and solution design
* Proven track record in leading large\-scale managed services programs (multi\-year, multi\-million\-dollar engagements)
* Deep knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), enterprise integration, and platform modernization
* Hands\-on experience with at least one programming language (Java, .NET, JavaScript/TypeScript, or Python)
* Strong expertise in service delivery models, SLAs/KPIs, and governance frameworks
* Experience with AI/GenAI integration in managed services (automation, predictive analytics, conversational AI, knowledge management)
* Demonstrated ability to interact with and influence CXO\-level executives
* Proven experience in IT consulting or global delivery organizations
* Excellent leadership, communication, and presentation skills







**Nice to have** 



* Experience with AIOps, MLOps, and intelligent automation
* Knowledge of GenAI orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock)
* Strong business acumen to participate in contract negotiations, service pricing, and P\&L discussions
* Thought leadership (public speaking, whitepapers, or blogs in architecture and AI/GenAI)

65dfef2a.title: Solution Architect (FROM SAAS/ ECOMMERCE/ FINTECH)
65dfef2a.description:
**About The Opportunity**
 A fast\-scaling tech consultancy operating at the intersection of SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce, we help global brands architect, deploy, and scale intelligent AI\-driven platforms that power personalization, automation, and real\-time decision\-making. Our clients span Fortune 500s to high\-growth startups—we translate complex business needs into scalable, secure, and intelligent AI architectures leveraging cloud\-native stacks, GenAI frameworks, and enterprise\-grade data ecosystems.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Design end\-to\-end AI solution blueprints for SaaS, Fintech, and E\-commerce clients—covering data pipelines, model orchestration, API gateways, and observability layers.
* Lead AI architecture reviews, aligning technical design with compliance (GDPR, PCI\-DSS), scalability targets, and cost\-optimization goals.
* Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral) and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate) into client platforms for RAG, agent\-based workflows, and real\-time recommendation engines.
* Partner with data science and engineering teams to productionize ML models using MLOps tooling (MLflow, SageMaker, DVC) and Kubernetes\-based inference services.
* Define cloud architecture on AWS/Azure/GCP—leveraging serverless, event\-driven, and containerized patterns to support low\-latency AI services.
* Advise on AI governance, model drift detection, bias mitigation, and ethical AI frameworks tailored to regulated verticals (Fintech, Healthcare, E\-commerce).


**Skills \& Qualifications**
**Must\-Have**
* AWS
* Azure
* GCP
* Python
* LangChain
* TensorFlow
* PyTorch
* MLflow
* Kubernetes
* Apache Airflow
* OpenAI API
* LangGraph
* FAISS
* Pinecone
* GenAI
* LLM
* RAG
* LLMOps
* MLOps
* PCI\-DSS
* GDPR


**Preferred**
* Experience with fintech compliance frameworks (e.g., PSD2, KYC/AML architecture)
* Published AI solutions or case studies in e\-commerce personalization or SaaS automation
* Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty, Azure AI Engineer Associate


**Benefits \& Culture Highlights**
* Work with global clients building next\-gen AI products—no internal legacy systems to refactor
* Hybrid flexibility \+ travel opportunities to client sites across APAC, MEA, and North America
* Access to cutting\-edge AI tools, training budgets, and speaking opportunities at major tech conferences


 Skills: aws,saas,azure,architecture,fintech,e\-commerce,commerce,data,automation,api

These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced and highly skilled
 **Solution Technical Architect** 
 to lead the design, development, and implementation of enterprise\-scale technology solutions. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in
 **Java\-based application architecture** 
 , strong experience in creating
 **High\-Level Designs (HLD)** 
 and
 **Low\-Level Designs (LLD)** 
 , and the ability to translate complex business requirements into scalable, secure, and high\-performing technical solutions.
   

  

 As a Solution Technical Architect, you will collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, engineering leaders, and development teams to define architectural standards, drive technology decisions, and ensure successful delivery of mission\-critical applications. This role requires a strategic thinker with strong technical leadership capabilities and hands\-on experience in designing modern enterprise systems.
   

  

**Requirements**
 Key Responsibilities
   

  

  

* Define end\-to\-end solution architecture for enterprise applications and digital transformation initiatives
* Create and review High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD) documents, ensuring alignment with business objectives and technical standards
* Lead architecture discussions and provide technical direction across multiple development teams
* Design scalable, secure, and maintainable systems using Java and related enterprise technologies
* Evaluate business requirements and convert them into robust technical solutions and architecture blueprints
* Establish architecture governance, design principles, coding standards, and best practices
* Conduct architecture reviews, code reviews, and technical assessments to ensure solution quality
* Work closely with engineering, DevOps, QA, and product teams throughout the software development lifecycle
* Identify performance bottlenecks and recommend improvements for scalability, reliability, and maintainability
* Provide technical mentorship to developers, technical leads, and engineering teams
* Drive technology selection, framework adoption, and architectural innovation across projects
* Ensure compliance with security, performance, and enterprise architecture guidelines


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
 Must\-Have Skills
   

  

  

* Strong expertise in High\-Level Design (HLD) and Low\-Level Design (LLD) for complex enterprise applications
* Extensive experience in Java and enterprise application development
* Deep understanding of object\-oriented design principles, design patterns, and software architecture methodologies
* Experience designing distributed systems, microservices architectures, APIs, and integration solutions
* Strong knowledge of application scalability, performance optimization, security, and reliability principles
* Ability to create architecture diagrams, technical documentation, and solution blueprints
* Excellent problem\-solving, analytical, and decision\-making skills
* Strong stakeholder management and communication abilities


 Good\-to\-Have Skills
   

  

  

* Experience working as a Solution Architect or Technical Architect in large\-scale enterprise environments
* Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud
* Familiarity with containerization, Kubernetes, DevOps practices, and CI/CD pipelines
* Knowledge of event\-driven architecture, messaging systems, and modern integration patterns
* Experience in enterprise modernization and digital transformation initiatives


**Preferred Experience**
* 12\-20 years of overall experience in software engineering, architecture, and enterprise solution design
* Proven track record of leading architecture initiatives for large\-scale business\-critical applications
* Experience working with cross\-functional teams in Agile or hybrid development environments
* Strong understanding of enterprise architecture frameworks and best practices

46b6bbf9.title: Solutions Architect
46b6bbf9.description:
Forward Deployed Engineer / Solutions Architect \- Deccan AI
 



**About** 
 :
 



 Deccan AI is a venture\-backed AI infrastructure company ($25M Series A, Prosus Ventures), headquartered in the Bay Area with an engineering hub in Hyderabad. We build the infrastructure layer for Reinforcement Learning and Agentic AI and work with frontier labs including Google DeepMind and Snowflake.
 



  





 Deccan AI builds the data, evaluation, and agentic infrastructure that helps frontier labs and enterprises ship AI that actually works in production. Our Helix and EnterpriseOS platforms put humans and AI side by side to catch failures, close evaluation gaps, and run mission\-critical workflows. As we move from data and evals into full\-scale enterprise deployments, we're looking for a Forward Deployed Engineer / Solutions Architect to sit at the center of that motion: embedded with customers, owning the technical relationship, and turning ambiguous problems into shipped, reliable AI systems.
 



  





 This is a customer\-facing, build\-heavy role. You will spend as much time in a client's codebase and infrastructure as you do in a whiteboard session with their VP of Engineering. You are equally comfortable designing an architecture and writing the code that proves it out.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Embed directly with enterprise customers to scope, design, and build production AI solutions on top of Deccan AI's Helix and EnterpriseOS platforms.
* Own the end\-to\-end technical relationship for key accounts: requirements gathering, solution architecture, implementation, deployment, and post\-launch iteration.
* Translate ambiguous, often messy customer workflows into concrete technical designs data pipelines, agent architectures, evaluation harnesses, and integration points with the customer's existing infra.
* Write production\-grade code alongside customer engineering teams; this is not a slideware role.
* Build reusable patterns, tooling, and accelerators from each engagement so the next deployment moves faster than the last.
* Act as the technical voice of the customer internally feeding field learnings back into product and platform roadmaps.
* Debug and resolve issues in live, high\-stakes deployments, often under time pressure and with imperfect information.
* Present architecture, tradeoffs, and rollout plans to both engineering counterparts and executive stakeholders.



**What we're looking for** 



* 4\+ years of experience in software engineering, solutions architecture, or a forward\-deployed / professional\-services engineering role, ideally with exposure to AI, ML, or data\-intensive systems.
* Strong hands\-on coding ability (Python and/or a modern backend language) you can prototype, productionize, and debug your own work, not just review someone else's.
* Experience designing and deploying systems on at least one major cloud platform (AWS, GCP, or Azure), including data pipelines and API\-level integrations.
* Working knowledge of LLM\-based systems: prompting, evaluation, RAG, agentic workflows, or fine\-tuning you don't need to have built a foundation model, but you need to have shipped something that uses one.
* Excellent communication skills you can move fluidly between a technical deep\-dive with engineers and a business conversation with a customer sponsor.
* A bias toward ownership: comfortable being the one person accountable for a customer's technical outcome, without a large team behind you at every step.
* Willingness to travel to customer sites as needed and to work occasionally across customer time zones.



  





**Nice to have** 



* Prior experience in a forward\-deployed engineering, solutions engineering, or technical consulting role at an AI/ML or enterprise software company.
* Experience building or operating evaluation systems for AI agents or LLM applications.
* Familiarity with human\-in\-the\-loop workflows and production monitoring for AI systems.
* Startup experience, particularly in a 0\-to\-1 or early\-scale environment.



  





**Why Deccan AI** 



* Work at the point where AI research meets real enterprise deployment your work ships to production, not to a slide.
* High\-trust, high\-ownership culture: capable people who move fast and hold a high bar.
* Direct exposure to frontier AI labs and enterprise customers solving genuinely hard problems.
* Competitive compensation, meaningful equity, and a seat at the table as the company scales.

ef505100.title: Solution Architect  ( SaaS, Loyalty Platforms, E-commerce, FinTech)
ef505100.description:
**About The Opportunity**
 A fast\-scaling technology innovator in the SaaS, FinTech, and E\-commerce ecosystem, we build and deploy next\-gen loyalty platforms that power customer engagement, retention, and revenue growth for global brands. Our solutions fuse real\-time data, personalization engines, and payment orchestration to create seamless, scalable, and secure loyalty experiences across verticals — from retail and travel to banking and telco. We’re on a mission to redefine how enterprises turn customers into lifelong advocates — and we need visionary architects to design the backbone.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Architect scalable, secure, and modular SaaS platforms for loyalty, rewards, and customer engagement — from API design to microservices topology.
* Translate complex business requirements (e.g., point accrual, redemption logic, tiered campaigns) into technical blueprints compatible with cloud\-native environments.
* Design integration patterns with core systems — CRM, ERP, payment gateways, and identity providers — using event\-driven and REST/gRPC architectures.
* Lead technical decisions on cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure/GCP), data modeling, observability, and compliance (GDPR, PCI\-DSS).
* Collaborate with product, engineering, and security teams to ensure platform resilience, performance, and extensibility for enterprise clients.
* Document architecture decisions, conduct tech reviews, and mentor engineers on best practices for distributed systems and SaaS scalability.


**Skills \& Qualifications**
* Must\-Have
* AWS
* Azure
* Microservices
* REST APIs
* Event\-Driven Architecture
* Cloud\-Native Design
* PCI\-DSS
* OAuth2
* Preferred
* Serverless Architecture
* Kubernetes
* GraphQL


**Benefits \& Culture Highlights**
* Remote\-first culture with flexible hours and no commute — work from anywhere in India.
* Ownership\-driven environment: You own architecture decisions and see them ship to global clients.
* Competitive compensation \+ equity, learning stipends, and career growth paths tailored to architecture leadership.


 Skills: aws,saas,platforms,azure,architecture,customer engagement,commerce,design,cloud,customer

d480c80d.title: Senior Solutions Engineer - Cybersecurity / Network Security Sales background*
d480c80d.description:
**SonicWall** 
  is a cybersecurity forerunner with more than 30 years of expertise and is recognized as a leading partner\-first company, ensuring our partners and their customers are never alone in the fight against cybercrime. With the ability to build, scale and manage security across the cloud, hybrid and traditional environments in real\-time, SonicWall provides relentless security against the most evasive cyberattacks across endless exposure points for increasingly remote, mobile and cloud\-enabled users. With its own threat research center, SonicWall can quickly and economically provide purpose\-built security solutions to enable any organization—enterprise, government agencies and SMBs—around the world. For more information, visit 
 **www.sonicwall.com** 
  or follow us on 
 **Twitter** 
 , 
 **LinkedIn** 
 , 
 **Facebook** 
  and 
 **Instagram** 
 .
 



 This is a
 **Solution Engineering role** 
 typically is 70% office or remote working in the regional country you are aligned to, supporting sales and channel technical activities and up to 30% traveling.
   

  

 This role is aligned to someone who is a self\-starter, passionate about technology, enabling teams and connecting with people to help solve their requirements. The ideal candidate must have proven hands\-on experience in cyber security products, excellent communication, and presentations skills. This is a perfect opportunity for an individual with previous Pre\-Sales, Support, or Professional Services proven experience at a Vendor, Channel, Customer or Distribution role, who is looking to have a balance of channel and technical sales activities and build trusted relationships with partners.
   

  

**Responsibilities Include:**



* Proactive leader of technical discovery conversations to qualify and validate the customer requirements and use cases to build out a bill of materials that meets the customer needs and aligns to the desired outcomes
* Conduct technical sales presentations, product, and solution demonstrations across SonicWall portfolio to an audience typically between 1\-100 persons, keeping partners and customers informed of our new solutions and industry trends
* Talk to and demonstrate SonicWall unique value proposition and to know our key competitive offerings in this space
* Builds out a minimum of 10 trusted relationships with channel partners, holding reoccurring meetings with their channel technical decision makers
* Builds out and maintains personal lab for most common demo requests and personal development
* Support remote partner product trials
* Technical lead for proof of concepts that are either with a partner or direct with a customer
* Participate in beta testing and feedback of products, working alongside the product management teams
* Teaming with support where necessary to preserve relationships with partners and customers
* Support key technical marketing initiatives, builds out collateral, presenting on virtual or external events
* Develop expertise to a PoC level between 3\-6 x SonicWall product areas and a subject matter expert and go to persons for region
* Shares best practices with fellow peers
* Provides support for onboarding new solutions engineers
* Keeps regional sales informed of roadmap insights, product updates and technical best practices
* Adheres to the company values, guidelines, and solution engineering regional reporting tasks



**Characteristics Of The Role:**



* Demonstrates a balance of business and technical acumen, proactively seeks to take a technical sales lead without instruction
* Develops skills and uses experience in business focused discussions to envision and describe how a technical solution compliments existing customer and partner business practices
* Proven ability using formal best practice methods to present a convincing presentation, solution selling, demonstrate whiteboarding skills, objection handling and excellent time management
* Receives little instruction on day\-to\-day work and general instructions on new assignments.
* Working in an effective way that maximizes the available time, optimize teaming discussions to deliver the required outcomes on time and to the required ask
* Exhibits advanced wide\-ranging experience, using in\-depth professional knowledge, acumen, concepts, and company objectives to develop, resolve complex models and procedures
* Exercises judgment in selecting methods, evaluating, adapting of complex techniques and evaluation criteria for obtaining results.
* Work is reviewed upon completion and is consistent with departmental objectives.
* Networks with key contacts including product management, support, marketing, and peers within the Solution engineering organization.
* Adapts style and uses persuasion in delivering messages that relate to the wider firm business. Frequently advises others on complex matters



**Desired Education and Experience**



* **Typically requires a minimum of 8\+ years of experience working in a Presales/Solution engineering or equivalent role .**
* **Cyber Security CISSP Certified**
* ****Microsoft Azure or AWS Associate****
 desired
* Retaining specialist knowledge across SonicWall products to the desired level
* ****SNSA \& SNSP SonicWall Certified\*Training****
 will be provided
* Familiarity with governance and compliance issues and management/reporting solutions and requirements. Working knowledge of HIPAA, PCI, SOX, FERPA, CIPA, GDPR, etc.
* In addition, the candidate must have experience with the following technologies: Full range of L2\-L7 networking technologies and protocols, NAT, stateful firewall, IDS/IPS, web and content filtering, proxies, endpoint security,SSE.SASE,Cloud Security   email security gateways, VPN and encryption (IPsec/SSL), PKI and key management, 802\.11/WLAN, Syslog, NetFlow/IPFIX, Active Directory and LDAP, reading, interpreting and creating scripts, regular expressions and/or custom signatures, virtualization platforms including VMware, Hyper\-V, AWS and Azure.
* Experience around Managed Security Services, XDR, MDR will be a plus.



  
 























 SonicWall is an equal opportunity employer.  
 



 We are committed to creating a diverse environment and are an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, ethnicity, religion, sex, gender, gender identity and expression, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, age, marital status, veteran status, pregnancy, or any other basis prohibited by applicable law.
   

  

 At SonicWall, we pride ourselves on recruiting a diverse mix of talented people and providing active security solutions in 100\+ countries.

Powered by a team with an active learning mindset and client centricity at its core, we deliver lasting value for the world’s leading enterprises.  

 Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, YouTube, X, and Facebook.

Job Description

Do

g. Ensures integration architecture principles, patterns and standards are consistently applied to all the projects
  
h. Ensure optimal Client Engagement
  
i. Support pre\-sales team while presenting the entire solution design and its principles to the client

Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
The purpose of the role is to create exceptional integration architectural solution design and thought leadership and enable delivery teams to provide exceptional client engagement and satisfaction.
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
1\. Define integration architecture for the new deals/ major change requests in existing deals
  
a. Creates an enterprise\-wide integration architecture that ensures that systems are seamlessly integrated while being scalable, reliable, and manageable.
  
b. Provide solutioning for digital integration for RFPs received from clients and ensure overall design assurance
  
i. Analyse applications, exchange points, data formats, connectivity requirements, technology environment, enterprise specifics, client requirements to set an integration solution design framework/ architecture
  
ii. Provide technical leadership to the design, development and implementation of integration solutions through thoughtful use of modern technology
  
iii. Define and understand current state integration solutions and identify improvements, options \& tradeoffs to define target state solutions
  
iv. Clearly articulate, document and use integration patterns, best practices and processes.
  
v. Evaluate and recommend products and solutions to integrate with overall technology ecosystem
  
vi. Works closely with various IT groups to transition tasks, ensure performance and manage issues through to resolution
  
vii. Document integration architecture covering logical, deployment and data views mentioning all the artefacts in detail
  
viii. Validate the integration solution/ prototype from technology, cost structure and customer differentiation point of view
  
ix. Identify problem areas and perform root cause analysis of integration architectural design and solutions and provide relevant solutions to the problem
  
x. Collaborating with sales, program/project, consulting teams to reconcile solutions to architecture
  
xi. Tracks industry integration trends and relates these to planning current and future IT needs
  
c. Provides technical and strategic input during the project planning phase in the form of technical architectural designs and recommendations
  
d. Collaborates with all relevant parties in order to review the objectives and constraints of solutions and determine conformance with the Enterprise Architecture.
  
e. Identifies implementation risks and potential impacts.
  
  

͏
  
  

2\. Enable Delivery Teams by providing optimal delivery solutions/ frameworks
  
a. Build and maintain relationships with technical leaders, product owners, peer architects and other stakeholders to become a trusted advisor
  
b. Develops and establishes relevant integration metrics (KPI/SLA) to drive results
  
c. Identify risks related to integration and prepares a risk mitigation plan
  
d. Ensure quality assurance of the integration architecture or design decisions and provides technical mitigation support to the delivery teams
  
e. Leads the development and maintenance of integration framework and related artefacts
  
f. Develops trust and builds effective working relationships through respectful, collaborative engagement across individual product teams
  
g. Ensures integration architecture principles, patterns and standards are consistently applied to all the projects
  
h. Ensure optimal Client Engagement
  
i. Support pre\-sales team while presenting the entire solution design and its principles to the client
  
ii. Coordinate with the client teams to ensure all requirements are met and create an effective integration solution
  
iii. Demonstrate thought leadership with strong technical capability in front of the client to win the confidence and act as a trusted advisor
  
  

͏
  
  

3\. Competency Building and Branding
  
a. Ensure completion of necessary trainings and certifications on integration middleware
  
b. Develop Proof of Concepts (POCs),case studies, demos etc. for new growth areas and solve new customer problems based on market and customer research
  
c. Develop and present a point of view of Wipro on digital integration by writing white papers, blogs etc.
  
d. Help in attaining market recognition through analyst rankings, client testimonials and partner credits
  
e. Be the voice of WiproÃ¢ÂÂs Thought Leadership by speaking in forums (internal and external)
  
f. Mentor developers, designers and Junior architects in the project for their further career development and enhancement
  
g. Contribute to the integration practice by conducting selection interviews etc.
  
  

4\. Team Management
  
a. Resourcing
  
i. Anticipating new talent requirements as per the market/ industry trends or client requirements
  
ii. Support in hiring adequate and right resources for the team through conducting interviews
  
b. Talent Management
  
i. Ensure adequate onboarding and training for the team members to enhance capability \& effectiveness
  
c. Performance Management
  
i. Provide inputs to project manager in setting appraisal objectives for the team, conduct timely performance reviews and provide constructive feedback to own direct reports (if present)
  
  

͏
  
  

Deliver
  
  

No. Performance Parameter Measure
  
  

1\. Support sales team to create wins % of proposals with Quality Index \>7, timely support of the proposals, identifying opportunities/ leads to sell services within/ outside account (lead generation), no. of proposals led
  
2\. Delivery Responsibility in Projects/Programs and Accounts (a) Solution acceptance of Integration architecture (from client and/or internal Wipro architecture leadership), and
  
(b) effective implementation of integration\-approach/solution component by way of sufficient integration\-design, methods guidelines and tech\-know how of team
  
3\. Delivery support CSAT, delivery as per cost, quality and timelines, Identify and develop reusable components, Recommend tools for reuse, automation for improved productivity and reduced cycle times
  
4\. Capability development % trainings and certifications completed, increase in ACE certifications, thought leadership content developed (white papers, Wipro PoVs)
  
**Mandatory Skills:** Redhat OpenShift .
  
  

**Experience:** 8\-10 Years .
  
  

Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

2f26f43c.title: Presales-Cloud Architect
2f26f43c.description:
**Company Description** **About Sopra Steria**  

Sopra Steria, a major Tech player in Europe with 51,000 employees in nearly 30 countries, is recognised for its consulting, digital services and solutions. It helps its clients drive their digital transformation and obtain tangible and sustainable benefits. The Group provides end\-to\-end solutions to make large companies and organisations more competitive by combining in\-depth knowledge of a wide range of business sectors and innovative technologies with a collaborative approach. Sopra Steria places people at the heart of everything it does and is committed to putting digital to work for its clients in order to build a positive future for all. In 2025, the Group generated revenues of €5\.6 billion.  

**The world is how we shape it.**

 **Job Description** **Role Overview**


Cloud Technology Enthusiast who love solving business problems using technology. Candidate should have excellent experience with diverse customer and partner facing roles supported technical aspects of sales activities for the technology products and services such as Cloud –PaaS \& IaaS, Databases \& tools and Systems.


You will be a key player in the pre\-sales process and be able to understand complex customer environments and be able to build close customer relationships.

 **What you will be doing**

* Take full ownership of technical pre\-sales activities, driving solution strategy, competitive positioning, and customer success.
* Develop and deliver high\-impact proposals, ensuring alignment with client needs and industry best practices.
* Conduct C\-level client interactions, technical workshops, and deep\-dive discussions to position solutions effectively.
* Uses their recognised expertise to resolve issues
* Act as a trusted advisor and technology thought leader, guiding clients through their cloud transformation journeys.
* Demonstrable experience leading teams and pitching to clients
* Identifies and controls risks
* Good command of the market in their domain: competitor products, trends, changes in regulations
* Internally and, where relevant, externally recognised expertise in one or more business domains
* Oversees performance (profitability, lead\-times, quality) within their scope
* Advises senior business representatives on choices and implementation of a product
* Is a key player in pre\-sales in Cloud offerings and helps identify sales opportunities
* Contributes to steering product developments in liaison with Practice Director

 **Essential skills and experience**

* Demonstrable experience in Azure and or AWS with a technical background and experience in technology deployments
* Demonstrable knowledge of Microsoft solutions and their application to a clients cloud strategy
* Strong leadership in orals during RFPs, client executive briefings, and high\-stakes technical demonstrations.
* Demonstrable experience of leading engagements and managing client stakeholders
* Ability to engage and influence C\-level executives, technical leaders, and business stakeholders.
* Good command of the market in their domain: competitor products, trends, changes in regulations
* Internally and, where relevant, externally recognised expertise in one or more business domains
* Recognised in one or more business domains and recognised expertise with one or more products or product groups as a whole
* Expertise in workshop facilitation techniques, particularly the fundamentals of co\-design work
* Good command of the impacts of agility
* Good command of and transfers motivational management practices
* Demonstrated experience managing several complex product assessment tasks

 **Attributes and Qualities**

  

* High level of written and oral communication
* Appetite for business challenge
* Ability to motivate and inspire colleagues
* Customer orientated approach
* Innovative
* Problem solving skills

  

Total Experience Expected: 10\-14 years

 **Qualifications**  

* Microsoft Azure / AWS Solutions Architect Expert
* Azure IaaS (virtual machines, storage, networking, security).
* Azure Backup \& Recovery Services.
* Azure Governance (Blueprints, policies, tagging, cost management).
* Azure SQL Databases (Managed Instances, PaaS, IaaS).
* Azure Security (Zero Trust, Defender for Cloud, Sentinel, Azure AD, AIP).
* Azure Serverless and integration (Batch, Function, Logic Apps, EventGrid).
* Azure Containers (AKS, ACI, ACR).
* Active Directory\\Entra ID (Azure AD, Azure AD DS, on premises AD DS).
* On premises infrastructure, virtualisation technologies or applications
* Experience with Windows Server\\Linux OS.
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (ARM, Bicep, Terraform, PowerShell).

  

**Additional Information** **Desirable skills and experience It would be great if they had…**

* An ability to see the bigger picture, understanding where activities are inter\-related while ensuring dependencies are clear and appropriately managed to achieve success
* Adaptable and flexible to new work requests and highly demanding priorities
* Honed abilities to motivate and support others to achieve a common business goal
* Good knowledge of at least one business domain

 **Key performance indicators How will they be measured?**

* Feedback from customers and colleagues
* Growth of the Practice
* Knowledge acquisition of more junior members of the practice
* Utilisation


At our organization, we are committed to fighting against all forms of discrimination. We foster a work environment that is inclusive and respectful of all differences.


All of our positions are open to people with disabilities.

12b1a558.title: Solution Architect - Azure
12b1a558.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Solution Architect \- Azure with AI** 
 to lead the design and delivery of scalable, AI\-driven solutions within the Azure ecosystem. The ideal candidate will bring deep technical expertise, strong leadership skills, and a passion for building innovative GenAI platforms that align with business goals and long\-term architecture strategy.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Provide end\-to\-end technical leadership from solution design to implementation, ensuring alignment with business goals and long\-term architecture strategy
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers and stakeholders to refine user stories and translate business requirements into scalable AI\-driven solutions
* Design and develop architecture blueprints, including system design, integration strategies, and solution components for GenAI platforms
* Lead the development and deployment of RAG\-based applications, AI automation solutions, and intelligent interfaces within the Azure ecosystem
* Define and implement best practices for performance, scalability, security, and cost optimization across AI and cloud solutions
* Guide and mentor engineering teams, ensuring high\-quality code, adherence to standards, and effective delivery
* Drive integration with enterprise systems using APIs, Microsoft Graph, and other external services
* Contribute to technical decision\-making, risk assessment, and mitigation strategies while ensuring successful delivery of complex AI solutions







**Requirements** 



* 12\-16 years of experience in software engineering
* Expertise in designing and building scalable applications on Azure cloud using Azure Functions, Web Apps, API Management and Azure DevOps
* Hands\-on experience with Generative AI solutions including Azure OpenAI, prompt engineering and implementation of Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) using Azure AI Search
* Background in building and integrating AI\-driven applications such as chatbots, automation workflows and NLP\-based systems
* Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Bicep or ARM templates along with strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
* Solid programming skills in Python or C\#/.NET with exposure to frameworks like FastAPI or Web APIs
* Competency in designing unstructured data pipelines including data ingestion, transformation, enrichment and indexing for AI\-driven applications
* Understanding of distributed system design, scalability, performance optimization and monitoring using Azure Application Insights
* Familiarity with agentic frameworks, orchestration tools (e.g., LangChain, Semantic Kernel) or multi\-agent systems







**Nice to have** 



* Experience with Kubernetes or container\-based deployments (AKS)
* Exposure to multi\-region deployments and high\-availability architecture
* Familiarity with SonarCloud or similar code quality tools
* Background in product\-based or platform engineering environments

b7638294.title: Software Architect I
b7638294.description:
**Role Description**
 Job Title: offshore Full Stack \+ AI Architect
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a highly experienced offshore Full Stack \+ AI Architect to lead the design and implementation of scalable, cloud\-native applications integrated with advanced AI/ML capabilities. This role will be responsible for defining end\-to\-end architecture across frontend, backend, data, and AI layers, while working closely with stakeholders at the client location.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will combine strong expertise in full stack application architecture with hands\-on experience in AI/ML, generative AI, and cloud platforms, driving innovation and business value through intelligent solutions.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Define and drive end\-to\-end solution architecture across UI, backend services, data layers, and AI/ML components.
   

  

 Act as the primary onsite technical architect, engaging with client stakeholders to understand business needs and translate them into scalable architectures.
   

  

 Design and implement full stack solutions using modern frameworks (frontend, backend, APIs, microservices).
   

  

 Architect and integrate AI/ML/GenAI solutions (e.g., predictive models, NLP, copilots) into enterprise applications.
   

  

 Design cloud\-native and event\-driven architectures ensuring scalability, resilience, and performance.
   

  

 Define and enforce architecture standards, reusable frameworks, and best practices across the program.
   

  

 Lead API strategy, integrations, and data pipelines with internal and external systems.
   

  

 Drive DevSecOps, CI/CD, and automation practices, ensuring high\-quality and secure delivery.
   

  

 Collaborate with cross\-functional teams (product, UX, engineering, QA) to ensure seamless solution delivery.
   

  

 Provide technical leadership, mentorship, and guidance to engineering teams.
   

  

 Evaluate emerging technologies and recommend innovations aligned with business objectives.
   

  

**Required Qualifications \& Experience**
 10\+ years of experience in software engineering, with 3\-5\+ years in architect roles.
   

  

 Strong experience in full stack development (frontend frameworks, backend services, APIs).
   

  

 Proven experience in designing and implementing AI/ML or GenAI\-based solutions.
   

  

 Strong expertise in cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP) and cloud\-native architectures.
   

  

 Deep understanding of microservices, APIs, event\-driven architecture, and distributed systems.
   

  

 Experience working in onsite\-offshore delivery models.
   

  

 Strong knowledge of DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and automation frameworks.
   

  

 Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
   

  

**Preferred Skills**
 Experience in Healthcare domain is highly desirable.
   

  

 Exposure to LLM frameworks, MLOps, and AI lifecycle management.
   

  

 Familiarity with data engineering tools, data lakes, and real\-time processing frameworks.
   

  

 Experience with security, compliance, and governance models in enterprise environments.
   

  

 Certifications in cloud or AI/ML domains are a plus.
   

  

**Skills**
 fullstack,full stack development,ai/ml,cloud\-native architecture,event\-driven architecture,

6ae588b9.title: Software Architect
6ae588b9.description:
We are looking for a
 
**Software Architect** 

 who can bridge the gap between prospective clients and our engineering teams. This is a senior, client\-facing role for someone who has built products for the U.S. healthcare market and understands what it takes to design compliant, scalable, and feasible solutions from the ground up.
 




  





**Key Responsibilities :** 





 Client engagement: Speak directly with prospective clients to understand their business goals, technical requirements, and constraints.
 





 Feasibility \& proof of concept: Assess technical feasibility for proposed solutions and build proofs of concept (POCs) to validate approach and de\-risk delivery.
 





 Estimations: Once feasibility and POC are complete, produce high\-level effort, cost, and timeline estimations to support proposals and planning.
 





 System design: Design end\-to\-end system architectures, including cloud infrastructure, data flows, integrations, and security/compliance considerations.
 





 Compliance\-first architecture: Ensure all designs meet U.S. healthcare regulatory requirements, with particular attention to HIPAA\-compliant infrastructure.
 





 Project planning: Build critical chain / critical path schedules to plan delivery realistically and surface dependencies and resource constraints early.
 





 Technical guidance: Provide architectural direction across mobile and web stacks and act as a point of reference for delivery teams.
 




  





**Required Skills \& Experience** 




**Healthcare Domain** 





 Prior, hands\-on experience building products for the U.S. healthcare market.
 





 Strong working knowledge of U.S. healthcare compliance, including HIPAA and relevant FDA regulations.
 





 Experience with healthcare interoperability standards—FHIR—and Epic integration.
 




  





**Cloud \& Infrastructure** 





 Good command of
 
 \#AWS
 
 cloud services and the ability to design with them.
 





 Proven experience designing
 
 \#HIPAA
 
 \-compliant infrastructure.
 




  





**Mobile \& Web Stacks** 





 Practical understanding of the major stacks used in digital product development:
 




 \#MERN
 
 ,
 
 \#MEAN
 
 ,
 
 \#ReactNative
 
 ,
 
 \#Laravel
 



  





**Tooling** 





 Extremely comfortable using Claude Code (Anthropic's agentic coding CLI) as part of day\-to\-day development and prototyping.
 




  





**Project Planning** 





 Able to create and manage critical chain schedules for project planning and delivery.
 




  





**Soft Skills** 





 Excellent English communication skills — comfortable speaking with clients and translating business needs into technical solutions.
 





 Strong analytical and problem\-solving ability.
 





 Able to balance speed (POCs, estimates) with rigor (compliance, scalable design).

5d818b6a.title: Software Solution Architect I
5d818b6a.description:
**Role Description**
**Location : Any location (Prefer Chennai,Bngalore ,Trivandrum ,Cochin )**
**Overview**
 UST is a leader in digital transformation and intelligent automation for Global 1000 companies. With deep capabilities in Pega\-based workflow automation and decisioning, we help organizations across Healthcare, Telecom, Retail, and BFSI reinvent how they operate. We are seeking a Lead System Architect (LSA to join our Pega practice. This role requires a visionary who can architect complex, high\-scale solutions while providing the technical leadership necessary to grow our global Pega practice and position UST as a premium implementation partner.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 The LSA is the authority on Pega architecture and delivery excellence within the organization. You will be responsible for defining the technical roadmap for our practice, ensuring all client implementations adhere to Pega Guardrails, and leading the transition from traditional workflows to Agentic AI and GenAI\-led architectures. As the technical face of UST s Pega practice, you will engage with client C\-suite stakeholders to provide architectural oversight, drive innovation, and mentor a global team of certified architects.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Practice Leadership \& Governance
   

  

* Define and enforce technical standards, best practices, and the ideal architecture practices across all UST Pega engagements.
* Oversee the Pega Center of Excellence (CoE) to ensure project health and adherence to Pega Express methodology.
* Stay at the forefront of Pega s product roadmap, including Pega GenAI Blueprint and Agentic AI, to build cutting\-edge service offerings.
* Mentor and grow the internal talent pool, driving certification paths for CSA, CSSA, and LSA cohorts.


 Architecture \& Solution Design
   

  

* Serve as the primary Lead System Architect for large\-scale, complex transformations, ensuring scalability and performance.
* Lead high\-quality discovery and design sessions to map complex business problems to robust, reusable Pega solutions.
* Review and approve enterprise\-level architectural designs to minimize technical debt and ensure future\-proof upgrades.


 Strategic Sales Support \& Delivery Assurance
   

  

* Collaborate with the Business Development team to provide technical support during the qualification and proposal stages.
* Lead the creation of technical proposals, Proof of Concepts (PoCs), and solution estimates with internal pre\-sales teams.
* Help handle critical client escalations, providing deep technical troubleshooting and course correction for high\-stakes projects.


**Qualifications \& Skills**
**Certification** 
 : Active Pega Certified Lead System Architect (CLSA) is mandatory.
   

  

**Experience** 
 : 12\+ years in IT services, with at least 8 years dedicated to Pega implementations and 3\+ years in a practice leadership or chief architect role.
   

  

**Technical Breadth** 
 : Expert knowledge of Pega Infinity, Pega Cloud, and integration patterns (REST, Kafka, etc.).
   

  

**Industry Knowledge** 
 : Proven track record in Healthcare, Telecom, Retail, or BFSI.
   

  

**Leadership** 
 : Strong experience in building and managing technical teams in a global delivery model.
   

  

**Skills**
 solution delivery,pega cloud,pega,solution architecture,

e86762a2.title: Cloud Consultant
e86762a2.description:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
***HPE Operations***
 is our innovative IT services organization. It provides the expertise to advise, integrate, and accelerate our customers’ outcomes from their digital transformation. Our teams collaborate to transform insight into innovation. In today’s fast paced, hybrid IT world, being at business speed means overcoming IT complexity to match the speed of actions to the speed of opportunities. Deploy the right technology to respond quickly to market possibilities. Join us and redefine what’s next for you
   

  

**Job Family Definition**
 The Cloud Consultant guides and supports HPE's clients through their digital transformation, and thinks strategically and long\-term about the complex business and technical needs of customers.
   

  

 Deeply evaluates customer applications for the strategic and functional transition from internal systems to external virtual cloud\-based platforms. Acts as a trusted value advisor to HPE's customers in the development of their cloud computing strategy, providing recommendations for cloud migrations, technical implementation roadmaps, and adoption plans.
   

  

 Designs state\-of\-the\-art public, multi, and hybrid cloud technology solutions, achieving scalability, reliability, security, and performance.
   

  

 Builds influential relationships with executives including the C\-level when necessary. Proactively defines an effective engagement model with the customer's key influencers and decision\-makers.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Contributions include applying developed subject matter expertise to solve common and sometimes complex technical problems and recommending alternatives where necessary. Might act as project lead and provide assistance to lower level professionals. Exercises independent judgment and consults with others to determine best method for accomplishing work and achieving objectives.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Strong problem\-solving skills with participation in product or service development.
* Develop and implement comprehensive security strategies for cloud environments, including encryption, compliance, and threat detection.
* Regularly leads in the technical assessment and delivery of specific technical solutions to customers.
* Coordinates implementation of new installations, designs, and migrations for technology solutions in one of the following work domains: networks, applications, or platforms.
* Collects and analyzes data from appropriate sources to assist in determining customer needs and requirements.
* Engages in technical problem solving across multiple technologies; often needs to develop new methods to apply to the situation.
* Owns knowledge sharing within a small community (e.g., team, practice, or project). Ensure team members support knowledge sharing and re\-use requirements of the project. Contributes significant knowledge to job family community.
* Proactively encourages the membership and contributions of others to the professional community and coach’s others in their area of expertise. Regularly produces internally published material such as knowledge briefs, service delivery kit components and modules, etc. Presents at multi\-customer technology conferences.


**Education And Experience Required**
* Bachelor’s degree in a related area of study with typically 7\- 10 years’ experience; master’s degree desirable.


**What You Need To Bring**
* hands\-on experience in Microsoft platforms, including Windows Server, Cluster technologies including SQL cluster., Active Directory, Exchange, and related infrastructure.
* In\-depth knowledge of various cloud technologies, virtualization, networking, and storage.
* Proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., Python, PowerShell) for automation.
* Depth and breadth of technical knowledge to design and scope multiple deliverables across a single technology.
* Has participated in the delivery of multiple deliverables across multiple technologies.
* Ability to develop solutions that enhance a particular customer's enterprise's availability, performance, maintainability, and agility.
* Understands, at a detailed level, the architectural dependencies of technologies in use in the customer's IT environment.
* Uses product and application knowledge to develop solutions. A recognized expert in one or more technologies within one's own technical community and at the regional level.
* Holds a vendor or industry certification in at least one discipline area.
* Able to communicate with internal and external management confidently and demonstrate the professionalism of the job family.
* Ability to work in a multi\-technology environment and diagnose complex technical problems to their root cause, in addition to troubleshooting and consulting skills.
* Can summarize prognoses and impact at the practice lead level.
* Ability to adapt to a consulting style appropriate to the situation and identify upselling opportunities.
* Demonstrates a broad understanding of market dynamics, an industry area, commercial issues, and technical concerns while maintaining depth in core focus areas.
* Ability to present within one's own area of expertise as part of a customer sales presentation, putting forward domain\-specific information within the context of the company sales campaign.
* Able to independently complete solution implementation or application design deliverables.
* Able to participate in a team of consultants in completing one or more solution requirements, architecture, or implementation deliverables.


**Additional Skills**
