 ·        Proficient in C\#, ASP.Net, MVC, Web API, Entity Framework, LINQ, and other .Net technologies.
 



 ·        Experience with front\-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Angular, Blazor or React.
 



 ·        Solid understanding of database design and development, including SQL Server and ORM framework Knowledge of cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS and related services.
 



 ·        Experience with DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing.
 



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 









    Certifications:
 



  Microsoft Certified: Azure Developer Associate, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert, or equivalent certifications.
 



  





**Additional Skills:** 




  





  Experience with micro services architecture and containerization.
 



  Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and project management tools.
 



  Experience with performance tuning, application monitoring, and troubleshooting.

127676df.title: SOLUTION ARCHITECT L2
127676df.description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
 Role Purpose
 



 The purpose of this role is to define secure integration strategies, devise solution frameworks for enterprise systems, and identify infrastructure dependencies to enable efficient and compliant implementation.
 


 ͏
 
 Area of Responsibility
 



 Requirement Analysis\-Collaborate with business leaders and technical teams to define solution strategies that align with enterprise IT roadmap, security, and risk management requirements, ensuring implementation feasibility across multiple systems.
 



 Designing\-Create design frameworks for enterprise systems, review implementation across applications, and assist in creating reusable patterns and governance processes to ensure proper integration and risk control.
 



 Integration assessment and support\-Define integration framework, manage infrastructure dependencies, and create strategies for secure and efficient integration across enterprise systems.
 



 Troubleshooting\-Assess the solution in the client environment and address any issues identified during the troubleshooting process through appropriate remediation steps.
 



 Risk Analysis and Assessment\-Identify potential risks, potential impact and define governance processes for risk management and compliance across enterprise solutions and review its adherence.
 



 RFPs\-"Collaborate with sales and delivery teams to contribute to proposals by providing inputs on the interoperability of multiple applications within an enterprise system, identification of change areas, and integration approaches aligned with business needs."
 


 ͏ ͏ ͏
 
 Mandatory Skills: Hyperion Planning .
 



  
 



 Experience: \>10 YEARS
   

 .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

8b2fb1ce.title: Cloud Technology Consultant - AWS Cloud, Director
8b2fb1ce.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are seeking an experienced **Cloud Technology Consultant** to serve as a strategic advisor and hands\-on expert for enterprise clients embarking on their AWS cloud transformation journeys. In this Director\-level role, you will shape cloud strategies, guide large\-scale migrations, and influence adoption of cloud\-native architectures and modern engineering practices. This is a senior individual contributor position ideal for a technically strong consultant who combines architectural depth with an advisory mindset.

**Responsibilities**

* Partner with enterprise clients to assess current\-state environments and define future\-state cloud strategies with AWS as the primary platform
* Advise clients on cloud transformation approaches, including platform engineering, modernization, and migration
* Provide thought leadership on cloud\-native architectures, landing zones, multi\-account strategies, and operating models
* Lead cloud consulting engagements involving large\-scale workload assessments and migration planning (rehost, re\-platform, refactor, re\-architect)
* Guide clients in designing scalable, secure, and cost\-efficient cloud environments
* Contribute to strategic discussions on cloud governance, security models, CI/CD pipelines, observability, and operational excellence
* Shape solution approaches for RFPs, proposals, and client workshops, working closely with pre\-sales, architecture, and delivery teams
* Stay current with GenAI / LLM\-powered cloud use cases and advise clients on adopting innovative cloud capabilities
* Influence cloud adoption decisions through deep expertise in automation, containerization, DevSecOps, and platform scalability
* Serve as a hands\-on technical advisor and strategic individual contributor, bringing clarity and direction to complex cloud transformation initiatives

**Requirements**

* 20\+ years of overall IT experience, including extensive hands\-on cloud consulting or platform engineering experience
* Expertise in AWS services across compute, storage, networking, security, governance, and DevOps
* Background in multi\-cloud environments, with exposure to Azure as an added advantage
* Proven experience delivering enterprise\-scale cloud migration and modernization programs
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, CDK), CI/CD pipelines, and container platforms (EKS, ECS, Kubernetes)
* Understanding of cloud security, IAM, and networking, along with encryption, compliance, and cost optimization
* Capability to collaborate directly with business, technology, and architecture stakeholders to influence strategy and guide transformation choices
* Cloud certifications (AWS preferred; Azure certifications considered a plus)
* Depth of an architect combined with the mindset of an advisor, comfortable operating as a senior individual contributor and influencing strategy through hands\-on expertise
* Confident in client\-facing discussions and capable of translating complex cloud concepts into actionable business insights
* Passionate about cloud transformation, platform engineering, and modern cloud\-native practices
* Strong English communication skills (B2 level or higher)

**Nice to have**

* Skills in application development using .NET, Java, or Python
* Background in SRE practices
* Proficiency in DevSecOps practices

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)

72ee1c92.title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect
72ee1c92.description:
Job Summary
 



 We are looking for an experienced Cloud Infrastructure Architect to design, implement, and govern secure, scalable, and resilient cloud platforms across enterprise environments. The role will focus on cloud infrastructure architecture, enterprise landing zone design, disaster recovery (DR), security governance, automation, and operational excellence across multi\-cloud or hybrid cloud ecosystems.
 



 The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in cloud\-native services, infrastructure modernization, networking, security, governance, high availability, and enterprise\-scale cloud transformation programs.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 Cloud Architecture \& Strategy
 


* Design enterprise\-grade cloud infrastructure solutions across AWS, Azure, and/or GCP environments.
* Define cloud adoption strategies, target\-state architectures, and modernization roadmaps.
* Establish scalable, secure, and cost\-optimized cloud infrastructure patterns.
* Collaborate with enterprise architects, security teams, DevOps engineers, and application teams.







  





 Landing Zone Architecture \& Governance
 


* Design and implement enterprise cloud landing zones aligned with security, compliance, and governance standards.
* Define multi\-account/subscription strategies, organizational hierarchy, and environment segregation.
* Implement:
* Identity and access management (IAM)
* Network segmentation
* Guardrails and policy enforcement
* Resource tagging standards
* Logging and monitoring frameworks
* Security baselines
* Establish centralized shared services architecture including:
* Connectivity hubs
* DNS
* CI/CD integration
* Secrets management
* Key management
* Enable infrastructure automation using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).







  





 Disaster Recovery (DR) \& Business Continuity
 


* Define enterprise DR strategies including:
* Active\-Active
* Active\-Passive
* Pilot Light
* Warm Standby
* Design multi\-region and cross\-region resilience architectures.
* Define and validate:
* RTO (Recovery Time Objective)
* RPO (Recovery Point Objective)
* Conduct DR drills, failover testing, and resiliency assessments.
* Architect backup, replication, and recovery solutions for:
* Compute
* Databases
* Kubernetes workloads
* File systems
* Messaging systems
* Ensure high availability and fault tolerance for mission\-critical workloads.







  





 Security \& Compliance
 


* Implement cloud security best practices and zero\-trust architecture principles.
* Work closely with cybersecurity and compliance teams to enforce governance standards.
* Implement:
* Encryption strategies
* Network security controls
* SIEM integration
* Threat detection and monitoring
* Security posture management
* Support compliance frameworks such as ISO 27001, SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI\-DSS, etc.







  





 Cloud Operations \& Optimization
 


* Establish observability and monitoring frameworks.
* Optimize cloud cost, performance, scalability, and operational efficiency.
* Define operational runbooks, SOPs, and support models.
* Support capacity planning and infrastructure lifecycle management.







  





 Required Skills \& Experience
 



 Technical Skills
 


* Strong experience with cloud platforms:
* Amazon Web Services
* Microsoft Azure
* Google Cloud
* Expertise in:
* Landing Zone architecture
* Cloud networking
* DR architecture
* Infrastructure security
* Identity and access management
* Kubernetes and container platforms
* Strong understanding of:
* Hybrid cloud architecture

* HA/DR patterns
* Observability platforms
* Hands\-on experience with:
* Terraform
* Kubernetes
* Docker
* GitHub Actions / Azure DevOps / Jenkins
* Monitoring tools
* Backup \& recovery solutions







  





 Experience
 


* 4\+ years in infrastructure engineering or cloud architecture.
* 2\-3\+ years of hands\-on cloud architecture experience.
* Experience designing enterprise landing zones and DR solutions at scale.
* Experience working with regulated enterprise environments preferred.







  





 Preferred Certifications
 


* Amazon Web Services Certified Solutions Architect – Professional
* Microsoft Azure

 Soft Skills

 Experience with:

11433025.title: Cloud Technology Consultant - AWS Cloud, Director
11433025.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Cloud Technology Consultant** 
 to serve as a strategic advisor and hands\-on expert for enterprise clients embarking on their AWS cloud transformation journeys. In this Director\-level role, you will shape cloud strategies, guide large\-scale migrations, and influence adoption of cloud\-native architectures and modern engineering practices. This is a senior individual contributor position ideal for a technically strong consultant who combines architectural depth with an advisory mindset.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Partner with enterprise clients to assess current\-state environments and define future\-state cloud strategies with AWS as the primary platform
* Advise clients on cloud transformation approaches, including platform engineering, modernization, and migration
* Provide thought leadership on cloud\-native architectures, landing zones, multi\-account strategies, and operating models
* Lead cloud consulting engagements involving large\-scale workload assessments and migration planning (rehost, re\-platform, refactor, re\-architect)
* Guide clients in designing scalable, secure, and cost\-efficient cloud environments
* Contribute to strategic discussions on cloud governance, security models, CI/CD pipelines, observability, and operational excellence
* Shape solution approaches for RFPs, proposals, and client workshops, working closely with pre\-sales, architecture, and delivery teams
* Stay current with GenAI / LLM\-powered cloud use cases and advise clients on adopting innovative cloud capabilities
* Influence cloud adoption decisions through deep expertise in automation, containerization, DevSecOps, and platform scalability
* Serve as a hands\-on technical advisor and strategic individual contributor, bringing clarity and direction to complex cloud transformation initiatives







**Requirements** 



* 20\+ years of overall IT experience, including extensive hands\-on cloud consulting or platform engineering experience
* Expertise in AWS services across compute, storage, networking, security, governance, and DevOps
* Background in multi\-cloud environments, with exposure to Azure as an added advantage
* Proven experience delivering enterprise\-scale cloud migration and modernization programs
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, CDK), CI/CD pipelines, and container platforms (EKS, ECS, Kubernetes)
* Understanding of cloud security, IAM, and networking, along with encryption, compliance, and cost optimization
* Capability to collaborate directly with business, technology, and architecture stakeholders to influence strategy and guide transformation choices
* Cloud certifications (AWS preferred; Azure certifications considered a plus)
* Depth of an architect combined with the mindset of an advisor, comfortable operating as a senior individual contributor and influencing strategy through hands\-on expertise
* Confident in client\-facing discussions and capable of translating complex cloud concepts into actionable business insights
* Passionate about cloud transformation, platform engineering, and modern cloud\-native practices
* Strong English communication skills (B2 level or higher)







**Nice to have** 



* Skills in application development using .NET, Java, or Python
* Background in SRE practices
* Proficiency in DevSecOps practices

0eb2bef8.title: Security Consultant - Cloud Security
0eb2bef8.description:
**Introduction**
 A career in IBM Consulting is built on long\-term client relationships and close collaboration worldwide. You’ll work with leading companies across industries, helping them shape their hybrid cloud and AI journeys. With support from our strategic partners, robust IBM technology, and Red Hat, you’ll have the tools to drive meaningful change and accelerate client impact. At IBM Consulting, curiosity fuels success. You’ll be encouraged to challenge the norm, explore new ideas, and create innovative solutions that deliver real results. Our culture of growth and empathy focuses on your long\-term career development while valuing your unique skills and experiences.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 As a Security Consultant specializing in cloud security, you help organizations understand and manage the entire security lifecycle within their enterprise.
   

  

* Possess strong understanding of the concepts, approaches, methods, and techniques used for the implementation and effective management of a cloud security program
* Support in design, implementation and configuration of the Cloud security systems
* Lead cloud security assessments and provide recommendations on required configurations for client cloud platforms (such as AWS, Azure, GCP, Alibaba Cloud, Oracle Cloud) and environments based on Cloud Cyber Risk Framework and industry standard frameworks such as PDP, GDPR, ISO, CSA\-CSM and NIST
* Provide support for escalated incidents or critical situations
* Interface with Engineering and assist with testing or troubleshooting
* Reproduce issues to verify problems and provide feedback to Engineering and teams
* Contribute to development and maintenance of Information Security Policies, Standards and Guidelines
* Identify security gaps or concerns pertaining to new infrastructure or application build out. 9\. Troubleshoot problems with cloud infrastructure (e.g., domain name service, virtual network peering, dedicated cloud connectivity services) and resources (e.g., virtual machines, virtual networks, cloud databases) in a multi\-cloud vendor environment and lead analysis of technical platform issues, and resolution as part of cyber risk mitigation steps
* Gather evidence, perform remediation, and work with the IT GRC vertical to support audit efforts.
* Create and maintain documentation of departmental security procedures pertaining to cloud security
* Serve as an expert on cloud cyber risk for other business and technology stakeholders.
* Maintain and build effective, professional relationships with third party vendors and service providers that result in timely delivery of requirements and the highest standards of quality and cost effectiveness
* Work with internal stakeholders to gather requirements and develop the most effective solutions
* Keep abreast with latest trends in the field of cloud security
* Participate in seminars/conferences/forums to keep up\-to\-date with the industry best practice


**Preferred Education**
 Master's Degree
   

  

**Required Technical And Professional Expertise**
* Cloud computing experience (AWS, AliCloud, Azure), and in particular, CloudFormation, EC2, EMR, S3, Redshift, RDS, SQS and AutoScaling Groups
* Experience in patch management and vulnerability scanning
* Familiarity with industry standards, guidelines, and regulatory compliance requirements related to information security and cloud computing such as ISO 27001, Cloud Security Alliance, NIST 800\-53, PCI DSS, SOC2 and FedRamp
* Strong analytical \& problem\-solving skills with ability to translate ideas into practical implementation
* Ability to manage stakeholder relationships including team members, vendors and partners 6\. Excellent leadership and communication skills with ability to present and communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical audience
* Ability to provide technical and professional leadership, guidance, and training to other


**Preferred Technical And Professional Experience**
* Cloud computing experience (AWS, AliCloud, Azure), and in particular, CloudFormation, EC2, EMR, S3, Redshift, RDS, SQS and AutoScaling Groups
* Experience in patch management and vulnerability scanning
* Familiarity with industry standards, guidelines, and regulatory compliance requirements related to information security and cloud computing such as ISO 27001, Cloud Security Alliance, NIST 800\-53, PCI DSS, SOC2 and FedRamp
* Strong analytical \& problem\-solving skills with ability to translate ideas into practical implementation
* Ability to manage stakeholder relationships including team members, vendors and partners 6\. Excellent leadership and communication skills with ability to present and communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical audience
* Ability to provide technical and professional leadership, guidance, and training to other

ff067471.title: Systems Architect - Cloud AIOps
ff067471.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Systems Architect \- Cloud AIOps** 
 to design and evolve next\-generation cloud platforms where AI\-driven intelligence is embedded as a foundational design principle. In this role, you will shape AI\-enabled platform engineering strategies, lead AIOps architecture initiatives, and serve as a senior technical authority guiding enterprise modernization programs across cloud infrastructure and cloud\-native environments.
 



  
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Architect and evolve cloud platforms (AWS or Azure) where AI\-driven intelligence is a foundational design principle, not an afterthought
* Define and drive AI\-enabled platform engineering strategy, integrating observability, telemetry pipelines, intelligent alerting, predictive insights, and automation
* Lead the design of AIOps architectures that combine monitoring data, logs, metrics, traces, and operational knowledge to support proactive operations
* Embed SRE principles (SLIs, SLOs, error budgets) into platform design and enable AI\-assisted reliability management
* Serve as a senior technical authority in customer\-facing engagements, architecture workshops, and RFP/RFI responses, articulating AI\-driven platform value
* For Cloud Infrastructure\-led engagements: architect AI\-ready landing zones, networking, IAM, hybrid connectivity, DR, and cost governance
* For Cloud Native\-led engagements: architect Kubernetes platforms, modernization initiatives, and cloud\-native runtime environments designed for intelligent operations
* Design and integrate AI\-assisted operational knowledge systems, including RAG\-based architectures, to accelerate root cause analysis and decision support
* Collaborate with data and ML teams to consume AI/ML capabilities for operations (anomaly detection, automated RCA, predictive capacity insights)
* Provide architectural guidance on LLM, vector stores, and RAG pipelines as platform components for operational and reliability use cases
* Mentor architects and senior engineers, establishing AI\-aware platform engineering standards across the organization







**Requirements** 



* 13\-20 years of experience in cloud platform architecture and engineering
* For the Cloud Infrastructure path: expertise in enterprise landing zones, VPC/VNet design, and security \& IAM, along with hybrid/multi\-cloud connectivity
* For the Cloud Native path: proficiency in Kubernetes platforms (EKS/AKS), microservices modernization, and service mesh (Istio/Linkerd), including GitOps and container security
* Background in Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Ansible, and CloudFormation or ARM/Bicep
* Skills in CI/CD and platform automation with Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI
* Competency in automation and integration scripting with Python, Shell, and PowerShell
* Familiarity with observability stacks such as Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK/EFK, as well as OpenTelemetry, Datadog, AppDynamics, and New Relic
* Strong SRE foundations covering SLIs/SLOs, error budgets, incident automation, and postmortems
* Expertise in AIOps capabilities, including event correlation across telemetry sources, anomaly detection on metrics/logs/traces, automated remediation with intelligent runbooks, and predictive alerting and capacity insights
* Understanding of RAG architectures for operational knowledge retrieval and AI\-assisted decisioning
* Proven experience leading platform\-led modernization programs and influencing platform roadmaps at enterprise and portfolio levels
* Capability to assess legacy and cloud environments and define AI\-enabled target platform architectures, combining platform engineering, AI capabilities, and operational excellence
* Strong English communication skills (B2 level or higher)

79f35813.title: Senior Technical Architect — AWS Cloud Solutions
79f35813.description:
**Senior Technical Architect — AWS Cloud Solutions \- Gurgaon/Noida/Pune/Bangalore** 




  





*Individual Contributor, Senior/Lead Level \|* 
***Hands\-On Technical Role***




**Role Summary** 




 EXL Digital is hiring
 **Senior/Lead Enterprise Architects** 
 with deep, hands\-on expertise in cloud\-native architecture on AWS to own end\-to\-end technical design and solution architecture across multiple product lines or client engagements.
 



 This is an
 **individual\-contributor** 
 role, not a people\-management position. It calls for a proven, senior technologist with strong reasoning ability — someone who can independently take an ambiguous business problem, design a sound enterprise architecture for it, and work directly with engineering teams to troubleshoot and deliver, across several concurrent engagements with minimal oversight.
 



**About EXL Digital** 




 At EXL, we believe there is always a better way. We look deeper, we find it, and we make it happen. We've built a culture founded on core values of innovation, collaboration, excellence, integrity, and respect.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Own End\-to\-End Architecture** 



* Define and own end\-to\-end enterprise architecture — application, data, integration, security, and cloud layers — for one or more product lines or client engagements.
* Translate ambiguous business goals into clear architectural blueprints and reference implementations, applying strong first\-principles reasoning to design pragmatic, defensible solutions.
* Design cloud\-native and serverless solutions on AWS, following AWS Well\-Architected principles, across compute, networking, storage, and data layers.
* Lead architecture and design reviews across teams; make, and stand behind, build\-vs\-buy and technology trade\-off decisions independently.
* Design integration strategies for internal services, third\-party systems, and partner APIs (REST, GraphQL, event\-driven, messaging), and lead complex enterprise system integrations.



**Drive Technical Delivery Across Multiple Engagements** 



* Operate with a high degree of autonomy across multiple concurrent solutions — driving architecture and technical decisions to closure without needing close oversight.
* Provide hands\-on technical troubleshooting support to engineering teams — working directly with them to resolve production issues, performance bottlenecks, and integration failures.
* Build proof\-of\-concepts and reference implementations to validate architectural approaches before broader rollout.
* Embed security, compliance, and Well\-Architected best practices into every design (IAM, encryption, secrets management, threat modeling).



**Design AI\-Enabled Solutions** 



* Architect solutions that incorporate AWS AI/ML and agentic AI services (e.g., Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker) at the solution\-design level — evaluating where generative AI and agent\-based patterns fit within a broader enterprise architecture.
* Stay current on the AWS AI/ML landscape and recommend where it creates real architectural or business value.



  





**Communicate and Influence** 



* Communicate architecture and trade\-offs clearly to executives, clients, product managers, and engineers alike.
* Influence engineering teams toward architectural standards and best practices, earning trust through technical credibility.



**Required Qualifications** 



* 15\+ years in enterprise application/systems development, including 5\+ years operating at architect or principal\-engineer level.
* Deep, hands\-on expertise designing cloud\-native architectures on AWS — compute, serverless, networking, storage, databases, and security — fluent in the AWS Well\-Architected Framework.
* Strong reasoning and problem\-solving ability — a proven track record designing scalable, resilient software systems and enterprise architectures from ambiguous requirements.
* Experience with microservices, event\-driven architecture, API design (REST/GraphQL), and complex enterprise system integrations.
* Demonstrated ability to independently drive technical decisions and troubleshoot directly with engineering teams across multiple concurrent engagements.
* Solid data architecture background — relational (PostgreSQL/MySQL), NoSQL, caching, and search.
* Working knowledge of security architecture (OAuth, SAML, SSO, IAM, encryption, secrets management, secure SDLC).
* Familiarity with DevOps/IaC practices (Terraform/CloudFormation, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes).
* Excellent communication skills — able to explain complex technical concepts to technical and non\-technical stakeholders alike.
* Experience designing solutions that incorporate AWS AI/ML and agentic AI services (e.g., Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker) at the architecture level.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional, or equivalent.
* Experience working across multiple client accounts or business units concurrently (systems\-integrator or consulting background a plus).
* Exposure to modern frontend frameworks (React, Vue, or Angular) sufficient for full\-stack architectural decisions.
* Experience in Agile/SCRUM environments, leading architecture across sprints and releases.



**Education** 



* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

f0a8b7cd.title: Zuora Revenue Architect
f0a8b7cd.description:
**No. of Positions:** 1
**Relevant Experience:** 7\+ Years
**Job Location:** Bengaluru
**Job Type:** Full Time
**Work Timing:** Afternoon Shift
**Work Mode:** Hybrid / Remote
### **Company overview: About Estuate**


At Estuate, more than 400 uniquely talented people work together, to provide the world with next\-generation product engineering and IT enterprise services. We help companies reimagine their business for the digital age.


Incorporated in 2005 in Milpitas (CA), we have grown to become a global organization with a truly global vision. At Estuate, we bring together talent, experience, and technology to meet our customer’s needs. Our **‘Extreme Service’** culture helps us deliver extraordinary results.


### **Our key to success**


We are an ISO\-certified organization present across four distinct global geographies. We cater to industry verticals such as BFSI, Healthcare \& Pharma, Retail \& E\-Commerce, and ISVs/Startups, as well as having over 2,000 projects in our portfolio.


Our solution\-oriented mindset fuels our offerings, including Advisory, Engineering, Data \& AI, AI Business Applications, Enterprise Security \& GRC and Managed Services.


### **Our culture of oneness**


At Estuate, we are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace that welcomes people from diverse social circumstances. Our diverse culture shapes our success stories. Our values unite us. And, our curiosity inspires our creativity. Now, if that sounds like the place you’d like to be, we look forward to hearing more from you.


Currently, we are looking for a **Zuora Revenue Architect** to join our **team.**


**Job Description**
-------------------


* 7\+ years’ Order to Cash with Revenue Recognition experience within a professional services/SaaS organization; ideally, at least 3 years in delivering revenue solutions
* Experience in working with at least one of the revenue recognition products: Zuora Revenue, Oracle Revenue Management, NetSuite ARM
* Excellent knowledge of ASC 605 and 606
* Must have knowledge of integration and data flows between CRM, Order Management, Billing, and Revenue systems
* Experience with customer\-facing solution delivery and/or business consulting experience
* Demonstrated ability to lead business discussions with customers, architect solutions, and implement best practices
* Experience in requirements gathering, use case documentation, business analysis, systems design and integration, and implementation
* Experience in SQL, data analysis, conversion and migration, interfaces, and reports
* Must be a strong team player with excellent communication skills at the business and technical levels, able to collaborate with cross\-functional teams
* Experience managing tasks on multiple projects simultaneously
* Able to travel to customer locations as needed
* BS/MS degree in Information Systems or Computer Science or equivalent practical experience
* Work at the enterprise level to deliver revenue solutions and manage end\-to\-end solution design and delivery in collaboration with the Revenue Accounting team, IT, the Solution Delivery Manager, and Technical Consultants.
* Conduct requirements gathering and design workshops to analyze the requirements
* Perform FIT/GAP analysis on business requirements and then document gathered requirements/user stories
* Design and document functional and technical solutions, including process flows, technical customizations, and integrations, based on customer requirements
* Work with the customer to get sign\-off on requirements, design, and production roll\-out
* Configure and test Zuora Revenue, and Add\-On products to meet the approved designs
* Work with Technical Consultants to explain the requirements to build any custom solutions/integrations
* Perform testing of end\-to\-end solutions in conjunction with the development team and customer
* Perform customer demos throughout the project lifecycle
* Create and develop training materials and conduct/deliver end\-user training to customers
* Support the customer with regular calls to answer functional and technical questions

### **Our commitment to Equal Opportunity Employment (EOE)**


Estuate, Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. Our employment decisions are made on the basis of merit and business needs. We comply with all applicable state \& local laws governing non\-discrimination in employment at each of our facilities and locations.


### **Disclaimer**


The above job definition information has been designed to indicate the general nature and level of work performed by employees within this classification. It is not designed to contain or be interpreted as a comprehensive inventory of all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications required of employees assigned to this job. Job duties and responsibilities are subject to change based on changing business needs and conditions.


**Share This Job**

e76e1b0d.title: Solutions Architect - Managed Services
e76e1b0d.description:
**Job Description**
 Manage opportunities and assist sales teams in the preparation, delivery, presentation and negotiation of Managed Services proposals, contracts and pricing.
   

  

* Respond to RFP s, RFQ s and proactive bids while working closely with all teams to develop the win strategy, competitor evaluation and creating differentiated value propositions.
* Develop a deep understanding of Blackbox services capabilities and serve as a Managed Services thought leader and SME across the organization.
* Assist in identifying, developing and rollout of new, innovative and exciting service offerings.
* Achieve sales and profit goals through joint account planning, partner teaming (internal \& external), on\-site client interface/visits, engagement/solution development and implementation support/follow\-up.
* Lead the design and execution strategy for multi\-site rollouts, ensuring seamless deployment and standardized configurations across diverse geographic locations
* Architect and oversee network refresh projects, working closely with clients to modernize legacy infrastructure while minimizing downtime and business disruption
* Drive infrastructure refresh initiatives, including server, storage, and network hardware upgrades, aligned with evolving business and technology requirements
* Define support models and resource planning for Smart Hands services, enabling on\-site technical assistance across various customer environments
* Design scalable and flexible frameworks for on\-demand support, including SLA\-based engagements to handle ad\-hoc technical requirements across IT infrastructure domains
* Provide solution leadership for structured cabling projects, covering both copper and fiber, ensuring compliance with standards and optimal network performance.
* Coordinate and deliver detailed Wi\-Fi site surveys, including predictive and physical surveys, to ensure optimal coverage, capacity, and performance for enterprise wireless networks
* Plan and manage Access Point (AP) replacement and refresh projects, ensuring minimal user impact and improved wireless experience across all business\-critical areas


**Knowledge, Skills \& Abilities**
* Strong business acumen and understanding of clients IT related business goals and challenges to ensure proper translation of the client’s needs into solutions
* Understanding various pricing models such as per port , resource based, ticket based, onsite, remote or Hybrid
* Experience of solutioning on deals involving multi\-site rollouts, network refresh projects, Smart Hands services, on\-demand support, structured cabling projects (both copper and fiber), Wi\-Fi site surveys and Access Point (AP) replacement and refresh projects, etc.
* Strong understanding of Pre\-sales/Solutions process and activities with hands\-on experience good bid/project management skills ability to manage multiple bids simultaneously
* Ability to develop and deliver technical presentations with customers and tailor content to audience as appropriate. Display sustained energy and determination to meet challenging deliverables within stringent timelines
* Ability to work independently with diverse \& global teams and interact confidently with customers and internal stakeholders at all levels
* Strong written and verbal communication skills
* Experience running support teams and/or operations a plus
* Strong experience with Unified Communications and UC Managed Services a plus


**Education And Experience**
* Degree in a computer Science and Engineering or equivalent role relevant experience
* 10\+ years in a customer/client facing technical role (Pre/Post Sales, Sales Engineering, Consulting, Solutions Architecture, Service Delivery, etc.) with a strong knowledge of various network architectures, virtualization, Cloud, Unified Communications and mobility solutions.
* 5\+ years of experience in managed services practice.
* 8\+ years of pre\-sale experience developing managed IT and/or managed UC services solutions.
* ITSM training and certifications (ITIL,COBIT, etc.) a plus
* Extensive consulting experience, providing large, global customers with strategic and tactical planning for technology solutions.
* Demonstrated and verifiable track record of prior successful customer engagements. Examples of solution designs, statements of work and/or technical project plans are required
* Experience in the development and implementation of IT and/or managed Unified Communications solutions with accountability for end\-to\-end delivery
* Experience with enterprise OEM such as AVAYA, Cisco, etc. a plus
* Experience leading and/or managing teams a plus


 CERTIFICATIONS
   

  

 Current and valid industry certifications on technology partners,processes in one or more of the following preferred:
   

  

* UC and/or Contact Center (AVAYA, Cisco, Genesys, etc.)
* Network (Cisco, Juniper, Extreme, etc.)
* ITIL


 KEY TECHNOLOGIES
   

  

* Unified Communications
* Network Architecture
* Wireless
* Cyber security

3d9ca869.title: Service Delivery Mgr - Cloud Services
3d9ca869.description:
**Req ID:** 
 377051
   

  

 NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward\-thinking organization, apply now.
   

  

 We are currently seeking a Service Delivery Mgr \- Cloud Services to join our team in Delhi, Delhi (IN\-DL), India (IN).
   

  

***NTT Data Services is Hiring!***
**Position's Overview**
 At NTT DATA Inc., we know that with the right people on board, anything is possible. The quality, integrity, and commitment of our employees are key factors in our company’s growth, market presence, and our ability to help our clients stay a step ahead of the competition. By hiring, the best people and helping them grow both professionally and personally, we ensure a bright future for NTT DATA and for the people who work here.
   

  

 NTT DATA, Inc. currently seeks a Cloud Service Delivery Manager/Project Manager to join our team.
   

  

**Client's business problem to solve?**
 You will take a key role in NTT Data Cloud Service Delivery Management practice and Program Management Office. The
 **Cloud Service Delivery Manager/Project Manager** 
 works directly with cross\-functional teams across the company to support our clients in their migration/transition to the Cloud as well as with long\-term engagements (steady\-state) as Service Delivery Manager (SDM); managing the interests of NTT Data but also aligning these with our Clients’ Cloud needs.
   

  

 The ideal candidate has a broad skill set:
   

  

* Strong program management skills.
* Excellent communications both written and oral, be able to talk to and act on many organizational levels.
* Can Do attitude and entrepreneurial skills to meet milestones and deadlines.


 Position's General Duties and Tasks
   

  

**In this role you will be responsible for:**
* Maintaining positive relationships with customers.
* Identifying customer needs and overseeing service delivery within the business context.
* Managing finances and budgets and tracking contract deliverables.
* Determining ways to reduce costs without sacrificing customer satisfaction.
* Assessing customer feedback and using your creativity to establish, improve, and refine services.
* Building partnerships and liaising with team leaders to determine the company's services, delivery criteria, and solutions for issues that may arise.
* Providing status, updates, and dashboards to client stakeholders. Mitigate risk and accelerate resolution of outstanding issues.
* Responsible for developing and meeting project plans/schedules, defining project execution requirements, and managing communications.
* P\&L Control, Complex Negotiations, MS Project and Planning Techniques, Risk Logs, Deviations and Mitigations, scope control.
* Responsible for coordinating projects through various communications, data collection, and analysis. May act as Project Manager on multiple projects concurrently.
* Outstanding analytical, problem\-solving, negotiation, and organizational skills to effectively achieve project objectives whilst maintaining a strong sense of urgency. Functional experience in multiple business areas.
* Ability to relate business knowledge to complex problems.
* Additionally, the candidate must have a very strong ability to deal with ambiguity and drive for results. The ability to summarize and present information concisely and clearly for review and approval is a must.


**Requirements for this role include:**
* A bachelor's degree in a business\-related field.
* Fluent in English.
* Experience in Project Management, preferably in a technical or infrastructure\-related role.
* Proficiency in project management methodologies and demonstrated ability to create and maintain project plans, budgets, and timelines.
* Strong organizational skills with the ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
* Good understanding of infrastructure components such as networking, servers, storage, and virtualization.
* Familiarity with Cloud computing platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP) and related services.
* Proven track record of identifying and resolving issues that arise during project execution.
* Ability to think critically and develop creative solutions to overcome challenges and obstacles.
* Experience mitigating project risks and ensuring project deliverables are completed on time and within budget.
* Excellent verbal and written communications skills, with the ability to effectively communicate technical information to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Proven consensus\-building skills in a remote role.
* Leadership skills with the ability to motivate and lead cross\-functional teams.
* Experience collaborating with stakeholders at all levels of the organization to gather requirements and drive project success.
* Strong analytical and negotiation skills.
* Self\-starter, energetic, flexible, innovative, and willing to get things done.
* Experience as a complex project manager or a program manager.
* Willingness to stay updated on industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices.
* Ability to adapt to changing project requirements and priorities in a fast\-paced environment.


**Preferences:**
* 10\+ years relevant experience.
* Deep domain experience with 5\+ years of work experience in Services, cloud computing, or technical project delivery.
* Enterprise work experience dealing with highly complex situations is strongly preferred.
* Experience managing technical and executive\-level relationships (IT Director, VP, and C\-level).
* PMP, ITIL, Agile, Azure, AWS and GCP certifications preferred.


 Required schedule availability for this position is Monday\-Friday (time zone to be determined).
   

  

**About NTT DATA**
 NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in R\&D.
   

  

 Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in\-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com, @nttdatafed.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.
   

  

***NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact\-us.***
***This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.***

088b8c4f.title: PROJECT DELIVERY LEAD - VOIS
088b8c4f.description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About This Role**
 We are seeking a highly experienced project delivery professional to lead and manage large\-scale application development programmes within the telecommunications domain. This role focuses on delivering projects within defined KPIs, driving customer engagement, and establishing effective project management frameworks. The individual will operate within Agile environments, oversee programme delivery, and contribute to organisational improvements while mentoring emerging project management talent.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead assigned programmes and projects to successful completion within defined KPIs such as budget, quality, and risk management
* Develop and implement detailed project management plans, including scope, timelines, and resource allocation
* Drive strong customer engagement, ensuring alignment with expectations and delivery outcomes
* Establish milestones and execute structured action plans to achieve project objectives
* Define and enhance project management frameworks and operating models as required
* Contribute to RFP/RFI processes for new business opportunities
* Guide and support junior project professionals, enabling capability development within the team
* Promote continuous improvement initiatives at organisational or service line level
* Motivate and support team members in achieving shared goals through effective collaboration


**Who You Are**
* Extensive experience managing application development projects valued at USD 2–5 million
* Strong understanding of BIBDA and BSS domains within telecommunications
* Proven experience in programme management and Agile delivery frameworks
* Expertise in estimation, productivity optimisation, and delivery planning
* 13–18 years of overall professional experience, including 8–10 years in project/programme management roles
* Familiarity with tools such as Microsoft Project (MPP), Slack, Jira, Confluence, and Azure DevOps
* Professional certifications such as PMP, PRINCE2, Certified ScrumMaster (CSM), or SAFe (preferred)
* Educational background in Engineering, Computer Science, or related fields


**Not a perfect fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
* Opportunity to lead high\-value, globally impactful technology programmes
* Exposure to strategic initiatives within a leading telecommunications environment
* Collaborative working environment with cross\-functional and international teams
* Professional development through certifications and continuous learning opportunities
* A culture that values inclusion, innovation, and employee growth


**What Skills You Will Learn**
* Advanced programme and portfolio management techniques
* Customer engagement and stakeholder management at scale
* Agile and hybrid delivery methodologies in complex environments
* Strategic thinking in telecom technology and service delivery
* Leadership and mentoring capabilities within global teams


**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.
   

  

**Alert**
 Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
   

  

 \#JDEnhancedByTARA
   

  

**Follow us on social media**
* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/
* You can also chat with our employees to learn more about our projects: https://lnkd.in/dpkrcvR2

9893e82e.title: Delivery Lead
9893e82e.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Delivery Lead / POD Lead
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore
 



**Department:** 
 Delivery / Customer Support
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-time
 



**Reports To:** 
 Head of Delivery / Director – Delivery
 



  





**Role Overview** 




  





 We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced
 **Delivery Lead / POD Lead** 
 to join
 **Signzy Technologies Private Limited** 
 , a leading B2B SaaS technology product organization.
 



 The Delivery Lead will be responsible for ensuring the successful delivery of products and services to clients by managing the end\-to\-end project lifecycle, from initiation to completion. This role will work closely with cross\-functional teams, including Product, Engineering, Sales, and Customer Success, to ensure client expectations are met, project timelines are maintained, and delivery processes run smoothly and efficiently.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





 Project Management
 



 Oversee multiple client\-facing projects simultaneously, ensuring delivery is completed on time, within scope, and as per defined quality standards.
 



  





 Client Relationship Management
 



 Act as the primary point of contact for clients, manage client expectations, proactively address concerns, and ensure a high level of customer satisfaction.
 



  





 Cross\-Functional Collaboration
 



 Coordinate with Product, Engineering, Sales, and Customer Success teams to ensure alignment on deliverables, timelines, milestones, and client requirements.
 



  





 Resource Management
 



 Plan and manage resource allocation across projects to ensure successful delivery and avoid bottlenecks.
 



  





 Risk and Issue Management
 



 Identify project risks, dependencies, and issues in a timely manner, and work with relevant stakeholders to mitigate or resolve them effectively.
 



  





 Delivery Process Ownership
 



 Own the end\-to\-end delivery process by continuously assessing workflows, delivery standards, and client outcomes to drive improvements.
 



  





 Stakeholder Communication
 



 Provide regular updates on project progress, risks, issues, and milestones to internal and external stakeholders, ensuring transparency throughout the delivery lifecycle.
 



  





 Reporting and Documentation
 



 Maintain accurate project documentation, status reports, trackers, and other relevant project\-related records.
 



  





 Continuous Improvement
 



 Drive process improvements, implement delivery best practices, and contribute to operational efficiency and improved quality of delivery.
 



  





**Job Requirements** 




  





 Experience
 


* 5\+ years of experience in Delivery, Project Management, Program Management, or a similar client\-facing role within a B2B SaaS or technology\-driven environment.
* Proven experience in managing large\-scale and complex client projects involving cross\-functional teams.
* Strong experience in SaaS product delivery, including onboarding, integrations, implementation, and customer enablement.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban.
* Familiarity with project management tools such as Jira, Asana, Trello, Monday.com, or similar platforms.



 Education
 


* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* PMP, PRINCE2, Scrum Master, or Agile certifications would be an added advantage.



 Technical Understanding
 


* Good understanding of SaaS architectures, cloud\-based applications, and technology stacks.
* Ability to understand technical requirements and communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.



  





**Key Skills** 




  





 Leadership and Communication
 


* Strong leadership and people management skills.
* Ability to guide, motivate, and align cross\-functional teams towards successful project delivery.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Ability to engage effectively with internal teams, external clients, and senior stakeholders.



 Project and Delivery Management
 


* Strong expertise in managing timelines, scope, resources, risks, and dependencies.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and competing priorities simultaneously.
* Strong ownership mindset with the ability to drive projects to closure.



 Client Focus
 


* Strong client\-facing skills with the ability to build long\-term relationships.
* Ability to understand client expectations, business needs, and pain points.
* Commitment to delivering high\-quality outcomes and ensuring customer satisfaction.



 Problem Solving and Decision Making
 


* Ability to analyze complex problems and provide practical, solution\-oriented recommendations.
* Strong decision\-making capabilities, especially in high\-pressure situations.
* Ability to anticipate challenges and take proactive corrective action.



 Attention to Detail and Quality
 


* Strong attention to detail in project planning, documentation, communication, and delivery.
* Commitment to maintaining high standards of quality across deliverables and client interactions.



 Time Management
 


* Excellent organizational and time management skills.
* Ability to manage multiple deadlines, stakeholders, and deliverables effectively.



  





**Desirable Qualities** 




  




* Strong understanding of Agile principles and the ability to promote Agile ways of working within teams.
* Proactive, solution\-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment.
* Strong client empathy and ability to understand business\-critical client requirements.
* Ability to drive accountability across teams and ensure timely execution.
* Comfortable working with ambiguity and evolving project requirements

1dd1b77c.title: Acquisition & Engagement Manager
1dd1b77c.description:
**Job Requirements**
 About the Role
   

  

 The Acquisition \& Engagement Manager in Branch Banking is responsible for supporting branch launches and events within the assigned region or zone. The role focuses on acquiring targeted customers, delivering exceptional and personalized service, and building strong customer relationships. Additionally, the role involves driving below\-the\-line (BTL) marketing activities to contribute to the overall objectives of the branch banking channel.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

**Primary Responsibilities**
* Conceptualize and execute micro\-marketing events for mapped branches and corporate clients as per defined frequency.
* Identify and develop a vendor network to ensure quality and cost\-effectiveness for all events.
* Generate high\-quality leads for the acquisition team.
* Drive planning and execution of on\-ground events to enhance customer engagement.
* Facilitate strong business\-to\-business relationships between the bank and clients by creating an environment conducive to customer interactions.
* Ideate and leverage multiple channels to identify new business opportunities.


 Secondary Responsibilities
   

  

* Support regional initiatives and collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth execution of engagement activities.
* Monitor event performance and recommend improvements for future campaigns.


 What We Are Looking For
   

  

 Education
   

  

* Graduate in any discipline.


**Experience**
* 2 to 5 years of relevant experience in customer acquisition, engagement, or event management.


 Skills and Attributes
   

  

* Strong planning and organizational skills.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
* Ability to manage vendors and ensure cost\-effective event execution.
* Creative thinking for ideating engagement activities.
* Customer\-centric approach with a focus on relationship building.
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced environment and meet deadlines.

b491666c.description:

**Your Role**

 Additional expertise includes:
   

  

 Assembling Complex deals

* Project Resource Management.

 who can drive Oracle cloud transformation projects end to end.
   

  

 Should have strong knowledge is project planning and execution, hands on in preparing for leadership meetings and discussions like Steering committee, Change control board etc.
   

  

**What You'll Love About Working With Us**

 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.
