f7f84852.title: Healthcare Solutions Consultant (Presales)
f7f84852.description:
**About the Role**
We are seeking a seasoned **Healthcare Solutions Consultant (Presales)** who blends deep US healthcare domain expertise with hands\-on business analysis pedigree and a proven presales track record. You will be the domain and solution authority in our pursuit teams — owning RFP/RFI responses, discovery\-to\-solution translation, demo narratives, and proposal architecture for opportunities across Provider Health IT, EHR/interoperability engineering, and MedTech software.
This is a **presales\-heavy role (approximately 70/30\)**: your primary charter is winning business by shaping compelling, technically credible solutions; your BA depth is what makes those solutions land with clinical, operational, and technical buyers alike.
You will work closely with our US\-based sales and leadership team and our Ahmedabad delivery organization, acting as the connective tissue between what the client needs, what we propose, and what we can credibly deliver. **Location:**Ahmedabad (Preferred)/ Remote **Key Responsibilities** **Presales \& Solutioning (Primary Charter)*** + Identify Healthcare domain capability areas based on Dash’s project experiences.
	+ Develop accelerators based on industry trends and evolving needs.
	+ Help with designing and running campaigns for the identified domain capabilities and accelerators.
	+ Lead discovery calls with prospect stakeholders (CIOs, CMIOs, VPs of Product, Directors of Clinical Informatics, Revenue Cycle leaders) to elicit business drivers, current\-state workflows, and technical constraints — and translate these into solution blueprints.
	+ Design and deliver solution presentations, capability demos, and proof\-of\-concept (POC) scoping — tailored to clinical, operational, and executive audiences.
	+ Partner with Delivery Leads to build effort estimates, staffing models, phased implementation roadmaps, and commercial constructs (T\&M, fixed\-bid, managed capacity).
	+ Develop reusable presales assets: capability decks, solution one\-pagers, case studies, battlecards, demo scripts, and reference architectures.
	+ Support pipeline development by partnering with Business Development and Sales on account plans, opportunity qualification, and competitive positioning.
	+ Represent Dash in client workshops, industry events, webinars, and partner ecosystem conversations (EHR vendor programs, cloud/AI platform alliances).

 **Business Analysis \& Domain Leadership (Supporting Charter)*** + Bring current\-state/future\-state workflow mapping, requirements elicitation, user story definition, and traceability discipline into early\-stage engagements and pilot phases.
	+ Serve as the US healthcare domain SME internally — coaching delivery teams on clinical workflows, revenue cycle processes, regulatory context, and payer\-provider dynamics.
	+ Contribute to thought leadership: white papers, POVs, and webinar content that establish Dash's domain authority in healthcare AI, interoperability, and MedTech engineering.

 **Required Qualifications*** + **12\-15 years** in US healthcare IT, with a demonstrable blend of business analysis and presales/solution consulting roles at IT services firms, health tech ISVs, or consulting organizations.
	+ **US Healthcare domain mastery:** provider workflows (ambulatory, acute, post\-acute), revenue cycle management (837/835, CMS\-1500/UB\-04, prior authorization, denials), payer\-provider data exchange, value\-based care constructs, and regulatory landscape (HIPAA, 21st Century Cures Act, information blocking, ONC certification criteria).
	+ **EHR implementation experience:** hands\-on involvement in implementations, optimizations, integrations, or migrations across one or more major platforms — Epic, Oracle Health (Cerner), MEDITECH, athenahealth, eClinicalWorks, or NextGen — including module\-level familiarity (clinical documentation, orders, scheduling, patient accounting).
	+ **Interoperability depth:** working fluency in HL7 v2\.x, FHIR (R4, US Core, SMART on FHIR), C\-CDA, X12 EDI transactions, API\-based integration patterns, integration engines (Mirth/Rhapsody/Cloverleaf), and familiarity with TEFCA/QHIN developments.
	+ **MedTech exposure:** experience supporting medical device software, SaMD, or device\-connectivity programs — with awareness of FDA regulatory pathways (510(k), De Novo), IEC 62304, ISO 13485, and design control expectations. (Depth is a plus; credible fluency is a must.)
	+ **Presales craft:** proven record of shaping and winning deals — RFP authorship, solution demos, estimation, proposal defense/orals — ideally for US clients from an offshore/GCC or onsite\-offshore model.
	+ **Exceptional communication:** ability to command a room (virtual or in\-person) with US executive and clinical stakeholders; crisp written English for proposals and client artifacts.
	+ Bachelor's degree in engineering, life sciences, health informatics, or related field.

**Preferred Qualifications*** + Exposure to healthcare AI/ML use cases — ambient clinical documentation, clinical decision support, deterioration prediction, prior\-auth automation, NLP on clinical notes — and the governance/regulatory considerations around them.
	+ Familiarity with cloud healthcare platforms: AWS HealthLake, Azure Health Data Services, Google Cloud Healthcare API.
	+ Experience with EHR vendor partner programs (e.g., Epic Vendor Services/Connection Hub, Oracle Health partnerships, MEDITECH Alliance) or app marketplace listings.
	+ Certifications such as CBAP, PMI\-PBA, AHIMA/HIMSS credentials (CPHIMS), Epic/Cerner certifications, or HL7 FHIR proficiency.
	+ Prior experience in a GCC or offshore delivery center serving US healthcare clients, including onsite client\-facing stints in the US.
	+ MBA or master's in health informatics/healthcare management.

3bc106af.title: Senior Pre-Sales Consultant
3bc106af.description:
**Responsibilities**
* To work closely with Sales / Channel Team in approaching new engagements/prospects to find out and document the requirements and key findings. Perform solution mapping and relay requirements to Pre\-Sales Team for demonstrations.
* To conduct product demonstrations with focus on Microsoft Defender, Entra ID, Microsoft Purview, Microsoft Sentinel, Defender for Cloud \& Azure Security.
* To provide assistance to the Sales / Channel Team in preparing Presentation Slides, Solution Proposals, solution BOM, Response to RFP and Tenders.
* Work closely with Sales / Channel Teams to ensure customer security requirements are addressed using Microsoft\-native security solutions, with or without the inclusion of approved third\-party products distributed by the company.
* Assist Sales / Channel Teams in preparing presentation decks, security solution proposals, BOMs, RFP/Tender responses, and technical compliance documentation.
* To perform research on respective solution domain technologies and how it can enhance solution or product positioning. If there are other technologies that can value add to the position, it should also be incorporated.
* To work closely with the Sales / Channel Team and Post\-Sales Team in preparing Solution Plays \& blueprints for enablement.
* Support In\-Country Pre\-Sales team with technical guidance.
* To assist and jointly execute a hand\-over meeting upon successful win to the Post\-Sales Team with the Sales / Channel Team and Pre\-Sales Team.
* To be updated with latest changes or new products introduced by principals and/or 3rd party vendors.
* To fulfill and undergo product certification trainings as required.
* To understand and execute company's marketing strategies and understand competitors' products, services and strategies, feedback to management on plans and strategies.
* Participate in exhibitions to showcase products/solutions, capture leads, network with audiences to be closely updated with industry trends and needs.
* Represent solutions at Tech Data, vendor, and partner\-led events
* Any other duties as and when assigned from time to time.
* Validates pre\-sales solutions design and sizing.
* Coaches and mentor pre\-sales team
* Leads the technical discussion with suppliers on new initiatives.
* Responsible for cross solutions bundles.
* Continuously upskill and maintain relevant product certifications.
* Open to expand technical skills around Azure.
* Attends QBR sessions with sales.


**Knowledge, Skills And Experience**
* Proficient knowledge in Microsoft 365 Security, Entra ID, Defender Suite, Microsoft Sentinel, Azure Security (Defender for Cloud, Azure Network Security, Key Vault, IAM)
* Bachelor's degree in information technology/computer science or equivalent experience certifications preferred.
* 7\+ years of experience with Minimum of 4 years relevant working experience, ideally in IT multinational environment.
* Track record on the assigned line Cards experience is an added advantage.
* IT Distributor and/or SI experience would also be an added advantage.
* Have good communication in English, on the job understanding and problem\-solving skills.
* Proven ability to work independently, effectively in an off\-site environment and under high pressure.


 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on\-demand courses.
* Elevate Your Personal Well\-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well\-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* Diversity, Equity \& Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer\-to\-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co\-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer\-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At Tech Data, a TD SYNNEX Company, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!
   

  

 We are an equal opportunity employer and committed to building a diverse team that represents and empowers a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment based on merit, without regard to race, colour, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, genetics, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. To support our diversity and inclusion efforts, we may ask for voluntary gender disclosure information. This data will be used solely to improve our hiring practices and ensure fair treatment for all candidates.

4405190b.title: Solution Architect
4405190b.description:
**Join our Team**
**About this opportunity:**
 Join our dynamic team at Ericsson as a Solution Architect. In this pivotal role, you will be tasked with analyzing, designing, and developing commercially viable technical solutions in your respective technical domain. These solutions will be based on customer specifications and business needs. As Solution Architect, you will be responsible for creating both short\- and long\-term profitable business strategies for Ericsson. This will be accomplished by working closely with the Core 3 team to translate customer needs and technology opportunities into detailed technical offerings, solutions, and proposals.
   

  

**What you will do:**
* Engage in detailed discussions with customers to understand their technology strategy and identify key challenges.
* Analyze customer's technology and business environment along with their non\-functional requirements.
* Identify customer's improvement areas and challenges related to both technology and business.
* Collaborate with the Core 3 team to develop a list of potential activities and solutions.
* Construct value arguments alongside the Core 3 team.
* Develop and present technical presentations to customers.


**The skills you bring:**
* Consultative Skills.
* Solution Delivery.
* Project Implementation.
* Negotiation.
* Hardware, Architecture, Virtual Environment, Technology, Protocol and Interface.
* Coaching and Mentoring.
* Solution Architect.
* Financial Acumen.
* Customer Solution Design.
* Market insights.
* Ericsson Portfolio.
* Business Acumen.
* Knowledge sharing and learning.
* Infra Capacity,Perf AnalysisandSol Def.
* Technical Sales.

ad074472.title: Specialist - Presales
ad074472.description:
Ingram Micro is a leading technology company for the global information technology ecosystem.
   

  

 With the ability to reach nearly 90% of the global population, we play a vital role in the worldwide IT sales channel, bringing products and services from technology manufacturers and cloud providers to business\-to\-business technology experts.
   

  

 Our market reach, diverse solutions and services portfolio, and digital platform Ingram Micro Xvantage™ set us apart
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are seeking a technically strong and customer\-focused
 **Pre\-Sales Associate** 
 to support enterprise sales for core infrastructure solutions. The role will involve designing and presenting solutions leveraging platforms such as
 **Zebra** 
 ,
 **PeopleLink** 
 , and
 **Versa** 
 , along with associated infrastructure hardware.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Solution Design \& Architecture
* Design end\-to\-end solutions using:
+ Zebra devices (barcode scanners, RFID, mobility solutions)
+ PeopleLink video conferencing \& AV solutions
+ Versa SD\-WAN / SASE platforms

* Build integrated architectures combining hardware, networking, and collaboration tools
* Develop HLDs (High\-Level Designs) and LLDs (Low\-Level Designs)
* Pre\-Sales Engagement
* Work closely with sales and product teams during client engagements
* Understand customer business requirements and map to technical solutions
* Conduct product demos, PoCs, and technical workshops
* Respond to RFPs/RFIs with detailed technical proposals
* Technical Expertise
* Strong knowledge of:
+ SD\-WAN, SASE (especially Versa)
+ Enterprise networking (LAN/WAN, routing, switching)
+ Collaboration technologies (VC systems, AV integration)
+ Endpoint \& mobility hardware (Zebra devices)

* Ability to integrate hardware with cloud and on\-prem environments
* Stakeholder Management
* Interface with OEMs (Zebra, PeopleLink, Versa, etc.) for solution validation
* Collaborate with delivery and implementation teams for smooth transition
* Act as a trusted advisor to customers and internal stakeholders
* Commercial \& Proposal Support
* Support solution costing, BOM preparation, and pricing strategy
* Ensure solutions are scalable, cost\-effective, and aligned with client needs


**Required Skills \& Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering / IT
* 4–6 years in Pre\-Sales / Solution Architecture roles
* Hands\-on experience with:
+ Versa SD\-WAN / SASE
+ AV \& VC solutions for PeopleLink
+ Mobility / scanning devices (Zebra or equivalent)

* Strong presentation and client\-facing skills
* Experience in enterprise or large deal environments


**Preferred Certifications**
* Versa Certified Professional (VCP\-SASE or equivalent)
* Cisco / Networking certifications (CCNP/CCIE preferred)
* AV / Collaboration certifications

a82959d6.title: Specialist - Presales
a82959d6.description:
**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a skilled
 **Fortinet Pre\-Sales Engineer \& Product Technical Specialist** 
 to support our
 **distribution business** 
 . The role focuses on
 **technical pre\-sales** 
 ,
 **partner enablement** 
 , and
 **customer engagement** 
 across the
 **Fortinet portfolio** 
 .
   

  

 The candidate will work closely with
 **distribution\-managed partners, system integrators, and enterprise customers** 
 , providing technical expertise, solution design support, and enablement to drive Fortinet adoption and growth.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Pre\-Sales \& Solution Engineering**
* Act as a technical SME for the Fortinet security portfolio, including:
+ FortiGate (NGFW)
+ FortiManager / FortiAnalyzer
+ FortiSwitch \& FortiAP
+ FortiEDR, FortiClient, FortiSIEM (as applicable)

* Support pre\-sales activities such as:
+ Requirement gathering and technical discovery
+ Solution architecture and design
+ Technical presentations, demos, and POCs

* Assist sales teams with:
+ RFP/RFI responses
+ BOM creation and solution size
+ Licensing and subscription guidance


**Partner \& Customer Engagement**
* Participate in:
+ Distribution Managed Partner Round Tables
+ Partner Round Tables
+ Customer Round Tables

* Engage directly with partners and customers to position Fortinet solutions effectively.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor during the sales lifecycle.


**Training, Enablement \& Onboarding**
* Deliver partner enablement and training sessions on Fortinet solutions.
* Support new partner onboarding, ensuring technical readiness and alignment with Fortinet best practices.
* Conduct Fast Track trainings and technical workshops.
* Help partners prepare for and achieve Fortinet NSE certifications.
* Develop and maintain technical documentation, demo labs, and enablement material.


**Collaboration \& Vendor Interaction**
* Work closely with:
+ Internal sales and product teams
+ Fortinet vendor technical and channel teams

* Stay updated with Fortinet product roadmap, new releases, and security trends.
* Provide feedback from partners and customers to improve GTM and enablement strategy.


**Technical Skills**
**Required Skills \& Experience**
* Strong hands\-on experience with Fortinet security solutions, especially FortiGate.
* Solid understanding of:
+ Network security concepts (Firewall, VPN, IPS, Web Filtering)
+ SD\-WAN and Secure Networking
+ Endpoint and access security (basic to intermediate)

* Knowledge of:
+ Networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, routing, switching)
+ Linux basics
+ Cloud security (AWS / Azure / GCP) – preferred


**Certifications (Mandatory / Preferred)**
* Fortinet NSE 1 – NSE 7 (at least NSE 4/5 preferred)
* Fortinet Fast Track certification
* Higher NSE levels are a strong advantage.


**Professional Skills**
* Strong presentation and communication skills.
* Ability to explain complex security concepts to both technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Experience working in a distribution or channel\-driven environment.
* Self\-motivated, organized, and comfortable handling multiple partners.


**Experience Requirements**
* 3 – 5 years of experience in:
+ Pre\-sales engineering
+ Network/security consulting
+ Technical specialist or solution engineering roles

* Prior experience with network security or firewall technologies is mandatory.

ef9e0e40.title: Solution Consultant - C&P
ef9e0e40.description:
The Role
   

  

 In this role, the focus is on helping customers realise genuine value from Adobe’s Document Cloud and Creative solutions, including Adobe Firefly and Acrobat Studio. Working closely with Sales and Channel teams, the Solutions Consultant uses a consultative approach to guide customers through their buying journey: from discovery and demonstration through to solution design. Generative AI has fundamentally changed how creative teams work, and this role sits right at the front of that shift!
   

  

 The Job
   

  

 Run discovery sessions to understand customer goals, workflows, and challenges. Deliver tailored demos and proof\-of\-concepts across Creative Cloud, Acrobat Studio and Adobe Firefly that clearly connect to business outcomes. Facilitate customer workshops and executive briefings. Provide technical guidance on creative workflows, document automation, and solution design. Partner with Sales, Marketing, and Channel Partners to support deal cycles and respond to RFPs. Build lasting relationships with customers and partners.
   

  

 What We’re Looking For
   

  

 Strong candidates bring a background in pre\-sales, solutions consulting, or solutions engineering within a tech organisation, and:
   

  

* Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders across creative, business, and IT functions
* Hands\-on knowledge of Adobe Creative Cloud, Document Cloud, or a comparable platform
* Ability to translate product features into clear business outcomes for diverse audiences
* Familiarity with digital workflows, document automation, or creative content production
* Understanding of APIs, integrations, and SaaS or cloud platforms
* Business\-level English, and readiness to travel across India


 Working at Adobe
   

  

 Adobe is an encouraging work environment celebrated globally. Colleagues are dedicated to each other’s growth, and the feedback culture is one of the things people value most. This role offers the chance to make a real impact and be part of Adobe’s story as it evolves. Read more about life at Adobe on the Adobe Life blog.
   

  

 Why Adobe?
   

  

 Adobe has spent over 40 years at the intersection of creativity and technology, and the generative AI era is the most exciting chapter yet! India’s teams are growing fast, with real paths into senior pre\-sales, product specialisation, or field roles. Adobe is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applications from all backgrounds.

 Adobe empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools that unleash creativity, productivity and personalised customer experiences. Adobe’s industry\-leading offerings including Adobe Acrobat Studio, Adobe Express, Adobe Firefly, Creative Cloud, Adobe Experience Platform, Adobe Experience Manager, and GenStudio enable people and businesses to turn ideas into impact, powered by AI and driven by human ingenuity.

07653fa5.title: Advisory Solution Consultant
07653fa5.description:
**Company Description**
 It all started when engineer Fred Luddy wrote code that automated a tedious task for his coworker, Phyllis. She cried tears of joy. That moment inspired Fred to build a company that could do that for everyone—freeing people from busywork so they could focus on meaningful work. Today, ServiceNow is the AI control tower for business reinvention. Our ServiceNow AI platform brings together any AI, any data, and any workflow— helping 85% of the Fortune 500® work smarter, faster, and better. We're building an AI\-native culture where technology and talent are unstoppable together. And we're just getting started.
   

  

 Join us to put AI to work for people.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a member of our Solution Consulting team, you will have a major impact on our future success by supporting \[Employee Experience, Customer Workflow, ITX] Solution Sales. You will guide revenue for one of our products with the support and partnership of Sales, Product Management, and the executive team. This is a hands\-on technical consultant who can go wide and deep on solution delivery and solution positioning during sales cycles.
   

  

**What You Get To Do In This Role**
 The Solution Consultant is a technical consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide product\-specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.
   

  

* Support product sales as a technical and domain expert of a client\-facing sales team
* Lead discovery workshops to determine customers' challenges and give product demonstrations to align our solution with customer needs
* Answer product feature and technical questions from customers, channel partners and ServiceNow colleagues
* Provide feedback to product management about product enhancements that can address customer needs and provide additional value
* Share and learn best practices and re\-usable assets with other Solution Consultants to enhance the quality and efficiency of the team
* Stay current on competitive analysis and market differentiation
* Support marketing events including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and trade shows


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision\-making, or problem\-solving. This may include using AI\-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI\-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* 7\+ years of pre\-sales solution consulting or sales engineering experience
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or technical expertise with cloud software solutions
* Experience working collaboratively with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services
* Territory management skills, including pipeline building and working with Sales counterpart to guide execution excellence
* Travel, as necessary


 FD21
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third\-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, gender identity, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.

db1e92d3.title: Presales Network Consultant (HPE Aruba)
db1e92d3.description:
**Company Description** 
 NTT DATA, Inc. is a global innovator in business and technology services, focused on helping clients innovate, optimize, and transform for long\-term success. The organization invests heavily in R\&D to support a sustainable and secure digital future for businesses and society. Recognized as a Global Top Employer, NTT DATA brings together diverse experts in more than 50 countries and works with a strong ecosystem of established partners and start\-ups. Its services span business and technology consulting, data and artificial intelligence, and industry\-specific solutions. NTT DATA also provides end\-to\-end capabilities for developing, implementing, and managing applications, infrastructure, and connectivity.
   

**Role Description** 
 This is a full\-time, on\-site Presales Network Consultant (HPE Aruba) role based in Mulshi. The individual in this role collaborates with sales teams and clients to understand business and technical requirements, designing HPE Aruba network solutions that align with customer needs and NTT DATA standards. Daily responsibilities include preparing solution proposals, bills of materials, and technical presentations, as well as responding to RFPs/RFQs with accurate network designs and cost estimates. The role involves conducting product demonstrations, proof\-of\-concept activities, and technical workshops to showcase HPE Aruba capabilities. The consultant also provides presales technical support, works closely with delivery teams for smooth handover of awarded projects, and stays current with HPE Aruba certifications, features, and industry best practices.
   

**Qualifications**
* Candidates should possess strong skills in Network Administration and Network Engineering for configuring, deploying, and supporting HPE Aruba solutions.
* Candidates should possess expertise in Network Architecture to design scalable, secure, and resilient wired and wireless network infrastructures.
* Candidates should possess capabilities in Network Security to implement and advise on secure access, segmentation, and compliance\-aligned configurations.
* Candidates should possess advanced Troubleshooting skills to diagnose network issues, optimize performance, and support presales validation activities.
* Relevant HPE Aruba certifications (e.g., Aruba Certified Switching Professional, Aruba Certified Design Professional) or equivalent vendor certifications are highly beneficial.
* Experience in presales or solution consulting, including RFP/RFQ response, proposal development, and customer presentations, is preferred.
* Strong communication, documentation, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with sales, technical, and client teams.
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

bae61954.title: Solutions Engineer
bae61954.description:
**About Workato**
 Workato delivers enterprise infrastructure for the agentic era, redefining iPaaS and helping enterprises unify data, applications, processes, and AI into a single, governed platform. A leader in Enterprise MCP and trusted by 50% of the Fortune 500, Workato’s cloud\-native architecture connects every application, data source, and process to power real\-time orchestration at scale. With enterprise\-grade security and continuous innovation at its core, Workato provides the trusted foundation for organizations to automate with confidence and operationalize AI across the business. To learn more, visit www.workato.com
   

  

**Why join us?**
 Ultimately, Workato believes in fostering a
 **flexible, trust\-oriented culture that empowers everyone to take full ownership of their roles** 
 . We are driven by
 **innovation** 
 and looking for
 **team players** 
 who want to actively build our company.
   

  

 But, we also believe in
 **balancing productivity with self\-care** 
 . That’s why we offer all of our employees a vibrant and dynamic work environment along with a multitude of benefits they can enjoy inside and outside of their work lives.
   

  

 If this sounds right up your alley, please submit an application. We look forward to getting to know you!
   

  

**Also, Feel Free To Check Out Why**
* Business Insider named us an “enterprise startup to bet your career on”
* Forbes’ Cloud 100 recognized us as one of the top 100 private cloud companies in the world
* Deloitte Tech Fast 500 ranked us as the 17th fastest growing tech company in the Bay Area, and 96th in North America
* Quartz ranked us the \#1 best company for remote workers


**Responsibilities**
 We are seeking a hands\-on, detail\-oriented
 **Solutions Engineer** 
 to join our Solution Consulting team and support demo and proof\-of\-value (PoV) environments for sales, marketing, and customer success initiatives. You will collaborate with solutions architects, product managers, and developers to ensure that lab infrastructure is robust, secure, and aligned with real\-world use cases.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will Be Responsible To**
**Pre\-Sales \& Technical Engagement**
* Partner with AEs, Solution Architects, and cross\-functional teams to deliver tailored platform demonstrations, manage POC engagements, and respond to RFI/RFP requests — driving technical sales cycles to completion.Collaborate with Customer Success to ensure seamless solution delivery and a positive post\-sale customer experience.


**Demo Environment \& Infrastructure**
* Design, deploy, and maintain virtual and physical lab environments across hybrid cloud and on\-premise platforms (VMware, KVM, AWS, Azure, GCP), ensuring availability, security, and alignment with the latest product releases.Develop and maintain automation scripts (PowerShell, Python, Bash, Ansible, Terraform) and reusable components to streamline environment provisioning and accelerate field team deployments.


**Collaboration \& Enablement**
* Work cross\-functionally with Solution Architects, Product Managers, and Field Engineering to ensure demo content reflects current product capabilities and best practices.Maintain comprehensive documentation and troubleshooting guides, providing ongoing guidance and support to field teams on demo setup and usage.


**Requirements**
**Qualifications / Experience / Technical Skills**
* 2–4 years of experience in systems engineering, presales, back office support, deve ops, IT infrastructure
* Familiarity with infrastructure automation tools (e.g., Ansible, Terraform, Packer).
* Familiar with APIM, Integration, and Data Integration platforms (Boomi, Workato, Mulesoft)
* Basic scripting skills in Python, Ruby, PowerShell, or Bash.
* Experience managing cloud\-based resources (e.g., AWS EC2, Azure VM).
* Strong problem\-solving skills and the ability to work independently.


**Preferred**
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and version control (e.g., GitLab CI, GitHub Actions).
* Familiarity with containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
* Experience working with demo platforms or technical enablement teams.
* Understanding of enterprise software architectures and APIs (REST, gRPC).


**Soft Skills / Personal Characteristics**
* Strong written and verbal communication skills to collaborate effectively across technical and non\-technical teams.
* Able to translate technical requirements into actionable lab builds.
* Highly organised, with the ability to manage multiple concurrent tasks or environments.
* Comfortable working in fast\-paced and collaborative settings.


 (REQ ID: 2636\)

d6ce412f.title: Technical Solutions Consultant, gTech Ads
d6ce412f.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Gurugram, Haryana, India; Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Mumbai, Maharashtra, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 3 years of experience as a solutions consultant/product manager, with a focus on digital advertising products or launching and scaling products and features in online shopping and eCommerce.
* Experience in an online advertising role, and with the advertisement serving industry and internet technologies.
* Experience in coding with Java or Python, constructing SQL queries, and working with databases/shopping feeds.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* 6 years of experience as a solutions consultant/product manager, with a focus on digital advertising products or launching and scaling products and features in online shopping and eCommerce.
* Experience in influencing senior stakeholders.
* Excellent problem\-solving, analytical, management, and communication skills, with the ability to absorb technical concepts and communicate them to a non\-technical audience.


**About The Job**
 As a Technical Solutions Consultant, you will be responsible for the technical relationship of our largest advertising clients and/or product partners. You will lead cross\-functional teams in Engineering, Sales and Product Management to leverage emerging technologies for our external clients/partners. From concept design and testing to data analysis and support, you will oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's online advertising platforms and/or product partnerships.
   

  

 You will be able to balance business and partner needs with technical constraints, develop innovative, cutting edge solutions and act as a partner and consultant to those you are working with. You will also be able to build tools and automate products, oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's partnerships, as well as develop product strategy and prioritize projects and resources.
   

  

 Google creates products and services that make the world a better place, and gTech’s role is to help bring them to life. Our teams of trusted advisors support customers globally. Our solutions are rooted in our technical skill, product expertise, and a thorough understanding of our customers’ complex needs. Whether the answer is a bespoke solution to solve a unique problem, or a new tool that can scale across Google, everything we do aims to ensure our customers benefit from the full potential of Google products.
   

  

 To learn more about gTech, check out our video .
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work with clients and internal stakeholders to map strategic business goals.
* Understand requirements, and provide technical information and solutions around applying ad products and technologies.
* Contribute to product development by identifying gaps in current product offerings to drive both operational efficiencies and business growth.
* Build relationships with internal and external customers, to identify key challenges and implement technical solutions, and become a trusted advisor.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

d27982e9.title: Solution Consulting Manager (Travel Domain)
d27982e9.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

 Your Role
   

  

* You will consult with sales and client management teams to determine servicing platforms that align with clients' program goals and objectives, and lead technical product presentations and discussions.
* The ideal candidate will have a strong background in travel, managing global clients, working with multiple teams and most importantly driving results.
* They must also have excellent presentation skills and have the ability to explain complex information to an audience.
* We are open minded to the background of the candidate (sales, account management, technology, etc) as long as they have excellent technology skills (within IT or travel) and can manage senior level stakeholders.
* Extensive technical knowledge and experience, technical competence and experience with IT service management tools.


 Your Profile
   

  

* Part of a dedicated team focusing on customer requirements.
* Demos and Reviews of Proprietary and 3rd Party Technology solutions for new customers.
* Prepare for large or small scale software and service deployments.
* New and existing customer service and products evaluation, design, and documentation into Statement of Work/Contracting process.
* Winning and retaining travel business by leveraging sales, servicing, technology, travel, and consulting expertise.
* Building strong internal relationships, networking within the business to build your brand.
* Learning and developing knowledge of all internal servicing platforms, travel products, sharing expertise with teams.
* Lead client presentations and discussions, product demonstrations, proof of concepts, and technical proposals to demonstrate value to clients.


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
 You can shape your career with us. We offer a range of career paths and internal opportunities within Capgemini group. You will also get personalized career guidance from our leaders.
   

  

 You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
   

  

 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \| www.capgemini.com

**Key Responsibilities**

Requirements

0c155f5b.title: Strategic Cloud Engineer, Appdev (English)
0c155f5b.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Mumbai, Maharashtra, India; Gurugram, Haryana, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 3 years of experience coding in one or more general purpose languages (e.g., Python, Java, Go, C or C\+\+).
* Experience designing cloud enterprise solutions and supporting customer projects to completion.
* Ability to communicate in English fluently to collaborate efficiently with local customers.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience refactoring monolithic applications to microservices, Application Programming Interface (APIs), or serverless models.
* Experience architecting, developing software, or internet scale production\-grade cloud solutions in virtualized environments such as Google Cloud Platform or other public clouds.
* Experience leading application modernization or application architecture projects.
* Experience with data structures, algorithms, and software design.
* Experience with unit or automated testing tools.


**About The Job**
 As an Application Modernization Engineer, you will work with customers to transform existing enterprise applications into modern, cloud native applications to reduce time to launch, increase release frequency, reduce time to recovery and failure rate. You will propose and execute, including code development, approaches to modernize Google’s customer’s applications and deploy them to Google Cloud Platform. You will work with customers on application re\-design and implementation, including application scaling and reliability. You will also advise on ongoing operations such as application and feature rollouts, monitoring, and more. You will work closely with product management and product engineering to build and drive excellence in our products. You will work with Google's most strategic Cloud customers. You will support customer adoption of Google Cloud products through architecture guidance, best practices, application migration, implementation, troubleshooting, monitoring, and much more.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Deliver modern software to Google’s customers, including creating and executing enterprise application transformation and migration strategies.
* Recommend approaches and estimated effort for application migration and modernization programs.
* Create and deliver best practice recommendations, tutorials, blog articles, and sample code.
* Travel up to 30% for in\-region for meetings, technical reviews, and onsite delivery activities.
* Be a trusted technical advisor to customers and solve complex software development challenges.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. ccfd24f2.title: Architect
ccfd24f2.description:
**Job Summary**
 Architect role for an experienced professional with strong Infor M3 and integration expertise responsible for designing scalable solutions that align with enterprise standards in a hybrid work model. The role involves collaborating with cross functional teams optimizing end to end business processes and ensuring robust secure and maintainable integrations across critical applications.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design robust Infor M3 solution architectures that align with enterprise standards while supporting complex manufacturing and distribution processes in a sustainable manner
* Develop detailed application and integration blueprints that clarify data flows between Infor M3 and surrounding systems to ensure reliable and predictable operations
* Coordinate with business stakeholders to translate functional requirements into Infor M3 designs that enhance process efficiency and reduce operational risk
* Configure Infor M3 modules to support order management procurement inventory finance and production flows while maintaining consistency with global templates
* Create integration specifications that define payload structures transformation rules and error handling approaches to support stable system to system communication
* Collaborate with integration teams to design and validate middleware and API based solutions that connect Infor M3 with legacy cloud and partner platforms
* Review technical designs code and configuration from implementation teams to ensure adherence to reference architecture and maintainability guidelines
* Define nonfunctional requirements such as performance scalability security and observability for Infor M3 and integration landscapes and validate them through solution reviews
* Guide troubleshooting of complex incidents by analyzing logs integration traces and configuration to quickly identify root causes and recommend sustainable fixes
* Document solution architectures configuration decisions and integration patterns in a structured and reusable manner to support future enhancements and audits
* Partner with infrastructure and database teams to plan capacity environment strategy and deployment approaches that ensure high availability and predictable performance for Infor M3
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives by identifying technical debt proposing refactoring opportunities and promoting reusable integration patterns across projects
* Align Infor M3 roadmaps with enterprise digital initiatives so that solutions support long term business goals and contribute to operational resilience and customer satisfaction


**Qualifications**
* possess a minimum of ten years of hands on experience working with Infor M3 in complex enterprise environments covering design configuration and solution validation
* demonstrate strong expertise in designing integrations between Infor M3 and external systems using middleware tools APIs and event driven patterns with focus on reliability and data integrity
* show practical experience in hybrid work settings with proven ability to collaborate effectively using remote and onsite modes while maintaining clear communication and documentation quality
* apply solid understanding of manufacturing distribution and financial processes as implemented in Infor M3 so that solutions reflect real world business operations
* utilize strong skills in requirements analysis and process mapping to convert business needs into detailed Infor M3 and integration designs without overcomplicating the solution
* bring proficiency in performance tuning and optimization of Infor M3 processes and integrations to ensure responsive user experience and efficient resource usage
* leverage familiarity with secure development and integration practices including authentication authorization encryption and data privacy controls in regulated environments
* display working knowledge of testing strategies including system integration testing user acceptance testing and regression testing tailored for Infor M3 landscapes
* benefit from experience with modern integration platforms and scripting or configuration tools that simplify orchestration error handling and monitoring of interfaces
* enhance team effectiveness by sharing knowledge mentoring peers and promoting consistent use of architectural standards and reusable assets within the Infor M3 domain
* demonstrate strong communication and documentation capabilities that enable clear explanation of complex designs to both technical and nontechnical stakeholders
* support the organization purpose by designing systems that improve operational efficiency reduce manual work and enable more responsive service to customers and communities

0b044730.title: Cloud Technical Architect
0b044730.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Technical Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Develop and deliver agile and cost effective hosting solutions. Implement scalable, high performance hosting solutions that meet the need of todays corporate and digital applications using both private and public cloud technologies. Plan and deliver legacy infrastructure transformation and migration to drive next\-generation business outcomes.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 SAP BTP Application Development
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Cloud Technical Architect, a typical day involves designing and delivering agile and cost\-efficient hosting solutions tailored to meet the evolving demands of modern corporate and digital applications. This role focuses on implementing scalable and high\-performance hosting environments utilizing both private and public cloud platforms. The professional actively plans and executes the transformation and migration of legacy infrastructure, ensuring seamless integration with next\-generation business objectives. Collaboration with various teams to align technical strategies with business goals is a key aspect of daily activities, fostering innovation and operational excellence.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to perform independently and become an SME.
* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.
* Contribute in providing solutions to work related problems.
* Lead the design and implementation of cloud hosting architectures that support business scalability and performance requirements.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure smooth migration and transformation of legacy systems to cloud environments.
* Continuously evaluate emerging cloud technologies and recommend improvements to enhance hosting solutions.
* Support junior team members by providing guidance and sharing best practices to foster professional growth.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in SAP BTP Application Development.
* Experience in designing and deploying cloud\-native applications using SAP Business Technology Platform.
* Strong knowledge of cloud infrastructure, including private and public cloud services.
* Ability to architect scalable, secure, and high\-performance hosting solutions.
* Familiarity with migration strategies and tools for legacy system transformation.
* Competence in integrating cloud solutions with existing enterprise systems and workflows.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in SAP BTP Application Development.
* This position is based at our Hyderabad office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

7789b120.title: Enterprise Architect
7789b120.description:
**Job Description**
 This is a Senior role within the MCO architecture team. The role is responsible for the evolution of the architecture across components of the MCOs solutions.
   

  

 In this role, you will assess MCOs needs across the MCO Platform and solutions, working with and across Teams to evolve the architecture and design solutions to meet business needs. Developing a strategy to evolve our solution architecture as needed to enable growth and expansion of our platform. Working closely with the architecture, engineering and product management teams to ensure solutions match our current and future needs, and working within the constraints of our business and existing technology.
   

  

**Job Requirements**
* The role requires over 14 years of IT experience, with at least 5 years in an Architect capacity focused on enterprise SaaS applications
* Minimum 10 years of experience with Java EE/OLTP solutions
* A degree in Engineering/Computer Science or equivalent by experience
* Must have strong practical experience of designing and implementing business application solutions, across a range of stacks/vendors
* Must have hands on experience with monolithic Java EE solutions, ideally with experience in migration to componentized (Macro Services) architectures
* Must have experience working with AWS
+ Must experience designing solutions to meet non\-functional requirements and helping teams to address issues where non\-functional issues arise.

* Must have strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to share technical information to both technical and non\-technical audiences
* A self\-starter, with a passion for technology and the drive to share your knowledge with the wider team
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies
* Ideally have Oracle database experience
* Preferable with experience Business Process Engineering in organizations that are driven to constantly improve


**Job Responsibilities**
* Work with the architecture, engineering and product management teams to evolve the architecture and design solutions
* Design and review cloud architecture changes to ensure they meet of MCO’s functional and non\-functional requirements
* Contribute to the overall strategy and vision for the evolution of our solutions
* Work with the rest of the architecture team, to ensure the quality, performance, and overall suitability of the continued evolution of the MCO solutions
* Assess vendors/technologies against MCOs strategic needs
* Develop detailed architectures/designs for the implementation of the solutions
* Work with the engineering teams to enable them to effectively refine and implement the solution
* As a senior technical leader in the Hyderabad centre, work with VP and Managing Director of MCO India, leading the growth and development of this centre and its people
* Work to increase understanding of good engineering practices across the MCO organization, acting as a domain expert/thought leader to drive best practice.

7745c996.title: Solution Engineering
7745c996.description:
**At Chain IQ, your ideas move fast.**
 Chain IQ is a global AI\-driven Procurement Service Partner, headquartered in Baar, Switzerland, with operations across main centers and 16 offices worldwide. We provide tailored, end\-to\-end procurement solutions that enable transformation, drive scalability, and deliver substantial reductions in our clients' indirect spend. Our culture is built on innovation, entrepreneurship, ownership, and impact. Here, your voice matters \- bold thinking is encouraged, and action follows ambition.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a Solutions Engineering Expert, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and delivering enterprise solutions and process optimization within an Integration team. The role focuses on solution engineering, combining workflow orchestration, secure integration, standardization and apply DevSecOps principles to build scalable and efficient integration systems. You will contribute to the organization’s modernization journey by developing config\-driven solutions that align with Zero Trust security principles and responsible practices.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Solution Design \& Delivery
* Design and develop secure, scalable, and modular solutions that enable automation and process optimization.
* Build and maintain config\-driven systems to streamline operations and improve efficiency.
* Develop proofs of concept (POCs) to test new technologies and validate implementation approaches.
* Ensure all designs comply with Zero Trust principles, secure identity management, and data protection standards.
* Demonstrated proficiency in building end\-to\-end integration solutions on the Microsoft Azure platform.
* Champions engineering excellence by defining best practices, standard frameworks, and governance models aligned with industry standards and organizational goals.
* Governance, Security \& Collaboration
* Partner with business, data, platform and client teams to translate requirements into robust, maintainable solutions.
* Produce and maintain solution documentation, including technical designs and operational procedures.
* Maintain compliance with enterprise security and governance standards (SOC 2, GDPR, RBAC).
* Take full ownership of deployment strategy and execution, ensuring standardized review practices, automated template\-driven releases, and reliable pipeline operations across environments.


**Requirements**
 We are seeking candidates with:
   

  

* 10\+ years of experience in solution engineering, integration, system architecture, and enterprise system delivery.
* Proven ability to identify and develop integration requirements by analysing business processes and needs.
* Expertise in designing and implementing scalable solutions.
* Drive a design\-led development approach, emphasizing upfront solution architecture, technical design documentation, and alignment with enterprise standards.
* Hands\-on experience with Azure integration stack (Function App, Logic App, APIM, Service Bus, etc.) for secure and connected systems.
* Proficiency in .NET, C\#, SQL and with experience developing REST APIs and backend services.
* Strong understanding of Zero Trust architecture and secure design principles for identity, access, and data protection.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and Azure DevOps, Github practices for solution deployment and maintenance.
* Exposure to Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or Bicep for automated and repeatable environment provisioning.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to design, troubleshoot, and optimize distributed systems.
* Excellent collaboration and communication skills across business, architecture, and platform teams.
* Demonstrated history of upskilling and adapting to new technology trends (e.g., certifications, personal projects, or contributions in nascent technology areas).
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
* Certified for Azure integration, DevSecOps and/or IaC.


**Join a truly global team.**
 We offer a dynamic and international environment where high performance meets real purpose. We're proud to be Great Place to Work\-certified and even prouder of the people who make that possible. Let’s shape the future of procurement \- together.
   

  

**Chain IQ – Create. Lead. Make an impact.**
*Information for agencies:* 
*Applications sent or uploaded by placement agencies or similar are not desired, will therefore not be considered and will be deleted.*

a15c1715.title: Integration Architect
a15c1715.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Integration Architect
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Architect an end\-to\-end integration solution. Drive client discussions to define the integration requirements and translate the business requirements to the technology solution. Activities include mapping business processes to support applications, defining the data entities, selecting integration technology components and patterns, and designing the integration architecture.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 SAP Basis Administration
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As an Integration Architect, you will be responsible for architecting an end\-to\-end integration solution. Your typical day will involve engaging with clients to understand their integration requirements, translating these business needs into effective technology solutions, and mapping business processes to support applications. You will also define data entities, select appropriate integration technology components and patterns, and design the overall integration architecture to ensure seamless connectivity and functionality across systems.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:

* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.

* Facilitate workshops with stakeholders to gather and analyze integration requirements.

 Professional \& Technical Skills:

* Strong understanding of integration patterns and technologies.
* Experience with middleware solutions and data transformation tools.
* Ability to design and implement secure and scalable integration solutions.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in SAP Basis Administration.
* This position is based in Pune.
* A 15 years full time education is required.
