685b4d92.title: Solution Architect, Solution Engineering(Java Backend, AWS)
685b4d92.description:
JR0130806
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
 The Solution Architect – Solution Engineering is responsible for designing scalable, secure, and resilient technology solutions across digital banking, wallets, cards, and payment platforms. This role provides technical leadership in solution design, translates business requirements into architecture and implementation patterns, and ensures alignment with enterprise standards, engineering best practices, and regulatory requirements.
   

  

**Solution Architecture \& Design**
* Design end\-to\-end solutions for digital banking, wallet, card issuing/processing, and payment platforms.
* Define application, integration, and data architectures that support business and operational objectives.
* Design cloud\-native solutions on AWS with a focus on scalability, resiliency, security, and performance.
* Develop API\-first and event\-driven architectures supporting real\-time and batch transaction processing.
* Define integration patterns across channels, orchestration layers, domain services, partner platforms, ledger, and settlement systems.
* Produce architecture artifacts, solution diagrams, interface specifications, and technical design documentation.
* Participate in architecture reviews and ensure compliance with enterprise architecture, security, and governance standards.


**Banking \& Payments Domain Expertise**
* Apply domain knowledge across:
+ Digital Banking platforms
+ Wallet and stored\-value systems
+ Card issuing, authorization, clearing, and settlement
+ Domestic and cross\-border payment systems

* Design solutions supporting transaction processing, funds management, reconciliation, settlement, and accounting requirements.
* Ensure architectures address regulatory, compliance, audit, and operational needs.
* Collaborate with Product, Operations, Risk, Compliance, and partner teams to define solution requirements and controls.


**Technical Leadership \& Engineering Support**
* Provide technical guidance to engineering teams throughout the development lifecycle.
* Review designs, code implementation approaches, and integration strategies to ensure architectural alignment.
* Identify and mitigate architectural, performance, scalability, and operational risks.
* Promote engineering best practices, reusable design patterns, and technology standards.
* Support production readiness, observability, resiliency, and operational excellence initiatives.


**Role Requirements**
**Technical**
* Strong experience designing cloud\-native solutions on AWS, including:
+ Compute (EC2, ECS/EKS, Lambda)
+ API \& Integration (API Gateway, Event Bridge, SQS, SNS)
+ Data (RDS, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB)
+ Security \& Monitoring (IAM, CloudWatch, CloudTrail)

* Experience designing API\-driven and event\-based architecture.
* 7\+ Years of strong software architecture design skills.
* Strong experience in Java programming including, Servlets, JDBC, JMS, Spring, Spring JDBC, JEE \& Eclipse IDE.
* Knowledge of relational (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra) databases.
* Strong understanding of microservices, distributed systems, scalability, and resiliency patterns.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure\-as\-code.
* Ability to create architecture documentation, solution diagrams, and technical specifications.


**Domain**
* 5\+ years of experience in banking, fintech, or payments technology.
* Experience with Digital Banking, Wallets, Cards, and Payments platforms.
* Understanding of payment processing lifecycles, ledgering, settlement, reconciliation, and financial transaction flows.
* Experience working within regulated environments and compliance frameworks.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* AWS certifications (Solutions Architect or equivalent).
* Experience modernizing legacy banking or payment platforms.
* Familiarity with event\-driven architecture, Kafka, and cloud\-native integration patterns.


**Work Shift**
 Western Union values in\-person collaboration, problem solving, and ideation whenever possible. We believe this fosters common ways of working and supports how we execute initiatives for our customers. The expectation is to work from the office a minimum of three days a week.
   

  

**Benefits**
**BENEFITS AND OTHER DETAILS**
 You will also have access to short\-term incentives, multiple health insurance options, accident and life
   

  

 insurance, and access to best\-in\-class development platforms, to name a few. Please see the benefits below specific to your country. If applicable, additional role\-specific benefits will be mentioned during your interview process or in an offer of employment.
   

  

**Your India Specific Benefits Include**
* Employees Provident Fund \[EPF]
* Gratuity Payment
* Public holidays
* Annual Leave, Sick leave, Compensatory leave, and Maternity / Paternity leave
* Annual Health Checkup
* Hospitalization Insurance Coverage (Mediclaim)
* Group Life Insurance, Group Personal Accident Insurance Coverage, Business Travel Insurance
* Cab Facility
* Relocation Benefit


**Other Details**
 As part of the application process, all applicants are required to take assessments. Western Union has partnered with a 3rd party provider to administer these tests. Applicants will need to provide their name and email address in order to process the assessments. If you have any questions, you may reach out to careers@westernunion.com.
   

  

 We are passionate about honoring our employee's identity and fostering a feeling of belonging. Our commitment is to provide an inclusive culture that celebrates the unique backgrounds and perspectives of our global teams while reflecting the communities we serve. We do not discriminate based on race, color, national origin, religion, political affiliation, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, marital status, or veteran status. The company will provide accommodation to applicants, including those with disabilities, during the recruitment process, following applicable laws.
   

  

**Estimated Job Posting End Date**
 07\-21\-2026
   

  

 This application window is a good\-faith estimate of the time that this posting will remain open. This posting will be promptly updated if the deadline is extended or the role is filled.

5470b05b.title: Architect
5470b05b.description:
**Job Summary**
 Architect role in a hybrid work model focusing on design and delivery of scalable enterprise applications using Core Java Spring Framework Spring Boot and Maven within the cards and payments domain. The architect will ensure robust solution design compliance with security and regulatory standards and seamless integration with complex payment ecosystems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design end to end application architectures for cards and payments platforms that are secure scalable and optimized for high transaction volumes in a hybrid work environment.
* Develop reference implementations using Core Java Spring Framework Spring Boot and Maven to demonstrate best practices for reusable components and modular services.
* Guide solution design to ensure that card issuance authorization clearing and settlement flows are modeled with high reliability and compliance to industry regulations and company standards.
* Collaborate with product managers and business stakeholders to translate cards and payments requirements into technical solutions that improve customer experience and operational efficiency.
* Review application code and configuration for services built on Spring Boot and Maven to ensure strict adherence to coding guidelines performance targets and security baselines.
* Optimize integration patterns for external payment networks and internal systems by defining clear contracts error handling strategies and monitoring approaches that reduce downtime.
* Define non functional requirements for latency throughput resilience and observability and ensure these are met through thoughtful use of Core Java concurrency and Spring Framework features.
* Coordinate with quality engineering teams to define test strategies including unit integration performance and regression tests that validate complex cards and payments scenarios.
* Produce detailed architectural documentation and solution diagrams that clearly describe service boundaries data flows and deployment topologies for distributed applications.
* Evaluate existing applications in the cards and payments portfolio to identify modernization opportunities that simplify maintenance and reduce long term technology risk.
* Mentor developers and technical analysts by explaining architectural decisions reviewing designs and promoting continuous improvement in engineering practices and tools.
* Engage with security and compliance teams to incorporate standards for encryption tokenization data privacy and auditability directly into the application architecture.
* Partner with operations and site reliability teams to define deployment strategies capacity plans and monitoring dashboards that support stable day shift operations without travel requirements.


**Qualifications**
* Demonstrate strong hands on expertise in Core Java with a solid understanding of object oriented design collections concurrency and performance tuning for enterprise scale systems.
* Exhibit deep experience with Spring Framework and Spring Boot for building microservices dependency injection data access layers and robust application configuration.
* Apply advanced proficiency with Maven for dependency management build automation and multi module project structures that support complex enterprise applications.
* Show proven experience in cards and payments including transaction lifecycle messaging standards risk controls and integration with payment networks and internal banking systems.
* Utilize experience of at least nine years in software architecture or senior engineering roles with a focus on end to end design and delivery of large scale platforms.
* Demonstrate ability to work effectively in a hybrid work model by using collaborative tools documentation and clear communication to keep distributed teams aligned.
* Leverage strong problem solving and analytical skills to investigate production incidents in cards and payments systems and drive sustainable architectural improvements.

4163956c.title: Solution Engineering
4163956c.description:
**At Chain IQ, your ideas move fast.**
 Chain IQ is a global AI\-driven Procurement Service Partner, headquartered in Baar, Switzerland, with operations across main centers and 16 offices worldwide. We provide tailored, end\-to\-end procurement solutions that enable transformation, drive scalability, and deliver substantial reductions in our clients' indirect spend. Our culture is built on innovation, entrepreneurship, ownership, and impact. Here, your voice matters \- bold thinking is encouraged, and action follows ambition.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a Solutions Engineering Expert, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and delivering enterprise solutions and process optimization within an Integration team. The role focuses on solution engineering, combining workflow orchestration, secure integration, standardization and apply DevSecOps principles to build scalable and efficient integration systems. You will contribute to the organization’s modernization journey by developing config\-driven solutions that align with Zero Trust security principles and responsible practices.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Solution Design \& Delivery
* Design and develop secure, scalable, and modular solutions that enable automation and process optimization.
* Build and maintain config\-driven systems to streamline operations and improve efficiency.
* Develop proofs of concept (POCs) to test new technologies and validate implementation approaches.
* Ensure all designs comply with Zero Trust principles, secure identity management, and data protection standards.
* Demonstrated proficiency in building end\-to\-end integration solutions on the Microsoft Azure platform.
* Champions engineering excellence by defining best practices, standard frameworks, and governance models aligned with industry standards and organizational goals.
* Governance, Security \& Collaboration
* Partner with business, data, platform and client teams to translate requirements into robust, maintainable solutions.
* Produce and maintain solution documentation, including technical designs and operational procedures.
* Maintain compliance with enterprise security and governance standards (SOC 2, GDPR, RBAC).
* Take full ownership of deployment strategy and execution, ensuring standardized review practices, automated template\-driven releases, and reliable pipeline operations across environments.


**Requirements**
 We are seeking candidates with:
   

  

* 10\+ years of experience in solution engineering, integration, system architecture, and enterprise system delivery.
* Proven ability to identify and develop integration requirements by analysing business processes and needs.
* Expertise in designing and implementing scalable solutions.
* Drive a design\-led development approach, emphasizing upfront solution architecture, technical design documentation, and alignment with enterprise standards.
* Hands\-on experience with Azure integration stack (Function App, Logic App, APIM, Service Bus, etc.) for secure and connected systems.
* Proficiency in .NET, C\#, SQL and with experience developing REST APIs and backend services.
* Strong understanding of Zero Trust architecture and secure design principles for identity, access, and data protection.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and Azure DevOps, Github practices for solution deployment and maintenance.
* Exposure to Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform or Bicep for automated and repeatable environment provisioning.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to design, troubleshoot, and optimize distributed systems.
* Excellent collaboration and communication skills across business, architecture, and platform teams.
* Demonstrated history of upskilling and adapting to new technology trends (e.g., certifications, personal projects, or contributions in nascent technology areas).
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
* Certified for Azure integration, DevSecOps and/or IaC.


**Join a truly global team.**
 We offer a dynamic and international environment where high performance meets real purpose. We're proud to be Great Place to Work\-certified and even prouder of the people who make that possible. Let’s shape the future of procurement \- together.
   

  

**Chain IQ – Create. Lead. Make an impact.**
*Information for agencies:* 
*Applications sent or uploaded by placement agencies or similar are not desired, will therefore not be considered and will be deleted.*

f0272db7.title: Solutions Architect
f0272db7.description:
**About the Company** 




  





 Greeting from LTM!!! We are thrilled to announce an exciting opportunity for the role of AI Technical Architect. We are on the lookout for exceptional candidates who can join us within an immediate to 30 days' time. If you are passionate about this field and eager to take on new challenges, we would love to hear from you! This is a fantastic chance to become a part of our dynamic team and contribute to our projects with your expertise and skills.
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 AI Architect (15\+ Years Experience) Azure AI \& Power Platform Architect (Copilot Studio) Role Overview We are seeking a highly experienced Azure AI \& Power Platform Architect with 15\+ years of IT experience and deep hands\-on expertise in Azure, Generative AI, and Microsoft Power Platform. The ideal candidate will lead architecture design, guide engineering teams, and deliver intelligent automation and copilot solutions using Microsoft Copilot Studio and modern AI/LLM capabilities. This role requires strong stakeholder management, technical leadership, and the ability to design scalable, secure, and enterprise\-grade cloud and hybrid solutions.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




  




* **Solution Architecture \& Technical Leadership**
* Architect, design, and implement scalable solutions across on\-premises, cloud, and hybrid environments
* Provide technical governance, mentoring, and hands\-on leadership to engineering teams
* Drive architecture decisions ensuring performance, scalability, reliability, and security
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define and deliver complex technical solutions
* 
* **Copilot Studio \& AI Solution Development**
* Design, build, and maintain intelligent copilots using Microsoft Copilot Studio
* Topics, entity extraction, actions, generative answers
* 
* Develop LLM\-powered applications leveraging:
* Azure OpenAI
* Prompt engineering techniques (few\-shot, instructions, grounding)
* Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with vector databases
* 
* Fine\-tune and customize pre\-trained AI models
* Implement AI solutions using Form Recognizer, Cognitive Search, and vector stores
* 
* **Power Platform Architecture**
* Design and build:
* Power Automate flows (cloud \& desktop)
* Canvas Apps and Model\-driven applications
* 
* Architect Dataverse data models (tables, relationships, business rules)
* Implement Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) using Azure DevOps/GitHub
* Build enterprise\-grade automation solutions leveraging Power Platform components
* 
* **Integration \& Enterprise Connectivity**
* Design and implement integrations using:
* REST APIs, Azure Functions, Graph API
* Dataverse and Power Platform connectors
* Third\-party systems (SAP, ServiceNow, Salesforce, etc.)
* 
* Develop and manage custom connectors
* Ensure secure integration using:
* OAuth2, Azure AD authentication
* API throttling and exception handling best practices
* 
* **Microsoft Graph \& M365 Automation**
* Integrate with Microsoft Graph API to manage:
* Users, groups
* Mail \& calendar
* Files and drives
* Teams and collaboration data
* 
* Build Graph\-enabled automation within Power Automate and Copilot solutions
* 
* **Data Engineering \& AI Engineering**
* Apply best practices in:
* AI data engineering
* Large data processing and pipelines
* 
* Work with Python and PySpark for large\-scale data transformation
* Implement model deployment, monitoring, and lifecycle practices (MLOps / LLMOps)
* 
* **Enablement \& Stakeholder Engagement**
* Deliver technical upskilling sessions and workshops to customers
* Build strong customer relationships and act as a trusted technical advisor
* Prepare and present solution architecture presentations
* Facilitate consensus across technical and business stakeholders



  





  





**Qualifications** 




  




* **Required Skills \& Experience**
* Core Requirements
* 15\+ years of IT experience with minimum 5 years of hands\-on Azure experience
* Proven experience in architecting and governing technical teams
* Strong expertise in:
* Azure AI Services (OpenAI, Cognitive Services)
* Power Platform (Copilot Studio, Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse)
* Prompt engineering and LLM design patterns
* 
* Hands\-on experience with:
* Generative AI model deployment and fine\-tuning
* Vector databases and semantic search
* 
* Programming: Python, PySpark
* Flexibility to work in shifts as required
* 
* **Secondary Skills**
* Experience with MLOps and LLMOps frameworks
* Exposure to enterprise\-scale AI/ML deployment pipeline



  





 Interested candidates can share their profiles to Pooja.Jawalekar2@ltimindtree.com

9c66ccf1.title: ServiceNow ITSM Solution Architect
9c66ccf1.description:
**Company Description** 
 Uno Gravitas Consultants is a team of business experts focused on delivering customized solutions aligned with client needs. The firm provides consulting services that help organizations become high\-performing, scalable, and sustainable enterprises. Its solutions have demonstrated success across multiple industries and at various stages of growth. Uno Gravitas Consultants brings deep industry and domain expertise, with hands\-on leadership and global entrepreneurial experience, offering practical and strategic guidance to clients.
   

**Role Description** 
 The ServiceNow ITSM Solution Architect will design, configure, and optimize ServiceNow ITSM solutions to meet client requirements and best practices. Responsibilities include leading requirements workshops, translating business needs into technical designs, and overseeing implementation and integration activities across ITSM modules. The architect will collaborate closely with stakeholders, project managers, and technical teams to ensure solution quality, performance, and alignment with organizational processes. This is a contract, on\-site role based in India, requiring direct engagement with client teams and participation in governance, documentation, and knowledge transfer activities.
   

**Qualifications**
* Strong expertise in ServiceNow ITSM architecture, including design of incident, problem, change, request, CMDB, and service catalog modules.
* Hands\-on experience in ServiceNow configuration and development, including workflows, business rules, integrations, and automation.
* Solid understanding of ITIL/ITSM processes and frameworks, with experience translating business processes into ServiceNow solutions.
* Ability to conduct requirements gathering, solution design workshops, and create clear technical and functional documentation.
* Experience working with cross\-functional teams, including business stakeholders, developers, and project managers, in consulting or enterprise environments.
* Relevant certifications such as ServiceNow Certified System Administrator, ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist (ITSM), and ITIL Foundation are highly beneficial.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to work on\-site in India and manage multiple priorities within contract timelines.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

004e9dad.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer - SRE, Multi Cloud, Exp: 7-12 Yrs
004e9dad.description:
**Meet the Team**
 Join the founding SRE team building Cisco’s next\-generation multi\-cloud fabric (MCF) platform from the ground up. We are a high\-impact, 17\-person global team (spanning the US, Europe and India) dedicated to ensuring the reliability of a platform designed to handle billions of daily transactions across multiple global regions. You will collaborate closely with Backend, DevOps, and QA teams to pioneer the future of multi\-cloud connectivity.
   

  

**Your Impact**
 As a Senior SRE, you will be instrumental in the MCF Beta launch scheduled for Q3 2026\. You will design observability systems, optimize performance, and ensure the platform operates with 99\.9%\+ reliability across AWS, Azure, and GCP. This role offers the exciting opportunity to build self\-healing infrastructure and AI\-powered operations for a brand\-new, large\-scale networking platform.
   

  

* Build Reliable Infrastructure: Design and operate highly available infrastructure across AWS (EKS), Azure (AKS), and GCP (GKE) regions.
* Observability \& Monitoring: Architect comprehensive monitoring, alerting, and dashboards using Prometheus, Thanos, and Grafana.
* AI\-Powered SRE: Build MCP servers and AI agents to detect anomalies, automate troubleshooting, and enable self\-healing.
* Automation Excellence: Write Python/Go code to automate operations, reduce manual toil, and improve system efficiency.
* Incident Response: Lead incident response, conduct root cause analysis (RCA), and participate in a 24x7 on\-call rotation to ensure 24/7 uptime.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* 7\-12 years of experience in SRE, DevOps, or infrastructure engineering with a focus on reliability at scale.
* Proficiency in programming with Python or Go.
* Expertise in Linux internals (networking, filesystems, memory management) and container orchestration (Kubernetes/EKS/AKS/GKE).
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform, Terragrunt or Ansible and public cloud providers (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
* Willingness to participate in a 24x7 on\-call rotation.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Strong understanding of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP stack, BGP, IPsec, VPN).
* Experience managing multi\-cloud operations across AWS, Azure, and GCP simultaneously.
* Knowledge of high\-performance networking or VPP (Vector Packet Processing).
* Experience with secrets management (IAM roles, RBAC, service accounts).
* Familiarity with building AI\-native SRE tools or MCP server development.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

a16d783d.title: Solutions Architect
a16d783d.description:
**About Us** 




 We are building a team to deliver foundational Customer Data Platform (CDP) use cases in just 45 days.
 



 Our approach is fast, structured, and client\-centric—designed to bring clarity, predictability, and results under pressure.
 



 We’re hiring a
 **Solutions Architect** 
 to orchestrate these 45\-day missions—and beyond.
 



 This isn’t a typical project manager role.
 



**What You’ll Do** 



* **Translate business → technical.** 
 Take vague goals (“We want onboarding emails”) and turn them into schemas, flows, and measurable success criteria.
* **Design the tracking plan→** 
 Events, traits, identity stitching, naming conventions—no one writes a line of code before you say “ready.”
* **Validate the flow→** 
 Use Segment debugger, staging/prod checks, and QA logs to prove events flow from source → Segment → destination.
* **Draw the map→** 
 System diagrams anyone can understand—from a VP of Marketing to a junior engineer.
* **Overcommunicate→** 
 Document every decision in Notion/Confluence. Update Trello/Jira like it’s gospel. No silent work.
* **Collaborate→** 
 Partner with the Engagement Lead, Engineers, QA, and client stakeholders daily. Your clarity \= their velocity.
* **Ship outcomes→** 
 45 days → validated foundational use case in production, documented, and signed off.



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Build \& maintain tracking plans and identity models.
* Enforce schema conventions and event validation rules.
* Run technical deep\-dives with clients to uncover hidden dependencies.
* Review dev instrumentation, flag violations, and unblock quickly.
* Deliver diagrams, schemas, and documentation that survive team reshuffles.
* Support QA by validating flows, identity stitching, and consent/privacy rules.
* Ensure acceptance criteria are always measurable, always tested.



**What We’re Looking For** 




**Minimum Requirements** 



* Experience designing/implementing data/analytics or martech solutions.
* Hands\-on skills with Segment (or similar CDP), event schemas, and identity resolution.
* Comfort with debugging event payloads and validating against schema.
* Strong ability to explain technical systems in plain English.
* Tools fluency: Segment Debugger, Trello/Jira/Linear, Notion/Confluence, Slack/Email, diagramming tools (Whimsical/Excalidraw).



**Bonus Points** 



* Prior CDP implementations (Segment preferred).
* Familiarity with GA4, Amplitude, Snowflake, Looker, or other destinations.
* Experience working on tight 4–6 week implementation timelines.
* Building checklists, templates, or playbooks for repeatable work.



**The Mindset We Hire For** 



* Schema first, code later.
* Detail\-obsessed but pragmatic.
* You don’t guess — you validate.
* You document as if you might be replaced tomorrow (zero knowledge loss).
* You get a kick out of catching schema violations.
* When blocked, you don’t stop — you reroute.



**Tools You’ll Use** 




 Segment Debugger, Trello/Jira/Linear, Slack, Notion/Confluence, Excalidraw/Whimsical, GA4/Amplitude/Snowflake/Looker, and Zoom/Meet.
 



 Rule of thumb: If it’s not on the board, it doesn’t exist. If it’s not documented, it didn’t happen.
 



**How to Apply** 




 We don’t hire off resumes alone. We hire off how you approach, how you execute, and how you communicate under pressure.
 



 Here’s what to do: Complete our
 **Solution Architect Exercise** 
 – https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bAYKtiAjtEm2Eu6RPztDbXiDXJOf42nbHv466TA0o7c/edit?usp\=sharing
 



**\[Please copy and paste the given link to access the exercise document.]** 




 We care about clarity, rhythm, and spark—not polish.
 



 Email everything to
 **onboardwithtwilio@datadrone.biz** 
 with the subject line:
 **“CDP Solution Architect – \[Your Name].”** 




 We’ll review submissions on a rolling basis. If you crush it, you’ll hear from us fast.

bfafef57.title: Cloud Network Architect
bfafef57.description:
**ECI** 
 is the leading global provider of managed services, cybersecurity, and business transformation for mid\-market financial services organizations across the globe. From its unmatched range of services, ECI provides stability, security and improved business performance, freeing clients from technology concerns and enabling them to focus on running their businesses. More than 1,000 customers worldwide with over $3 trillion of assets under management put their trust in ECI.
   

  

 At ECI, we believe success is driven by passion and purpose. Our passion for technology is only surpassed by
 **our commitment to empowering our employees around the world** 
 .
   

  

**The Opportunity:**
 ECI has an exciting opportunity for a Cloud Network Architect position to support several of our client's cloud infrastructure and networking systems. Ensuring client satisfaction is our highest priority, and all available positions are customer\-facing, requiring exceptional communication and interpersonal skills. A professional, strong work ethic, and a positive attitude are essential for success in this role. Candidates must demonstrate fluency in English, both written and verbal, and exhibit the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear, client\-friendly solutions.
   

  

 This is
 **Hybrid** 
 position.
   

  

**What you will do:**
* Understand business requirements and convert them to technical design for implementation.
* Develop and maintain cloud network architectures that support enterprise applications, services, and workloads across public, private, and hybrid cloud platforms.
* Ensure reliable interconnectivity between on\-premises infrastructure, cloud environments, and third\-party services. Strong communication, analytical, and troubleshoot skills.
* Monitor and enhance network performance, scalability, and cost efficiency through automation and advanced cloud\-native tools.
* Implement robust network security frameworks, including firewalls, VPNs, identity management, and compliance with industry standards.
* Work independently as individual contributor with minimum or no help.
* Lead end\-to\-end cloud network design reviews (HLD/LLD), produce implementation runbooks, and enforce architecture standards and best practices.
* Own cloud network governance: IP addressing strategy, subnetting/VPC design, routing domains, DNS design, tagging/standards, and change control.
* Drive incident/problem management for network issues across cloud and hybrid connectivity, including root\-cause analysis (RCA) and continuous improvement.
* Partner with security, platform, and application teams to integrate network controls (segmentation, egress filtering, private endpoints) and meet regulatory requirements.
* Manage and coordinate third\-party providers (ISPs/carriers, firewall/WAF vendors) for circuits, cloud interconnects, and managed services; validate SLAs and delivery timelines.
* Build and maintain Infrastructure\-as\-Code patterns and CI/CD workflows for network changes (peer review, automated validation, drift detection, and rollback plans).
* Perform network cost optimization (FinOps) by right\-sizing gateways/firewalls, optimizing data transfer, and selecting appropriate connectivity patterns.
* Follow Agile Methodology (SCRUM).


**Who you are:**
* Experience: 10\+ years in IT infrastructure or networking, with at least 5 years focused on cloud networking architecture.
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Client\-Facing Skills: Strong communication and interpersonal abilities to engage directly with clients, explain complex technical concepts clearly, and build trusted relationships.
* Professionalism: Positive attitude, rigorous work habits, and ability to thrive in high\-pressure, customer\-facing environments.
* Language: Fluency in English, both written and verbal, is mandatory.
* Leadership: Ability to mentor junior engineers, lead technical discussions, and drive architectural decisions.
* Certifications (Preferred): CCNP/CCIE, AWS Advanced Networking, Azure Network Engineer Associate, or equivalent cloud/security certifications.
* Operational Excellence: Experience with change management, incident response, post\-incident reviews, and producing clear technical documentation/runbooks.
* Problem\-Solving: Analytical mindset with a focus on designing secure, scalable, and cost\-effective solutions.


**ECI’s culture is all about connection** 
 \- connection with our clients, our technology and most importantly with each other. In addition to working with an amazing team around the world, ECI also offers a competitive compensation package and so much more! If you believe you would be a great fit and are ready for your best job ever,
 **we would like to hear from you!**
**Love Your Job, Share Your Technology Passion, Create Your Future Here!**

466e4a07.title: Solution Architect - Data and Analytics 4C
466e4a07.description:
Solution Architect \- Data and Analytics**Ready to turn bold ideas into real\-world impact?**  

 At Genpact, we don’t just adapt to change, we lead it. AI and digital innovation are transforming the way businesses work, and we’re at the forefront of it. Genpact’s AI Gigafactory, our industry\-first accelerator, exemplifies how we scale advanced technology solutions to help global enterprises work smarter, grow faster, and transform at scale. Whether tackling complex challenges through large\-scale models or agentic AI, our breakthrough solutions tackle companies’ most complex challenges.  

  

If you thrive in a fast\-moving, innovation\-driven environment, love building and deploying cutting\-edge AI solutions, and want to push the boundaries of what’s possible, this is your moment.  

  

Genpact (NYSE: G) is an agentic and advanced technology solutions company. We leverage process intelligence and artificial intelligence to deliver measurable outcomes. With a strong partner ecosystem and decades of client trust, we provide innovative solutions that transform how businesses run. Powered by a team with an active learning mindset and client centricity at its core, we deliver lasting value for the world’s leading enterprises.  

 Get to know us at genpact.com and on LinkedIn, YouTube, X, and Facebook.

**Job Description**


As a Senior Integration Solution Architect, you will be a vital Associate within our global digital technologies team. Our mission is to move past traditional "technical\-only" integration and build a team of Segment Domain Experts. In this role, you will not just connect systems; you will deeply immerse yourself in the operational logic of our distinct business segments to design a seamless digital fabric that connects our global supply chains, factories, brand operations, and retail partners.

**The Five Principles in Action for This Role**
-----------------------------------------------

* Quality: You will champion the delivery of robust, highly reliable, and secure integration solutions. By holding yourself and your partners to uncompromising standards, you will ensure our digital transactions flow flawlessly across our global value chain.
* Responsibility: You will take ownership of the integration landscape and proactively build your domain expertise. You will assume responsibility for defining best\-practice design patterns, safeguarding our data, and mentoring junior Associates to help them grow.
* Mutuality: You will design integration frameworks with a "win\-win" mindset. By understanding the commercial realities of our segments, you will ensure our systems operate seamlessly for us, our external retail partners, global suppliers, and third\-party logistics providers.
* Efficiency: You will optimize our integration footprint, avoiding redundant custom builds by maximizing platform capabilities. Through API\-led connectivity, reusable microservices, and automated workflows, you will help us deliver faster and with fewer resources.
* Freedom: Backed by our long\-term generational perspective, you will have the creative freedom to innovate, experiment, and implement forward\-looking, event\-driven architectures that shape the future of our digital ecosystem.

 **Quality:** You will champion the delivery of robust, highly reliable, and secure integration solutions. By holding yourself and your partners to uncompromising standards, you will ensure our digital transactions flow flawlessly across our global value chain.

**Responsibility:** You will take ownership of the integration landscape and proactively build your domain expertise. You will assume responsibility for defining best\-practice design patterns, safeguarding our data, and mentoring junior Associates to help them grow.

**Mutuality:** You will design integration frameworks with a "win\-win" mindset. By understanding the commercial realities of our segments, you will ensure our systems operate seamlessly for us, our external retail partners, global suppliers, and third\-party logistics providers.

**Efficiency:** You will optimize our integration footprint, avoiding redundant custom builds by maximizing platform capabilities. Through API\-led connectivity, reusable microservices, and automated workflows, you will help us deliver faster and with fewer resources.

**Freedom:** Backed by our long\-term generational perspective, you will have the creative freedom to innovate, experiment, and implement forward\-looking, event\-driven architectures that shape the future of our digital ecosystem.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

### **1\. Integration Strategy \& Domain Architecture (Freedom \& Quality)**

* Define, design, and govern enterprise\-grade integration architectures across our hybrid\-cloud ecosystem, ensuring high availability, fault tolerance, and low latency.
* Act as a Segment Domain Expert: Deeply understand the business processes, data flows, and operational nuances of our core business segments (e.g., Petcare, Snacking, Food) to design integrations that solve real business problems.
* Architect end\-to\-end integration flows connecting core enterprise systems, including ERPs (SAP S/4HANA), CRMs (Salesforce), Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), and Retail POS systems.
* Champion API\-Led Connectivity and Event\-Driven Architecture (EDA) as the foundational paradigms for global business operations.
* Establish reusable integration patterns, templates, and frameworks that accelerate time\-to\-market for digital initiatives across different business units.

### **2\. Technology Leadership \& Platform Governance (Efficiency \& Quality)**

* Provide deep architectural expertise and hands\-on design leadership across our core integration platforms:

  

SAP BTP Integration Suite (SAP BTP IS): Lead core ERP and cloud line\-of\-business integrations (e.g., Cloud Integration, API Management).  

Azure Integration Services (Azure IS): Drive cloud\-native workflows, event routing, and messaging using Logic Apps, Service Bus, Event Grid, and Azure API Management.  

MuleSoft Anypoint Platform: Govern API portfolios, design reusable RAML/OAS specs, and establish robust runtime engine deployments (CloudHub/hybrid).  

Solace PubSub\+: Design and implement real\-time, high\-performance event brokers and streaming frameworks for globally distributed supply chain and manufacturing operations.  

OpenText: Architect secure, high\-volume B2B integration networks and EDI systems to support transactional exchanges with global retailers and logistics partners.* Collaborate with DevOps and Platform squads to implement modern, automated CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and infrastructure\-as\-code for integration deployments.
* SAP BTP Integration Suite (SAP BTP IS): Lead core ERP and cloud line\-of\-business integrations (e.g., Cloud Integration, API Management).
* Azure Integration Services (Azure IS): Drive cloud\-native workflows, event routing, and messaging using Logic Apps, Service Bus, Event Grid, and Azure API Management.
* MuleSoft Anypoint Platform: Govern API portfolios, design reusable RAML/OAS specs, and establish robust runtime engine deployments (CloudHub/hybrid).
* Solace PubSub\+: Design and implement real\-time, high\-performance event brokers and streaming frameworks for globally distributed supply chain and manufacturing operations.
* OpenText: Architect secure, high\-volume B2B integration networks and EDI systems to support transactional exchanges with global retailers and logistics partners.

### **3\. Stakeholder Collaboration \& Mutuality (Mutuality)**

* Act as a trusted consultant to Business Partners, Functional Leads, and external partners, translating complex business processes into elegant technical designs.
* Partner closely with security, data privacy, and compliance teams to enforce robust authentication standards (OAuth, OIDC, SAML), encryption at rest/transit, and compliance with global regulations (GDPR, CCPA).
* Present clear, value\-driven architectural proposals to digital leadership, demonstrating how technology choices support business enablement.

### **4\. Continuous Improvement \& Associate Mentorship (Responsibility)**

* Drive a culture of Domain Excellence within the technical team, encouraging developers and junior architects to build deep expertise in specific business segments and processes rather than remaining pure technical generalists.
* Keep a pulse on emerging industry trends, cloud paradigms, iPaaS innovations, and modern B2B integration capabilities, steering the technology roadmap accordingly.
* Establish a culture of shared learning; mentor junior integration architects and developers, conducting design reviews to elevate collective technical capability.

**Required Experience \& Qualifications**
-----------------------------------------

### **Industry \& Domain Expertise (Mandatory)**

* CPG/FMCG Sector Experience: Experience of working within a global Consumer Packaged Goods, retail, or manufacturing enterprise (or serving such clients in an architectural consulting capacity).
* Segment Domain Mindset: Proven ability or strong desire to move beyond purely technical execution to become a true domain expert in core CPG business processes, specifically:

  

Order\-to\-Cash (O2C): Customer orders, pricing, billing, and retail POS integrations.  

Procure\-to\-Pay (P2P): Supplier interactions and procurement flows.  

Supply Chain \& Logistics: Logistics execution, 3PL/4PL integrations, Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), inventory visibility, and product serialization (GS1 standards).* Order\-to\-Cash (O2C): Customer orders, pricing, billing, and retail POS integrations.
* Procure\-to\-Pay (P2P): Supplier interactions and procurement flows.
* Supply Chain \& Logistics: Logistics execution, 3PL/4PL integrations, Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), inventory visibility, and product serialization (GS1 standards).

### **Technical Stack \& Platform Expertise**

* MuleSoft Anypoint Platform: Solid experience designing and governing API\-led connectivity, managing API policies, and configuring CloudHub.
* Azure Integration Services: Proven expertise with Logic Apps, Service Bus, Event Grid, and Azure APIM.
* SAP BTP Integration Suite: Deep hands\-on experience integrating SAP environments (S/4HANA, ECC) with external cloud platforms and cloud LOBs (Ariba, SuccessFactors).
* Solace PubSub\+: Experience implementing event mesh networks, real\-time message routing, and publish/subscribe patterns.
* OpenText: Proven track record in B2B/EDI integration, automated document processing, and managed integration services (EDIFACT, ANSI X12, AS2, SFTP standards).
* Modern Protocols \& Formats: Expertise in REST, SOAP, gRPC, JSON, XML, and flat\-file integration patterns.

### **Soft Skills \& Leadership**

* Principle\-Driven Leadership: Ability to operate under a values\-based framework, demonstrating strong personal accountability and mutual respect.
* Collaborative Mindset: Strong active listening, communication, and negotiation skills, with an innate ability to build bridges across global, multicultural teams.
* Problem\-Solving \& Agility: Strong analytical capability, comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast\-paced, digital environment.

### **Education \& Certifications**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a highly related field.


Professional certifications in relevant technologies (e.g., MuleSoft Certified Integration Architect, Azure Solutions Architect, SAP Certified Integration Associate, or Solace Certified Engineer) are highly desirable.

**Qualifications**


Bachelors \- Business Analytics, Bachelors \- Computer Science, Bachelors \- Statistics, Masters \- Data Science**Certifications**


Certified Data Management Professional \- RiversandRiversand, IBM Certified Solution Developer \- WebSphere IIS DataStage Enterprise Edition v7\.5 \- IBMIBM, Informatica Certified Administrator \- InformaticaInformatica, TOGAF 9 Certification \- The Open Group Architecture Framework (TOGAF)The Open Group Architecture Framework (TOGAF)**Required Skills**


Solution Architecture**Language**


English**Language Proficiency \-**

Proficient \- C2**Additional Job Location \-**

**Job Type**


Regular**Master Skill List \-**

Data and Analytics \- Solutioning**Remote Type \-**

Office**Work Shift \-**

Flex Time (India)**Why join Genpact?**  

* **Lead AI\-powered transformation** – Drive innovation and solve real\-world business challenges that matter
* **Make an impact** – Help global enterprises solve business challenges that matter
* **Accelerate your career** – Gain hands\-on experience, mentorship, and world\-class learning opportunities to stay ahead
* **Work with the best** – Join 140,000\+ bold thinkers and problem\-solvers who push boundaries every day
* **Thrive in a values\-driven culture** – Our courage, curiosity, and incisiveness \- built on a foundation of integrity and inclusion \- allow your ideas to fuel progress


  

Come join the 140,000\+ coders, tech shapers, and growth makers at Genpact and take your career in the only direction that matters: Up.  

Let’s build tomorrow together.  

  

Genpact is an Equal Opportunity Employer and considers applicants for all positions without regard to race, color, religion or belief, sex, age, national origin, citizenship status, marital status, military/veteran status, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity, physical or mental disability or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. Genpact is committed to creating a dynamic work environment that values respect and integrity, customer focus, and innovation.  

Furthermore, please do note that Genpact does not charge fees to process job applications and applicants are not required to pay to participate in our hiring process in any other way. Examples of such scams include purchasing a 'starter kit,' paying to apply, or purchasing equipment or training.

05eaf338.title: Talent Acquisition Service Delivery Manager
05eaf338.description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Your Role**
 We are seeking for an experienced Talent Acquisition Service Delivery Manager to join our team. The successful candidate will be accountable for the end‑to‑end delivery of TA services across defined geographies or business units.
   

  

 In this role you will play a key role in:
   

  

* End‑to‑end TA service delivery across assigned scope, ensuring agreed SLAs, KPIs, and quality standards are consistently met.
* Act as the primary escalation point for operational issues, risks, and service disruptions, ensuring timely resolution.
* Ensure recruitment processes are executed consistently and in line with agreed operating models and governance.
* Monitor hiring volumes, pipeline health, time‑to‑hire, quality, and candidate experience metrics.


**Your Profile**
* Significant experience in Talent Acquisition service delivery, RPO, or in‑house TA leadership roles.
* Proven track record of managing TA operations at scale, including SLA‑based delivery.
* Strong stakeholder management skills, with experience working with senior leaders.
* Experience leading and developing multi‑disciplinary recruitment teams.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret TA metrics and translate insights into actions.
* Experience working in transformation, transition, or change environments is highly desirable.
* Flexible working in night shifts


**What You'll Love About Working Here**
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* We’re committed to ensure that people of all backgrounds feel encouraged and have a sense of belonging at Capgemini. You are valued for who you are, and you can bring your original self to work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.


 Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \| www.capgemini.com

8001e4d0.title: Technical Delivery Manager
8001e4d0.description:
Role Purpose
 



 Accountable for the end\-to\-end delivery of TBS solutions, ensuring predictable, high\-quality, and value\-driven outcomes aligned to Jet2 strategic priorities.
 



 The Technical Delivery Manager will lead the delivery of automation, low\-code, and AIenabled solutions across the TBS portfolio, ensuring strong governance, stakeholder alignment, and measurable business value.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 1\.  Delivery Ownership \& Execution
 



 •        Own end\-to\-end delivery lifecycle from discovery through to BAU
 



 •        Ensure all delivery aligns to the TBS delivery lifecycle and system design standards across technologies
 



 •        Maintain clear oversight of status, risks, dependencies, and delivery outcomes
 



 •        Ensure solutions are delivered on time, to scope, and to agreed quality standards
 



 2\.  Demand \& Prioritisation
 



 •        Partner with stakeholders to shape demand aligned to value, feasibility, and complexity
 



 •        Support governance processes including Front Door and SteerCo prioritisation
 



 •        Ensure only appropriate, high\-value initiatives progress into delivery
 



 3\.  Stakeholder Management
 



 •        Act as the primary interface between Business, TBS, and Delivery teams
 



 •        Provide clear, concise, executive\-ready updates
 



 •        Build strong relationships through consistent, outcome\-focused delivery
 



 4\.  Team Leadership \& Delivery Performance
 



 •        Lead a technical function within TBS Hub
 



 •        Support the cross\-functional team (Developers, BAs, SMEs)
 



 •        Drive a high\-performance, delivery\-focused culture
 



 •        Ensure alignment across roles to reduce rework and improve flow
 



 •        Act as a Final Reviewer and escalation point for design and delivery issues
 



 5\.  Governance, Risk \& Control
 



 •        Ensure adherence to TBS governance, standards, and controls
 



 •        Identify and proactively manage risks, dependencies, and issues
 



 •        Ensure all solutions meet security, regulatory, and operational standards
 



 6\.  Value Realisation \& Reporting
 



 •        Ensure all solutions have defined, tracked, and realised benefits
 



 •        Provide consistent delivery and value reporting to SteerCo
 



 •        Use data\-driven insights to drive continuous improvement
 



 7\.  Continuous Improvement \& Innovation
 



 •        Drive improvements in delivery speed, quality, and consistency
 



 •        Promote adoption of new automation, AI, and low\-code capabilities •                     Support scaling of the TBS toolkit
 



 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) Delivery Performance
 



 •        ≥ 80% of initiatives delivered on time and to agreed scope
 



 •        ≤ 10% of deployments with high\-severity post go\-live defects
 



 •        ≥ 95% solution success rate / availability in BAU
 



 Governance \& Control
 



 •        100% adherence to TBS delivery lifecycle and governance
 



 •        100% compliance with security, regulatory, and documentation standards
 



 •        All key risks, issues, and dependencies tracked and reported regularly
 



 Value \& Benefits Realisation
 



 •        ≥ 90% of solutions with defined and tracked benefits
 



 •        Demonstrable delivery of ROI and business outcomes
 



 •        Aligned to benefits such as cost savings, capacity release, and risk reduction
 



 Stakeholder Satisfaction
 



 •        ≥ 85% stakeholder satisfaction score
 



 •        Minimal escalations linked to delivery performance
 



 •        Consistently high\-quality, executive\-ready reporting
 



 Demand \& Throughput
 



 •        ≥ 90% delivery aligned to prioritised SteerCo pipeline
 



 •        No unmanaged or “shadow” delivery outside governance
 



 •        Continuous improvement in cycle time and throughput
 



 Team Performance
 



 High\-performing team evidenced by:
 



 •        Consistent delivery against commitments
 



 •        Low rework and defect rates
 



 •        Strong collaboration across Developers, BAs, and stakeholders
 



 Continuous Improvement \& Innovation
 



 •        Measurable improvements in:
 



 •                 Delivery efficiency
 



 •                 Reusability of solutions
 



 •                 Adoption of automation and AI capabilities
 



 •                 Active contribution to evolving the TBS operating model
 



 Skills \& Experience Essential
 



 •        Proven experience delivering technology or automation solutions end\-to\-end
 



 •        Strong understanding of delivery governance, risk, and control frameworks
 



 •        Ability to manage multiple stakeholders across business and technical teams
 



 •        Strong communication and executive reporting capability
 



 •        Experience driving process optimisation and automation initiatives
 



 •        Experience with Power Platform, RPA, or AI\-enabled automation
 



 •        Exposure to AWS or cloud\-based delivery environments
 



 •        Experience in benefits tracking and ROI frameworks
 



 •        Understanding of development and low\-code enablement
 



 Key Behaviours
 



 •        Outcome\-focused with strong commercial awareness
 



 •        Confident in prioritisation and decision\-making
 



 •        Strong accountability for live services, not just delivery milestones
 



 •        Collaborative, pragmatic, and  delivery\-driven mindset

4f6a003c.title: Engagement Manager
4f6a003c.description:
**Client \- One of the Top Consulting Firms in India in Consumer Tech space** 




  





 The Engagement Manager plays a pivotal role in leading a cross\-functional team of consultants and analysts to solve the client's most critical business challenges. You will own the day\-to\-day delivery of strategy, operational transformation, or growth advisory projects, while serving as a trusted advisor to senior executives and nurturing internal talent.
 



  





**Core Responsibilities** 




 1\. Project Leadership \& Delivery
 


* **Structure Complex Problems** 
 : Define project workplans, formulate hypotheses, and translate broad client objectives into actionable analysis and workstreams.
* **Ensure Technical Excellence** 
 : Oversee data collection, advanced financial modeling, and research to ensure outputs meet the highest standard of consulting quality.
* **Manage Operations** 
 : Track timeline adherence, mitigate execution risks, and actively monitor project budgets and resource utilization.



  





 2\. Client Relationship \& Communication
 


* **Serve as Trusted Advisor** 
 : Manage day\-to\-day interactions with client leadership (including VP and C\-suite levels), aligning stakeholder expectations.
* **Present Insights** 
 : Synthesize multi\-faceted data points into cohesive executive narratives and lead executive\-level presentations.
* **Drive Change** 
 : Guide clients through implementation strategies, ensuring seamless alignment and organizational transformation.



  





 3\. People Development \& Coaching
 


* **Mentor Junior Staff** 
 : Actively manage, coach, and support the career progression of Business Analysts and Associates.
* **Foster Collaboration** 
 : Create a highly cooperative, motivated, and psychologically safe environment for diverse, international teams.



  





 4\. Practice \& Business Development
 


* **Support Pursuits** 
 : Identify follow\-on business opportunities with existing accounts and assist Partners in drafting proposals and participating in sales pitches.
* **Build Intellectual Property** 
 : Contribute to internal firm initiatives, standardizing proprietary frameworks, whitepapers, and industry thought leadership.



  





**Required Profile \& Qualifications** 




**Education \& Work Experience** 



* **Top\-Tier Education** 
 : Master of Business Administration (MBA) or equivalent advanced degree (PhD, MFE) from a globally renowned business school or university. A strong Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field (e.g., Engineering, Economics) is preferred.
* **Consulting Tenure** 
 : Typically requires
 **4 to 8 years** 
 of total professional experience, with at least
 **2 to 4 years** 
 in a prominent management consulting environment



  





 Critical Competencies
 


* **Structured Problem Solving** 
 : Elite logic and structuring capabilities to breakdown ambiguous corporate crises into digestible frameworks.
* **Emotional Intelligence (EQ)** 
 : High levels of empathy, conflict\-resolution skills, and the capacity to confidently navigate political environments at client offices.
* **Communication Mastery** 
 : Exceptional verbal and written storytelling skills, capable of delivering difficult insights with tact and clarity.
* **Adaptability** 
 : Comfort with moving across a wide variety of industries (such as Financial Services, Tech, TMT, Retail, or Private Equity) and functional areas.

aff24cb4.title: Engagement Manager - 2 to 4 years
aff24cb4.description:
**Company Description** 
 myfollo.com is a technology brand of Valion P.R.E.F.O., India’s first Private Real Estate Family Office, focused on transforming real estate advisory and transaction services. The company operates on an “Aggregate, Control \& Transact” model, engaging landlords, property owners, and developers online to aggregate inventory and optimize distribution channels for efficient transactions. With an O2O (Online to Offline) activation approach, myfollo.com combines digital platforms like PropCare and its aggregation portal with on\-ground expertise to deliver seamless property management and transaction services. A personalized online dashboard keeps clients informed about the performance of their real estate portfolio and transaction status. Backed by over 10 years of experience and a parent company trusted by 350\+ companies and 1700\+ families in India and Singapore, myfollo.com manages combined investments and aggregated assets worth over INR 9600 crores.
   

**Role Description** 
 The Engagement Manager role at myfollo.com is a full\-time, on\-site position based in Gurugram. This role involves managing client relationships across the real estate advisory and transactions lifecycle, ensuring a high level of engagement and satisfaction. The Engagement Manager will coordinate with internal teams to oversee property onboarding, portfolio reviews, and transaction progress, while providing timely updates through digital dashboards and offline touchpoints. Daily responsibilities include understanding client requirements, preparing and presenting recommendations, monitoring ongoing projects, and resolving issues to ensure smooth execution. The role also includes supporting business development efforts, gathering client feedback to improve services, and contributing to process enhancements.
   

**Qualifications**
* Candidates should possess strong Analytical Skills to interpret real estate data, portfolio performance, and market trends.
* Candidates should possess Program Management and Project Management skills to coordinate multiple client engagements and ensure on\-time delivery.
* Candidates should possess excellent Communication and Consulting skills to understand client needs, present solutions, and build long\-term relationships.
* Relevant experience of 2 to 4 years in client\-facing roles, preferably in real estate, financial services, or consulting.
* Ability to work on\-site in Gurugram, collaborate with cross\-functional teams, and manage stakeholders at different levels.
* Proficiency with digital tools, dashboards, and MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint) for reporting and presentations.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Real Estate, or a related field; a postgraduate qualification is an advantage.
* Strong attention to detail, problem\-solving mindset, and a focus on delivering high\-quality client experiences.

6a05b181.title: Microsoft Customer Engagement Manager
6a05b181.description:
We are the leading provider of professional services to the middle market globally, our purpose is to instill confidence in a world of change, empowering our clients and people to realize their full potential. Our exceptional people are the key to our unrivaled, inclusive culture and talent experience and our ability to be compelling to our clients. You’ll find an environment that inspires and empowers you to thrive both personally and professionally. There’s no one like you and that’s why there’s nowhere like RSM.
   

  

**Overview**
 RSM US India (USI) supports RSM US LLP’s Risk Consulting, Transaction Advisory, Technical Accounting, Financial Consulting, Technology and Management Consulting, Tax, and Assurance practices by providing access to highly skilled professionals for scalable and repeatable business processes across an extended business day. USI is a member of RSM International, the sixth largest global network of independent accounting, tax, and consulting firms.
   

  

**Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement – Functional Manager**
 RSM’s Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement (Dynamics 365 CE) practice is a team of highly specialized, multi\-disciplinary professionals delivering innovative Microsoft business application solutions for global clients.
   

  

 RSM is seeking a
 **Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement (CE) Functional Manager** 
 who blends deep, hands\-on configuration and customization experience with the leadership skills to run multiple concurrent engagements. The ideal candidate brings end\-to\-end mastery of the Dynamics 365 CE suite and the Microsoft Power Platform, sound solution architecture judgment, strong client presence, and a passion for growing the next generation of consultants. This role is a true player–coach: you will partner directly with US\-based leaders, shape solutions on the whiteboard, and actively mentor and coach a team of Supervisors, Senior Associates, and Associates.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Hands\-on configuration, customization, and implementation experience of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement applications and the Power Platform to meet complex client business needs
* Translate complex business problems into clear functional specifications, solution designs, and architecture recommendations across CE, integrations, and the broader Microsoft cloud
* Own functional and architectural integrity across all phases of the project lifecycle — discovery, design, build, test, deployment, and post\-go\-live support
* Lead and oversee multiple concurrent Dynamics 365 CE engagements, owning delivery quality, risk, and outcomes across a portfolio of projects
* Serve as a trusted advisor to US\-based engagement leaders and client stakeholders, managing priorities, timelines, escalations, and deliverables across time zones
* Facilitate design reviews, demos, and solution walkthroughs with confidence and clarity
* Review and quality\-assure work products — including configuration, customization, testing, and documentation
* Direct data migration, integrations, security model design, and ALM strategy (solutions, pipelines, managed environments) across engagements
* Coach, mentor, and develop junior talent across the team; provide performance feedback, career guidance, and hands\-on knowledge transfer
* Support post\-go\-live activities including hypercare, enhancements, governance, and continuous improvement
* Champion delivery excellence, documentation standards, and a great client experience on every engagement


**Required Qualifications**
- 10\+ years of hands\-on functional experience implementing Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement

- Demonstrated experience leading multiple concurrent Dynamics 365 CE projects to successful delivery in a consulting environment

- Strong, hands\-on configuration and customization expertise across the Dynamics 365 CE suite, including:

* Customer Service
* Contact Center / Omnichannel
* Sales
* Customer Insights – Journeys
* Field Service
* Project Operations


- Hands\-on experience with the Microsoft Power Platform, including:

* Power Automate
* Power Pages
* Copilot Studio
* Power BI
* Power Apps
* Proven solution design and architecture experience across CE, integrations, and surrounding Microsoft cloud services
* Strong business process mapping and requirements analysis skills across various Dynamics 365 CE apps
* Experience with environment and ALM management (solutions, pipelines, managed environments)
* Demonstrated ability to mentor, coach, and develop junior consultants and grow high\-performing teams
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, with strong executive presence
* Experience working in global delivery models and collaborating with onshore/offshore stakeholders
* Proven ability to manage competing priorities, navigate ambiguity, and consistently meet delivery commitments


**Certifications (Strongly Preferred)**
* Microsoft Dynamics 365 certification(s)
* Power Platform certification(s)
* Actively pursuing and maintaining Microsoft certifications is highly encouraged and supported


 At RSM, we offer a competitive benefits and compensation package for all our people. We offer flexibility in your schedule, empowering you to balance life’s demands, while also maintaining your ability to serve clients. Learn more about our total rewards at https://rsmus.com/careers/india.html.
   

  

 RSM does not tolerate discrimination and/or harassment based on race; colour; creed; sincerely held religious beliefs, practices or observances; sex (including pregnancy or disabilities related to nursing); gender (including gender identity and/or gender expression); sexual orientation; HIV Status; national origin; ancestry; familial or marital status; age; physical or mental disability; citizenship; political affiliation; medical condition (including family and medical leave); domestic violence victim status; past, current or prospective service in the Indian Armed Forces; Indian Armed Forces Veterans, and Indian Armed Forces Personnel status; pre\-disposing genetic characteristics or any other characteristic protected under applicable provincial employment legislation.
   

  

 Accommodation for applicants with disabilities is available upon request in connection with the recruitment process and/or employment/partnership. RSM is committed to providing equal opportunity and reasonable accommodation for people with disabilities. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete an application, interview, or otherwise participate in the recruiting process, please send us an email at careers@rsmus.com.

1cc30378.title: Service Delivery Manager
1cc30378.description:
Job Description
**Noventiq is hiring!**


Noventiq (Noventiq Holdings PLC) is a leading global solutions and services provider in digital transformation and cybersecurity, headquartered in London. The company enables, facilitates, and accelerates digital transformation for its customers’ businesses, connecting 80,000\+ organizations across all sectors with a vast selection of best\-in\-class IT vendors, alongside its own services and solutions.


Noventiq delivered record gross revenue of $1\.6 billion for the 12 months to March 31, 2023, an increase of 52% in constant currency. The company’s growth is underpinned by its three\-dimensional strategy to expand its markets, portfolio, and sales channels. The strategy is supported by an active approach to M\&As which enables Noventiq to take advantage of the ongoing consolidation in the industry. Noventiq's 6,400 employees work in approximately 60 countries throughout Asia, Latin America, Europe, Middle East, and Africa—markets with significant growth potential.


* One of the largest SI’s in India with revenue close to 700M$ and growing to 900M$.


* 3500\+ Employees in India for India.


* Total 28 Offices in India across North, South, West \& East.


* 1000\+ Resident Engineers across India.


* 2500\+ technical resources in India for India.


* Technology partnerships with Top 3 Cloud Solution Providers, Top 3 Infrastructure companies, Top 10 Cybersecurity companies.


* Enviable customer base: 4 of Top 5 Banks, 3 of Top 5 IT companies, 3 of Top 5 BPO’s, 3 of Top 5 Pharma companies.


* Largest partner to Microsoft with combined infeed of US$600M about 25% of Microsoft India revenues.

  

  

**About You:**


* 7\+ years of experience working in a customer facing technical service delivery or support role (design, implementation, consulting, infrastructure, and/or cloud service system administration).


* Experience in managed service delivery management.


* Experience with virtualization, distributed networks and/or cloud computing of scale


* High level of comfort communicating effectively across internal and external organizations.


* Knowledge of networking protocols such as HTTP, DNS and TCP/IP.


* Previous or current experience in an engineering support technical role (systems or network administration/operations or similar).


* Experience with virtualization, distributed networks and/or cloud computing of scale.


* Experience in managed service delivery management


**Must Have:**

* Technical complex troubleshooting skills in infrastructure services (OS, networking, cloud).


* Previous or current experience in an engineering support technical role (systems or network administration/operations or similar).


* Ability to manage multiple tasks and projects in a fast\-moving environment.


* Presentation skills; high degree of comfort with both large and small audiences.


* High level of comfort communicating effectively across internal and external organizations.


* The ideal candidate must possess customer facing skills to represent Umbrella well within a customer’s environment and drive discussions with senior personnel regarding incidents, trade\-offs, best practices, and risk management.


* Client Communication and Presentation experience.


**Soft Skills**

* Excellent communication and conversation skills (Verbal and Written.)


* Good documentation skills.


* Should have a great customer handling skill.


* Able to handle unforeseen situations.

  

  

**What you ‘ll do:**


* Service Deliver Manager/ Project Manager is engaged with the client account level and is a trusted adviser, providing visibility, service reviews and reporting through all phases of the implementation life cycle.


* The successful candidate will be working closely with other Umbrella teams to ensure that all changes to a customer’s environments are smoothly carried out while meeting capacity needs and service level agreements.


* Earn a Trusted Client Advisory relationship with our clients and team.


* Work with customers to provide visibility and guidance around their Services account through regular Operational Service Reviews and Reporting.


* Work with the customers on operational and tactical issues.


* Be involved in the change management process of the customer’s environment to ensure success and service up\-time.


* Work with application owners to develop and standardize test, upgrade, and release management processes.


* Go “toe to toe” with customer technical stakeholders on most issues.


* Be the voice of the customer and work with internal Umbrella resources to ensure that the customer’s SLA’s are met.


* Raise internal awareness of customer impacting bugs and/or issues and drive the appropriate prioritization for fixes and/or responses.


* Participate in customer requested meetings (onsite or via phone).


* Provide oversight of escalation, prioritization, and drive customer communication during critical events.


* Be available outside of business hours to help coordinate handling of urgent issues as needed


**What we offer:**
==================


* Insurance – Group Medical Coverage, Group Personal Accident, Group Term Life Insurance


* Rewards and Recognition Program, Employee Referral Program, Wellness Program and CSR Initiatives


* Maternity and Paternity Leaves


* Company Sponsored Certification Program


* Learning/Development Courses, Cross Skill, Mentorship and Leadership Programs


* Quarterly Performance Feedback Sessions


* Savings, Investments and Retirement Benefits


* Flexible Work Hours, Work from Home, Remote Working, Hybrid Working


* Company Onsite / Fun Events
