f02746ba.title: Sr. Technical Architect
f02746ba.description:
Relocation Assistance Offered Within Country
   

  

 Job Number \#173956 \- Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Colgate\-Palmolive Company is a global consumer products company operating in over 200 countries specialising in Oral Care, Personal Care, Home Care, Skin Care, and Pet Nutrition. Our products are trusted in more households than any other brand in the world, making us a household name!
   

  

 Join Colgate\-Palmolive, a caring, innovative growth company reimagining a healthier future for people, their pets, and our planet. Guided by our core values—Caring, Inclusive, and Courageous—we foster a culture that inspires our people to achieve common goals. Together, let's build a brighter, healthier future for all.
   

  

 Role Summary/Purpose
   

  

 We are seeking a visionary and hands\-on
 **Senior AI Domain Expert \& App Developer** 
 to lead the design, architecture, and delivery of our next\-generation AI\-driven automation systems. In this hybrid role, you will act as both a Solutions Architect and a Scrum Master, bridging the gap between complex AI capabilities and practical business applications. You will collaborate closely with stakeholders to run feasibility studies, establish robust AI governance, and build frameworks that seamlessly integrate Agentic workflows, RPA, and human oversight. Ultimately, you will guide the implementation team to deliver robust, secure, and highly optimized system solutions across core business processes.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Solution Design \& Architecture: Define, build, and scale overarching architectures for hybrid automation solutions, orchestrating complex workflows utilizing AI Agentic tools (for Agentic automation flows), UiPath (for RPA), and Intelligent Agents.
* Agile Leadership \& Facilitation (Scrum Master): Act as the Scrum Master for the delivery team—managing sprints, removing technical blockers, and conducting rigorous code/design reviews to ensure development teams adhere to best practices.
* Governance \& AI Guardrails: Define, update, and enforce development standards around AI guardrails, data privacy, compliance, and risk mitigation protocols to handle challenges like model drift or exception management.
* Stakeholder Engagement \& Feasibility: Partner with business leaders to conduct feasibility studies, process documentation, RFPs/RFQs, and estimations, successfully translating ambiguous business requirements into concrete technical roadmaps.
* Post\-Implementation \& HITL Management: Monitor and maintain automations post\-deployment, investigating and documenting advanced methodologies for Human\-in\-the\-Loop (HITL) exception management and critical decision validations.


 Required Qualifications :
   

  

* Architectural Experience: 8\+ years of work experience in a Solution Design and Architect role centered around enterprise automation or complex software implementations.
* Automation \& Low\-Code Tech: 5\+ years of hands\-on experience with leading automation technologies (e.g., RPA, AI Center, Action Centre, Document Understanding) and low\-code/orchestration and agentic platforms (such as Retool for Agentic flows).
* AI Domain \& Integration Mastery: Deep proficiency in an automation\-first mindset, LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, building workflow\-based frameworks, and developing APIs to bridge modern AI tools with legacy enterprise systems.
* Agile Frameworks \& Process Delivery: Solid experience acting comfortably in a Scrum Master role running sprints, managing deliverables, handling architectural evaluations, and assigning tasks based on developer skill sets.
* Core Competencies: Proven experience architecting Human\-in\-the\-Loop (HITL) systems, with the exceptional ability to express complex technical concepts in business terms and work independently in a fast\-paced environment.


 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  

* Education: Engineering Degree (B.E. / B.Tech / Master's) in Computer Science, IT, or a related technical field.
* Professional Certifications: AI / Agentic Automation Certified Professional, Solution Architect Certification, or Certified Scrum Master (CSM) / equivalent Agile credential.
* Technical Versatility: Advanced knowledge or exposure to modern machine learning infrastructure, cloud platforms, Python, or API gateways.
* Strategic Leadership: Demonstrated capability to balance technical architecture responsibilities with servant\-leadership, drive continuous improvement, and proactively manage long\-term data governance strategies.


**Our Commitment to Inclusion**
 Our journey begins with our people—developing strong talent with diverse backgrounds and perspectives to best serve our consumers around the world and fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels a true sense of belonging. We are dedicated to ensuring that each individual can be their authentic self, is treated with respect, and is empowered by leadership to contribute meaningfully to our business.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 Colgate is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, ethnicity, age, disability, marital status, veteran status (United States positions), or any other characteristic protected by law.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodation during the application process is available for persons with disabilities. Please complete this request form should you require accommodation.

239cfb66.title: Cloud Architect
239cfb66.description:
Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE:RL) is a global leader in the design, marketing and distribution of premium lifestyle products in five categories: apparel, accessories, home, fragrances, and hospitality. For more than 50 years, Ralph Lauren's reputation and distinctive image have been consistently developed across an expanding number of products, brands and international markets. The Company's brand names, which include Ralph Lauren, Ralph Lauren Collection, Ralph Lauren Purple Label, Polo Ralph Lauren, Double RL, Lauren Ralph Lauren, Polo Ralph Lauren Children, Chaps, among others, constitute one of the world's most widely recognized families of consumer brands.
   

  

 At Ralph Lauren, we unite and inspire the communities within our company as well as those in which we serve by amplifying voices and perspectives to create a culture of belonging, ensuring inclusion, and fairness for all. We foster a culture of inclusion through: Talent, Education \& Communication, Employee Groups and Celebration.
   

  

 ,
   

  

 We are seeking an experienced Cloud Architect to join our Cloud Engineering team. This role will help define and advance Ralph Lauren’s cloud architecture strategy across Microsoft Azure and AWS, with a strong emphasis on security, governance, compliance, and enterprise\-scale platform design.
   

  

 The Cloud Architect will play a strategic role in shaping secure, scalable, and reusable cloud patterns that strengthen our cloud service portfolio. The ideal candidate brings deep expertise across Azure and AWS platform services, container technologies, networking, and cloud security, along with the ability to influence cross\-functional engineering teams and drive architectural excellence.
   

  

 ,
   

  

* Define secure, scalable, and reusable cloud architecture patterns across Azure and AWS.
* Design reference architectures, platform blueprints, and implementation standards for enterprise cloud services.
* Architect secure network topologies, including private connectivity, web application firewall controls, and ingress/egress patterns.
* Embed governance, compliance guardrails, and policy enforcement mechanisms into platform design.
* Drive standardization across cloud services and identify opportunities to enhance the product portfolio.
* Provide architectural leadership and design guidance to engineering teams throughout solution delivery.
* Review platform and infrastructure designs to ensure alignment with security, reliability, and scalability standards.
* Support Infrastructure\-as\-Code and CI/CD best practices to improve automation, operational excellence, and platform maturity.
* Contribute to roadmap discussions and help shape the future direction of the cloud engineering portfolio.


 ,
   

  

* 5–10 years of hands\-on experience in cloud architecture, engineering, or platform design across Azure and AWS.
* Strong expertise in Azure networking, including Virtual Networks, NSGs, Private Link, DNS, and WAF technologies.
* Deep knowledge of Kubernetes architecture and container platforms, including AKS and related ecosystem services.
* Experience with Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure Kubernetes Service, Azure Container Apps, Azure Front Door, and Azure Application Gateway.
* Strong understanding of PaaS security hardening, identity and access management, and enterprise cloud governance.
* Knowledge of CI/CD implementation and Infrastructure\-as\-Code practices, including Terraform, Bicep, ARM, or AWS CloudFormation.
* Experience designing and supporting secure, enterprise\-grade architectures for highly available cloud services.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* AWS certification and demonstrated experience architecting cloud\-native solutions on AWS.
* Hands\-on knowledge of data platform and migration services, including S3, EMR, Glue, Lambda, SNS, SQS, Athena, Redshift, CloudWatch, Step Functions, Lake Formation, DMS, Kinesis, Kafka, RDS, Aurora, Neptune, Snowflake, and CDC processing patterns.
* Experience in data lake and data warehouse modernization initiatives.
* Kubernetes certification such as CKA is a plus.


 KEY COMPETENCIES
   

  

* Strong architectural and systems\-thinking capabilities.
* Security\-first mindset with a product\-oriented approach to platform engineering.
* Ability to influence cross\-functional stakeholders and build alignment across teams.
* Excellent communication, documentation, and presentation skills.
* Strong analytical thinking and proactive problem\-solving abilities.
* Curiosity and commitment to staying current with emerging cloud technologies and industry trends.
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to work effectively across engineering, operations, and business teams.
* Confidence in evaluating options and presenting clear, scalable solutions to stakeholders.

18048d68.title: Senior Cloud & Infrastructure Engineer
18048d68.description:
**REPORTING RELATIONSHIP** 




 POSITION REPORTS TO: ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR IT
 



 DEPARTMENT: TECHNOLOGY
 



 POSITION LOCATION: VADODARA
 



  





**POSITION SUMMARY** 




 The position is offered through Company. This is a hands\-on, breadth\-oriented role for an engineer who wants to run a real production environment, modernize how infrastructure is built and operated, and work closely with security and development to ship and run software safely. As lead infrastructure engineer for Omni’s multi\-tenant Azure estate and Windows server fleet, this role works in close daily partnership with Omni’s Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, who acts as the technical sounding board, security reviewer, and sign\-off authority on significant infrastructure decisions. This role operates under a matrix reporting structure, with a functional reporting line to the CTO, Omni Agent Solutions (USA) and an administrative reporting line to the Associate Director IT (India).
 



  





**JOB RESPONSIBILITIES** 




 • Operate as the lead infrastructure engineer in close daily partnership with Omni’s Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, who provides technical direction, conducts security review, and signs off on significant infrastructure decisions before they reach production.
 



 • Run and modernize Omni’s Azure environment, including compute, networking, identity, Azure App Services, Azure SQL, Microsoft WAF, Azure Virtual Desktop and Windows 365, and Azure Monitor.
 



 • Own the Windows Server fleet end\-to\-end: provisioning, patching cadence, Group Policy and Active Directory operations, lifecycle planning, and end\-of\-support migrations.
 



 • Own Microsoft 365 license allocation and Azure subscription management across Omni’s multi\-tenant environment, including license assignment and recovery, subscription and tenant governance, cost visibility, and ongoing right\-sizing.
 



 • Modernize the infrastructure\-as\-code practice. Propose tooling and patterns for joint review with the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer, and incrementally bring infrastructure under code with security guardrails built in from the start.
 



 • Partner with the senior developer and broader development team to extend modern CI/CD patterns from application code into infrastructure deployment, and to design systems that scale securely as the business grows.
 



 • Work closely with Omni’s security team and managed SOC on hardening, vulnerability remediation, identity controls, endpoint protection through SentinelOne, and compliance evidence.
 



 • Cross\-train into the security workstreams the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer manages day\-to\-day, including endpoint detection and response, SASE and ZTNA networking, SIEM, and the managed SOC’s tooling, so the two roles can back each other up across disciplines.
 



 • Manage observability across Datadog and Azure Monitor, including alerting, on\-call signal hygiene, and runbook development.
 



 • Maintain the homegrown line\-of\-business application infrastructure (Azure App Services, Azure SQL, and Microsoft WAF).
 



 • Run day\-to\-day business continuity and disaster recovery operations within Omni’s defined RPO and RTO targets. Maintain DR runbooks and run periodic failover and tabletop exercises.
 



 • Build and maintain runbooks, architecture diagrams, and change records so the environment can be supported by anyone on the team.
 



 • Partner with Omni’s co\-managed MSP as a shared delivery team across day\-to\-day operations and escalations, rather than treating the MSP as an outside vendor.
 



 • Provide escalation support to internal end users for infrastructure\-impacting tickets routed through the helpdesk and the co\-managed MSP.
 



 • Participate in an after\-hours rotation covering monthly maintenance windows and incident response, and co\-lead
 



 post\-incident reviews. Formalizing the rotation is part of the role, in partnership with the Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer.
 



  





**KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS AND ABILITIES** 




 • 8\+ years of cloud engineering experience, with significant Azure depth.
 



 • 3\+ years' operating Windows Server environments at production scale.
 



 • Hands\-on experience with hybrid identity, including Active Directory, Group Policy, and Entra ID, in a Windows\-centric environment.
 



 • Strong cloud and hybrid networking experience, including firewall change management, network segmentation, cross\-tenant routing, IPsec and SSL VPN, NSGs, and subnet design.
 



 • Experience operating to defined RPO and RTO targets, including DR runbook maintenance and failover testing.
 



 • Strong infrastructure\-as\-code experience. Terraform preferred, with openness to Azure\-native equivalents such as Bicep or ARM templates.
 



 • Demonstrated ability to modernize engineering practices in close collaboration with security counterparts, partnering on the final shape of the practice rather than dictating it.
 



 • Comfort operating in a role where a security peer reviews and signs off on significant infrastructure decisions, and where outcomes are defined jointly rather than independently.
 



 • Comfort cross\-training across infrastructure and security disciplines, holding a primary area of focus while providing secondary coverage of the other.
 



 • Track record of partnering closely with security and development teams to ship and operate software safely and at scale.
 



  





**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS** 




 • Familiarity with Microsoft 365 Copilot or other enterprise AI rollouts.
 



  





 • Exposure to NIST CSF, CIS Controls, or ISO/IEC 27001, and how these frameworks apply to both cloud and on\-
 



 premises or Group Policy deployment.
 



  





 • Familiarity with SOC 2 control operation and evidence collection.
 



 • Working knowledge of California privacy regulation (CCPA / CPRA). HIPAA exposure also a plus.
 



 • Microsoft partnership program exposure (CSP, Solutions Partner designations).
 



 • Secondary cloud and SaaS familiarity beyond Azure, including Google Workspace, Google Cloud Storage, and Wasabi object storage.
 



 • Exposure to thin\-client deployments and cloud browser management.
 



 • Cloudflare familiarity (edge, DNS, security).
 



 • Next\-generation firewall platform experience (Palo Alto Networks, Fortinet FortiGate, or comparable).
 



 • Enterprise backup and DR platform experience (Veeam, Axcient, Azure Backup, or comparable).
 



 • Experience migrating workloads from traditional VMs to serverless or cloud\-native application platforms.
 



 • SQL Server DBA exposure for day\-to\-day database operations (not a primary focus of the role).
 



 • IIS management experience.
 



 • AWS, Kubernetes, or serverless experience.
 



 • Experience operating in a small infrastructure team where breadth matters more than depth in any one area.

4b642014.title: Senior AWS Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
4b642014.description:
**About Cognizant Corporate**
 Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth.
   

  

 At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping future of business.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a Senior AWS Cloud Infrastructure Engineer to design, implement, and operate enterprise\-grade AWS infrastructure. The role combines hands\-on engineering with solution ownership — building automation, enforcing governance and security standards, mentoring junior engineers, and contributing to landing zone and platform design with limited supervision.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will**
* Design, deploy, and manage AWS infrastructure at scale — EC2/Auto Scaling, EBS/EFS, S3, VPCs, ELB/ALB/NLB, and key managed services — across multiple accounts.
* Own Infrastructure\-as\-Code delivery using Terraform (preferred) or CloudFormation/CDK, including reusable modules and CI/CD integration.
* Contribute to landing zone, account vending, and governance design using AWS Control Tower, Organizations, and the Well\-Architected Framework.
* Implement and manage IAM roles/policies, IAM Identity Center (SSO), KMS, Secrets Manager, and SCP\-based guardrails.
* Design and operate networking — VPC peering, Transit Gateway, VPN/Direct Connect, route tables, Route 53, NAT/PrivateLink — within platform service limits.
* Build and maintain monitoring, logging, and observability using CloudWatch, CloudTrail, and AWS Config; drive reliability improvements.
* Lead operational activities — patching strategy, backup/DR, capacity planning, cost optimization (FinOps), and resource governance.
* Troubleshoot complex infrastructure, connectivity, and security issues; perform root\-cause analysis.
* Manage AWS service limits and quotas, raising increase requests and designing scalable, limit\-aware architectures.
* Mentor junior engineers, review IaC and designs, and contribute to standards and runbooks.
* Collaborate with architecture, security, networking, and application teams on solution delivery.


**What You Must Have To Be Considered**
* 4–6 years of hands\-on AWS infrastructure experience with independent solution delivery.
* Strong command of AWS core services — Compute, Storage, VPC networking, IAM, KMS, and key managed services.
* Proven Infrastructure\-as\-Code experience (Terraform preferred) with module design and CI/CD integration.
* Solid scripting skills (Python/boto3, AWS CLI; Bash/PowerShell a plus).
* Strong networking knowledge — TCP/IP, DNS, routing, BGP basics, hybrid connectivity (VPN/Direct Connect), and segmentation.
* Working knowledge of AWS governance — Organizations, SCPs, Config, tagging, and security baselines.
* Understanding of AWS service limits/quotas and capacity/cost planning.
* Experience with monitoring, DR/backup, and operational best practices.


**These will help you succeed**
* Exposure to landing zone implementation, multi\-account governance, or Control Tower design.
* Familiarity with containers (ECS/EKS), and secondary exposure to Azure or GCP.
* Awareness of egress control / SASE tooling (e.g., Zscaler) and zero\-trust networking.


 Certifications: AWS Solutions Architect – Associate, SysOps Administrator – Associate, or Advanced Networking – Specialty
   

  

**Work Model**
 We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring 2\-3 days a week in a client or Cognizant office in Pune/Hyderabad/Kolkata/Bangalore/Coimbatore. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance though our various wellbeing programs.
   

  

 The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting. This may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations.
   

  

 We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

63cbb81d.title: Cloud Resiliency Engineer
63cbb81d.description:
**Job Title**
 Cloud Resiliency Engineer
   

  

**Job Description**
 We're Concentrix. The intelligent transformation partner. Solution\-focused. Tech\-powered. Intelligence\-fueled.
   

  

 The global technology and services leader that powers the world’s best brands, today and into the future. We’re solution\-focused, tech\-powered, intelligence\-fueled. With unique data and insights, deep industry expertise, and advanced technology solutions, we’re the intelligent transformation partner that powers a world that works, helping companies become refreshingly simple to work, interact, and transact with. We shape new game\-changing careers in over 70 countries, attracting the best talent.
   

  

 The Concentrix Technical Products and Services team is the driving force behind Concentrix’s transformation, data, and technology services. We integrate world\-class digital engineering, creativity, and a deep understanding of human behavior to find and unlock value through tech\-powered and intelligence\-fueled experiences. We combine human\-centered design, powerful data, and strong tech to accelerate transformation at scale. You will be surrounded by the best in the world providing market leading technology and insights to modernize and simplify the customer experience. Within our professional services team, you will deliver strategic consulting, design, advisory services, market research, and contact center analytics that deliver insights to improve outcomes and value for our clients. Hence achieving our vision.
   

  

 Our game\-changers around the world have devoted their careers to ensuring every relationship is exceptional. And we’re proud to be recognized with awards such as "World's Best Workplaces," “Best Companies for Career Growth,” and “Best Company Culture,” year after year.
   

  

 Join us and be part of this journey towards greater opportunities and brighter futures.
   

  

 Resilence :The Cloud Resiliency Architect will support customers through focused technical engagements aimed at improving the reliability, continuity, and recoverability of their cloud environments. The architect will combine deep technical expertise in Microsoft Azure with a strong command of disaster recovery, business continuity, and operational resiliency processes, including the design and evaluation of Major Incident Response Plans (MIRPs).

64cb1cde.title: Delivery Manager - Engineering
64cb1cde.description:
**Responsibilities**
 We’re looking for a Delivery Manager to drive delivery excellence across our Asset Management product family. In this role, you’ll ensure delivery success by aligning strategy, engineering capacity, and business priorities. You’ll partner closely with product, engineering, and business teams to develop delivery plans, lead risks, and complete roadmaps that advance our modernization journey.
   

  

 As a formal leader, you'll lead a team and champion a culture of continuous learning and innovation. You will promote customer\-centric product development and help build consistent delivery practices across the organization.
   

  

 You’ll Have the Opportunity To
   

  

* Lead and optimize delivery systems across multiple teams, applying Agile principles while balancing iterative development with structured planning, achievement tracking, and continuous improvement.
* Provide strong technical and delivery leadership, especially across AWS cloud, Python, and modern engineering practices—driving the build, estimation, planning, and end\-to\-end delivery of cloud\-native applications.
* Mentor and develop teams, promoting a learning culture, product approach, and high\-quality engineering across short\- and long\-term delivery cycles.
* Drive central initiatives by setting clear objectives, influencing multi\-functional groups, and enhancing delivery systems through improved processes and consistency to Agile, Lean, and AWS guidelines.
* Proactively handle dependencies and impediments, encouraging positive relationships with business and technology partners to ensure alignment, transparency, and predictable outcomes.
* Champion Lean Leadership, nurturing talent through mentoring, experimentation, and continuous improvement while supporting both iterative and phased delivery models.
* Own and guide large\-scale system improvements, elevating stability, performance, scalability, and operational reliability using a pragmatic blend of Agile and structured delivery approaches.
* Coordinate technology operations including incident \& problem management (SEV management), consistency to SLAs, operational excellence, and driving improvements that improve system stability and efficiency.
* Promote engineering maturity, driving automation, documentation excellence, and knowledge\-sharing across teams to uplift delivery consistency and quality.
* Stay ahead of industry and cloud trends, making recommendations that improve our architecture and delivery capabilities.
* Facilitate multi\-functional collaboration, enabling faster issue resolution, root\-cause analysis, and aligned technical problem solving.


**Qualifications**
 Who You Are
   

  

* Bachelor's degree \- Engineering (preference in a computer science, technology, engineering or math\-related field) and 10\+ years work experience or equivalent experience
* 10\+ years leading software/application development projects with strong delivery ownership
* Experience in data management/integration, data warehousing, Python, and AWS cloud services
* Demonstrated relationship\-building skills with both IT and non\-IT collaborators
* Shown ability to lead multiple complex initiatives under time constraints
* Skilled in executive communication, scope alignment, risk management, and delivery governance
* Strong analytical, decision\-making, organizational, and problem\-solving skills
* Solid understanding of engineering frameworks, SDLC methodologies, and operational guidelines
* Experience leading operational processes—incident, problem, and service management—with focus on stability and continuous improvement


 Skills That Will Help You Stand Out
   

  

* Asset Management domain experience OR Financial Services industry experience
* 10\+ years working with Agile teams in a software engineering environment


**Additional Information**
**Our Engineering Culture**
 Through our Agile/Lean DevOps environment dedicated to delivering valuable solutions, we’ve fostered a culture of innovation and experimentation across our development teams. As a customer\-focused organization, we work closely with our end users and product owners to understand and rapidly respond to emerging business needs.
   

  

 Collaboration is embedded into everything we do – from the products we develop to the quality service we provide. We’re driven by the belief that diversity of thought, background, and perspective is critical to creating the best products and experiences for our customers.
   

  

**Experience Principal**
 At Principal, we value connecting on both a personal and professional level. Together, we’re imagining a more purpose\-led future for financial services – and that starts with you. Our success depends on the unique experiences, backgrounds, and talents of our employees. And we support our employees the same way we support our customers: with comprehensive, competitive benefit offerings crafted to protect their physical, financial, and social well\-being. Check out our careers site to learn more about our purpose, values and benefits.

12dfd082.title: Customer Program Manager- Husky (India)Chennai
12dfd082.description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Customer Program Manager\- Husky (India)Chennai
   

  

**Id:** 
 21045
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\-of\-the\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 As a member of the Customer Success Management (CSM) SAARC team, you will be responsible for managing Advantage \+ Elite Contracts from order intake to delivery as well as to achieve the key performance indicators of the product. In this role, you will be a key contact for customers to ensure customer satisfaction and contract renewal.
   

  

****Responsibilities:****
* Implements and leads the Contract planning process, its implementation and sustainment, responsible to achieve the stated KPI (availability, cycle time, energy consumption, quality, resin usage)
* Work with key cross\-functional teams throughout the Organization with the goal of maintaining the Contract commitments on a continuous basis
* Project Manages all activities and services provided within the Contract, ensuring they are done on time, based on a predefined timetable, in an efficient way
* Ensures all services included in the Contract are well defined, properly documented (in the proper Husky systems), and properly scheduled
* Manages customer expectations to ensure complete alignment with the Contract objectives and goals
* Plan and schedule Contract timelines and milestones using the appropriate tools. Responsible for the milestones and deliverables.
* Develop and deliver progress reports, presentations, and other Contract documentation, internally and to the customer.
* Coordinate all activities related to the Contract implementation and ongoing activities.
* Focus should be in the involvement and awareness of the daily activities and issues related to the Contract. Key contact, both internally and customer.
* Ensure customer is satisfied with contract
* Manage and lead weekly call with customer
* Escalate issues when required
* Builds relationship with customers
* Schedule upcoming work with Field Service teams


****Qualifications:****
* Familiar with preform or plastics manufacturing environment. Understands plants KPI.
* Project Management experience
* Mechanical or electrical engineering or equivalent experience
* A minimum of 5 years’ work experience gained in a similar work environment
* Knowledge of injection molding machinery and related mechanical, hydraulic, and electronic technologies considered an asset
* Customer\-focused attitude
* Fluent in English and Hindi language will be an advantage
* Excellent communication and coordination skills
* Strong organizational and project management skills
* Strong negotiation, facilitation, conflict management skills and the ability to professionally interact with team members
* Experience or knowledge of CRM, ERP, CPQ systems
* Sales attitude and capacity to judge business requirements
* Good knowledge of all MS Office applications
* Logical thinking capabilities and continuous improvement attitude


 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

bf26ad80.title: Senior Director AI, Data & Solutions
bf26ad80.description:
**Build** **our** **future** **together:**



Regeneron is founded on the belief that the right idea, combined with the right team, can lead to significant transformations. Our growing global network is dedicated to inventing, developing, and commercializing medicines that change lives for those with serious diseases. In doing so, we are pioneering innovative approaches to science, manufacturing, and commercialization, as well as redefining our understanding of health.



At Regeneron, we are accelerating the adoption of Artificial Intelligence, advanced analytics, and digital innovation to transform how we discover, develop, manufacture, and deliver medicines. We are seeking a Senior Director, AI, Data \& Solutions to provide strategic leadership for our enterprise AI, Data, and Digital Solutions organization. In this role, you will shape and implement the enterprise AI and data strategy, build and lead high\-performing multidisciplinary teams, drive the delivery of transformative AI and analytics solutions, and partner with executive team members to create measurable business and scientific value. You will play a critical role in helping Regeneron remain at the forefront of innovation while ensuring responsible, scalable, and secure adoption of AI and data technologies.


**When** **\&** **where:**



Hyderabad (Hybrid)


**Discover** **your** **role:**


* Develop and implement a comprehensive AI, Machine Learning, and Data strategy aligned with enterprise priorities across research, development, manufacturing, commercial, and corporate functions.
* Serve as an enterprise leader with vision and advocate for AI, analytics, and advanced digital solutions, translating emerging technologies into business and scientific outcomes.
* Accelerate the adoption of Machine Learning, Generative AI, and advanced computational capabilities that support scientific discovery, clinical development, and operational excellence.
* Design and implement scalable, cloud\-native AI and data platforms that enable self\-service analytics, governed data access, and rapid deployment of AI solutions.
* Partner with executive leadership to shape technology and business strategy while providing trusted guidance on AI and data investments.
* Lead executive communications, strategic briefings, and governance forums that provide insight into portfolio performance, business impact, and future opportunities.
* Build, mentor, and inspire a diverse team of AI/ML scientists, data engineers, analytics professionals, and solution architects, fostering a culture of innovation, accountability, and continuous learning.
* Establish strong operating models, communities of practice, and talent development programs to support long\-term organizational growth and capability building.
* Oversee the end\-to\-end delivery of AI, Data, and Digital Solutions programs from concept through implementation and value realization.
* Define and implement delivery standards, engineering procedures, and operating methodologies including Agile, MLOps, and DataOps.
* Establish KPIs and performance metrics to measure solution adoption, operational performance, and business outcomes.
* Lead enterprise data governance, architecture, and compliance initiatives to ensure quality, security, scalability, and regulatory compliance across data and AI platforms.
* Drive innovation and continuous improvement by evaluating emerging technologies, optimizing investment portfolios, and seeing opportunities to create enterprise value through AI and data\-driven solutions.


**This** **role** **requires:**


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related technical discipline.
* Advanced degree or equivalent experience (Master's or PhD) in AI, Data Science, Engineering, or a related field preferred.
* 15\+ years of progressive experience in AI, Data Analytics, Digital Engineering, or advanced computational technologies.
* 10\+ years of leadership experience managing large\-scale teams and senior managers within complex, global organizations.
* Proven experience developing and accomplishing enterprise AI, Machine Learning, and Data Analytics strategies.
* Demonstrated success delivering AI and data platforms and solutions from strategy through production deployment and business value realization.
* Deep expertise in AI/ML technologies including Generative AI, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Agentic Systems, and MLOps platforms.
* Strong experience with cloud\-native data platforms and modern data architecture patterns across AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud environments.
* Expertise in enterprise data governance, data quality, metadata management, and regulatory compliance requirements.
* Broad technology acumen spanning data engineering, solution architecture, infrastructure, security, and API\-based integrations.
* Exceptional strategic thinking, executive presence, communication, stakeholder management, and organizational leadership capabilities.
* Experience in life sciences, biotechnology, pharmaceutical, healthcare, or other highly regulated industries.
* Experience working with GxP\-regulated environments and healthcare data regulations.
* Relevant certifications such as AWS/Azure/GCP Machine Learning certifications, PMP, SAFe, CDMP, or related credentials.
* Proven track record of converting emerging technologies into measurable business outcomes and enterprise transformation initiatives.
* Ability to influence senior collaborators and lead complex digital transformation programs across global organizations.

  

Does this sound like you? Apply now to take your first step towards living the Regeneron Way! We are committed to building a workplace with an inclusive culture. Regeneron is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion or belief (or lack thereof), sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, gender reassignment, marital or civil partnership status, civil status, pregnancy or parental status, age, disability, nationality, citizenship status, ethnic or national origin, membership of the Traveler community, familial status, genetic information, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law. Where required, we will provide reasonable accommodation to applicants with known disabilities or chronic illnesses during the recruitment process, unless such accommodation would impose undue hardship.



Where necessary, we disclose salary ranges for roles in all countries in which we operate. The final offer will be determined within the relevant range based on the country of employment, specific role level, and your skills and experience. In some countries, collective bargaining agreements (CBAs) may apply and influence certain elements of pay or benefits. Regeneron offers a competitive and comprehensive total rewards package which may include, depending on country and role: annual bonuses or other incentive plans, equity awards, pension or retirement benefits, 401(k) company match, health and wellness programs, fitness centers, insurance benefits (e.g. medical, dental, vision, life and disability), paid time off, and family support benefits. For additional information about Regeneron benefits in the U.S., please visit https://careers.regeneron.com/en/working\-at\-regeneron/total\-rewards/. For other locations, additional information will be provided during the recruitment process. If you have any questions, please speak with your recruiter.  



  

Please be advised that at Regeneron, we believe we do our best work when we are together. For that reason, many roles are required to be performed on‑site. Please speak with your recruiter and hiring manager for more information about on‑site expectations for your role and location.

  

As part of the recruitment process, certain background checks may be conducted in accordance with the laws of the country where the position is based. The purpose of such checks is to verify certain information prior to the commencement of employment such as identity, right to work and educational qualifications.

  

For jobs in Canada: this posting is for an existing position.

7bff47d7.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
7bff47d7.description:
**Role Overview**
 The Senior Technical Program Manager will own the planning, coordination, and executionof the strategic programs for Quickbase’s Corporate delivery pod. This is where the systems, data, and AI capabilities that underpin the rest of the business get built: the back\-office platforms and process modernization that IT, Security, HR, and Systems Architecture run on. This role requires a strong operator who can manage technical complexity while also driving alignment across distributed global teams.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who proactively identifies risks before they become issues, creates clarity in ambiguous environments, and keeps teams aligned and moving without creating unnecessary process overhead. The right candidate will be highly organized, technically fluent, execution\-focused, and capable of influencing senior leaders without formal authority.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Lead highly visible, cross\-functional technical programs from initiation through delivery
* Drive execution across the Corporate pod's core stakeholders — IT, Security, HR, Legal, and Systems Architecture — translating their operational needs into structured, deliverable programs
* Program manage back\-office AI pilots and rollouts end to end from scoped pilot through workforce adoption Ensure Jira hygiene and Plan visibility, roadmap alignment, and execution transparency across programs
* Build and maintain integrated program plans with clear milestones, dependencies, owners, and risks
* Establish operational rigor across complex initiatives while keeping teams focused on outcomes rather than bureaucracy
* Identify delivery risks early and drive mitigation strategies before escalation becomes necessary
* Facilitate executive\-level program reviews and provide concise, data\-driven status reporting
* Drive accountability across multiple organizations and time zones
* Improve program management standards, processes, templates, and operating rhythms across the organization
* Manage stakeholder communication across both technical and non\-technical audiences
* Help teams make decisions quickly by creating clarity, surfacing tradeoffs, and removing blockers
* Support strategic company initiatives including product launches, platform modernization efforts, integrations, and operational transformation programs


**Required Qualifications**
**What We Are Looking For**
* 8\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management, Program Management, or related leadership roles
* Proven experience leading large\-scale cross\-functional technical initiatives in SaaS or enterprise software environments
* Strong understanding of software development lifecycles, Agile delivery models, and engineering operations
* Experience working closely with Experience corporate functions — IT, Security, HR, Legal — and with data and technical teams.
* Strong executive communication and stakeholder management skills
* Demonstrated ability to influence without direct authority
* Experience managing programs involving multiple concurrent workstreams and distributed teams
* Strong organizational skills with exceptional attention to detail and follow\-through
* Advanced experience with Jira, Confluence, and program reporting tools
* Ability to synthesize complex information into actionable insights and clear executive updates
* Comfortable operating in fast\-moving environments with changing priorities


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Previous experience as a Jira Administrator
* Experience working with globally distributed teams across Sofia, Bulgaria, North America, and India
* PMP, PgMP, Scrum certification, or equivalent experience


**Characteristics of Success**
**The Strongest Candidates For This Role Will**
* Anticipate risks before others see them
* Create structure in ambiguous situations
* Balance urgency with operational discipline
* Communicate directly, clearly, and professionally
* Hold teams accountable while building strong working relationships
* Stay calm under pressure and maintain forward momentum during complex initiatives
* Know when to escalate and when to solve problems independently
* Focus on outcomes, not process for the sake of process


**How We Think About AI**
 At Quickbase, we view AI as a tool to accelerate how work gets done — not replace it. We encourage thoughtful use of AI to improve speed, quality, and decision\-making, while maintaining strong judgment, accountability, and data integrity.
   

  

**Pay Range**
 ₹2,169,803\.08 \- ₹3,409,690\.56
   

  

**Compensation \& Benefits**
 At Quickbase, we believe in pay transparency and are committed to equitable pay practices.
   

  

**Incentive Compensation**
 This role is eligible to participate in our annual incentive plan. Incentives are earned based on employee performance against defined metrics and company goals.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Full\-time roles are eligible for our comprehensive benefits program which includes medical, dental and vision coverage. You may also contribute to our 401(k) plan that includes a company match.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Statement**
 Quickbase is committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply – even if you don’t meet every qualification listed. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.

e931aebe.title: Solutions Architect
e931aebe.description:
As a Presales Solution Architect, you will collaborate with our sales team to provide technical expertise and support throughout the sales process. You will play a crucial role in understanding customer requirements, presenting our solutions, and demonstrating the value of our products.
 



  





 Your intellectual curiosity and customer\-centric focus drive you to explore new avenues in presales continuously, seeking ways to add tangible value to projects and deliverables. You thrive in high\-pressure environments, maintaining a positive outlook and understanding that career growth is a journey that requires making strategic choices.
 



  





 Your communication skills, both written and verbal, are exemplary, enabling you to convey complex technical concepts clearly and effectively. Additionally, your ability to create effective test strategies ensures that automation solutions align with core values and business objectives. Your approach is characterized by a quality\-first mindset, focusing on building robust, scalable testing frameworks and leading testing efforts across various projects. You are a team player, customer\-focused, self\-motivated, responsible individual who can work under pressure with a positive attitude. You must have experience in managing and handling RFPs/ RFIs, client presentations, and converting opportunities into winning bids. You have excellent verbal and written communication skills. You possess a strong work ethic, a positive attitude, and enthusiasm to embrace new challenges. You can multi\-task and prioritize (good time management skills), willing to display and learn. You should be able to work independently with little or no supervision. You should be process\-oriented, have a methodical approach, and demonstrate a quality\-first approach.
 



  





**Requirements** 




**What you’ll do** 




 As a Solution Architect your expected to have all the below skills:
 



  




* **Architecture \& Design:** 
 Develop high\-level architecture designs for scalable, secure, and robust solutions.
* **Technology Evaluation:** 
 Select appropriate technologies, frameworks, and platforms for business needs.
* **Cloud \& Infrastructure:** 
 Design cloud\-native, hybrid, or on\-premises solutions using AWS, Azure, or GCP.
* **Integration:** 
 Ensure seamless integration between various enterprise applications, APIs, and third\-party services.



  





**Customer Centricity – Soft Skills** 




  




* Communication \- Strong written and oral communication skills
* Interpersonal \- Strong relationship\-building for getting work done efficiently
* Intelligent Probing \- Asking smart questions, in\-depth understanding of the opp. Context
* Collaboration \- Effective use of tools \- Presales templates, MS Teams, OneDrive, Calendars, etc.
* Presentation Skills \- Strong presentation skills and experience presenting to C\-Level executives
* Negotiation \- Resource allocation, response timelines, estimates, resource loading, rates, etc.



  





**Agility – Responsiveness** 




  





 1\) Kickoff \& bid planning \- High reaction speed and quality; identification of the right team.
 



 2\) Adherence to the bid plan \- High reaction speed and quality; identification of the right team 3\) Follow\-ups \& reminders \- Timely and appropriate reminders "
 



 4\) Pro activeness \- Quick risk identification \& highlighting; early identification of key deliverables not directly asked for (e.g., mock\-ups), early win theme identification with the help of key stakeholders.
 



  





**Responsibility – Deliverable Quality \& Process Compliance** 




  





 1\) Language \& articulation \- Consistent, high\-quality language across sections of a proposal; correctness of grammar, punctuation, and appropriate capitalization
 



 2\) Document structure \- Standard template for general proposals; customized structure for specific requests like RFPs; storyboarding for presentations
 



 3\) Completeness \& correctness \- General completeness and according to requirements specified in solicitation documents; correctness of content \- functional, technical, company data, process\-related content, creative content like mock\-ups, etc.
 



 4\) Process compliance \- Regular and timely updates, updating the knowledge repository
 



 5\) Aesthetics \& document formatting \- Quality, consistency/relevance of graphics \- architecture diagrams, mock\-ups, infographics, etc.; consistency of formatting (headings, fonts, indents, bullets, table and diagram captions, text alignment, etc.); adherence to Kanerika standards or client\-specified standards
 



  





**Intelligence – Value Addition** 




 1\) Providing intelligence to the bid team \- Client’s industry, client (general info and their preferences for engagement model, development methodology), competition, "build vs buy" research (if applicable), tentative budget, etc.
 



 2\) Empathy \- Understanding customer’s deeper pain area/s (generally not specified in the solicitation documents) with research and intelligent queries
 



 3\) Baking win themes \- (at times subtly) in all sections of the deliverable/s and strong messaging in the executive summary.
 



 4\)Solution \& estimation validation \- Ability to guide and challenge the solution \& the estimates 5\) Quality of original exec summary \-A strong first pass, with zero objective (factual) errors.
 



  





**Global \- leveraging Organizational Strength** 




 1\) Relevance \& quality of case studies \- Including all relevant success stories,
 



 2\) Leveraging the best contributors \- Specific context of each opportunity
 



 3\) Effective use of past knowledge \- From the past presales deliverables
 



 4\) Effective use of support groups \- Talent management, Information Security, Legal, HR, etc.
 



  





**What you will bring** 



* Must Have Skills
* MBA from a reputed Institute
* 4\+ years of experience working in Presales in the IT industry



  





**Soft Skills** 



* Communication Skills
* Presentation Skills
* Interpersonal relations
* Flexible and Hard\-working



  





**Technical Skills** 



* Knowledge of Presales Processes
* Basic understanding of business analytics and AI
* High IQ and EQ

14f669eb.title: Presales Consultant
14f669eb.description:
**About Hexnode** 




 Hexnode is a
 **global leader in Unified Endpoint Management (UEM)** 
 , trusted by over 100 countries and managing millions of devices worldwide. With a rapid pace of innovation, we have established ourselves as a dominant force across Apple, Windows, Android, macOS, Linux, and tvOS. Fuelling the transformation to a seamless ecosystem of connected tools, Hexnode is revolutionizing the enterprise software and cybersecurity landscape.
 



  





  





**The role** 




 We are seeking a strategic Presales / Solution Consultant with deep expertise in the Cybersecurity and UEM domain. In this Senior role, you will be the technical architect behind our sales success— bridging the gap between complex security requirements and Hexnode’s cutting\-edge solutions. You will drive the presales lifecycle, lead high\-stakes technical engagements, and ensure seamless implementation for our global enterprise clientele.
 



  





  





 If you are passionate about technology and eager to make a real impact, Hexnode has the perfect opportunity for you!
 









  





**Responsibilities** 



* Strategic Architecture: Lead technical discovery sessions to translate complex enterprise business needs into robust, scalable security architectures.
* Executive Demonstrations \& POCs: Command high\-stakes product demonstrations and orchestrate complex Proof\-of\-Concept (POC) deployments that clearly validate Hexnode's value proposition to potential clients.
* Technical Advisory: Serve as a trusted consultant to C\-level executives and IT Directors, providing authoritative guidance throughout the sales cycle.
* Bid Management: Lead the technical response for RFPs/RFIs, ensuring all documentation is meticulous and competitive.
* Cross\-functional Collaboration: Partner with Product and Engineering teams to advocate for customer feature requests and influence the product roadmap.
* Performance Excellence: Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction (CSAT) by overseeing the transition from presales to successful long\-term implementation. Required Skills \&








  





**Qualifications** 



* 8–10 years of proven experience in Presales, Solutions Architecture, or Technical Consulting, with a focus on UEM, MDM, or RMM.
* Deep technical understanding of enterprise\-grade security and device management for global organizations.
* Proven ability to engage, influence, and build credibility with senior decision\-makers, including CTOs, CISOs, and IT Directors. You should be comfortable navigating complex organizational hierarchies to identify and address the pain points of key stakeholders.
* A proven track record of managing complex customer expectations and solving "blocker" technical challenges under pressure.
* An innate ability to distill intricate technical architectures into clear, value\-driven narratives that resonate with both deep\-level engineers and non\-technical business leaders.
* Advanced aptitude for managing customer expectations, rapidly identifying technical "blockers," and negotiating solutions that align client needs with Hexnode’s capabilities. Exceptional public speaking and presentation skills, with a track record of delivering compelling technical pitches to large enterprise audiences and diverse groups of stakeholders in high\-pressure environments.
* Extensive hands\-on experience in the full presales lifecycle—from initial discovery and use\-case mapping to orchestrating persuasive product demonstrations and managing complex Proof\-of\-Concept (POC) success criteria.
* A robust understanding of network security principles (VPN, Proxy, Firewall), Zero Trust frameworks, endpoint protection strategies, and overarching cloud\-integrated IT infrastructure.
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a closely related technical field (preferred). BE/B\-Tech.








  





**Desired Skills (Good to Have)** 



* Prior experience in advanced network security methodologies and comprehensive endpoint management strategies.
* Knowledge of cutting\-edge cloud security concepts, architectures, and associated technologies.








  





 Hexnode is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We welcome and encourage candidates of all backgrounds, identities, and experiences to apply.

34ad925f.title: Senior Presales System Engineer (Cybersecurity) - BFSI
34ad925f.description:
**About the Company** 




  





 As the world’s leading vendor of Cyber Security, facing the most sophisticated threats and attacks, we’ve assembled a global team of the most driven, creative and innovative people. At Check Point, our employees are redefining the security landscape by meeting our customers’ real\-time needs and providing our cutting\-edge technologies and services to an ever\-growing customer base. If you want to make the world a safer place – you belong with us.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 Your role in a nutshell: No two days for a Check Point security engineer are the same, from getting hands on with the most advanced technologies in the market, to learning more about the customer’s most pressing security challenges and playing a crucial part in designing a solution, you’re always at the heart of fascinating projects!
 



  





  





**Responsibilities** 




  




* Winning Sales opportunities by working closely with the partner sales team \- identify prospects, progress sales opportunities and help win them demonstrating the Check Point value\-proposition
* Present the Check Point story at key forums, including partner led customer events \& workshops
* Handholding and jointly conducting POCs and assessments along with partner technical / presales community for prospect customers
* Lead with value\-driven conversations with potential and existing customers with ability identify business problems and provide winning solutions
* Become a trusted Cybersecurity advisor for your partner technical community, handling technical questions, presenting Check Point value with the solutions offered
* Demonstrate strong knowledge on Cybersecurity industry developments including tackling competitive threats in sales opportunities
* Help partners respond to RFI’s \& RFP’s, share best practices, manage Proof\-of\-Concepts that translate to best CX through the sales cycle
* Engage and enable key partners and customers on the latest security technologies
* Demonstrate sales acumen through clever positioning of Check Point’s products for optimum cross\-sell and Upsell along with partners in their base accounts
* Deliver high impact customer engagements, solution design, winning proposals and uphold the leadership position of Check Point
* Participate and showcase Check Point’s solutions during cyber security events



  





  





**Qualifications** 




  




* 10\+ years of proven experience in technology organizations with over 8\+ years of direct system engineering and pre\-sales experience in
 **BFSI and Banking sector**
* Strong customer centricity with focus on delivering the best experience for customers
* Ability to roll\-up the sleeve when required to address gating challenges
* Possess strong analytical and problem solving skills
* Excellent understanding of networking technologies combined with strong understanding of design and applications
* Ability to create an end\-to\-end security solution for a customer’s environment
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Relevant certifications highly preferred, e.g. CCNP / CISSP/ CCSA / CCSE
* An engineering degree in Computer, Electronics or similar disciplines



  





**Required Skills** 



* Strong customer centricity
* Analytical and problem solving skills
* Excellent communication and presentation skills



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Relevant certifications (CCNP / CISSP/ CCSA / CCSE)
* Experience in system engineering and pre\-sales

0bb38142.title: Solution Architect (Bengaluru)
0bb38142.description:
**About The Project**
 We are the development center for Sber's India branch.
   

  

 You have a unique opportunity to participate in building an Automated Banking System (ABS) for Sber's Indian branch from scratch.
   

  

 The system consists of a set of modules \- core, accounting, reporting, credit and non\-credit products, internet banking and anti\-fraud system. You can directly participate in the creation of any of them, influence the architecture, the quality, the processes, the way they should look in the end.
   

  

 Our pros are no legacy, no complicated, hardened processes, modern technology.
   

  

 Our goal is to make our own, small Sber for the foreign market.
   

  

 Part of the team is in Russia, part in India, a great opportunity to work in an international team!
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* lead the design and development of end\-to\-end solutions that meet business requirements, leveraging your expertise in solution architecture.
* translate business requirements into technical specifications that Developers can work with, ensuring that solutions are scalable, reliable, and maintainable.
* provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior team members, ensuring that they are equipped with the skills and knowledge needed to deliver high\-quality solutions.
* stay up\-to\-date with the latest trends and technologies in solution architecture, and apply this knowledge to drive innovation and continuous improvement.
* technical leadership.


**Requirements**
* write well\-structured documentation that is easy for developers to understand, using modern standards and technologies
* ability to independently analyze business requirements and communicate with stakeholders
* minimum of 5 years of experience in architectural design, development experience preferred
* deep knowledge of architectural approaches and practices
* experience in designing and implementing solutions using containerized environments (Docker, OpenShift/Kubernetes)

f3073073.title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
f3073073.description:
**Company Description** 




**Xpance Infotech is a forward\-thinking technology partner that empowers businesses to scale through highly skilled remote talent and smart digital solutions. We specialize in providing top\-tier expertise across AI, software development, data analytics, automation, and enterprise platforms. Our team integrates seamlessly with client organizations to deliver scalable, high\-impact solutions that drive efficiency, innovation, and long\-term growth. At Xpance Infotech, we are committed to becoming a trusted partner in our clients’ success journeys.** 




**Role Description** 




**We are hiring a Cloud Infrastructure Engineer** 
 with
 **3\+ years of experience** 
 . This role offers
 **Remote / Hybrid work flexibility** 
 .
 



 As a Cloud Infrastructure Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining secure, scalable, and highly available cloud environments that support enterprise applications and services. Your day\-to\-day responsibilities will include monitoring system performance, managing servers and networks, implementing backup and disaster recovery strategies, and ensuring infrastructure reliability.
 



 You will collaborate closely with development and operations teams to streamline deployments, troubleshoot infrastructure issues, and enhance security and compliance across systems. Additionally, you will contribute to automation initiatives, maintain documentation, and continuously improve infrastructure processes.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and manage scalable cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Monitor system performance and ensure high availability
* Manage servers, storage, and networking components
* Implement backup, disaster recovery, and security best practices
* Troubleshoot infrastructure, networking, and performance issues
* Collaborate with DevOps and development teams for optimized deployments
* Contribute to automation using Infrastructure\-as\-Code tools
* Maintain documentation for configurations and processes



**Qualifications** 



* Minimum
 **3\+ years of experience** 
 in cloud infrastructure or system engineering roles
* Strong experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Solid system administration skills (Linux/Windows, user access management, performance tuning)
* Good networking knowledge (routing, switching, firewalls, VPNs)
* Understanding of network and cloud security best practices
* Hands\-on experience with troubleshooting infrastructure issues
* Familiarity with
 **Terraform, Ansible, or CloudFormation** 
 (preferred)
* Knowledge of
 **Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines** 
 , and monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch)
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (or equivalent experience)
* Strong communication, documentation, and teamwork skills
* Relevant certifications (AWS, Azure, GCP, CCNA) are a plus

0ba299e6.title: Cloud Engineer
0ba299e6.description:
**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Design, deploy, and maintain cloud\-based infrastructure across platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Automate provisioning, configuration, and monitoring using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools like Terraform or CloudFormation.
* Collaborate with development, security, and operations teams to build CI/CD pipelines and DevOps workflows.
* Monitor cloud systems for performance, reliability, and security; troubleshoot and resolve issues proactively.
* Ensure best practices in cloud architecture, cost optimization, and compliance.
* Manage cloud networking, storage, and compute resources to support business needs.
* Implement backup, disaster recovery, and security protocols across cloud environments.
* Stay up to date with emerging cloud technologies and propose innovative solutions.



  





**Skills and Qualifications:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 2\+ years of hands\-on experience in cloud engineering or DevOps roles.
* Proficiency in at least one major cloud platform: AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Strong knowledge of Linux\-based systems, networking, and containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Experience with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions).
* Familiarity with scripting languages such as Python, Bash, or PowerShell.
* Understanding of security best practices in cloud environments.
* Relevant certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Azure Administrator, or Google Cloud Engineer) are a plus.
* Strong analytical thinking, problem\-solving, and communication skills.

The purpose of this role is to create high\-level application architecture designs across modules and database layers, ensuring alignment with functional requirements and integration guidelines.
  
  

͏
  
  

Area of Responsibility
  
  

Requirement Analysis\-Coordinate with business and development teams to understand application\-specific requirements relating to module\-level needs, data flows, and integration expectations.
  
  

Designing\-Create high level application architecture designs across application and database layers to ensure alignment with defined design guidelines, including frameworks, patterns, protocols, API design.
  
  

Integration assessment and support\-Assess and evaluate application’s interaction with existing systems, databases, and infrastructure to validate integration feasibility.
  
  

Troubleshooting\-Support application testing after deployment and help validate functional behaviour of application design.
  
  

͏
  
͏
  
͏
  
**Mandatory Skills:** Quality Management .
  
  

**Experience:** 8\-10 Years .
  
  

Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

**About Position**

The architect will design scalable, secure, and governed solutions across Power Platform and Dataverse, embed Azure AI capabilities, and lead delivery through Agile practices on Azure DevOps partnering with client stakeholders, engineering leads, and QA to drive technical quality and outcomes.
   

  

* Role: Architect
* Location: Pune
* Experience: Between 12 to 15 Years
* Job Type: Full Time Employment


**What You’ll Do**
* Define solution architecture, design patterns, and reference models across Power Apps, Power Automate, Power Pages, and Copilot Studio.
* Architect robust Dataverse data models entities, relationships, security roles, business rules, and ALM strategy.
* Design and integrate Azure AI services (Azure OpenAI, AI Search, Document Intelligence, ML) into Power Platform solutions.
* Establish CoE governance, environment strategy, DLP policies, licensing optimization, and performance/security best practices.
* Lead Agile delivery using Azure DevOps backlog shaping, sprint planning, CI/CD pipelines, and solution ALM/release management.
* Provide technical leadership and mentoring to engineering and QA teams; conduct design and code reviews.
* Engage client and internal stakeholders on solution roadmaps, estimations, risk, and effort.
* Must\-Have SkillsPower Platform (Power Apps canvas model\-driven, Power Automate, Power Pages, Copilot Studio) architect\-level.Dataverse data modeling, security model, ALM, and solution management.
* Azure AI Azure OpenAI / Cognitive Services / AI Search integration with low\-code solutions.Agile delivery on Azure DevOps pipelines, repos, boards, CI/CD for Power Platform.Integration expertise REST APIs, custom connectors, Dataverse Web API, Azure Functions.
* Strong grasp of identity, security, and governance (Entra ID, RBAC, DLP).Good\-to\-HaveDynamics 365 exposure; Power BI; Azure Logic Apps / Service Bus / API Management.
* Experience setting up a Power Platform Center of Excellence (CoE).Solution estimation, presales, and client\-facing architecture experience.
* Qualifications: CertificationsBachelors/Masters in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent.Preferred: PL\-600 (Power Platform Solution Architect), PL\-400, AI\-102, AZ\-305


**Expertise You’ll Bring**
* Between 12 to 15 Years of relevant experience in a Architect or similar role.
* Strong, hands\-on expertise in Canvas Power Apps, SME \- Presales \- Technical Solutions, Dataverse.


**Educational Background**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field
* Master’s degree (preferred) in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related discipline
* Microsoft certifications such as Power Platform Solution Architect Expert (PL\-600\) are highly preferred
* Certifications in Azure (e.g., Azure Solutions Architect, AI Engineer Associate) are a strong advantage
* Additional certifications in Enterprise Architecture frameworks (TOGAF) or Agile methodologies are a plus

fe15b679.description:
**Position Overview**  
We are looking for an experienced **IT Architect cum Full Stack Developer** to lead the architecture, development, and long\-term growth of organisation's cloud\-based HRMS platform. This role offers the opportunity to grow into a **CTO** with leadership and equity potential.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design and develop a scalable, secure SaaS HRMS.
* Build core HRMS modules (HR, Payroll, Attendance, Leave, Recruitment, ESS/MSS, Compliance, Reports).
* Develop APIs, integrations, and cloud deployment.
* Ensure security, performance, maintenance, and product enhancements.

**Technical Skills**

* **Backend:** .NET Core / ASP.NET Core, Node.js
* **Frontend:** React.js / Angular
* **Mobile:** Flutter / React Native
* **Database:** SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL
* **Cloud:** Azure/AWS, Docker, Git, CI/CD

**Experience \& Qualification**

* 5–10 years of Full Stack Development experience.
* Experience in HRMS, Payroll, ERP, or SaaS products preferred.
* Bachelor's/Master's in Computer Science, IT, MCA, or equivalent.

**Engagement**  
Full\-Time \| Part\-Time Consultant \| CTO with Equity

**Why Join Us?**  
Build a next\-generation HRMS from scratch, work directly with the founders, and shape the company's technology vision with long\-term ownership.

Pay: ₹50,000\.00 \- ₹70,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Cell phone reimbursement
* Flexible schedule
* Internet reimbursement

Experience:

* IT Architect cum Developer: 5 years (Required)

Work Location: In person
